description.value:
Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C

You cause a touched body part or object to shine like a torch, shedding bright light in a 30 ft. radius, and dim light for 20 ft. after that.

name: BOUENKYOU SHIKAKU NO JUTSU (TELESCOPIC VISION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C

You focus Chakra into your eyes, improving sight by allowing you to ignore any distance penalties to Spot checks up to the technique's range. While focused on long range vision, you take a -2 penalty to Spot checks and attack rolls with thrown weapons against creatures and objects within 20 ft.

Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, E, P

You fire a concentrated ball of Chakra that seeks out the highest Chakra signature in the area of effect, dealing 4d6 force damage before bouncing to the next highest Chakra signature, continuing until it has hit 4 targets. Secondary targets take half damage.

If two or more Chakra signatures are even, determine which is hit first randomly.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6 and the number of secondary targets by 1 (maximum 8d6 damage and 7 secondary targets).

Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C

You channel up to 1 Chakra per level to linger around you as a buffer, able to grant various benefits. Each round, you can channel another 5 Chakra into the buffer as a free action, increasing the duration by 1 round. If your Chakra would be drained or drawn from by an outside source (such as a Kage Bunshin or a Chakra Vampire), the Chakra in the buffer is expended first (does not include Chakra damage).

Projectiles: As a full-round action, you can fire one projectile of light per 2 Chakra spent from the buffer. Each projectile requires a ranged touch attack, and deals 1d4 force damage.

Shield: As an instant action, you can gain DR 1/-, energy resistance 1 against a specific type of energy or negate 1 die of fall damage per 2 Chakra spent from the buffer (up to 20 Chakra).

Technique: The Chakra can be used to perform a Chakra Control, Genjutsu or Ninjutsu technique. The technique's Perform Time is reduced by 1 step (techniques requiring more than one round are unaffected) and its Cost is increased by 50% (rounded up), but is (partially) paid for by the buffer.

If the buffer is empty at the end of your turn or when its duration ends, the technique ends and any remaining Chakra dissipates.

Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C

A simple exercise in Chakra control, you create a glowing orb, shedding bright light in a 30 ft. radius, and dim light for 20 ft. after that. As a move action, you can move the light anywhere within the technique's range.

Alternatively, you can make your hand emit the same amount of light for 1 minute per level.

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C, Mas

You channel Chakra into your hand and can burn off the Chakra in explosive tags, sunburst tags and similar Chakra-based devices by touching them, essentially defusing them.

Mastery: Each step allows you to use this technique an additional time per day as a defensive maneuver. Step one increases the maximum CR to 5.

Each additional step increases the maximum CR by 5.

name: CHAKRA UTSUSHI NO JUTSU (CHAKRA REVEALING TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Chakra Control

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 3

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C

The Chakra Threads animating the target light up and become more clearly visible, granting anyone trying to see than a +8 bonus to the Spot check to do so. The creature who created the Threads can make a save to reduce the bonus to +2.

target.value: An object or creature animated with Chakra Threads

description.value:
Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 0

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, Mas

You shrink yourself by one size (minimum Tiny), gain- ing the following effects:

- +1 size bonus to Defense and attack rolls
- +2 Dexterity, but -2 Strength and Constitution
- +4 size bonus to Hide checks
- Damage die of your unarmed and natural attacks are reduced by one step.
- Your physical size is halved.
- Your weight is reduced by two thirds.
- +1 bonus to Chakra Control checks.
- +1 bonus to Concentration checks.

Your equipment does not shrink with you.

Mastery: Each step grants a +1 bonus to Concentration checks made to avoid losing control of the technique. The third step allows you to increase the Cost to 3 to change the duration to 1m/level (D). The fifth step allows you to increase the Cost to 6 to change the duration to 10m/level (D).

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: C

A basic technique taught to most academy students, granting you a +4 enhancement bonus to Jump checks and a 5 ft. movement speed increase, which does not stack with other non-permanent movement speed increases. If you benefit from a running start, the Jump bonus increases to +5.

Type: Chakra Control

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, S

As Gamiyari, but you can harden up to 5 sheets of paper per level, and can harden 1 piece of Chakra-bearing paper per 3 levels (up to 5).

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, Mas

Gathering Chakra in your feet, you gain a +20 bonus to Jump checks.

Mastery: The third step allows you to perform this technique as a Swift action instead.

Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 1

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 15

Components: C

Your effective Chakra Signature appears to be one category higher than it really is for creatures Sensing Chakra (up to Overwhelming). You cannot Suppress Chakra while this technique is in effect.

name: DOKU HAKKEN NO JUTSU (POISON DETECTION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Chakra Control

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 2

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C

You focus your senses and become able to immediately tell if a creature in range is poisoned or not by reading their body's functions. A successful Wisdom check (DC 20) can determine which kind of poison is affecting such a target.

Type: Chakra Control

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C

You turn 3 Diminutive or Tiny paper objects per level into solid and sharp improvised weapons, which can be wielded as melee or thrown weapons with a range increment of 10 ft. The weapon's base damage is 1d3 for Diminutive objects (advanced seals, exploding tags, playing cards, etc.) and 1d4 for Tiny objects (an average size sheet of paper). Once a hardened object is no longer held by you, it returns to its previous state after one round.

This technique cannot solidify more than one Chakra-bearing object (like an exploding tag or advanced seal) among the objects it affects. If such an object is thrown and hits a creature, they are denied a Reflex save against the object, unless it is removed before it activates.

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 1

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, E

You create a current of spinning Chakra in your hand which knocks a touched creature or unattended object back 5 ft. If a creature encounters a solid surface while being pushed back, it suffers 1d3 nonlethal damage for every 5 ft. of knockback remaining. The surface suffers the same damage. If the target was a held object, its holder can make a Strength check (DC 16) to keep hold of it. If it fails, the object lands in a square of your choice, within 5 ft. Equipment that aids against being disarmed may grant the target bonuses or make it impossible for it to lose its grip on the object (GMs discretion).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the knockback distance by 5 ft. (maximum 50 ft., or 25 ft. for a held object) and increase the Strength check DC to keep hold of an object by 1. Every 3 Chakra spent on this technique (total) increases its Perform Requirements by 1.

Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: None

This technique functions as Genjutsu Kai. The bonus to the dispel check is up to +15.

Mastery: Each step increases the maximum bonus to the dispel check by +2. The fifth step allows you to pay double the cost to make two dispel checks, either against the same effect or two separate ones. Obtaining mastery requires you to be ECL 8 for the first step, +2 for each additional step.

Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C, Mas

You temporarily halt the target's Chakra flow in order to dispel a genjutsu effect on them (see the technique descriptions to see if they can be dispelled).

To use this technique, you must be aware that you or the target is under a genjutsu effect (you have failed a save to disbelief but are aware that it is present, you have identified a Genjutsu as it was performed or you have analyzed and identified a Genjutsu after it was performed (See Genjutsu, p42) and can only dispel an effect that was forcefully applied to the target (not any effect that it had placed upon itself). It must be used on a currently active effect, and so cannot be used to reverse the effects of a genjutsu that has already expired.

To dispel the effect, you must be able to describe its approximate effects (i.e. 'I dispel the effect making me sleepy') and make a dispel check (d20 + 1 per rank of Chakra Control you have, up to +10) against the genjutsu's save DC plus 2. Success means you end the genjutsu's effects for the target. Any other creatures still affected remain so, and a genjutsu affecting an ongoing area remains in effect. The target does not become immune against any future applications of the effect.

You can use this technique dispel techniques that you've performed yourself with a simple touch, without the need to spend Chakra or make a dispel check.

Mastery: The fifth step allows you to pay double the cost to make two dispel checks, either against the same effect or two separate ones.

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C

You bring yourself into a kind of artificial hibernation. Your pulse slows to an imperceptibly low pace, your body temperature starts to go down and you are paralyzed while the technique lasts. In effect, you appear to be dead, though a Treat Injury check (DC 35) can reveal that you are merely pretending. You can dismiss the technique as a move action.

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: C

You focus Chakra into your nostrils, gaining the Scent Extraordinary quality, when you come within 5 ft. of the source of a scent, you must make a Wisdom check (DC 15) to pinpoint it.

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C

You concentrate Chakra in your legs to propel yourself upward, gaining a +40 bonus to Jump checks and becoming unrestricted in jump height.

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 2

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 14

Components: C

You focus Chakra into your nose to amplify your sense of smell, gaining the ability to detect odors and smells you normally wouldn't be able to.

You gain an ability similar to Scent, but it's range is reduced to 10 ft. (20 ft. upwind, 0 ft. downwind). A particularly odorous source can be detected downwind at 10 ft. (strong scent) or 15 ft. (overpowering scent). When you come within 5 ft. of the source, you must make a Wisdom check (DC 20) in order to pinpoint its location. You are also not capable of tracking by smell.

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C

You conceal your scent, and make a Hide check using your Intelligence bonus rather than your Dexterity bonus, which can be retried once every 5 minutes as a full-round action (you must use the new result).

Any creature attempting to detect or locate you using Scent must make a Survival check, opposed by the last Hide check made for this technique (they take a -8 penalty if they cannot track by scent) in order to do so successfully. If a creature has at least 10 HD less than you, it cannot detect your scent at all.

Type: Chakra Control

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 28

Components: C, E

You gather your Chakra into your hands, and send it forth as a shimmering ball of energy.

Make a ray attack against the target. If it hits, the ray explodes in a burst of energy dealing 8d6 damage (half force, half sonic). It the ray misses, it will explode on the first solid surface it strikes within range (if any).

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 13d6. Doing so increases the perform time to one round, and increases the Burst radius by 5ft for every 2 additional damage dice.

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C

You force Chakra through the pores of your skin, hardening it for protection and gaining a +1 natural armor bonus to Defense.

name: KAYOU YUUGYOU NO WAZA (METHOD OF RAPID SWIMMING)

description.value:
Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 1

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C

While swimming, you do not need to make a skill check in calm waters, and move up to half your speed as a move action, or your full speed as a full-round action. If the waters are not calm, the Swim check DC is reduced by 5.

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 12 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 11

Components: C

You focus Chakra to your feet, allowing yourself to stick to surfaces such as walls and ceilings, capable of walking on them as though they were normal floors, suffering no penalties. When walking on a slippery or perfectly smooth surface, a Chakra Control check (DC 10) must be made every round to avoid falling as if tripped (see below). This technique will not grant you its benefits on ice-covered surfaces.

If you hang upside down, you suffer a cumulative -1 penalty to attack rolls and skill checks every 2 rounds, lasting only while you remain upside down. If you are tripped while upside down, you fall at a rate of 200 ft. per round, increasing by 50 ft. per round, without getting the chance to catch yourself. If you are tripped on a vertical surface, you can make a Climb check (DC 15) to catch yourself, though you will be considered prone.

While falling and within 10 ft. of a solid, vertical surface, you may perform this technique to reduce the fall speed by 90 ft. If you reduce your fall speed by at least one quarter in a single round, you stop falling and will be standing on the surface used to slow the fall.

When you land on a wall or similar surface, you can use this technique as a free action that does not provoke attacks of opportunity. Doing so increases the Perform Requirements by 5, and doubles the Chakra cost.

On the round this technique would end, you can spend a free action and pay the technique's Cost to extend its duration, as if you had just used it again.

name: MUGEN IBUKI NO JUTSU (AIR SUPPLY TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, H

You use Chakra to modify the composition and quantity of air in your lungs, allowing you to 'breathe' in any area without needing to inhale or exhale.

You are immune to strangulation, drowning and suffocation, and can run at your maximum speed without getting short of breath.

In the last round of the technique's duration, you can perform the technique again as a move-equivalent action to renew its duration.

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C

If hit, the subject becomes paralyzed for the duration of this technique. Each round, the subject can make an Intelligence check (DC 15) to take either a move or attack action normally, or take its full turn as normal if it beat the DC by 5 or more. Two consecutive successful checks will end the effect. Creatures without a discernible anatomy (such as oozes) and those immune to sneak attacks or critical hits are immune to this effect.

Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, Mob

You send out a burst of Chakra that deals 3d6 force and 1d6 fire damage. The explosion damages unattended objects, though will not set fire to them, and it will blow out small fires (such as candles) within 15 ft. of the center of the blast.

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, E

You push out a mass of wild Chakra, knocking back all creatures 1d4+1 x 5ft away from you and having them fall prone. This technique registers as a Strong Chakra activity for those sensing Chakra.

Empower: Spend 4 Chakra once to deal 2d6 force damage to all creatures in the area (no save).

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, Mas

You gain an energy resistance to acid, cold, earth, electricity, fire, water and wind of 1 per level.

Mastery: Each step allows you to use this technique an additional time per day as a defensive maneuver. Step one increases the maximum CR to 5.

Each additional step increases the maximum CR by 5.

Type: Chakra Control

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 12 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 11

Components: C

You repair torn or damaged fabric, recovering it for 1 HP each round while touching it. This technique cannot mend complex fabrics, nor can it restore clothing or fabric that was completely destroyed.

Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C

You create a weightless blade of Chakra which appears in your hand, and instantly dissipates if it leaves your grasp. The blade has the same statistics as a short sword made for a creature of your size. It is a Chakraenhanced weapon, has 4 HP and 6 hardness. and can only be damaged by Chakra-enhanced attacks.

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C, E, Mas

You gather Chakra in a specific part of your body (like a fist or foot) and attack with the body part, pushing out the Chakra at the same time.

Make an unarmed attack against the target, gaining a +1 damage bonus of the appropriate type.

Empower: Spend 1 additional Chakra to increase the damage bonus by +1, up to +1 per level or +6 total. Increase the Perform Requirements by 1 for every 2 Chakra spent to empower the technique.

Mastery: The fifth step grants an additional +1 damage to the attack, and increases the amount to which you can empower it by +1 as well.

name: SHINOBI HIKEN: CHAKRA TOUSHI (SHINOBI SECRET: CHAKRA SIGHT)

description.value:
Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, S

You focus Chakra into your body, partially activating your bloodline. Your eyes change in appearance as if the bloodline were active, and if your bloodline can gain the ability to See Chakra, you are capable of doing so while the technique lasts. This does not grant any other benefits, nor does it activate the bloodline or allow you to activate it for free.

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C

You can effortlessly leap into the sky, and gain a +60 bonus to Jump checks. In addition, the maximum height cap on jumps is removed while this technique is active.

name: SUMI NAMARU NO JUTSU  (INK CONCEALMENT TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C

Often used by couriers carrying vital documents, this technique turns the target page or scroll into a basic, blank version of itself, removing all writing, imagery, watermarks and other identifying features. A creature with the same Chakra Signature as the one who used this technique can concentrate for a fullround action while holding the object to restore it to its previous state. Any information put onto the scroll after it was erased will be removed to make way for the original contents.

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: C

You can stand and move normally on non-harmful liquid surfaces (water, oil, etc. but not lava, acid, etc.). Using this technique while underwater will not automatically cause you to surface. If the liquid behaves as rough water (such as a fast-flowing river), you must make a Balance check (DC 15) each round to avoid being reduced to half your normal speed.

On liquid behaving as stormy water (such as whitewater rapids or open water during a hurricane), you must make a Balance check (DC 20) each round to avoid being reduced to one-quarter your normal speed.

When you would fall into or land on water, you can use this technique as an instant action, suffering a -20 penalty to the Perform Requirements and paying double the Cost.

On the round this technique ends, you may spend a free action and pay the Cost to renew its duration.

name: UNKI TATE NO JUTSU (WARMTH SHIELD TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Chakra Control

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C

You surround yourself with a thin layer of insulating Chakra to shield you from cold weather. If the outside temperature is between 40°F and 10°F (4°C and -12C°), you will not suffer any adverse effects of cold weather,and will feel as though the temperature was moderate.

Mastery: Each step decreases the minimum temperature at which this technique works by 2°F (-1°C), down to 0°F (-17°C).

Type: Chakra Control (Body)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C

A basic traversal and Chakra Control technique in the category of Kinobori or Tadayou, this basic skill lets you walk on snow or ice without hindrance.

When walking on snow or ice, you suffer no movement penalties and need not make Tumble checks to move across a slippery surface of ice. You still leave tracks in the snow. When used in conjunction with Kinobori, you can even walk up ice-covered surfaces. Should the Koori Tanjou no Jutsu technique be used, you do not need to make a Balance check to remain standing on the surface it creates.

name: ZENSHIN FUZUI NO JUTSU (COMPLETE PARALYSIS TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 28

Components: C

The target is completely paralyzed. This technique immediately ends once the target has taken 1 damage per level or more.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 20

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 7

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: H

This highly forbidden technique lets you transfer part of a willing donor's Chakra into a willing creature, which will take on the donor's appearance and skills as a result. To do so, the target must be the same creature type, race, size and age category as the donor, and its current Chakra Pool must be lower than the donor's. The donor must pay one third of it's maximum Chakra Pool as the technique is performed. If you are the donor, the base Chakra cost becomes 0 (you must still pay one third of your maximum Chakra Pool).

The target becomes a virtually perfect clone of the donor, acting and thinking as they do, though the clone will follow your mental commands and the donor's as long as it is within 1 mile, with your orders taking priority. Both you and the donor can also see through the clone's eyes as long as it is within 5,000 ft.

The clone has all the donor's ability scores, taking a 2 penalty to Intelligence, Wisdom and Charisma, and has one-third of the donor's maximum Chakra Pool and HP. In addition, it has all templates and bloodlines of the donor, including Moujuu Aishou, though the animal companion will prioritize the donor's orders over the clone's.

The clone has all feats, talents and special abilities the donor has, and knows and can use any techniques of Rank 8 or lower that are known by the donor.

The clone counts as 7 levels lower than the donor to determine its Challenge Rating and the effectiveness of any level-dependent variables of abilities, techniques and the like, and suffers an inherent -4 penalty to attack rolls, saves, Defense and skill checks.

If the clone is slain or the technique expires, it returns to its original form, and both you and the donor will know it has been slain after 1d4+1 rounds.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 3

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C, H

You increase your size and grow one size category, gaining the appropriate bonuses (+2 Strength, -2 Dexterity, +2 Constitution, -1 size penalty to Defense and attack rolls, +4 to Grapple checks, -4 to Hide checks and unarmed damage increases by one step). While grown, you occupy a 10ft square, and gain a reach of 10 ft. Any worn and equipped items grow with you, gaining a size category (weapon damage increases accordingly).

If you are hit by a ranged or melee attack dealing greater damage than your Constitution score, you must succeed at a Fortitude save (DC 20) to avoid having the technique end immediately.

You can refresh the duration of the technique by spending a move action and its Chakra cost.

When used, you must eat twice as much food the following day or become fatigued. If used without having the Akimichi Toughness feat, you become exhausted.

name: BUBUN BAIKA NO JUTSU (PARTIAL MULTI-SIZE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, S

You temporarily increase the size of your arm or leg to deliver a powerful strike against any creature, gaining 15 ft bonus reach while doing so. The attack is a Slam attack, dealing damage as though you were two sizes larger (a Medium-size human's normal Slam attack deals 1d3 damage, becoming 1d6 with this technique). If you do not have the Akimichi Toughness feat, you become fatigued.

name: CHOU BAIKA NO JUTSU (MEGA MULTI-SIZE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 18

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, H

This technique is simply a more extreme version of Baika no Jutsu and functions identically to it, with the following exceptions:

You grow two sizes, and the bonuses and penalties increase to +8 Strength, -4 Dexterity, +4 Constitution, +3 natural armor bonus to Defense, -2 size penalty to Defense and attack rolls, +8 to Grapple checks and -8 to Hide checks. You occupy a 15 ft square, and the Fortitude save DC to maintain the transformation becomes 18. Size increases from techniques do not stack.

When used, you must eat three times as much food the following day or become fatigued. If used without having the Akimichi Toughness feat, you become exhausted instead.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 3

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, Mas

This technique can only be used while you are affected by Baika no Jutsu. You roll yourself up like an armadillo and spin, crushing enemies in the area for 2d6 bludgeoning damage, plus double your Strength modifier. At the end of your turn, you become nauseated until the end of your next turn (Fortitude DC 14 negates).

Mastery: The first four steps increase the range by 5 ft each. The fifth step adds the Shapeable (S) effect to the area.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 7

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 31

Components: C, H

1d6 Minutes after this technique is used outside, clouds form over the area and pouring rain falls down.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 6

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 20

Components: H

You infuse falling rain with Chakra, turning it into a dragon of rain that circles the area. Each round, you can direct the dragon to attack a creature within the area, making a touch attack at a +12 bonus, dealing 2d6+2 water damage. Creatures hit must save against poison (Fortitude DC 15, primary and secondary damage 1d4 temporary Wisdom damage). This technique can only be used in a rainy area.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 4

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 18

Components: H

The target must be reasonably wet (such as standing in the rain) or immersed in water. The subject suffers a -2 penalty to saves against Raiton techniques, and such techniques deal 1 bonus damage to him per 2 Ranks (minimum +1).

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 4

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, H

This technique can only be used if it is raining within the area of effect, and it turns the rain into acid for a short time, dealing 4d6 acid damage to creatures and structures in the area. Structures take double damage, and creatures can make a save for half damage.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H

Rainfall within the area turns to iron for a short time, dealing 6d8 damage to all creatures and structures in the area (if there is no rain, nothing happens). Structures cannot make a save for half damage, and they take double damage if their entire width is encompassed by the area.

name: NINPOU: SHIGAI KAIJIN (NINJA ART: BODY DESTRUCTION)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 4

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: F, Mas, Mob

This special technique is mainly used by ANBU and Hunter-Nin forces, and attempts to mangle a body beyond recognition. The check DC for any creature attempting to perform a forensics investigation on the body is increased by 5. If performed in one minute, the increase is 10 instead. This technique does not stack with itself: simply apply the highest modifier from among the effects.

Mastery: Each step improves the DC increase by +1, or +2 if performed in one minute.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 13 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 29 | Successes: 7

Perform: 17 | Perform DC: 33

Components: C, M, S

A secret technique of the powerful Deidara of Akatsuki, this skill allows you to use your finesse and artful nature to create animated clay figurines that can take any animal form, such as a bird or a spider, and are highly explosive. The power, Chakra cost and the amount of clay required vary based on the size of the sculpture. The technique costs 2 Chakra per d8 of damage:

Tiny (3 lbs): The sculpture deals up to 7d8 fire damage in a single 5 ft square. It has a +15 bonus to Hide and Move Silently, a Defense of 17 and 6 HP.

Small (6 lbs): The sculpture deals up to 9d8 fire damage in a 10 ft Burst. It has a +9 bonus to Hide and Move Silently, a Defense of 14 and 9 HP.

Medium (9 lbs): The sculpture deals up to 11d8 fire damage in a 20 ft Burst. It has a +4 bonus to Hide and Move Silently, a Defense of 11 and 17 HP.

The sculptures a created in your square or an adjacent one, and the sculptures can move up to 30 ft per round, by your mental command. You can spend three times the amount of clay required to allow a sculpted bird to fly 30 ft per round with clumsy maneuverability.

As chakra constructs, the sculptures carry as much Chakra as was used to create them. If a sculpture is killed, drained of all Chakra or if its duration expires, it becomes an inanimate, harmless clay sculpture. Sculptures are immune to mind-affecting effects, sneak attacks and critical hits.

As a free action on your turn, you can make any sculpture(s) you see explode, dealing their exploding damage. Creatures are allowed a Reflex save for half damage.

name: KIBAKU NENDO: C3 NO BAKUHATSU (EXPLODING CLAY: C3 EXPLOSION)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 25

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, M, S

You focus immense destructive power into a Small, flying bird sculpture, having statistics according to Kibaku Nendo, but its flight speed is doubled, and the explosion is a 100 ft Burst that deals 13d8 fire damage.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 3

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: Mob, E

The first step of a two-part combo, the user strikes the target with a single unarmed attack, dealing normal damage. If the target is hit, it must make a Fortitude save or be knocked back 30 ft and become unable to act for 1 round. This technique can be used once per encounter, and requires the Kairiki technique to be active on the user.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the save DC by 1 (maximum +5).

name: NIGEKI RENDAN - HARU NO SHUURAI (TWO-HIT COMBO - FALL OF THE BLOSSOM)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: Mob, E

You charge a creature that failed its save against Nigeki Rendan - Hana on your previous turn. If you are not under the effects of the Kairiki technique or are unable to charge the target, you cannot use this technique. This technique can be used once per encounter.

Make an unarmed charge attack against the target. On hit, the attack deals an additional 5d6 damage and knocks the target prone.

Empower: Spend 3 Chakra to increase the damage by 2d6, up to 1d6 per level or 11d6 total.

target.value: One creature affected by Nigeki Rendan - Hana

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 5

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 22

Components: E, H

This powerful assassination technique focuses lightning Chakra into one of your hands, which will be unable to hold items while charged, but can still be used to make hand seals or half seals without danger. You can apply the weapon focus feat to the chidori. Wielding it in your off-hand incurs a -4 penalty to attack rolls (halved with Two-Weapon Fighting feat). A chidori can be used for two-weapon fighting, counting as a light weapon. Attacks made with the charged hand are touch attacks dealing 1d8 piercing and 2d6 electric damage, not adding your Strength modifier. On a critical hit, only the piercing damage is doubled. A chidori can be used to make sneak attacks.

When active, the bright light and loud 'chirping' noise the technique makes allows enemies to easily detect the user with a Spot or Listen check (DC 5). When used in conjunction with Taijutsu: Ougi - Rendan Kidouki, you gain a +3 damage bonus.

A chidori can be used to make a charge attack with the Ryuutsuki technique. Doing so makes you suffer from the usual -2 penalty to Defense despite of Ryuutsuki, and you are denied your Dexterity bonus to Defense until your next turn.

In return, you can empower Chidori (see below). The chidori used for the attack is discharged if the attack hits, and you cannot score a critical hit for this attack.

Empower: If you use the Ryuutsuki technique to make a charge attack with a chidori, you can spend 3 Chakra to increase its damage by 1d8 piercing and 1d6 electric (maximum 1 damage die per level or 7d8 piercing and 8d6 electric, whichever is lower).

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 6

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 28

Components: H

Though weaker than Chidori, this technique is more practical as it lasts longer and is easier and cheaper to perform. The effects are similar to those of Chidori (except as noted above), with the following exceptions:

Attacks with a Raikiri deal 1d8+1 piercing, 1d6+1 sonic and 1d4+1 electric damage, and have a critical of (18-20, x2).

Raikiri does not gain special bonuses when used with Taijutsu: Ougi - Rendan Kidouki.

When combined with Ryuutsuki, a Raikiri cannot be empowered, but it will deal triple damage on hit, or quadruple damage if it is a critical hit.

name: SUIKOUSANDAN NO JUTSU (TRIPLE SHARK WATER BLAST TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 5

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: F, Mas, S

This advanced version of Suikoudan no Jutsu creates three sharks of water, each targeting one creature (not necessarily a different creature). The sharks each deal 7d6 damage.

Mastery: The fifth step increases the damage per shark to 8d6.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 22

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 7

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 32

Components: C, H, M

This powerful seal is used by the main house of the Hyuuga clan, to brand those of the branch house, serving to keep them in check by allowing a sufficiently skilled member of the main house to use Rakuinshou no Kizu to cause pain or even death. Upon completion, the target is fatigued for 2d6+2 hours.

The seal takes up a seal slot, and can only be removed by someone with the same Chakra signature as the one who placed it. If the subject dies, its bloodline and templates (if any) become sealed, making it look as though they had no bloodline or template(s) at all.

name: RAKUINSHOU NO KIZU (WOUNDS OF THE BRANDED)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: S

This technique was created by the main house of the Hyuuga clan in conjunction with Itami no Rakuin to keep the branch house(s) serving loyally. It is mainly taught to those of the main house once they reach the rank of Chuunin. The target must be affected by Itami no Rakuin, and suffers one of the following effects (your choice):

- Headache: The subject is dazed for 1 round.
- Intense Pain: The subject is stunned for 1d4 rounds (Fortitude negates).
- Severe Pain: The subject suffers 5d6 damage (Fortitude halves).
- Death Penalty: The subject must make a save against massive damage.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 3

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 14

Components: C, H

Your forearms, hands, shins and feet turn to stone, allowing your unarmed attacks to deal damage as though you were one size larger and deal lethal damage. You gain a +2 bonus to Strength checks made to break items or structures, as well as a +2 bonus to Climb checks, but take a -5 penalty to Move Silently and Swim checks. In the round this technique ends, you can spend a move action to refresh the duration, spending Chakra as though performing it to do so.

name: ISHIMARU RYU: NIDAN DACHI (ISHIMARU STYLE: SECOND STANCE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 3

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: None

As Ishimaru Ryu: Shodan Dachi, except as above, and you also gain a +2 competence bonus to unarmed attack rolls. If an unarmed attack made by you kills or disables an opponent (such as unconsciousness by lethal damage), you may make an attack of opportunity against any creature adjacent to you.

name: ISHIMARU RYU: SANDAN DACHI (ISHIMARU STYLE: THIRD STANCE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 4

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: None

As Ishimaru Ryu: Nidan Dachi. You gain a +4 bonus to attack rolls made to confirm critical hits with unarmed attacks.

name: ISHIMARU RYU: SHODAN DACHI (ISHIMARY STYLE: FIRST STANCE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 2

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: Mob

You enter a special fighting stance, and gain a +2 competence bonus to unarmed damage rolls.

name: DAISUKEBEI NO KAZE (WIND OF THE GREAT LECHER)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 3

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 14

Components: H

This supremely perverted technique has been forbidden by many a women's rights organisation. You focus Chakra around the target, causing a sharp wind to shred all of their non-mastercraft clothing, completely destroying them. Functional equipment like shuriken holsters is unaffected.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, S

You infuse a held Rasengan with fire Chakra, turning it into a fierce, blazing orb. The Rasengan's damage is increased by 1d6 and now deals fire damage. Targets hit catch on fire and deal 2d6 fire damage to any object or creature that comes within 5 ft of it while it is being knocked back by the Rasengan. A Reflex save (DC 15) can halve this proximity damage.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

Your hair hardens and expands, encasing you in a protective shell granting you a +4 natural armor bonus to Defense. Any creature in your square takes 2d6 piercing damage. If a creature misses you with an unarmed attack, natural melee weapon, or a Small or smaller melee weapon, it suffers 2d6 piercing damage.

While encased, you cannot attack or perform techniques, but you can make a touch attack when you move through an occupied square to deal 2d6 piercing damage.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 12 | Successes: 2

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 11

Components: Mob

Created by a young Jiraiya to spy on the women's baths, this technique nonetheless has some practical uses. You gain a +4 bonus to Spot checks, and can see 20 ft further before suffering range penalties to your Spot checks. As long as you remain within the square in which you used this technique, you gain a +2 bonus to Hide checks.

Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 4

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: E, H

A frozen spirit dragon flies from your outstretched hand, dealing 4d6 cold damage.

Empower: Spend 4 Chakra to increase the damage to 4d10 cold damage.

Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: E, H

Two ice dragons circle the area, creating a small tornado of freezing cold that deals 6d6 cold damage to creatures within the area.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 10d6 total.

name: KAO UTSUSHI NO JUTSU (FACE COPY TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 5

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

You touch a creature of the same size category as you, allowing your body to morph into an exact replica as you assume the target's appearance, voice and scent, and your Chakra signature seems identical to the target, though any item or ability requiring the target's Chakra Signature will not work for you. You may suffer penalties if they are missing a limb you would ordinarily have, but do not gain any ability scores or special benefits from their shape.

While transformed, your body is less resistant to pain, incurring a -2 penalty to Fortitude saves and reducing your MAS by 15 (if it was 50) or 5. Creatures that can See (Through) Chakra can make a Spot check (DC 25) to see a pattern of Chakra around you, after which a Ninjutsu check (DC 21) identifies it as a transformation technique.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 4

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: F, S

You carve glowing runes into your skin, granting you Darkvision out to 60 ft. You take 2 damage every time you attempt to perform this technique.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 4

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, E, F, S

You carve glowing runes into your skin, creating a dormant seal that can be activated as an instant action to grant you a +2 competence bonus to a single Will save, opposed level or caster check or a +4 competence bonus to a single Concentration check. The seal can be activated only if its bonus would be used, and disappears afterwards. You take 3 damage every time you attempt to perform this technique. Your body cannot carry more than one Acuity seal.

Empower: Spend double the Chakra and double the damage dealt to yourself to double the bonuses granted. Doing so makes you unable to use this technique or Ketsuyoujutsu: Gouki for 24 hours.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 5

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, E, F, S

You carve glowing runes into your forehead that quickly fade to black, allowing you to manipulate your brain in special ways. The seal is dormant until activated as a free action. After its effects have been applied, the seal vanishes. The seal can be used for three different purposes:

Resist Death: You can perform a strenuous action while at 0 HP, without being reduced to -1 HP after.

Ignore Wounds: You can act normally at -1 HP or lower, as though having the Remain Conscious class ability. Lasts for 10 rounds, or until healed to 0 HP or above.

Memorize/Recall: You memorize a single page worth of text, numbers, images or script, even if you do not understand their meaning. The memory is heavily suppressed, and cannot be accessed by anyone, even those reading your mind. When activated, the memory is released with perfect clarity.

Each time you activate the seal, you become mentally exhausted, taking a -1 cumulative penalty to Intelligence and Charisma based checks until you rest for 8 hours. You take 4 damage every time you attempt to perform this technique. After the seal has been used, you must wait 24 hours before being able to apply it to yourself again.

Empower: Double the Chakra cost and the damage dealt to yourself to allow for two activations before the seal vanishes. In case of the memorize function, you can choose to have the memory suppressed again after the first activation, or simply memorize something else.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 4

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, E, F

You carve glowing runes into your skin, granting you a +2 competence bonus to a skill of your choice. You take 1 damage every time you attempt to perform this technique.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the bonus to +3

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 4

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, E, F, S

You carve glowing runes into your skin, creating a dormant seal that can be activated as an instant action. When activated, you gain a +2 competence bonus to a single Fortitude save, improved to +4 against a poison or disease effect, or DR 3/Chakra against a single physi- cal attack. The seal can be activated only if its bonus would be used immediately, and disappears afterwards.

You take 2 damage every time you attempt to perform this technique. Your body cannot carry more than one Fortitude seal.

Empower: Spend double the Chakra and double the damage dealt to you to double the bonuses granted. Doing so makes you unable to use this technique or Ketsuyoujutsu: Eibin for 24 hours.

name: KETSUYOUJUTSU: HEBIGAN NO IN (BLOOD SORCERY: SNAKE EYE SEAL)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 4

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: F, S

You carve glowing runes into your skin, which fade to black, granting you low-light vision. You take 1 damage every time you attempt to perform this technique.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 6

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, E, F, S

You carve glowing runes into your skin, dealing 3 damage to yourself even if you fail to perform this technique. The seal activates instinctively whenever anyone tries to apply a seal to you, such as by a sealing technique or a crafted item (exploding tag, sealing tag, etc). When activated, the seal deals 5 points of damage to the creature applying the seal (techniques) or the item applied (which most likely destroys the item before it can activate). If a technique was attempted, the attacker must make an opposed level check against you. If you succeed, the seal will not be applied. After the seal activates, it vanishes. You can concentrate for an attack action to suppress the seal's effects for one round.

Empower: Spend 5 Chakra and deal yourself double damage to allow this seal to activate twice before it vanishes.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 5

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: None

This technique is identical to Ketsuyoujutsu: Getekki. The bonus granted is +4 and you deal yourself 3 damage when attempting this technique.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the bonus to +5

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 4

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, E, F

You carve glowing runes into your skin, creating a dormant seal that can be activated as an instant action to grant you a +2 competence bonus to Defense against a single attack, a single attack roll or a single Reflex save. The seal can be activated only if it's bonus would be used immediately, before the result of the roll is known, and disappears afterwards. You take 2 damage every time you attempt to perform this technique. Your body cannot carry more than one Celerity seal.

Empower: Spend double the Chakra and double the damage dealt to you to double the bonuses granted. Doing so makes you unable to use this technique or Ketsuyoujutsu: Seiryoku for 24 hours.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 6

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, E, F, S

You carve glowing runes into your skin, creating a dormant seal that can be activated as an instant action to grant you 5 temporary HP for 1 minute. While activated, any fatigue effect on you is ignored, and any exhaustion effect becomes a fatigue effect instead. Once the activation ends, the conditions will return to normal, unless the effect causing them already ended. You take 5 damage every time you attempt to perform this technique.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra and deal 1 additional damage to yourself to increase the temporary HP granted by 1. Doing so requires additional seal slots: A single seal slot (including the original) can store 5 HP.

name: KETSUYOUJUTSU: KUDOU (BLOOD SORCERY: PATH OF PAIN)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 6

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, F, M, S

You carve glowing runes into your skin, which you then rub with Chakra-imbued magnesium powder. This seal remains dormant until activated as a swift action, at which point it remains active for 5 rounds, after which it disappears. While active, your nervous system is supercharged, granting the Speed Rank 3 extraordinary ability, a +4 bonus to Will saves and Spot and Listen checks, a blindsense out to 30 ft, a +20 bonus to Balance checks and the ability to Sense Chakra passively, with 30 ft range. You also take 50% additional damage from physical attacks.

You take 12 damage every time you attempt to perform this technique.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 5

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, F, S

You carve glowing runes into your skin, which become dormant until activated. As an attack action, you can lower your Chakra and maximum Chakra Pool by up to 3, containing it within the seal. You cannot lower your Chakra below 1 this way. The seals help lower your Chakra Signature, and are not detected by creatures sensing Chakra. Each seal can hold no more than 3 Chakra.

As a move action, you can cancel any number of these seals currently holding Chakra to immediately restore your maximum Chakra Pool and current Chakra by the amount released. When a seal's duration expires, the Chakra is released in this manner as well. You take 2 damage every time you attempt to perform this technique.

name: KETSUYOUJUTSU: MA'ENDOU (BLOOD SORCERY: PATH OF THE FIENDFIRE)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 6

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, H, M

This technique can only be used on a fire elemental that would grant you XP when defeated, whose current HP is below half its maximum and whose CP is higher than 30. You seal the target's essence in a special mixture, which must be consumed within 3 rounds. When consumed, you suffer 5 negative levels for 1 week, and are exhausted while they last, in addition to suffering from a blazing fever that causes a -4 penalty to Intelligence-, Wisdom- and Charisma-based checks, as well as Concentration checks, and you are unable to think clearly. Once the exhaustion clears, so does the fever. In addition, you are unable to take any action for 1d4 minutes after consuming the mixture as searing pain cripples your mind and body.

Once all the effects above subside, you lose all elemental affinities, gain the Ignis Vitae subtype (p345) and can no longer gain elemental affinities from any source other than the Ignis Vitae subtype.

Up to four empty void seals (from Ketsuyoujutsu: Kuuin) can be used to absorb the shock, reducing the negative levels by 1 per empty seal. Any creature that isn't you can consume the mixture, but doing so has no effects (other than ingesting an exceptionally awfultasting gruel)

This technique, leads to Path of the Fiendfire, an offensive branch of Blood Sorcery which grants access to powerful techniques (p346).

name: KETSUYOUJUTSU: RYOKU NO YOU (BLOOD SORCERY: BLADE OF POWER)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 4

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, H, F, XP

This technique is the most basic among Blood Sorcery techniques, and creates a special dagger infused with your essence called a dagger of power, which is required for almost all other Blood Sorcery techniques. The dagger used becomes host to part of your vital essence, and anyone other than you holding it suffers a negative level until it releases the weapon (level 1 characters take 2 Constitution damage while holding it). The weapon will not be receptive to any further weapon seals, and only you can use it to perform Blood Sorcery techniques with.

If you create a dagger of power this way while the previous one still exists, the previous dagger is immediately destroyed, regardless of range and any protections it may have, and you suffer 1d6 negative levels for 1 week that cannot be healed by techniques, spells or effects as your essence must recover the part it lost. The weapon created counts as Chakra-enhanced when attempting to bypass any damage reductions.

XP- 50 XP.

components.value: Concentration, Hand Seals, Focus, XP Cost

Components: C, E, F

You carve glowing runes into your skin, creating a dormant seal that can be activated as an instant action to grant you a +2 competence bonus to a single weapon damage roll or a +4 competence bonus to a single Strength-based check. The seal can be activated only if it's bonus would be used immediately, before the result of the roll is known, and disappears afterwards. You take 2 damage every time you attempt to perform this technique. Your body cannot carry more than one Potency seal.

Empower: Spend double the Chakra and double the damage dealt to you to double the bonuses granted. Doing so makes you unable to use this technique or Ketsuyoujutsu: Kaisoku for 24 hours.

name: GOUKEN OUGI: OMOTE RENGE (IRON FIST SECRET SKILL: INITIAL LOTUS)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 6

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Components: Mob

This technique must be used after successfully knocking a target into the air with Kage Buyou. Make an unarmed attack against the target, which gains a critical threat range increase of +1 and deals triple damage on hit. If hit, the target is stunned for 1d6 rounds (Fortitude negates), is thrown down to the ground and knocked prone, and may not make a Tumble check to reduce or avoid fall damage.

You will land in a square adjacent to the target, and will become exhausted for the remainder of the encounter, plus 5 minutes afterwards. A Fortitude save (DC 21) allows you to be fatigued instead.

name: GOUKEN OUGI: URA RENGE (IRON FIST SECRET SKILL: EXTREME LOTUS)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 7

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 28

Components: Mob

This technique must be used after successfully knocking a target into the air with Kage Buyou and following them up into the air. Make an unarmed Full Attack against the target, each of which deals an additional die of damage on hit (not multiplied on critical hits). The critical threat range of these attacks is increased by 2. If hit, the target is knocked down to the ground and ends up prone. You will land in a square adjacent to it.

You will become exhausted for the remainder of the encounter, plus 5 minutes afterwards. A Fortitude save (DC 21) allows you to be fatigued instead. In addition, you suffer 1d4 temporary Strength damage for 1 hour.

name: JIKOKU KAGE BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (INSTANT SHADOW REPLICATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 6

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: H

This technique functions like Kage Bunshin no Jutsu, except it creates a single clone that acts immediately, and disappears on your next turn. You can only create one such clone per round.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 6

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Components: E, S

You cause a Kage Bunshin to explode, dealing 4d8 points of damage to creatures in the area. If a Tajuu Kage Bunshin is sacrificed, the explosion deals 4d6 damage, and the save DC is reduced by 2. If a creature is grappling with a clone that explodes, it takes a -4 penalty to its save. If it is pinned by a clone that explodes, the penalty increases to -8.

Empower: Spend 6 Chakra to target an additional clone to explode (up to 1 clone per 2 levels total).

area.value: 30 ft Burst centered on the target

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 6

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: H

The subject becomes shaken, and is caught in a zone of absolute darkness that radiates 50 ft away from it. Darkvision cannot pierce the darkness, and the subject can only see creatures it comes into direct contact with. Only the subject can 'see' the darkness. If the subject controls any clones, the clones are also affected by the darkness. Blind creatures are immune to this technique's effects.

Every time the subject is damaged, you must make a Will save (DC 10 + damage done) to prevent the technique being dispelled. After the target is damaged four times, the technique dispels automatically. This technique can be dispelled.

name: KYOUKA KAGE BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (SHADOW REPLICATION REINFORCEMENT TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 7

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 28

Components: C, E

If used on a mass shadow clone, it immediately becomes a normal shadow clone before applying the following. No more than two clones can be affected by this technique at the same time.

The targeted clone's HP doubles and then increases by 1 per level (up to +15). It gains a +1 bonus to attack rolls and Defense, and can now perform techniques up to Rank 6. The clone is no longer limited by range, and its duration is extended to the duration of this technique.

This technique's base cost equals one-third your current Chakra Pool, rounded up.

Empower: Spend any amount of Chakra to increase the clone's current and maximum Chakra by the same amount.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 6

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, H

You focus Chakra around your body, forming an invisible shield that reacts to all incoming attacks, releasing a burst of flame to deflect or mitigate the damage.

You gain a +4 deflection bonus to Defense, DR 15/and a Fire and Cold resistance of 30. Any creature that hits with an unarmed or weapon attack and does not deal damage (due to your DR and resistances) suffers 1d4 fire damage per hit (CR applies).

The technique ends when an attack breaches the DR.

name: MOKUTON: SHICHUUKA NO JUTSU (WOOD RELEASE: FOUR PILLAR HOME TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Mokuton)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 30

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 5

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: C, H, Mas

This technique can only be used on ground that is firm, soft or very soft, and creates a 50 x 30 ft, two-story ancestral-style mansion. The mansion is made entirely of wood that reaches out of the soil, has up to 10 separate rooms and can provide a comfortable living space for up to 30 Medium-sized creatures, although it does not contain any furniture.

You can perform the technique again without needing to meet its Perform Requirements to renew its duration, before the duration expires. When the technique ends, any creatures inside suffer 3d8 damage and must make a Reflex save (DC 16) or become pinned underground, taking 1d6 nonlethal damage per round until it breaks free by making a Strength check (DC 14) as a full-round action.

Mastery: The third step allows you to add simple furniture (such as a bookcase, table or chairs), costing 1 Chakra per 2 pieces of furniture. Like the mansion itself, they are shaped entirely of wood.

Type: Ninjutsu (Shadow)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 6

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, H

You expertly manipulate your Chakra and create warriors of shadow, kagemusha. A kagemusha is created from a shadow of a Medium-sized or larger shadow within range, and the kagemusha appears adjacent to the shadow's origin. These warriors must remain within 30 ft of a shadow at all times or be destroyed. You suffer 1 damage for each warrior created this way. If the shadow is larger than Medium size, you can create an additional kagemusha for each size category the shadow is larger. Each additional kagemusha costs 4 Chakra. The statistics for a kagemusha are as follows:

Kagemusha: Medium-sized Construct;

HD 2d10; HP 11; Mas -; Init +5; Spd 30 ft;

Defense 15, touch 15, flat-footed 10 (+5 Dex); BAB +1;

Grap -; Atk +6 melee (1d4 negative energy plus energy drain, ghastly blade); FS 5 ft. by 5 ft.; Reach 5 ft.;

SQ incorporeal, construct immunities, energy drain, light vulnerability; AL none;

SV Fort -, Ref +5, Will -; AP 0; CP 2; Rep +0; Str -, Dex 20, Con -, Int -, Wis -, Cha -.

Skills: Hide +8 (+16 in darkness or dark places).

Energy Drain (Su): Attacks inflict 1 negative level on hit, which lasts for 1 minute and cannot kill the subject. If a negative level is inflicted, the kagemusha is healed to its maximum HP.

Light Vulnerability (Ex): Light-based effects incur a 10 penalty to the kagemusha's saves against them, and there is a 50% chance that the kagemusha is instantly destroyed when targeted by such an effect.

Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 6

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, H, Mas

You summon three Constrictor Snakes (D20 Modern, p257), which emerge from your arms. Instead of making a weapon attack, you can direct a snake to strike a target within 15 feet. As a full-round action, you can direct all snakes to strike. The snakes attack with their natural weapon, using your attack bonuses (they count as melee weapons).

The snakes will retract back into your arm at the end of your next turn, at which point you suffer 1 point of temporary Strength damage (Fortitude DC 15 negates).

Mastery: The first through fourth steps decrease the Fortitude save DC to avoid Strength damage by 1.

The third step allows you to pay 4 additional Chakra and instead summon two snakes, each which 30 ft range and dealing 1d8+10 damage with their attacks.

The fifth step removes the Strength damage entirely.

Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 6

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, E, H, Mas

This advanced form of Sennei Jashuu functions the same, except as above. The snakes have 30 ft range and take a -5 penalty to their attacks. Up to one snake can constrict a Tiny or smaller character, doubling for each size category larger (a Medium creature can be constricted by up to four snakes). After the snakes retract, you suffer 1d6 temporary Strength damage (Fortitude DC 19 negates).

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to summon an additional snake, up to 1 per level or 15 total (whichever is lower).

Mastery: The first through fourth steps decrease the Fortitude save DC to avoid Strength damage by 1. The fifth step removes the Strength damage entirely.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 2

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: Mob

This technique is derived from the ancient art of Kancho, and is considered to be the most idiotic technique ever created. Make an unarmed melee attack against the target, which must be flat-footed and no more than one size category larger than you. On hit, the attack is an automatic critical hit that deals nonlethal damage. In addition, the target is knocked prone (Fortitude negates). Creatures immune to critical hits or sneak attacks are unaffected by this technique.

name: SOUJA SOUSAI NO JUTSU (DOUBLE SNAKE ASSASSINATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 5

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H *

This technique can only be used on a creature that you are currently in a grapple with. The target may make an Escape Artist or Dexterity check (DC 20) to avoid having you grip their hand and form a hand seal with it. If the target has no hands or discernable anatomy, this technique cannot be used.

If the target fails, numerous snakes are summoned inside your body, which will burst out and bite the target. If the target fails it's save, it is reduced to -10 HP and will die. Otherwise, the target suffers 6d4 piercing damage and must make a Fortitude save against the snakes' poison (DC 18, primary and secondary damage 1d4 Constitution). Regardless of the outcome, you (the user) will die.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 8

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 35

Components: C, H, P

Created as a counter to Konoha's great eye-based bloodlines, this technique and it's methods have been branded as forbidden since the peace treaty with Konoha was signed. While active, the Kaigan requires you spend 3 Chakra per 2 rounds.

Your eye turns red, with a black iris and white pupil. Anyone looking into your eyes becomes shaken for 1 round (Will DC 15 negates), which counts as a gaze attack with a range of 30 feet. You also gain a +6 insight bonus to Defense, attack rolls, saves and skill checks, High Speed Sight 3, and treat any concealment as 25% lower. You gain Darkvision with a range of 60 ft, and a +8 bonus to Genjutsu checks to detect a Genjutsu.

Once the technique ends, you suffer 1 temporary Wisdom damage for each round it was active (Fortitude DC 20 halves). If your Wisdom would be reduced to 0 due to this damage, you suffer 2 permanent Wisdom damage once you've recovered completely.

name: RAIJIN RIKI: RAIJUU NO SOU (MIGHT OF THE THUNDER GOD: RAIJUU'S CLAW)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: H, Mas

You fire an invisible bolt of lightning (seen as brilliant gold by those who can See (Through) Chakra), aiming to strike the target in the stomach, after which the lightning curls up into a balls and nests itself within the target's navel. After three rounds, or the first time the target takes damage before then, the lightning will erupt in a flash of lightning, dealing 8d6 electricity damage and forcing the target to save against being paralyzed for 1 round.

If the target is subjected to Chakra drain or Chakra damage, you must make an opposed level check against the source of the drain or damage. If you fail, this technique is dispelled and will not have any further effects.

You can dispel this technique by hitting the target with this technique a second time. This technique has no effect (other than possibly dispelling a previous use) if used on the same target more than once per minute.

Mastery: Each step grants a +2 attack bonus to the ray attack, as well as a +1 bonus to any opposed level checks to maintain the technique when the target suffers Chakra drain or damage.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 5

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 28

Components: C

This technique will remove the brand left by Tenchuu.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 7

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 29

Components: C, H

This secret technique was widely used during the civil war in Kumogakure and the Thunder Country. Creatures caught in the area are struck by a bolt of lightning that deals 8d8 electric damage and applies a brand to them in the form of the Seal of Heaven (Ten no In), placed on their forehead. A successful Reflex save halves the damage and avoids the brand.

A branded creature suffers 1 damage per minute, and becomes immune to any Medical technique of Rank 9 or lower. The brand persists for 1 hour per level. If a branded creature dies, the brand becomes permanent and cannot be removed.

name: KUSA KASUI NO JUTSU (GRASS SPIKES TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 3

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: E, H

The target squares must have short grass, moss or similar plant growth, which will harden and sharpen.

Each square counts as though it was covered in caltrops, which can be destroyed (a square of grass caltrops has Defense 11, 3 HP and 8 hardness). When dismissing this technique, you can choose to dismiss all of it, or only specific squares.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to target an additional 5 ft square (up to 1 per level).

name: MOKUTON: FUTORISUGI NO JUTSU (WOOD RELEASE: PLANT OVERGROWTH TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Mokuton)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 5

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: C, H

The target area must have bushes and trees for this technique to be effective. You send your Chakra into the area, causing living plants to grow wildly and out of control. The area becomes equivalent to a thicket or jungle, allowing creatures to move through it at only 5 ft per round (or 10 ft for Large or larger creatures).

name: MOKUTON: KIUGOKU NO JUTSU (WOOD RELEASE: TREE DISPLACEMENT TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Mokuton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: H

By spending a full-round action concentrating, you can merge with a tree, which allows you to travel through trees, roots and branches at your standard movement rate by concentrating as a full-round action each turn.

While moving, you can freely 'jump' to other trees if their roots or branches are close to each other, and you cannot be damaged as you have no physical presence.

If a tree you are currently occupying or traveling through takes damage, you take the same amount of damage. You can only 'resurface' once you reach the trunk of another tree. While occupying trees, it is possible to attack creatures standing adjacent to the tree you occupy, and you can easily hide inside a tree that can contain your body, making others suffer a -20 penalty to spot you.

name: MOKUTON: TSUTAKADO NO JUTSU (WOOD RELEASE: VINE CAPTURE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Mokuton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: F, H, Mas

The target must be within 10 ft of a tree that is at least 1 size category larger than it for this technique to be effective, and must be within 5 ft of the ground.

Vines will erupt from the ground and the trees, allowing you to make one touch attack per two levels, at a +7 bonus. The target is immobilized if it is hit by at least two vines per size category it is larger than Tiny (two vines for a Small creature, four for Medium, etc), and counts as entangled for the purposes of performing actions requiring concentration.

As a move action once per round, you can command the vines to constrict the target, dealing damage based on the number of vines that hit it (3 or less (1d4), 4 to 6 (1d6), 7 to 9 (2d6) or 10 or more (2d8)). You must be within range to do so. The vines have 4 HP each and can be destroyed to free the target.

Mastery: The second, fourth and fifth step grant a +1 bonus to the touch attacks made for the vines.

name: MOKUTON: TSUTAKAZURA ZOUDAI NO JUTSU (WOOD RELEASE: VINE GROWTH TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Mokuton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 4

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, H

This technique can only affect an area of (very) soft or firm ground. Vines and bushes burst from the ground, entangling creatures in the area. Such creates can make a Strength check or Escape Artist check (DC 20) to move up to half their normal speed as a full-round action. If a creature moves out of the area, it is no longer entangled and is no longer restrained in their movements. Creatures that make their save are not entangled but can still only move at half their speed, and cannot run or charge, while inside the area.

Each round on your turn, creatures in the area that aren't entangled by this technique must make a new save or become entangled as above.

name: OCHIBA AME NO JUTSU (RAIN OF FALLING LEAVES TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 4

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 19

Components: H

You center this technique on a living tree that still has plenty of leaves. You imbue the foliage with Chakra, turning the leaves hard and sharp and having them fall down, dealing 3d4+1 slashing damage each round. After the technique finishes, the tree is left completely devoid of foliage.

Type: Hachimon Tonkou

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: C

You open and close the Heal Gate quickly, and are granted a burst of energy that allows you to ignore the fatigued and exhausted conditions, as well as granting you 2d6+2 temporary HP. This technique's effects are not cumulative. If used while the technique is still active, it does not refresh the duration.

name: TAIJUTSU: GOUKEN OUGI - ASA KUJAKU (TAIJUTSU: IRON FIST SECRET SKILL - MORNING PEACOCK)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 6

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, E, Mob

One of Maito Gai's signature techniques, you punch or kick with extreme speed, causing friction that creates small fireballs to assault your enemies. Make an (ranged) unarmed touch attack at the target, using your Dexterity modifier instead of your Strength modifier for the attack roll. On hit, the attack deals 1d6+1 fire damage. You suffer a -4 penalty to Learn checks when learning this technique if you do not have the Gouken feat.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to throw an additional fireball, up to 1 per level or 15 total, whichever is lower. Each fireball can target a creature in range (the same creature can be targeted multiple times), and requires an attack roll (as above).

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 5

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: E, F, Mas

You shape your Chakra into a crimson, predatory bird that dives at the target. Make a ranged attack using your held weapon, which deals an additional 3d6 fire damage (not multiplied on critical hits). When performing this technique, you take 3d6 damage.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra and 1 HP to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 10d6 total.

Mastery: The third step allows you to ignore the base damage you suffer (but not the empower damage). The fifth step allows you to ignore the damage you would take when empowering this technique.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 6

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: E, F, Mas
