You send a shimmering bird of silver fire to engulf the area in an inferno, dealing 9d6 fire damage. The blast damages unattended objects and sets fire to combustibles. You take 5d6 damage when performing this technique.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra and 1 HP to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 15d6 total.

Mastery: The third step allows you to ignore the base damage you suffer (but not the empower damage). The fifth step allows you to ignore the damage you would take when empowering this technique.

name: MSR: SEIFUU HOEKO (ROAR OF THE WIND TIGER)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 6

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: E, F, Mas

You create a wind tiger that unleashes a fierce roar and pounces on your enemies. Creatures in the area take 6d6 wind damage (Fortitude halves), and are deafened for 1d6 rounds (Fortitude negates). Additionally, you can make a melee attack with your held weapon against up to six creatures in the area, which deals half damage, and all of its damage becomes wind damage. A creature cannot be targeted more than once, and the attacks cannot score critical hits.

You can deal 5d6 damage to yourself to improve the melee attack, allowing it to deal its normal damage instead. If you do, all damage dealt becomes half negative energy, half wind (including the first 6d6) as the created tiger becomes dark and vile.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra and 1 HP to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 10d6 total.

Mastery: The third step allows you to take no damage when creating a more powerful attack. The fifth step allows you to ignore the damage you would take when empowering this technique.

name: MSR: SEIFUU MOUKO (WILD WIND TIGER INCARNATION)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 5

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: E, F, Mas

Make a melee attack against the target, dealing damage as normal, except half the damage becomes wind damage as a tiger of wind rips the target to shreds. You can deal 3d6 damage to yourself to improve the attack's damage by 2d6 wind damage (Reflex negates).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra and 1 HP to increase the damage of the attack by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 8d6 total.

Mastery: The third step allows you to take no dam- age when creating a more powerful attack. The fifth step allows you to ignore the damage you would take when empowering this technique.

name: MSR: SEIFUU SHICHIHOURYUU (SEVEN FLOWING WATER DRAGONS)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 6

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: E, F, Mas

You send forth seven water dragons as you swing your weapon. Make seven melee attacks with your held weapon, taking a -5 penalty to hit. The attacks can be divided among up to seven creatures within range, deal half weapon damage as water damage and cannot score a critical hit. A creature hit by one or more dragons suffers 1d6 water damage for each dragon that hit it (Fortitude negates).

You can deal 5d6 damage to ignore the water part of the material focus, instead creating dragons of blood, which deal 1d6 additional damage, changes all damage dealt to acid damage and adds the Acid descriptor.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage dealt to each creature hit by one or more dragons by 1d6, up to 1d6 per 2 levels or 10d6 total. If the dragons are blood dragons, you deal yourself 1 additional die of damage per point of Chakra spent on empowering them.

Mastery: The third step allows you to take no damage when creating blood dragons.

The fifth step allows you to ignore the damage you would take when empowering this technique.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 5

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: E, F, Mas

Make a melee attack against the target, sending forth a powerful, watery dragon to sweep away your target. The attack deals normal damage, except the damage becomes water damage, and the target must make a save or become stunned for 1 round. This attack cannot score a critical hit.

You can deal 3d6 damage to ignore the water part of the material focus, instead creating a dragon of blood, which deals 1d6 additional damage, and all its damage becomes acid damage. Doing so adds the Acid descriptor to this technique.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage of the attack by 1d6, up to 1d6 per 2 levels or 5d6 total. If the dragon is a blood dragon, you deal yourself 1 additional die of damage per point of Chakra spent on empowering it.

Mastery: The third step allows you to take no damage when creating a blood dragon.

The fifth step allows you to ignore the damage you would take when empowering this technique.

name: MSR: TSUI NO HIKEN - BYAKKO (SUCCESSION TECHNIQUE BYAKKO)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 20

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 7

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 32

Components: E, F, H, Mas

This ultimate wind style technique calls forth the terrible power of Byakko, the great white tiger, guardian of the East. Creatures in the area take half your weapon damage as wind damage, plus 7d6 (Reflex negates). Creatures failing their save take an additional 7d6 wind damage, +1 per level (Fortitude halves). You take 7d6 damage when performing this technique.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the initial damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 18d6 total. Each additional die increases the damage you take by 1d6.

Mastery: The third step allows you to take no damage when performing this technique. The fifth step allows you to ignore the damage you would take when empowering this technique.

name: MSR: TSUI NO HIKEN - SEIRYUU (SUCCESSION TECHNIQUE SEIRYUU)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 20

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 7

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 32

Components: E, F, H, Mas

This ultimate water style technique calls forth the terrible power of Seiryuu, the great dragon, guardian of the West. Make a melee attack with your held weapon against each creature in the area, which deals weapon damage as water damage, plus 5d6. Creatures hit must make a Reflex save. If they fail, they are knocked up 10 ft before a water dragon slams them back down, making them suffer 5d6 water damage (Fortitude halves), as well as 3d6 fall damage. The attack cannot score a critical hit. You take 7d6 damage when performing this technique.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase both instances of damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 10d6 total per instance. Each additional die increases the damage you take by 1.

Mastery: The third step allows you to take no damage when performing this technique.

The fifth step allows you to ignore the damage you would take when empowering this technique.

name: MSR: TSUI NO HIKEN - SUZAKU (SUCCESSION TECHNIQUE SUZAKU)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 13 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 20

Learn DC: 29 | Successes: 7

Perform: 17 | Perform DC: 33

Components: E, F, H, Mas

This ultimate fire style technique calls forth the terrible power of Suzaku, the great phoenix, guardian of the South. Creatures in the area take your weapon damage, as well as 5d6 sonic and 5d6 fire damage (Reflex halves). Any creature suffering damage becomes dazed for 1 round (Fortitude negates). You take 7d6 damage when performing this technique.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the fire and sonic damage by 1d6 each, up to 1d6 per level or 20d6 total. Each additional die increases the damage you take by 1.

Mastery: The third step allows you to take no damage when performing this technique.

The fifth step allows you to ignore the damage you would take when empowering this technique.

Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C

You enhance your melee attacks by making gaze attacks against your melee opponents. Each time you make a melee attack, the target must save or be denied its Dexterity bonus to Defense against the attack, as the target 'forgets' you moved, feeling as though the attack was made instantly.

While this technique is active, attacks cannot apply more sneak attack dice than your Charisma modifier (up to 3). Each time you attack while using this technique, you suffer 1 point of mangekyou blindness (if applicable).

Avoiding an Attack (1/day): Minimum DC 26. If you succeed, you make a 5 ft step and an illusory clone is left in your place to be struck, which disappears almost immediately.

Using this technique to avoid an attack costs 6 Chakra, and can be done against a source with a CR of up to 15. Chakra Resistance will not apply when using this technique to avoid an attack.

Mastery: Each step increases the number of times per day you can use this technique to avoid an attack by one.

The first and third steps increase the maximum CR you can defend against by 5 each.

name: KAGE KUBISHIBARI NO JUTSU (SHADOW NECK BIND TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Shadow)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 5

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, S

You stretch your shadows even further (not counting against Kage Mane's limit), and attempt to strangle the targets with your shadow, dealing 6d8 damage. Any creature suffering damage must also make a Massive Damage save.

target.value: Up to one creature/3 levels trapped in Kage Mane no Jutsu

name: KAGE MANE NO JUTSU (SHADOW IMITATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Shadow)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 3

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, H, Mas

This technique lets you split your own shadow and stretch it out, attempting to control the movement of your foes. The technique has three steps: extend the shadow, attach the shadow and maintaining the hold. The technique cannot be used if you are blinded. Targets larger than your size category increase the Chakra cost by 4 per size category larger, and count as two creatures per size category larger when determining how many targets you can have (i.e. a creature two sizes larger than you counts as four creatures).

Extend the Shadow: Your shadow can extend to 30 ft, plus 5 ft per size category of an object or creature in the shadow's path (Fine is 5 ft, Medium is 25 ft). This bonus range is doubled during sunrise or sunset, but halved during midday. If there is little or no ambient light (a moonless or cloudy night), the technique's range instead becomes 5 feet, with no bonus range. If a subject moves out of range at any time while Kage Mane no Jutsu is active, the technique ends on them immediately.

Attach the Shadow: Make a touch attack against the shadow of each target. A shadow has a Defense of 10 if it's owner is unaware or flat-footed. Otherwise, use the target's touch defense. A creature is unaware if it fails to make a Spot check (DC 15) to see the shadows. A creature caught once is considered to be aware of any future attempts (GM's discretion).

Maintaining the Hold: Once hit, you must concentrate to maintain the hold. You can concentrate for 1 round, plus 1 for every 2 Chakra you currently have more than the creature held with the highest current Chakra (minimum 3 rounds, maximum 1 round per level). The DC to maintain concentration when damaged increases by 5.

Once caught and held, subjects cannot take any actions other than talking, or performing techniques that require a swift or instant action (as long as it doesn't require Mobility, Hand/Half Seals, or Physically Able), though if the technique requires only Concentration and/or Material Focus it must make a Concentration check (DC 20) to successfully complete the technique.

Subjects will mimic any movements you make, though the movement will be mirrored if they are facing you. If you attack, they will do so with the same attack bonus.

You cannot force a subject to spend Chakra, though if you use a technique with hand seals or half seals that a subject also knows, it can choose to perform the technique at the same time as you. Subjects can make a Strength check (DC 25) each round to resist the forced movement, instead remaining motionless and taking no actions.

If you take damage, all subjects suffer the same damage. If a subject suffers damage, you and all other subjects suffer the same damage.

Mastery: Every step increases the technique's base range by 5 ft (does not affect bonus range, does not increase range in darkness or low lighting), and also increases the minimum number of rounds this technique can be maintained by 1.

The fifth step allows you to make a Concentration check (DC 20) to avoid taking damage when a subject takes damage, or to avoid having one or more subjects suffer damage when you take damage.

target.value: Up to one creature per level

name: KAGE MANE YUSOU NO JUTSU (SHADOW IMITATION TRANSPORTATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Shadow)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C

You merge with your shadow and move yourself behind a subject of your Kage Mane no Jutsu, arriving in the square directly behind them on your next turn. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 8

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 34

Components: C, H, P

A withered wooden coffin springs forth from the ground within 15 ft of you. On your next turn, it opens, sending eight shadowy hands to make ranged touch attacks at a +10 bonus against the target. If at least five attacks hit, a larger hand flies out to make another touch attack at a +22 bonus, which will drag the target into the coffin if it hits.

Once it has caught a creature, the coffin sinks back into the ground. Each round, the creature takes 1d4 negative energy damage and must make a save to avoid taking 1 temporary Charisma damage.

If the target dies before it reaches 0 Charisma, the coffin surfaces and releases its corpse. If it reaches 0 Charisma before dying, it is completely healed of all damage caused by the technique and rises towards the surface, coming under your complete control for 1 hour per level.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, XP

You shed your damaged body like a snake shedding its skin, and emerge unscathed. You are cured of all poisons and diseases, and are healed 10 HP per level. This technique also removes being blinded, dazzled, deafened, exhausted, fatigued, nauseated, paralyzed, sickened and stunned.

If you are unable to act normally, you can still activate this technique, though doing so requires a Concentration (DC 20) or Chakra Control check (DC 45). The cost of this technique is half of your maximum Chakra Pool.

XP - 5,000 XP.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 7

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, H

You take on the guise of a creature you are familiar with, assuming its voice and gaining a +20 bonus to Disguise checks when impersonating that creature. If you have the creature's corpse available, you may double the Chakra cost to gain double the bonus to Disguise and also adopt the creature's Chakra Signature. As a result, the corpse's facial features will melt away.

name: BANKA NO JUTSU (RHAPSODY FOR THE FALLEN)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 6

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, F

Utilizing amplified sound waves, you damage the living and manipulate the dead. Each round, living creatures take 1d8 sonic damage and make a save to avoid becoming deafened for 1 round. Each round, the corpses of Medium-sized and smaller creatures of your type are raised as 1HD zombies (See D20 Modern, p267) under your control. If those zombies move out of the area, they immediately deanimate. Unless a zombie's body is completely destroyed, it will rise again the next round.

While performing the technique, you can freely make Perform checks using the instrument held to impress a person or crowd (as per the Perform skill).

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, S

This complex technique deals 2d4+2 sonic damage to the target, and if it fails a Fortitude save it becomes deafened for 1d4+1 rounds, as well as becoming nauseated for 1d3 rounds.

name: ONBYOU NO JUTSU (SOUND WAVE NAUSEA TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 3

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: E, H

You focus Chakra into your sound amplifier and touch the target with it, sending amplified sound waves into its body, nauseating them for 1d4 rounds.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: E, F, H

You focus Chakra through your sound amplifier, firing a powerful blast of sound that deals 4d6 sonic damage (Fortitude halves) and deafening creatures in the area for 1d4 rounds (Fortitude negates).

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per 2 levels or 10d6.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: E, F, Mob, Mas

You make a melee attack with your held weapon, which deals an additional 3d6 damage. If hit, the target must make a save to avoid being knocked back 15 ft. If the target impacts a solid object, both it and the object suffer 1d6 damage for every 15 ft of the knockback effect, and the target falls prone.

Once used, your weapon flies from your grip and lands in the target's square. A Strength check (DC 20) lets it land in a square adjacent to you instead, and if you beat the DC by 5 or more you don't lose your grip on the weapon at all.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the additional damage by 1d6 and the knockback by 5 ft, up to 10d6 and 50 ft total.

Mastery: Each step grants you a +2 bonus to Strength checks made to maintain your grip on the weapon.

name: HOKAGE IZOU HIJUTSU: KUBIKIRI SHURIKEN - NIHAN! (HOKAGE'S SECRET LEGACY TECHNIQUE: DECAPITATING SHURIKEN - MARK II!)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 5

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: C, E, H, Mob

You make a Full Attack with shuriken, one of which enlarges mid-flight. An enlarged shuriken's weapon damage increases to 2d8, and you apply 1.5 times your Strength modifier to damage. You may choose to throw fewer shuriken than you are able. If you throw more than one shuriken, the attacks will not benefit from any thrown weapon specific benefits (such as feats or class abilities).

Empower: Spend 3 Chakra to enlarge an additional thrown shuriken, up to 1 per 4 levels or 5 total.

Mastery: The third step allows you to increase the cost to 4 per shuriken to increase the base damage to 3d8 and allowing the attacks to ignore up to onequarter cover.

The fifth step allows you to increase the cost to 6 per shuriken to increase the base damage to 4d8 and allowing the attacks to ignore up to one-half cover.

Material Focus: 1 Shuriken per attack.

name: HOKAGE SHIKI JIJUN JUTSU: KAKUAN NITTEN SUISHU (HOKAGE STYLE RETIREMENT TECHNIQUE: DARKNESS SEALING PALM)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 13 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 24

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 7

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 38

Components: C, H, M

You attempt to seal the qualities of demonic Chakra that make the target frenzied. You scribe a seal on your palm and thrust it towards the target, prematurely ending any rage or frenzy effect it may be affected by.

If you concentrate on the technique, the subject is restrained, causing the target to be unable to run and have its effective Strength and Dexterity scores reduced to 3 as long as it is within 500 ft of you.

name: KUBIKIRI SHURIKEN NO JUTSU (DECAPITATING SHURIKEN TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: E, H, Mob

Created by the famed third Hokage, this technique enlarges a simple shuriken to great size. Make a single thrown attack with a shuriken, which enlarges midflight, increasing it's base damage to 1d8. For the purpose of this attack, the shuriken's range increment is doubled.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to enlarge the shuriken by 1 step (up to 5 steps). Each step increases its damage based on the following progression: 1d8, 1d10, 2d8, 3d8, 4d8, 6d8. At 4d8 or higher, it ignores any cover below ¾ and deals double damage to objects. Empowering this technique requires you to be level 3, plus 2 per size increase.

Mastery: The third step allows you to apply double your Strength modifier to damage if the shuriken's base damage has been empowered to at least 3d8.

name: SHURIKEN KAGE BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (SHURIKEN SHADOW REPLICATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 5

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 21

Components: E, F, H

This technique is based on Kage Bunshin, and allows you to create duplicates of a weapon after it's been thrown. The basic use of this technique creates two Shuriken Kage Bunshin, which each target a creature in the area. Make an attack roll for each Shuriken Kage Bunshin. On hit, the Shuriken Kage Bunshin deals damage as though three thrown weapons had hit, though you do not apply a Strength bonus beyond +1 (for example, if you have a Strength score of 14 and throw a kunai, a hit will deal 3d4+3 damage).

Bonus damage (such as from sneak attack, mastercraft, weapon seals, feats or class abilities) only applies once to each hit, rather than three times, and the Shuriken Expert abilities Precise Throw and Bullseye do not apply to attacks made with this technique.

Empower: Spend 3 Chakra to increase the number of Shuriken Kage Bunshin by 1, up to 1 per 2 levels total. Material Focus - One small thrown weapon per Shuriken Kage Bunshin.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 7

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, F, S

You send out your Chakra, allowing you to create an invisible, immaterial 100 ft'cube' within which you can observe as though you were actually present: you can see and hear, use Spot and Listen, and your Sense Chakra ability (if you have it) is always active. This 'cube' starts anywhere within range, and can move up to 200 ft per round in any direction of your choosing. If an area is filled with a high amount of lingering or foreign Chakra that is not yours, you may not be able to enter that area.

The observations you make are all displayed through a crystal ball, upon which you must focus to properly receive the information and control the area you observe. While observing, your awareness is partially out of your body and you take a -8 penalty to Spot and Listen checks to notice anything in the vicinity of your physical body. If the technique is dismissed or disrupted, these penalties clear after one round. If the technique duration expires because it's duration is up, the penalty clears after three rounds, and you will be fatigued until you take a short rest.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 40

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 7

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: C, M *

Inspired by the bearer of the Shukaku, this ritual was designed to grant similar powers by sealing a mass of sand and iron into your body. Upon completion, you gain the Satetsu Template (p353), and your weight increases by 40 lbs. You suffer 1d2 temporary negative levels (Fortitude DC 25 negates). If you fail the save, you must make a second save after 24 hours to avoid the negative levels becoming permanent. The seals cannot be broken or removed except by you.

name: HIEN JUTSU: IPPO (FLYING SWALLOW TECHNIQUE: FIRST STEP)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 3

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: F

You channel a focused stream of wind Chakra into your held weapon(s). The Chakra extends the cutting edge of the blade(s), granting you a +1 bonus to attack rolls with them against creatures that cannot See (Through) Chakra and your attacks with these weapons count as Chakra enhanced. The technique immediately ends for any weapon that leaves your grip.

name: SHIROI KUMO NO JUTSU (WHITE CLOUD TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, S

Developed by an elite Hidden Cloud assassin, this technique creates a thick, white fog that carries your Chakra. Any creature sensing Chakra immediately detects it, and the entire cloud has your Chakra Signature and counts as a Strong source. The fog obscures all sight beyond 5 ft and remains stationary once created, and counts as a dense fog for the purpose of concealment (D20 Modern, p146).

By concentrating for a move action, you can increase the size of the cloud's radius or height by 5 ft, up to a total maximum of a 30 ft radius and 20 ft height. A moderate wind (11+ mph) disperses the cloud in 5 rounds, while a strong wind (21+ mph) does so in a sin- gle round. While within the cloud and sensing Chakra, you (and nobody else) can locate any creature or object within the fog, moving and attacking them as though you could see them clearly.

Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 18

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 6

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, F, H

You raise many pillars of ice to encase the area, trapping all creatures within the area in an icy prison. When the prison is created, it deals 2d6 damage (half cold, half piercing. Reflex DC 15 halves) to all creatures adjacent to and outside of the prison. Creatures trapped within the prison take 1d6 cold damage every minute, which can be prevented by any item or effect that protects against cold weather.

The prison consists of 40 pillars of ice, which project your image to those inside the prison, and each pillar has the following statistics:

- 5 HP.
- Fire, electric and wind resistance 15.
- Immunity to cold and water damage.
- Immunity to rays and thrown weapons, which are reflected back to their origin (the creature will apply the attack roll/effects against itself).
- If destroyed by a melee attack, the attacker takes 1d4 cold damage.

Any cone or line attack used against the pillar(s) will also reflect back up to 10 ft with the same (Line) or maximum (Cone) possible width of the effect used. Such attacks still damage the pillar(s) normally. Once at least 15 adjacent pillars are destroyed, the prison crumbles. If you fall unconscious or die, the prison immediately collapses (no ill effects).

name: MUHYOUGETEN (MIRAGE OF A FROZEN MOON IN THE HEAVENS)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 6

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 32

Components: C, H *

You can use this technique without hand seals if you wield a melee weapon. If you do, the technique can only affect an area adjacent to you, performing the technique does not provoke attacks of opportunity, and the Perform Requirements are increased by 6. Creatures within the area are trapped in prisons of ice (as with Hyourou no Jutsu, p166) and suffer 5d8 cold damage. A Strength check (DC 40) can be made to break a single square of ice, breaking free any creature trapped inside of it.

As an instant action at any time, you can shatter one or more squares of the prison, freeing creatures held within those squares and dealing 6d8 cold damage to them (no save). The same thing happens when the technique ends. The ice prisons are immune to physical damage dealt by characters that don't have an active Strength Rank of 4 or higher, and have 200 HP each.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 5

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H, X

Infusing a small bit of sand or dirt with Chakra, it forms into an eye that can see up to 150 ft away using normal vision and your Spot check modifier, though you suffer a -4 penalty to Spot checks while it is active (penalty does not affect the eye's spot check modifier).

You can command the eye freely; it is a Fine construct with a fly speed of 30 ft (good maneuverability), a +16 Hide modifier, a +8 size bonus to Defense and has 1d4 HP. If it moves past the technique's range or is destroyed, it vanishes without a trace. The eye is subject to genjutsu and vision altering effects as though it were you.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 30

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 6

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: C, H

This extremely powerful and dangerous technique allows you to greatly amplify the speed and direction of winds in a small area, creating a tornado. The tornado will form over 1d4+1 rounds, after which it takes full effect and lasts for 1 minute. Once complete, each round the tornado has a 50% chance to move 250 ft in a random direction. Though the tornado's 'funnel' (the direct barrier of winds that touches the ground) only has a 30 ft radius, the tornado's howling winds still affect the entire area.

All flames are extinguished in the area, and ranged attacks of any kind become impossible. The howling winds make Listen checks impossible as well. Mediumsized and smaller creatures within the area are sucked into the funnel (Fortitude DC 30 negates). Large creatures are blown away, Huge creatures are knocked down and creatures larger than that are checked.Flying creatures count as one size category smaller to determine how they are affected.

Creatures who come into contact with the funnel are picked up and will fly around uncontrollably inside the tornado for 1d10 rounds (or until the tornado ends), taking 6d6 wind damage each round. Creatures picked up by the tornado also move upwards 40 ft each round. Once a picked up creature exits the tornado, it may suffer fall damage as normal, and will travel 2d6 x 10 ft in a random direction as it is forcefully thrown out.

The tornado uproots trees, destroys buildings and causes comparable kinds of destruction within the area of the technique.

Blown Away - The creature is knocked back 1d6 x 10ft and takes 1d6 damage per 10 ft, and ends up prone. Flying creatures are thrown back 2d6 x 10 ft and take 2d6 damage (total).

Knocked Down - The creature is knocked prone. Flying creatures are instead thrown back 1d6 x 10ft.

Checked - The creature is unable to move towards the tornado, or directly into the winds. Flying creatures are instead thrown back 1d6 x 5ft.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: F, S

You infuse a small amount of water with Chakra, forming into a water blade that has the same characteristics as a ninja-to. You are automatically proficient with the blade, the blade deals 2 additional water damage and it counts as Chakra-enhanced when bypassing damage reductions. If the weapon leaves your grip, it immediately loses its shape.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 5

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 28

Components: E, H

This technique was designed by Tenshunreiken Zacki of the Hidden Cloud, to serve as a method of quick assassination or execution. Usage immediately surrounds your hand with a crackling, golden halo of energy. You may use this energy in two ways: Either to make an immediate touch attack (as part of the technique), or you may hold the charge for up to 1 round per level, and make a melee touch attack with it at a later time. Such an attack counts as armed, and so does not provoke attacks opportunity. Once the charge hits a creature, it dissipates.

A creature hit by the charge takes 2d6 piercing, electrical and sonic damage (each, 6d6 total), and the target must save against being paralyzed for 1d3 rounds.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage of any one type by 1d6, up to 6d6 total damage per energy type. You cannot add more than 2 damage dice per 3 levels.

Type: Chakra Control

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, E, Mas

This technique, once used, grants two charges that can be used to amplify your physical strength. You can concentrate as a swift action and spend up to 5 Chakra to gain as many charges. When you run out of charges, the technique ends. Charges can be spent to gain a +1 bonus to weapon damage per charge spent for 1 round, up to +5. Every 2 charges spent in a round increases your base carrying capacity by 50% that round.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to gain an additional charge.

Mastery: Each step increases the maximum possible bonus to weapon damage by +1.

The first, third and fifth step increase the amount of Chakra you can spend when concentrating to gain charges, by 1 each.

The fifth step requires ECL 12 to achieve, and allows you to ignore any hardness of 8 or lower while this technique is in effect.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 5

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 29

Components: C, E, Mas

You increase your effective size category by 1 for the purposes of determining your bull rush, grapple, overrun and trip check bonuses.

Instant Action: The technique requires you to spend 2 Kairiki charges, and you also gain a +4 bonus to Strength checks made to break bonds or barriers such as doors or walls per charge spent.

Attack Action: You make an unarmed melee attack against a creature or object. You can spend 2 Kairiki charges to deal 1d6 additional damage against the creature and force it to make a save to avoid being pushed back 1d4x5 ft. Against an inanimate object, the additional damage is 1d10, and the attack ignores all hardness, but does not push back the target.

You gain 1 Kairiki charge per round, and the effective size category increase also applies to your carrying capacity and your ability to wield weapons. The bonuses granted by this technique do not stack with those granted by active Strength Ranks.

Empower: Spend 1 Kairiki charge to improve your carrying capacity by 50%, and/or spend 2 charges to increase your effective size category by another 1, which increases the damage and pushback by 1 die when using the technique as an attack action.

Mastery: The fifth step reduces the cost for the Attack action version to 1 strength charge per additional die of damage (and pushback).

Type: Chakra Control

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, Mob

You focus Chakra into a part of your body, which you use to strike the ground below you to create a powerful shockwave. Any creature finding itself underground and within 30 ft of the surface is thrown upwards 1d6 x 5 ft and takes 2d6 bludgeoning damage. Creatures standing on the ground are instead knocked prone (Reflex negates). You are unaffected by this technique.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 5

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: Mob

This technique is a wild card, a true random chance technique that can result in a very deadly combo or a very useless one. Roll d20 per level. Each time you roll a 7, you gain a cumulative +1 luck bonus to attack rolls made for this technique. Each time you roll a 13, you gain a cumu-lative -1 penalty to attack rolls made for this tech-nique. Each time you roll a 20, you can make an attack at your highest attack bonus against the target.

If you roll two consecutive 1s, you cannot roll any more dice. Any other number rolled has no effect. Results for attack rolls will not grant the random effects this technique may grant.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 6

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 29

Components: E, Mas, S

A powerful improved version of the classic Uchiha fireball technique, you fire a flaming orb that travels up to the technique's range (your choice) as a line attack, then explodes. Creatures caught in the explosive Burst take 7d6 fire damage, while creatures only caught in the Line take half as much damage.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level of 18d6 (whichever is lower).

Mastery: Increase the range by 5 ft per step, or increase the radius of the Burst by 5 ft per two steps (chosen when performing).

area.value: 15 ft wide Line followed by a 30 ft Burst

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, S, E, F, Mas

You channel the power of a chidori into a weapon with a Containment seal, allowing its attacks to ignore 10 hardness, 2 points of armor or shield bonus to Defense, and make it deal 1d6 electric bonus damage on hit (not multiplied on critical hits). Attacks made count as Chakra enhanced to bypass damage reduction.

As a swift action, the technique can be dismissed to deal 1d6 electric damage to a creature within 10 feet, forcing them to make a save to avoid being staggered for 1 round and being knocked prone. If the weapon loses contact with your hand for more than one round, the technique ends.

Mastery: The third step lets you spend 4 Chakra to have the weapon deal 1d10 electric damage on critical hits, and add 1d6 concussion damage when discharged.

The fifth step lets you spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage on hit to 1d10, and increase the damage on discharge by 1d6 electric.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 6

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, Mob, E

You must have a chidori or raikiri effect (or a derivative thereof) active. You channel Chakra into the effect and fire two needles of electricity, dealing 1d4+1 electric damage each. You can select a target within range for each needle, and can target the same creature multiple times. The needles automatically hit, ignoring cover and concealment (except total cover or concealment), and cannot be evaded with avoiding an attack actions.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to fire an additional needle, up to 1 per level or 10 total (whichever is lower).

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 3

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: Mob

Make an unarmed Full Attack against the target. If at least one attack hits, you gain a free trip attempt against the target, for which you gain a +2 bonus to the check per attack that hit. If the trip attempt is successful, you may make an attack of opportunity against the target, which is made as though you performed Todome (p231).

If used as a follow-up to Kage Buyou, the trip attempt automatically succeeds, and the target will be prone when it lands. If the target was knocked up high enough to take fall damage when landing, it cannot make a Tumble check to reduce or avoid that damage. You will land in a square adjacent to the target.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, E

This improved version of Rasengan is made by infusing it with the Kyuubi's Chakra. To pay for this technique, you must use the Overwhelming Chakra ability, and spend all of the Chakra gained to pay for (part of) this technique. The resulting rasengan is a dark red orb of swirling flames, which will blind any creature that looks at it for 1 round, as long as they can See (Through) Chakra and are within 30 ft (Fortitude DC 15 negates).

This technique creates the Kuroi Rasengan only, and it can then be used to attack with, much like the Rasengan. On hit, it deals 9d8+9 fire damage, pushes the target back 1d4 x 5 ft, and the target will catch on fire for 1d4+1 rounds.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d8+1, up to 16d8+16 total. Every 2 additional dice, increase the Perform Requirements by 1.

name: NARUTO RYU: SENJUTSU - HIRYAKU (NARUTO STYLE: TACTICS - EVASIVE MANEUVER)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: H, Mas

You must be next to an empty square to use this technique, with which you summon a clone that pulls you out of harms way. In addition, you cannot use this technique if immobilized, entangled or otherwise prevented from moving to a different square, and can only use this technique once per day.

Avoiding an Attack (1/day): Minimum DC 22. Can be used against techniques allowing a Reflex save for half damage, in which case the Perform DC increases by an additional 5. Can defend against a source with a CR of 5 or lower. If successful, a clone throws you into an adjacent square. You do not provoke attacks of opportunity with this movement. If the attack required an attack roll, you avoid it. If the attack required a Reflex save, you may make a second save and use the higher of both saves as your final result, and you count ass though having Evasion (or Improved Evasion if you already have Evasion) against that specific attack.

The summoned clone expires immediately, and you suffer 1d4+1 damage from its creation.

Mastery: Each step allows you to use the technique an additional time per day, and increases the CR which you can evade up to a certain number, which may also increase the cost.

The first step increases the maximum CR to 10. Each subsequent step increases the CR by an additional five (up to 25 at step four), but also increases the cost to do so by one per step (up to 7 Chakra at step four).

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 6

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: None

This technique is identical to Rasengan (p327), except as noted above, and the sphere is much greater, becoming a Force effect. On hit, the target is stunned for 1d4+1 rounds rather than being knocked back.

Empower: As Rasengan, except you can empower up to 20d8 damage total, and the Perform Requirements do not increase when empowering.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 40

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, E

This technique takes the base form of a Rasengan and infuses it with potent wind Chakra, creating a spiraling sphere emitting a high-pitched scream, circled by a white blade of wind. The technique functions as Rasengan, but its empowerment is altered and it does not include a knockback.

If not used before the duration expires, the Rasenshuriken fades into nothingness.

Creatures who fail their save are knocked back 2d6 x 5 feet and are trapped in a vortex of microscropic needles of wind. While trapped, the target is unable to act, and suffers 3d6 wind damage as well as 1d6 permanent Chakra coil damage each round. Creatures within a 10ft Burst radius of the target also suffer 2d6 wind damage each round until they move out of the vortex.

If the attack hits, you suffer 4d6 temporary Chakra Coil damage (Fortitude DC 25 halves) and 1d10 Strength damage (Fortitude DC 20 halves). If at least half the technique's cost was paid with senjutsu Chakra (see the Sage's Handbook supplement), these drawbacks are negated.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d8, up to 40d8 total (not limited by level). The Perform Requirements do not increase.

Mastery: The first, third and fifth steps increase the duration of the vortex by 1 round each, though no chakra coil damage is dealt after the second round.

Note: This technique is extremely powerful and should be denied to player characters.

name: SHUUGYOU: HOKAGE IZOU SHUUGYOU NO WAZA (TRAINING: METHOD OF HOKAGE LEGACY TRAINING)

description.value:
Type: Training (Ninjutsu)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 6

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

Using a host of clones to improve the efficiency of your training. When you start to learn a technique, you may spend an Action Point to gain +10 to the Learn check, and reduce the time per attempt by half (before applying time reductions from your Learn check result). This does not apply to mastering techniques.

If used, you suffer 40d6 nonlethal damage at the end of the training day (or 20d6 if only half a day was spent), though the damage cannot exceed your maximum hp.

Note: This training technique is extremely powerful and should be denied to player characters.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 5

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, Mob

You must have four to eight physical clones adjacent to the target in order to use this technique, which will also require those clones to use their actions. Each of the clones make an unarmed attack at their highest attack bonus against the target, which deals normal damage and knocks the target up 5 ft per hit. Once the target is knocked off the ground, it loses its Dexterity bonus against further attacks. If the target is out of reach for a clone, the clone must make a Jump check (DC varies) to reach it and make its attack.

After the clones have attacked the target, you launch yourself at the target, gaining a +4 bonus to the Jump check for each clone used (maximum +20). If the check is sufficient to reach the target, you make an unarmed attack against them, which deals double damage and smashes the target down to the ground, causing it to suffer 2d6 fall damage, as if it had fallen 20 ft.

The target cannot be more than two size categories larger than you. If the target attempts to reduce or ne- gate fall damage with the Tumble skill, the DC to do so increases by 10 (Jump cannot reduce this fall damage).

If you are unable to reach the target, you will not attack it. It still suffers fall damage, though the DC to decrease fall damage is not increased.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 5

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, H

You damage the mind of a creature you currently possess with Shintenshin no Jutsu, dealing 3d6 damage and having it make a Will save to avoid 1d10 Charisma damage. This damage does not affect your own body and mind. The second time this technique is used within a 24 hour period, you are fatigued for the rest of the encounter. The third time leaves you exhausted for the rest of the encounter, and the possession ends immediately after using this technique. While exhausted, this technique cannot be used.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 6

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 31

Components: C, H

You ensnare the mind of the subject, having it perform a command to the best of its ability (such as attacking a creature within its line of sight). The target's body will follow your order, but the subject's head (and thus, its mouth) remains under its own control. While under your control, the creature cannot use any techniques.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 3

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: H

*Base Will save is the bonus gained from your class(es).

This signature technique of the Yamanaka Clan allows you to send out your mind to control another creature's body. The technique affects the creature within the area that is closest to you. If that creature does not identify the technique or if it is unable to move sufficiently (because it is pinned or paralyzed, for example), it cannot make a Reflex save to avoid it. If the creature succeeds at the Reflex save, it will take 1d6+1 rounds for your mind to return to your body (see below).

If the creature is hit, it may make a Will save to resist the technique only if it is at least 5 levels higher than you. If that save succeeds, you take 1d6 damage for every 5 points by which they beat the save DC. If the technique succeeds, your body falls unconscious while your mind takes over the target. Once your mind returns, you immediately wake up. While possessing a body, you lose all your physical attributes and gain those of the target's (except HP), which amounts to gaining the following:

- The target's creature type, natural armor, natural weapons, movement speed and other physical characteristics of its body.
- The target's Str, Dex and Con scores, which now modify your statistics and die rolls (except for HP).
- The target's Chakra Signature and current Chakra Pool, as well as its Elemental Affinities.
- The target's Extraordinary abilities and qualities (if any), and any Supernatural or Spell-like abilities that were already active, for as long as their durations remain. Strength and Speed ranks are inaccessible and inactive.
- You lose all of the statistics and abilities listed above that your own body possesses. You retain your supernatural and spell-like abilities.

Note that your new statistics may make you unable to use some of the feats or special abilities, such as if an ability score does not meet its prerequisite.

There is no limit to how far you may travel with the possessed body, and if you take an action which the subject is strongly against, it can attempt a Will save to end the technique and regain control of its body. While possessing the body, treat your HP as a separate pool from the subject's own HP: the subject's body will suffer damage as normal, and half of such damage is also dealt to your own HP. If your real body is damaged, reduce your HP accordingly.

When your real body is reduced to 0 HP or below, the technique ends and you fall unconscious after returning to your real body. If your real body dies, you die. If the possessed body is reduced to 0 HP or below, you act as normal, though if the possessed body dies, you also die. All conditions and afflictions suffered remain with the possessed body, but any Int, Wis or Cha damage sustained while possessing a creature is applied to you and not to the possessed body (and, as such, remains on you even after the technique ends).

Mastery: Each step reduces the time it takes for your mind to return to your body on a miss by 1 round, down to a minimum of 2 rounds.

The third step increases the duration to 5r/level. The fifth step increases the duration to 1m/level.

name: HIRAISHIN NO JUTSU (FLYING THUNDER GOD TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 6

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 31

Components: C, Mob, S

You disappear in a flash of yellow Chakra and instantly appear in a square adjacent to a creature of your choice that is carrying your Shikei no In. When you arrive, you can make a hide check as a free action to attempt to remain undetected.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 11

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 5

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, E

An extremely powerful technique devised by the fourth Hokage, this complex technique has you spin Chakra into the palm of your hand, forming a sphere of great power. Once created, the sphere can be used to make a melee touch attack, either as an attack action or as part of a Full Attack. Once used it is discharged regardless of whether it hit. The rasengan can be held for up to 1 round per level before it dissipates.

A target hit by the rasengan takes 7d8 force damage, and will be pushed back a number of feet equal to half the damage dealt (rounded to the nearest 5 ft unit).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d8, up to 1d8 per level or 18d8 total, whichever is lower. For every 2 Chakra spent this way, the Perform Requirements of this technique increase by 1.

Type: Fuinjutsu (Advanced Seal)

Rank: 13 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 29 | Successes: 6

Perform: 17 | Perform DC: 33

Components: C, M *

You make a touch attack in an attempt to leave a specially designed seal that merged with the target's body or substance, allowing them to be a subject for the Hiraishin no Jutsu technique. If the target moves at high speed or if a target object becomes damaged (it is thrown, or a melee weapon is blocked, for example), you immediately gain knowledge of it, as long as the target is within 1 mile.

In addition, you gain a +10 bonus to Spot checks to detect the target, or any creature wielding the target (if it is an object).

name: SAKURA KAIHOU NO JUTSU (CHERRY BLOSSOM ESCAPE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 6

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 26

Components: S

You create the illusion that your body dissolves into a swarm of cherry petals that occupy the area, effectively acting as a smoke screen (as though it were a dense smoke that doesn't spread). You can immediately make a Hide check, even while being observed, against any creature affected by the illusion. Although the illusion itself covers only a small area, any creature that can see the area is affected by it, and such creatures cannot locate or detect you by any means while you remain within the technique's area. This technique cannot be dispelled.

name: HYUUGA RYU: HAKKE KUUSHOU (HYUUGA STYLE: VOID PALM OF DIVINATION )

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: Mob

You must be in a Jyuuken stance to use this technique. Make a Jyuuken attack against the target, as though they were in melee range. In addition, if the target is hit it must save to avoid being pushed back 1d4x5 ft. This attack counts as a ray attack, despite not using the same rules as most rays.

name: HYUUGA RYU: HAKKE ROKUJYUUYON SHOU (HYUUGA STYLE: 64 PALMS OF DIVINATION)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, Mob

You must be in a Jyuuken stance to use this technique. You make 4 Jyuuken attacks against the target, at your highest attack bonus. These attacks cannot score a critical hit and deal only half damage, but each hit deals an additional 1 point of Chakra damage, as well as 16 tenketsu damage. A creature's Chakra Pool cannot be reduced below 1 due to this damage. The target is dazed for 1 round (Fortitude negates).

Each additional time this technique or Hyuuga Ryuu: Ougi - Hakke Hyakunijuuhachi Shou is used against the same creature within a 24 hour period reduces the tenketsu damage per hit by 4.

name: HYUUGA RYU: HAKKESHOU KAITEN (HYUUGA STYLE: DIVINATION WHIRL)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, Mob

You must be in a Jyuuken stance and have your Byakugan ability active to use this technique. You make a Jyuuken attack at your highest attack bonus against each creature in the area, and those creatures are knocked back 5 ft. These attacks are considered Hyuuga Ryu: Jyuuken - Shodan Dachi attacks, regardless of which Jyuuken stance you are in.

Once you've used this technique, you can perform it again as an instant action up to once per round for the rest of the encounter. Doing so grants you a +4 deflection bonus to Defense against all attacks from a single opponent, in addition to Kaiten's normal effects.

name: HYUUGA RYU: JYUUKEN - NIDAN DACHI (HYUUGA STYLE: GENTLE FIST - SECOND STANCE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, Mas, Mob

Functions as Hyuuga Ryuu: Jyuuken - Shodan Dachi, except as above. The attacks deal 1d8 damage, and you can apply your Dexterity or Wisdom modifier instead of your Strength modifier to attack rolls (whichever is higher). If the Tenketsu Sealing ability is active, Jyuuken attacks in this stance deal 1d4 points of bonus damage on critical hit, per multiplier (1d4 on x2, 2d4 on x3, etc). In addition, the chance to strike incorporeal creatures increases to 50%.

Mastery: Each step increases your chance to strike an incorporeal creature with Jyuuken attacks while in this stance by 5%, and also allows you to add up to 2 points of your Dexterity or Wisdom modifier as a bonus to damage rolls for Jyuuken attacks in this stance.

name: HYUUGA RYU: JYUUKEN - SHODAN DACHI (HYUUGA STYLE: GENTLE FIST - FIRST STANCE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 3

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, Mas, Mob

This unique stance requires you to have your Byakugan ability active, and allows you to make a Jyuuken attack whenever you would roll a normal unarmed attack, or an attack for a technique that specifically allows for you to do so.

A Jyuuken attack is a melee touch attack to which you may apply your Wisdom modifier to hit instead of any other ability score modifier. The attack deals 1d6 damage, and will not gain bonus damage from your Strength, Strength Ranks or from the Melee Smash talents from the Strong Hero basic class. Other modifiers to unarmed attack damage apply. If your normal unarmed attack damage die is higher than 1d6, you may use that damage die instead.

Jyuuken attacks deal 50% bonus damage to Chakracreated creatures and objects (which does not include summoned creatures), and have a 25% chance to damage incorporeal creatures and a 25% chance to bypass a DR/Chakra. When making more than one attack in a single action, all damage of Jyuuken attacks is added together before applying hardness or damage resistances (A creature with DR 8/- that is hit by three Jyuuken attacks that deal 2, 3 and 6 damage would suffer 3 damage, not 0).

Once per encounter, you can use the Tenketsu Sealing ability (p312), even if you do not have it. If you do have the ability, this use does not count against your daily uses.

Mastery: Each step increases your chance to strike an incorporeal creature with Jyuuken attacks while in this stance by 5%. The second and fourth steps increase the number of times you can use the Tenketsu Sealing ability per encounter (or use it for free) by 1 each. The fifth step grants you a +1 damage bonus with Jyuuken attacks.

name: HYUUGA RYU: JYUUKEN OUGI - IGEKI HISSATSU (HYUUGA STYLE: GENTLE FIST SECRET SKILL - ONE-HIT KILL)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, Mas, Mob

You make a single Jyuuken attack against the target, and force a large amount of your own Chakra into the target's Chakra coils system.

The target's body attempts to expel it through their tenketsu forcefully. The attack's Chakra cost and effect is based entirely upon how many tenketsu damage the target has taken, (as shown in the table below). The target will be healed of 4d8 tenketsu damage as the Chakra blasts them open forcefully.

| Tenketsu Damage | Cost | Effect |
|-------------------|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 9 or less | 4 | 3d6 nonlethal damage |
| 10-50 | 12 | 7d6 damage; 1d6 Chakra coils damage |
| 51-99 | 14 | 9d6 damage; 1d8 Chakra coils damage |
| 100-199 | 16 | 12d6 damage; 1d10 Chakra coils damage |
| 200-359 | 18 | 15d6 damage; 1d12 Chakra coils damage |
| 360 | 20 | 20d6 damage; 3d8 Chakra coils damage |
| 361 | 26 | Save vs death. If saved, take damage as 360 tenketsu damage (above) |

name: HYUUGA RYU: KAI-MON GOUIN (HYUUGA STYLE: INITIAL GATE FORCEFUL RELEASE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 5

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 28

Components: C, Mob

You make an attack that reaches deeper within the target's Chakra pathways, targeting the Initial Gate.

You must be in the Hyuuga Ryu: Jyuuken - Nidan Dachi stance to use this technique. Make a jyuuken attack against the target. If the target is hit, it suffers normal damage and must make a save. If they fail, the Initial Gate is forced open, and the target will gain the benefit of Kai-mon Kai (See Hachimon Tonkou, p239). For the duration of this technique, the Gate cannot be closed, and if the target does not have the Initiate of the Eight Celestial Gates feat, they will suffer double damage from the Gate. Once the duration ends, the target can close the Gate, even if they do not know Kai-mon Kai, but they will suffer the normal effects of it being closed.

Alternatively, this technique can be used to cancel its own effects on another creature, which also instantly closes the Gate. Doing so costs no Chakra, but you must make an opposed level check against the creature who used this technique on the target to successfully end its effects.

name: HYUUGA RYU: KEIKETSU KYUUJO (HYUUGA STYLE: NEEDLE POINT RELIEF)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C

You release a specific pressure point on the target, granting them a +2 bonus to Chakra Control checks and increasing their natural Chakra recovery rate by 50% if it chooses to rest. This technique cannot be used on yourself.

name: HYUUGA RYU: OUGI - HAKKE HYAKUNIJUUHACHI SHOU (HYUUGA STYLE: SECRET SKILL - 128 PALMS OF DIVINATION)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 13 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 29 | Successes: 6

Perform: 17 | Perform DC: 33

Components: C, Mob

You must be in a Jyuuken stance to use this technique. You make 8 Jyuuken attacks against the target, at your highest attack bonus. These attacks cannot score a critical hit and deal only half damage, but each hit deals an additional 1 point of Chakra coils damage, as well as 16 tenketsu damage. A creature's Chakra Pool cannot be reduced below 1 due to this damage. In addition, the target is stunned for 1 round, which can be saved against.

Each additional time this technique or Hyuuga Ryuu: Hakke Rokujyuuyon Shou is used against the same creature within a 24 hour period reduces the tenketsu damage per hit by 4.

name: HYUUGA RYU: OUGI - HAKKE TENKUUSHOU (HYUUGA STYLE: SECRET SKILL - HEAVENLY VOID PALM OF DIVINATION)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: Mob, E

This technique is identical to Hyuuga Ryuu: Hakke Kuushou. If the target hits an object of its own size or larger weighing at least four times as much as it, it suffers 1d4 damage per 10 ft the knockback was cut short.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage and knockback by 1 die, up to 8d6 damage and 5d4 x 5 ft knockback.

name: HYUUGA RYU: OUGI - HAKKESHOU DAIKAITEN (HYUUGA STYLE: SECRET SKILL - GREAT DIVINATION WHIRL)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 5

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 28

Components: None

Functions as Hyuuga Ryuu: Hakkeshou Kaiten. The knockback increases to 10 ft, and attacks count as Hyuuga Ryuu: Jyuuken - Nidan Dachi attacks even if you're not in that stance. Targets are also knocked prone (Reflex negates).

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 12 | Successes: 2

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 11

Components: M, S

Using this technique, you create a length of spider silk to serve as a rope, which is attached to an anchor point, which must be an object, structure or surface of Medium-size or larger that can support your weight. The silk rope will support the weight of two Mediumsize creatures, has DR 5/fire and 6 HP.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, E, M

You fire a web of sticky spider silk to hinder or capture a foe. If a Small or smaller creature is hit by 1 or 2 webs, it becomes entangled or immobilized, respectively. For Medium creatures, the same is true if hit by 2 or 4 webs. For Large, the numbers are 4 and 8. The entanglement lasts 2d4+1 rounds, and two consecutive Strength or Escape Artist checks (DC 15) can be made to break free. The immobilization lasts for 2d6 rounds, and three consecutive Strength or Escape Artist checks (DC 18) can be made to break free.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to fire an additional web, up to 1 per 3 levels. Each web can target the same or a different creature.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: M,S

You create projectiles of hardened, golden spider silk, up to 1 per 2 levels. Each projectile is immediately fired, requiring a ranged attack roll. The projectiles have a critical of (19-20, x2) and deal 1d4+1 piercing damage.

name: KUMONENDOU NO JUTSU (VISCOUS SPIDER PROJECTION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, M

You spit out a long stream of spider silk towards a creature, attempting to stick to it and fling it away. The target must be your size category or smaller. If hit, the target is thrown 1d6 x 5 ft in a direction of your choosing (except directly away from you), and may suffer fall damage. If the target impacts a hard object or surface, it suffers 1d4 damage per 10 ft of the knockback.

name: KUMONENKIN NO JUTSU (GOLD SPIDER SCYTHE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 4

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, H, M

You create one or more kama or kusari-gama, made from solidified, golden spider silk (choose which type when performing this technique). The technique's cost is based on the weapon(s) created. The weapons are always made for your size, have a hardness of 5 and 7 HP. You are always proficient with the created weapons. When the technique ends, the weapons turn into ordinary spider silk threads.

Kama: The weapon acts like a normal kama, but deals one bonus piercing damage. A single kama costs 2 Chakra, and you can create up to 1 per 3 levels.

Kusari-gama: The weapon acts like a normal kusarigama, but you gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls made with it. A single kusari-gama costs 3 Chakra, and you can create up to 1 per 5 levels.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: E, H, M

You fire a long thread of hardened, golden silk, dealing 7d6 piercing damage to all creatures in its way.

Empower: Spend 5 Chakra and one additional kumonosu to extend the range by 25 ft (up to 100 ft total).

name: KUMONOSU ROKEN NO JUTSU (SPIDER WEB DETECTION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 5

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: H, M

You create a fine web of silken threads, covering the surfaces around you. Any creature that is in direct contact with the ground or a connected surface within range is immediately detected and located by you. While concentrating, you remain aware of all such creatures 'caught' within the web. The technique ends if you move from the location where you used the technique.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: H, M, E

You fire a large concentration of webbing from your mouth, creating a web at the target square, which is treated as a web spun by a Monstrous Spider one size larger than you (see D20 Modern, p245) and lasts for 1d4 hours or until destroyed. Any creature caught in a cone between you and the target square (its width reaches only up to 10 ft) must save or be pushed back into the web.

To properly use this technique, the target square must be capable of supporting a web.

Empower: Spend 7 Chakra and 1 additional kumonosu to increase the size of the web by 10 x 10 ft (and thus widen the cone), up to a total of a 50 ft squares.

name: DATTOUMARU RYU: KOURAI DACHI (DATTOUMARU STYLE: RISING THUNDER STANCE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, Mob

You can only use this stance while your Hiraishin is active. Half your unarmed attack damage becomes electric, and you gain electric resistance 5. On a critical hit, unarmed attacks deal 1d10 bonus electricity damage.

Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 3

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: F, H, Mas

You raise a wall of ice, which is 4 inches thick, has 12 HP, 2 hardness and can be broken by a Strength check (DC 15).

Mastery: Each step increases the number of times per day you can use this technique as a defensive maneuver by 1. The first step allows you to defend against attacks from sources of a CR up to your level or 5 (whichever is lower). Each additional step increases the CR by 5.

Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 5

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, F, H

You create a dome of Chakra-empowered, reflective ice 'mirrors' around the edges of the area. Each mirror occupies a single 5 ft square. While your Hyouma ability is active, you can move freely between them at your full speed, in any direction (even vertical). As long as you occupy a square containing a mirror, you gain a +3 bonus to your Speed Rank (cannot improve Speed

Ranks past Speed Rank 6), and gain the ability to hide without cover against any creature caught in the dome.

While you occupy a mirror, your reflection is shown by all mirrors, and due to this effect and your high speed, when you exit a mirror, you do not provoke attacks of opportunity from moving through or out of another creature's threatened area until your next turn, as long as you stay within the dome. While within a mirror, you are immune to physical attacks and techniques (until the mirror is destroyed).

There is sufficient space between the mirrors for a Medium-size creature to move through, but a creature doing so provokes an attack of opportunity from you, which will knock it back inside the area if it hits (Does not allow you to make more attacks of opportunity than normal).

Each mirror (24 along the ground perimeter, and 36 stacked in two levels on top of it) has 20 HP, 5 hardness, fire resistance and immunity to cold damage. If a mirror is destroyed, creatures can freely move through the empty space, without provoking an attack of opportunity. You can spend a move action to restore up to 1d4 mirrors, +1 per level (up to 10) each round, spending 1 Chakra per mirror.

Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, E

You freeze moisture from the air, forming thin blades of ice that spin around you at high speed, dealing 3d6 cold and 2d6 wind damage to other creatures within the area.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the wind or cold damage by 1d6 (up to 7d6 per damage type or 1d6 per level total, whichever is lower).

Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, Mob, S

This technique functions as Jigen Ugoku no Jutsu (p172), except as above, and you can only teleport to a square containing a Hyoushou or Makyou Hyoushou barrier, or a square adjacent to one, and you cannot bring other creatures with you.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: H, Mas

Your Katsugan deactivates: you no longer pay its cost or gain its benefits. You also become blinded for the technique's duration (Fortitude DC 20 negates).

Mastery: Each step grants a cumulative +2 bonus to the save to resist being blinded.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, M

You declare one separate target for each attack your base attack bonus grants you, each of which must be affected by Keirigan Jutsu: Hissatsugaku or Keirigan Jutsu: Ousatsugaku. You make an attack at your highest attack bonus against all targets, moving up to your full speed while doing so. The attacks benefit from the Destruction Mark feat, and deal weapon damage +12d6 on hit. This extra damage is not multiplied on critical hits.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 6

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: C, E, Mas

This technique is identical to Keirigan Jutsu: Hissatsugaku, except as above.

Empower: Spend 3 Chakra to affect another target creature, up to 1 target per 4 levels total.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, Mas

You make a Spot check to assess the target's condition (as per the Keirigan ability) to gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls against the target, and you can lower your Keirigan bonus by any amount (to no lower than 0) to gain the same amount as a weapon damage bonus against the target. If you have the Destruction Mark feat, you can apply it on your next attack against the target. A failed Spot check still grants a +2 bonus to your attack rolls for your next attack.

Mastery: Each step grants a +1 bonus to the Spot check. The fifth step lets you use this technique as a Swift action once per encounter, at a cost of 6 Chakra.

name: KEIRIGAN SAIKOU HIKEN - SAITEN (KEIRIGAN ULTIMATE SECRET SKILL - BREAKING POINT)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 15 (Spell Level 8)

Chakra Cost: 20

Learn DC: 40 | Successes: 8

Perform: 23 | Perform DC: 45

Components: C

You make a Spot check against a target creature, object or structure within range, opposed by the creature's touch Defense or the object or structure's Craft DC. If successful, your next offensive action against the target ignores all of its hardness, damage reductions, energy resistances, energy immunities, Chakra resistance and Chakra immunity, as well as bypassing all armor, natural armor and deflection bonuses to Defense. The attack can score a critical hit and deal sneak attack damage, even against creatures normally immune to either, and if you roll a critical threat on the attack, it is automatically confirmed.

Alternatively, you can spend one full round to apply the knowledge gained to destroy the object or structure (some limitations may apply, GM's call).

Mastery: Each step grants a +1 bonus to the Spot check made as part of this technique. Each step after the first allows you to use this technique as a defensive maneuver an additional time per day. The fifth step allows you to use this technique as a swift action once per day.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 6

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: H, E, Mas

This technique can only be learned if selected when taking the Mangekyou Sharingan feat. Your Mangekyou Sharingan needs to be active to use this technique, but not to concentrate on it. Add your Sharingan Eye bonus to Concentration checks made to maintain this technique. You gain a +4 bonus to overcome Chakra Resistance when using this technique.

You project intense black flames through your Mangekyou Sharingan, targeting up to one creature or unattended object (within line of sight) per round. Each target suffers 2d6 fire damage, halved with a Reflex save. On a failed save, the target will catch on fire for 1 round per level, or per damage die the burst of fire dealt (whichever is lower). You cannot choose the same target more than three times per use of this technique. If a target that is caught on fire is hit again, the duration of its catching fire will be refreshed.

Creatures that catch fire due to this technique can attempt to put it out as normal, but the save DC to do so is increased to 25. For 1 minute after it is created, Amaterasu flames cannot be doused by water, unless created or manipulated by a creature with at least 18 ranks of Ninjutsu through the use of a Suiton technique.

If fired at a surface, a 5ft-square will catch on fire, dealing half the flame's damage to any creature coming into contact with it while it burns. Such fire does not spread, but burns until everything within it is consumed.

As the technique ends, you suffer 1 Mangekyou Sharingan Blindness, plus 1 for every 2 rounds you keep concentrating on this technique after the first.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 15d6. You must empower each attack with this technique separately.

Mastery: Amaterasu ignores 3 fire resistance per step.

Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C

The subject feels and sees itself becoming bound by massive shackling stakes, and is frozen in place as though paralyzed, though it does not drop what it may be holding. When the subject suffers total damage equal to your level or greater, the technique ends. This illusion can be dispelled.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 36

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, S

This technique can only be learned if selected when you took the Mangekyou Sharingan feat. You gain a +4 bonus to checks made to overcome any Chakra Resistance with this technique.

One of the most powerful techniques of the Mangekyou Sharingan, this technique is virtually unknown, except to those who have used it. Kamui creates a singularity leading to a separate dimension. You must have your Sharingan ability active, and cannot use this technique when blinded or if both eyes are covered or otherwise not usable. If one of your eyes is not usable, or if you are dazzled, the technique deals only half damage.

The target suffers 2d4 damage per level (up to 40d4), though a successful save reduces the damage to 2d6, +1 per level (up to 2d6+20). If the target is killed by this damage, its body disappears from this world. After this technique is used, you suffer 1 point of Mangekyou Sharingan Blindness.

name: MAGEN: KYOUTEN CHITEN (DEMONIC MIRAGE: MIRROR OF HEAVEN AND EARTH)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 4

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 29

Components: C

Your sharingan must be active to use this technique. The first time you make a successful save against a harmful genjutsu before your next turn, you can 'bounce' the genjutsu to any creature within 30 ft, as long as you are aware of them.

The new target is now targeted by the genjutsu, as though it had been the original target (it can still make a save, and CR still applies).

Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3
