Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: E, H

This technique can be used in one of two ways:

Sharingan Mirage (Requires Glare (a)): The subject falls unconscious for 1d6+1 rounds, after which it is dazed for 1 round. The subject will lose all memory from 1 round before it fell unconscious to when it became dazed, except highly impactful events.

Technique Copy: You gain a gaze attack, which increases the success chance of your Ninja's Mimicry abilities against any creature affected by the gaze attack (no save, is avoided completely by a creature using avert one's gaze).

Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 29 | Successes: 8

Perform: 17 | Perform DC: 37

Components: C, E, H, Mas

This technique can only be learned if you selected it when you took the Mangekyou Sharingan feat.

You combine powerful illusory powers with the special spacetime distortion capabilities of the Mangekyou Sharingan, which must be active when using this technique. You empower your eyes with Tsukuyomi until you target a creature with it through a gaze attack. The subject will then be taken to an illusory realm within its own mind, where time operates differently. No matter the usage, the subject will be stunned for 1 round after the illusion ends (Will negates).

A creature can only be subjected to Tsukuyomi once per 24 hour period (in reality), and any ability damage inflicted (as below) takes twice as long to recover. You also gain a +4 bonus to checks to overcome Chakra Resistance with this technique. A creature with the Sharingan ability gains a bonus to its saves to resist this technique equal to its Sharingan ability bonus.

The technique has one of two effects, either to have you relay a message or to have you torture the target.

Either way, the effects lasts only a few seconds in reality, but lasts for up to 1 day in the perception of both yourself and the subject.

Message - You can converse with the subject normally, in an illusory environment.

Torture - You have the subject experience extreme torture, at your own hands or at those of an illusion. The torture can include any kind of mental and/or physical torture, and due to the mental stress it causes the subject may feel like the torture lasts much longer than it actually does. Each 'day' of torture inflicts 1d4+2 permanent Wisdom damage (Will negates), as well as 4d6 damage. The Wisdom damage can only be healed by a character of level 16 or higher, or by a character with at least 8 levels of Medical Specialist. A character who falls to 0 Wisdom or below will slip into a coma, and remains so until their Wisdom is restored to 1 or higher. On the subject's next turn, they take 1d6 damage per 'day' they were tortured.

If the subject survives the torture and did not reach 0 Wisdom, any Wisdom damage inflicted is removed after 24 hours, but the subject will take 1d4 temporary Intelligence and Charisma damage. As a downside, you suffer 1 mangekyou sharingan blindness if you torture the subject for more than a day, and an additional 6 mangekyou sharingan blind-ness if you torture the subject for more than three days.

Empower: Spend 6 Chakra to increase the duration of the technique by 1 day (inside the illusion, realworld duration unchanged), up to a maximum of 4 days total.

Mastery: The fifth step increases the maximum number of days to 5. If you choose to torture a creature for five days, you suffer an additional 6 points of mange-kyou sharingan blindness.

Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, Mas

This technique can only be used while your Sharingan ability is active. The subject becomes fascinated (p13) by your eyes, staring into your sharingan and dropping anything it is holding. You can concentrate on this technique no more than 3 rounds after your Sharingan is disabled, even if the duration would allow for it.

While fascinated, the subject has a 5% chance of having any rage or frenzy effect on them ended each round, and you gain a +2 bonus to Charisma-based checks made against them. Each round, the subject can make an additional save to end the technique.

This technique can be used once per day.

Mastery: The second and fourth steps increases the number of uses per day by one each.

name: KAMARATSU NO MAI (DANCE OF THE LARCH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Enhancement)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 5

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, P

You draw out the bones in your body, forming a protective but deadly armor. You gain a +3 natural armor bonus to Defense, and any creature attacking you with a natural weapon, or a held weapon of Small size or smaller, takes 1d4 piercing damage even if it misses. Your unarmed attacks deal damage as though they were claw attacks of a creature one size larger than you.Once every three rounds, you can spend a full-round action to spin wildly, making an attack at your highest attack bonus against all adjacent opponents.

name: SAWARABI NO MAI (DANCE OF THE SEEDLING FERNS)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 20

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 6

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 31

Components: C, Mob, P

You focus and empower your bones, sending them through the ground to rip through the area, dealing 6d12 piercing damage. The area remains littered with giant bone spikes, as if a thick forest of trees, which you can merge and move through (as per Mokuton: Kiugoku no Jutsu, but only allowing movement through the bone spikes). The bones are 10 to 15 feet tall, and count as though they were Large trees. Once dismissed or the duration expires, the bones wither and crumble. This technique can be used while underground and within 5 ft of the surface.

area.value: 20 ft Burst centered on you, or a 30 ft long, 10 ft wide Line (S)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, Mob

You fire bullets of bone from your fingers, up to five per hand you have free. Each bullet is a ranged attack with a bone weapon. It has a range increment of 20 ft, a maximum range of 200 ft, Kawarimi Defense 1, and deals 1d4+1 ballistic damage on hit. You do not suffer the normal penalties for creating a bone weapon when using this technique, as the bone and skin are instantly regenerated.

The Cost increases by 1 for each bullet fired beyond the first.

name: TSUBAKI NO MAI (DANCE OF THE CAMELLIA)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: Mob

Make a Full Attack with your bone weapon against the target, gaining an additional attack at your highest attack bonus -5. For 1 round after the attacks, you gain a +1 bonus to Reflex saves, and a +1 dodge bonus to Defense.

name: YANAGI NO MAI (DANCE OF THE WILLOW)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C

You immediately create two bone weapons (one per hand). While in this stance, you can retract and extend these weapons into (and from) your body as a move action. The weapons are part of your body, and any damage dealt to them is therefor dealt to you. In addi- tion, when you are struck in melee with an unarmed attack, or with a held weapon of Small or smaller size, you can spend 4 Chakra to sprout sharp bones in retaliation, dealing 1d6+1 piercing damage to the attacker. You can do this only once per round.

When the technique ends, the bone weapons return to your body.

name: TESSENKA NO MAI (DANCE OF THE CLEMATIS)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 7

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 29

Components: C, Mob, P

This technique is the fourth dance of the Kaguya style, and was made forbidden due to its extremely dangerous nature to the user. When using this technique, you can produce one of two highly advanced bone weapons:

Vine: You pull out your spine, which turns into a bone weapon one size larger than you that counts as both a bone weapon and a spiked chain. It has a reach of 15 ft, but can be used to attack adjacent opponents as well, and will deal triple damage on a critical hit. When creating the Vine, you are immediately paralyzed for 1 minute, and fatigued for 1 hour afterwards (Fortitude DC 15 negates both). You can only create one Vine every 24 hours, and it crumbles to dust after 6 hours (as a normal bone weapon).

Flower: You focus power into one of your arms, extracting a bone of superior thickness and density. The extracted weapon is a Colossal size bone weapon (4d6 damage, 18-20/x2 critical). If you were of a Large size when using this technique, it deals 5d6 damage instead. The Flower lasts 1 round per level, and leaves the used arm completely unusable for 1 hour (as per the Bone Weapon ability).

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 6

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, H

You infuse yourself with poison, with the goal of enhancing your bone weapons. Each bone weapon you create while the technique lasts will contain an Injury poison (Fortitude DC 16, primary damage is 2d6 negative energy damage, secondary damage is 1d4 temporary Strength damage). The poison on a weapon lasts for 1 attack per 3 levels. You suffer 1d6 damage 1 minute after the technique was performed.

name: KIKAI BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (BUG REPLICATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 3

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: F, H

You use a number of kikaichuu, infusing them with Chakra to shape them into a humanoid shape. If you attempt to mimic the appearance of a specific person, you must make a Disguise check for each clone you with to mimic the appearance with. Clones have the same statistics as you, but cannot speak or take actions that require the ability to reason. They suffer a -4 penalty to attack rolls and saves, cannot use techniques and have 1 HP per 2 levels.

This technique can transform any released kikaichuu within range, forming the clone in their square, or you can release the required kikaichuu from your body while performing the technique, in which case the clone(s) appear next to you. A clone can contain more than one kikaichuu, if you wish. A kikai bunshin that is destroyed or moves further than 500 ft from you loses its shape and turns back into its component kikaichuu.

If the clone contained more than one kikaichuu, the additional swarms move to adjacent squares

This technique creates up to one Kikai Bunshin per 4 levels. Each costs 4 Chakra to make.

name: KIKAI DOKUKESHI NO JUTSU (BUG POISON PURGE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 5

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, F

You imbue one of your kikaichuu with the ability to suck out poison from the target, reversing any damage and removing the need for any additional saves. The used kikaichuu returns to your body, where it must rest for 1 day until it can be used again. This technique can only be used on a creature that is also a host to kikaichuu.

name: KIKAI GISEI NO JUTSU (BUG SACRIFICE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: (Spell Level 0)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: | Successes:

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

Used when you take damage from any source, you sac- rifice a kikaichuu inside your body to absorb 8 of the damage.

name: KIKAI SHINKU NO JUTSU (BUG RECOVERY TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 3

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: F, H

All kikaichuu within range that are under your control return to your body immediately.

Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 3

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C

You force the subject to obey one command per fifteen levels, from the list below. Subjects can make an additional save at a -4 penalty each round to end the effects.

- Approach: The subject moves towards you as quickly and directly as possible, taking no actions other than moving.
- Drop: On its turn, the subject drops whatever they are holding and cannot pick it back up until their next turn.
- Fall: The subject falls to the ground and remains prone, though it can take actions while remaining prone.
- Flee: As Approach, but it moves away from you instead.
- Halt: The subject stands in place and takes no actions, but will defend itself normally.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: H, F

You conduct a mass of sand into a wave 40ft wide and 10ft tall, which moves out from you in a line at a speed of 45 feet per round while you concentrate and the wave remains in range. Any Large or smaller creature hit by the wave must save or be pushed back 1d6 x 5 feet. Huge or larger creatures are unaffected.

Creatures of Medium size and smaller must make an additional Fortitude save to avoid being buried far enough to be affected by the Sabaku Taiso technique. Creatures so buried can escape by making two Escape Artist checks (DC 22) as a full-round action or by simply moving out if they have a burrow speed.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, P, Mas

You can control sand and make it float through the Sand Manipulation technique without needing to make Concentration checks, and reduce the cost to do so to 3 Chakra per 2 rounds. You will be fatigued once this technique expires. You cannot use this technique if you are controlled by Shukaku or under the effects of Shukaku Metamorphosis.

Mastery: The fifth step of Mastery allows you to make a Fortitude save (DC 15) to negate the fatigue.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, F

You can choose to trap a creature, or a creature's limb. A creature whose limb is trapped is Entangled, while a creature who is entirely trapped becomes immobilized. A creature so held is a viable target for the Sabaku Sousou technique (further below). Creatures can attempt to free themselves by spending a full-round action making a Break check (DC 35).

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 4

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 28

Components: C, F

You trap a target in a sphere of sand, which weighs as much as the subject, and can be moved by the Sand Manipulation ability if it is light enough. If the target is mounted, use the mount's Reflex save. Both the mount and its rider are captured if the save fails, as long as the sphere can hold them both. If the mount is bigger than Large, it cannot be caught in the prison.

Captured creatures can breathe and move freely within the sphere, but suffer a 50% failure chance when attempting to perform any technique with the Mobility, Half-Seals or Hand Seals component(s), or use spells with a Somatic component. While inside, they are protected from all attacks and area affects, which will affect the sphere instead.

The sphere has Hardness 10, hp equal to three times your level, and is immune to earth damage. It has a Defense of 12 and can be attacked from within, though the attacker takes a -4 penalty to hit. Alternatively, it can be destroyed by a Break check (DC 35). If the sphere suffers fire damage equal to half its hit points or more, it turns to glass, and becomes useless once the duration expires (though it is still destroyed if it suffers enough fire damage in one hit).

You can use the Sabaku Sousou technique on enemies within the sphere with increased effect (see Sabaku Sousou).

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C

This technique can be used on a target held by Sabaku Kyuu or Sabaku Rou, and immediately dispels it after this technique finishes.

If the target is entangled by Sabaku Kyuu, it suffers 6d6 damage, and the affected limb becomes unusable until regenerated or healed by the likes of Iryou Ninjutsu: Hiken - Nikuteki Taisha. If it's immobilized by Sabaku Kyuu or held by Sabaku Rou, it suffers 6d10 damage instead, and must make a save against massive damage. In either case, a successful save halves the damage.

If the target is held within a sphere created by Sabaku Rou, you can perform this technique without meeting its Perform Requirements, and can empower it for 1 additional die of damage at the cost of 2 Chakra (maximum 12 total dice). A target held by Sabaku Rou counts as though immobilized by sand.

If the target is disabled or starts dying due to this technique, it suffers 2d6 Strength damage (Fortitude halves).

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 5

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 29

Components: H

You send forth waves of Chakra through the ground, compressing and collapsing a large area of soft ground (such as loose dirt or sand). The technique's area reaches below the surface, up to 5 foot per level deep. Any creatures that are underground suffer 9d10 damage.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, F, Mas

You create a cocoon of sand around yourself or a willing creature, protecting the held creature from attacks and area effects as though it had full cover.

The cocoon has a hardness of 8, 3 hit points per level, and is immune to earth damage. It can be attacked from within, or broken with a Break check (DC 35). If the cocoon suffers fire damage equal to half its hit points or more, it turns to glass, and becomes useless once the duration expires (though it is still destroyed if it suffers enough fire damage in one hit).

Mastery: Every step of Mastery after the first adds an additional use of this technique per day, and allows you to defend against attacks from a higher CR.

The first step of Mastery increases that CR to 5. Each additional step of Mastery increases the CR by an additional 5, but increases the cost of using the technique as a defensive maneuver by 1 while doing so.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 20

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, F

You gain DR 10/Ballistic, as well as fire and electricity resistance 10. The armor can soak up 10 points of physical and energy damage each per level (maximum 150 of each), after which it expires. While in effect, you add the weight of the sand to your worn equipment.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, F

You send a volley of deadly sand pellets to rain down on an area for one round. Creatures within the area take 2d6 Piercing and 2d6 Earth damage, and have their land and flight movement speed halved, though it does not restrict them from running.

name: TANUKI NEIRI NO JUTSU (SPELL OF FAKE SLEEP)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 5

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: S, F, XP

This technique is used to bring you into a deep slumber, allowing you to directly control the Shukaku sealed inside of you. While the technique lasts, you gain control of the Shukaku's body, but retain your own mind.

You gain all of the Shukaku's stats and abilities, except its Intelligence, Wisdom and Charisma scores, its Fear Aura and Darkvision abilities, its techniques and its Chakra Pool. You can only use techniques requiring abilities from the Bearer of the Shukaku template while transformed, and suffer 1 Wisdom damage each round.

When you reach 0 Wisdom, the Shukaku takes control (as per Shukaku Metamorphosis). As a full-round action, you may grant the Shukaku control to avoid taking further Wisdom damage. You will not remember anything the Shukaku does while it is in control.

If the Shukaku is killed, you die as well. You do not gain any experience for damage caused while the Shukaku is in control.

name: NYOUKAI NO KUCHITSUKE (KISS OF THE SUCCUBUS)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 0

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, Mas

The target must be a creature you are grappling with and have pinned. Make a Grapple check against the target. If successful, the target can make a Reflex save (DC 20) to avoid being 'kissed' by you. If it does not, you may use the Chakra Vampire ability to drain 1d6 Chakra, though the target can make a Fortitude save (DC 15) to resist, having you drain only 1 Chakra if successful. Cannot be used two rounds in a row.

Mastery: The fifth step increases the Chakra drain to 1d8 on a successful kiss.

name: YOUTON: DAIMYOURIKI (DEMONIC RELEASE: GREATER VILE POWER)

description.value:
Type: Training (Ninjutsu)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 5

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

You gain the Strength Rank 2 extraordinary ability. While learning this technique, you take 1d4 damage per level each day, which heals after 8 hours of rest.

Type: Training (Ninjutsu)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 4

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

You gain the Strength Rank 1 extraordinary ability. While learning this technique, you take 1 damage per level each day, which heals after 8 hours of rest.

name: YOUTON: SHINMYOURIKI (DEMONIC RELEASE: TRUE VILE POWER)

description.value:
Type: Training (Ninjutsu)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 6

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

You gain the Strength Rank 3 extraordinary ability. While learning this technique, you take 1d6 damage per level each day, which heals after 8 hours of rest.

name: YOUTON: KAIMON NO JUTSU (DEMONIC RELEASE: DESTRUCTION GATE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: S

You summon terrible images, memories and thoughts within your mind to trigger a controlled breakdown, which allows you to immediately enter your Blazing Rage, but causes you to suffer a -2 penalty to saves against Fear effects for the duration of the Rage (or Kyuubi Manifestation), plus 1d4 minutes afterward.

Once the Rage ends, you suffer 1 temporary Charisma damage (Will DC 16 negates).

name: MAJIN KOUSEI NO JUTSU (DEVILISH REGENERATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: (Spell Level 0)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 1

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 10

Components: C

You coax out the Kyuubi's healing power without allowing its Chakra to overpower your senses. You must pay for this technique's cost with all the Chakra gained by using the Overwhelming Chakra ability. You gain 2d10 temporary HP, Fast Healing 2 and a +4 bonus to Fortitude saves against massive damage for 1d4 rounds.

name: MA'EN JUTSU: EN'MI (FIENDFIRE TECHNIQUE: SEED OF FLAME)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 4

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: F, Mas, S

You carve fiery seals into your flesh, granting you a +1 bonus to Perform checks made to perform Katon techniques, and such techniques deal 1 additional fire damage.This techniques takes up one seal slot, and you deal yourself 1 damage when performing it. The seal's effects do not stack with itself.

Mastery: The third step requires ECL 8 or higher, and allows you to spend 2 additional Chakra and deal yourself 2 additional damage to double the seal's bonuses.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 4

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, F

You carve smoldering seals into your flesh, which remain dormant until activated as an attack action.

When activated, you can make a ray attack against a target within 20 ft, dealing 2d6 force damage and, if the target is no larger than Medium size, knocking it back 1d4 x 5 ft. The subject also falls prone (Fortitude negates). Alternatively, you can make an unarmed attack against an adjacent foe, adding the damage and effects of the ray to the attack if it hits. CR applies to the activation effect of the seal.

This technique takes up one seal slot, and you deal yourself 2 damage when performing it.

Empower: Spend 3 Chakra and deal yourself 2 additional damage to increase both the damage and the knockback by 1 die.

name: MA'EN JUTSU: KAENFUBATSU (FIENDFIRE TECHNIQUE: INDOMITABLE FIRE)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 4

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: F, S

On activation, you gain a +8 bonus to a single opposed roll when being attacked by a bull rush, overrun or grapple attempt. This technique takes up one seal slot, and you deal yourself 1 damage when performing it. The seal's effects do not stack with itself.

name: MA'EN JUTSU: KAENGUI (FIENDFIRE TECHNIQUE: FLAME EATER)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 5

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: E, F, S

You carve sizzling runes into yourself. The seal absorbs the first 10 points of fire damage that would be dealt to you, after which it blackens and becomes inactive.

While the seal is active, you can spend a full-round action which requires concentration to absorb any energy absorbed by the seal, gaining either 1 temporary Chakra or 2 temporary HP per 5 fire damage the seal had absorbed, which will last for 5 minutes. Doing so will cause the rune to fade and disappear. This technique takes up one seal slot, and you deal yourself 2 damage when performing it. You cannot have more than one of this seal at the same time.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra and deal yourself 1 additional damage to increase the amount of Chakra the seal can absorb by 3 (up to 25 damage absorption total).

name: MA'EN JUTSU: KAENRAKUIN (FIENDFIRE TECHNIQUE: BLAZING BRAND)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 4

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, E, F, S

You carve sizzling runes into the palm of your hand, remaining dormant until activated as an attack action.

When activated, you make a melee touch attack that does not provoke attacks of opportunity. If the attack hits, this seal is discharged with a bright, fiery glow as it leaves a mark identical to the seal on the target for 1 day afterward. When you hit, you can consume one seal created by Ma'en Jutsu: En'mi that you have, dealing 2d6 fire damage. (CR applies) When you hit and consume seals, both this seal and any En'mi seals consumed fade.

This technique takes up one seal slot, and you deal yourself 2 damage when performing it.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra and deal yourself 1 additional damage to consume an additional En'mi seal, adding another 2d6 damage.

Spend 4 Chakra to increase the damage dealt per En'mi seal consumed by 1d6 (up to 4d6 total per seal).

name: MA'EN JUTSU: SHOUKEN RYU (FIENDFIRE TECHNIQUE: BURNING FIST STYLE )

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 4

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, Mob

This unique stance can only be activated if you have an active seal created by the Ma'en Juts: En'mi technique.

In this stance, you gain a ranged touch attack with a range of 10 ft, which uses your Intelligence modifier to hit (instead of your Dexterity modifier) and deals 1d6 fire damage. These attacks are considered unarmed attacks to determine the number of attacks you can make.

Empower: At ECL 8 or higher, you can spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage to 1d8. At ECL 16 or higher, you can spend 4 Chakra to increase the damage to 2d6. Mastery does not apply to your ECL for this.

Mastery: The third step increases the range of the attacks to 15 ft if they have been empowered to deal 1d8 damage. The fifth step increases the range to 20 ft if they have been empowered to 2d6.

name: MA'EN JUTSU: YOUNI KASOUKU (FIENDFIRE TECHNIQUE: FIENDISH CELERITY )

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 5

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, E, F, S

You carve fiery runes into yourself, which becomes dormant until activated. While dormant, the runes increase your land speed by 5 ft.

The seal's activation and bonuses are identical to those of Ketsuyoujutsu: Kaisoku, and once activated it also disappears much like Kaisoku. This techniques takes up one seal slot, and you deal yourself 3 damage when performing it. Only one Fiendish Celerity or Fiendish Potence (see next technique) seal can be applied on you at the same time. This technique cannot be used more than once every 24 hours.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra and deal yourself 1 additional damage to increase the bonus on activation by +1 (up to +12 total).

name: MA'EN JUTSU: YOUNI SEIRYOKU (FIENDFIRE TECHNIQUE: FIENDISH POTENCE)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 5

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

This technique functions like Ma'en Jutsu: Youmi Kasouku, except as below. (You still damage yourself and follow the same limitations as with Youmi Kasouku).

The rune's passive bonuses are except the rune passively grants a +1 bonus to weapon damage rolls and Strength-based checks. It's activation and activated effects emulate the Ketsuyoujutsu: Seiryoku seal instead of the Kaisoku seal.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra and deal yourself 1 additional damage to increase the bonus on activation by either +1 (weapon damage) or +2 (Strength-based checks), up to a total of +12 or +24, respectively.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 30

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 7

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, F

In preparation for this technique, you must spend 2 rounds drawing a seal on the ground, requiring a Craft (Calligraphy) check (DC 20), which provokes attacks of opportunity. The seal covers the surface of a single 5 ft square, within which you must stand when performing this technique.

You ingest some blood belonging to the target, and attempt to link your bodies together. If the target succeeds at its save, the seal you drew vanishes and the technique ends. If they fail, your skin turns black, with a white, skeletal outline. While the subject is within range, any damage or healing you take is also given to the target, and the same is true for any physical effect inflicted upon you (such as poison), even if you are immune to such an effect, though the target does receive its own save against the effect, if it allows for one. This link also works the other way, so you share any damage, healing and physical effects inflicted upon the subject. If you hold a Small or larger weapon, you can provoke a massive damage save for yourself, or make a coup de grace attack on yourself, with the target suffering appropriate damage and needing to make a save as well.

The link is only active while you stand on the seal, and its effects become inactive until you return to the seal. Once the duration expires, the seal vanishes. Material Focus - A drop of the target's blood.

name: INUZUKA RYU: DYNAMIC AIR MARKING (INUZUKA STYLE: DYNAMIC AIR MARKING)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: Mob

This technique can only be used by a Medium-sized or smaller animal. The animal jumps into the air and sprays the target with a scent marker (such as urine). The target is blinded for 1d4 rounds and is marked.

A marked target can be tracked by smell, even by creatures who are not normally capable of doing so. The mark counts as an overpowering scent, and any creature with the Scent ability can instantly pinpoint its location if they can smell it. The mark's scent cannot be hidden by any means.

name: INUZUKA RYU: GAROUGA (INUZUKA STYLE: GREAT WOLF FANG)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, Mob

You must be under the effects of Inuzuka Ryuu: Soutourou and be able to charge the target. This technique is a charge attack made against a single target, but is treated as a Line area (width equal to your FS) that knocks all creatures it encounters aside (to the outside edge of the Line) if they fail a Fortitude save.

The target of the charge is not knocked back, and the charge attack deals double damage if using a claw or bite attack, though it suffers a 20% miss chance.

You must make a Fortitude save (DC 15) to avoid becoming nauseated for 1 round.

Mastery: Each step reduces the miss chance by 5%.

name: INUZUKA RYU: SOUTOUROU (INUZUKA STYLE: DOUBLEHEADED WOLF)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 6

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, H *

You must be adjacent to your animal companion to use this technique. You and your animal companion fuse into a large, two-headed wolf. You gain a size category, a bonus to your Strength, Dexterity and Constitution equal to your animal companion's ability modifiers in those scores, and your movement speed increases by 15 ft. In addition, you gain a number of claw attacks based on your BaB, as well as two bite attacks.

Your animal companion and all of your equipment merges into your new form and becomes unavailable while the transformation lasts. You become unable to make hand or half seals and cannot use techniques unless they require you to be affected by this technique.

name: INUZUKA RYU: TSUUGA (INUZUKA STYLE: PIERCING FANG)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 3

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: Mas, Mob

You must be using either the Shikakyu no Jutsu technique or the Feral Combat class ability in order to use this technique, and there must be enough space be- tween you and the target to execute a charge attack. Make a charge attack with a claw or feral combat attack. If it hits, you may add your Strength modifier to the damage twice (instead of the normal once), and you ignore up to 5 hardness.

Animal companions can use this technique, but only while affected by Juujin Bunshin no Jutsu.

Mastery: Each step allows you to ignore an additional point of hardness.

The fifth step allows you to spend 8 additional Chakra to make an additional attack at your highest attack bonus -5. This can only be done once per encounter, and only if you have at least 6 levels of Beastmaster.

name: JUUJIN BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (HALF BEAST CLONE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: H

You must be under the effects of Shikakyu no Jutsu and have a Dog or Wolf companion to use this technique.

You send Chakra into your animal companion, transforming it into an exact replica of you (as affected by Shikakyu no Jutsu), except it retains its own ability scores (modified by its new size if necessary). If the companion falls unconscious, the transformation automatically ends.

name: JUUJIN RYU: DAISEIGA (BEASTMAN STYLE: GREAT SPIRIT FANG)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: H

The target Animal Companion must be under the effects of Juujin Ryu: Seiga or Juujin Ryu: Shinseiga to benefit from this technique.

The animal companion's next hit with a natural weapon deals an additional 2d6 damage, not multiplied on critical hits.

name: JUUJIN RYUU: JUUSOKU (BEASTMAN STYLE: BESTIAL SWIFTNESS)

description.value:
Type: Training (Ninjutsu)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: M

Your Animal Companion gains the Speed Rank 1 extraordinary ability. This technique must be learned for each of your animal companions separately.

name: JUUJIN RYU: OUGI – SHINJUURIKI (BEASTMAN STYLE: SECRET TECHNIQUE – TRUE ANIMAL POWER)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 18

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, H

The Animal Companion grows one size category, increasing its weight eightfold and granting it a +8 size bonus to Strength, a +4 size bonus to Constitution and a -2 size penalty to Dexterity. Its natural armor increases by 2, and it suffers the appropriate new bonuses/penalties according to its size. The companion also gains DR 5/Chakra and a +2 resistance bonus to saves. If there is not enough space for the companion to grow, it may make a Strength check (DC based on environment) to burst through any restraints (such as if it is tied up or in a very small area). If it fails, it stops growing.

Once the technique ends, the companion will be fatigued for the rest of the encounter. While fatigued, it cannot benefit from this technique again.

name: JUUJIN RYU: SEIGA  (BEASTMAN STYLE: SPIRIT FANG)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 1

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 14

Components: S

The animal companion gains a +1 enhancement bonus to attack and damage rolls with all of its natural weapons, which now count as Chakra-enhanced when trying to bypass damage reduction.

name: JUUJIN RYU: SHINSEIGA (BEASTMAN STYLE: TRUE SPIRIT FANG)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H

This technique is identical to Juujin Ryuu: Seiga, except the enhancement bonus improves to +1 per 3 levels (up to +5).

name: JUUJIN RYU: YUSHU (BEASTMAN STYLE: HEALING HAND)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, H, Mas

Your animal companion recovers 1d6 + 1 HP. This technique cannot affect the same creature more than once every 24 hours.

Mastery: Steps one, three and five each increase the healing by 2, but require ECL 5, 7 and 9 (respectively) to obtain.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 3

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, H

You change into a more beast-like form, becoming half predator, half man. You gain a claw and bite attack, dealing damage as though an animal of your size category, and gain a +4 competence bonus to Intimidate checks. In addition, you can move up to three times your speed when charging. If you fall unconscious, the technique ends.

name: ISHI BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (STONE REPLICATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 5

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, E, F, H, Mas

This forbidden creates a single earth clone made from earth and rock, appearing from a material source range.

Appearance: An earth clone weighs six times as much as you (including equipment).

Control: Earth clones cannot swim (nor can they drown). If there is a direct path of solid earth between you, the clone can communicate its experiences with you by thought as well, though it still cannot form sentient thoughts by itself (for example, if you are both touching the floor or walls within the same cave).

Statistics: An earth clone applies the following:

- Its maximum HP equals your character level
- It has hardness 4
- It has earth resistance 15

Earth clones count as one size larger when grappling or using or defending against bull rush, disarm and trip attempts.

Earth clones suffer a -2 penalty to attack rolls and skill checks when moved further than 100 feet from the source of earth that created them.

Equipment: Earth clone equipment has hardness 3 and half of its normal hit points.

Combat: Earth clones can make up to three attacks with a Full Attack, and can use techniques you know, up to Rank 4. Any clones it would create are considered created by you, with the same limits.

Mastery: The fifth step improves the clone's hardness to 6, and lets the clone count as an additional size larger when grappling or using or defending against bull rush, disarm and trip attempts.

In addition, the clone gains a slam attack dealing lethal damage as though one size larger than it is (if you are a Medium humanoid, it deals 1d4 base damage).

components.value: Concentration, Empower, Focus, Hand Seals, Mastery

name: KAGE BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (SHADOW REPLICATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 5

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, E, H

This forbidden technique has you split your physical essence, creating shadow clones. Shadow clones appear at any location within range.

Clones cause you 1d4 damage for each clone when created, which cannot be mitigated in any way.

Appearance: To those sensing Chakra, the strength of a shadow clone's Chakra Signature is calculated based on half your current Chakra Pool. Creatures who can See Through Chakra see shadow clones as real creatures, indistinguishable from their creator.

Statistics: Shadow clones apply the following:

- Their maximum HP equals 1 /3 your character level.
- They take a -4 penalty to attack rolls
- They take a -5 penalty to Defense
- They take a -2 penalty to saving throws

Combat: Shadow clones cannot make more than two attacks per round, and can perform techniques you know, up to Rank 4. Any Chakra costs a shadow clone must pay are taken directly from your Chakra pool, and any Chakra damage or drain they suffer is applied to your Chakra pool instead. Any clones it would create are considered created by you, with the same limits.

Defeat and Dismissal: When a shadow clone is ended (its duration ends, is reduced to 0 hp, etc) it disappears in a puff of smoke, and you become immediately aware of anything it experienced.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra per clone to create additional clones. Each clone created deals damage to you, as noted in the technique description. You cannot control more than 1 shadow clone per character level at the same time.

name: KASUMI BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (MIST REPLICATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 5

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, E, F, H, Mas

This forbidden technique creates a single mist clone, made from water vapor charged with Chakra. Each clone appears within the source it is created from. Statistics: Mist clones apply the following:

- Their maximum HP equals ¼ your character level
- They have a clumsy flight speed equal to half your base land speed
- They take a -5 penalty to attack rolls
- They do not gain any armor bonus to Defense
- They take a -2 penalty to saving throws
- They have wind resistance 5

Mist clones have a 20% chance to be completely unaffected when hit by an attack dealing ballistic, bludgeoning, piercing or slashing damage, unless the attack can hit incorporeal creatures.

Upon contact with fire of any kind, a mist clone immediately evaporates as if killed or dismissed.

Defeat and Dismissal: A mist clone evaporates completely, leaving behind no trace of its existence when defeated or dismissed.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra per clone to create additional clones. You can control a maximum of 1 mist clone per three character levels.

Mastery: The fifth step improves the clones' flight speed to equal your base land speed, with poor maneuverability.

components.value: Concentration, Empower, Focus, Hand Seals, Mastery

name: KUU BUNSHIN NO HAETORI (VOID REPLICATION DEATH TRAP)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 13 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 29 | Successes: 7

Perform: 17 | Perform DC: 33

Components: C, H

This forbidden technique was once created for the purpose of abduction and/or assassination. The clone created resembles a physical creature, but underneath its surface lies a small pocket dimension. Unless otherwise noted, it is identical to a Kage Bunshin.

Appearance: Creatures who can See Through Chakra see the void clone as a shell filled with emptiness, as if nothing existed inside the clone.

Control: A void clone can move no more than 100 ft. from their creator.

Statistics: Void clones have a poor flight speed equal to your base land speed, and can walk on water. These benefits are lost while holding a creature (see below).

Combat: In addition to a clone's normal attacks and techniques, the clone can attempt to suck in an adjacent creature no larger than itself as a standard action (Fortitude negates, CR applies). If successful, the creature is trapped inside the clone's pocket dimension.

A void clone can only hold one creature at a time.

While Holding a Creature: The void clone gains bonus HP equal to the captured creature's HD while its being held, but cannot walk on water or fly while holding a creature.

A trapped creature can see what happens 'outside', but cannot communicate with the outside world, and it cannot harm the void clone from the inside.

If the clone takes damage, the creature trapped inside suffers double that damage, and the damage cannot be reduced or mitigated in any way. Force damage dealt to the clone is not transferred to the trapped creature.

As a free action while holding a creature, the clone can blow itself up, dealing 3d6 force damage in a 30ft. radius around it (Reflex halves, CR applies). The creature trapped inside the clone takes double damage, and cannot make a save to escape the blast.

Defeat and Dismissal: When a void clone is ended (its duration ends, is reduced to 0 hp, etc) it disappears in a puff of smoke. Any creature still trapped inside is freed, reappearing on the square the clone was in with no further ill effects.

name: MIZU BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (WATER REPLICATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Sution)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 5

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 19

Components: E, F, S, Mas

This forbidden creates clones made from water within range. Each clone must appear within 10 ft. of the source of water used to create it.

Appearance: Water clones weigh half as much as you do (worn equipment included). While underwater, the clone is invisible to creatures that cannot see Chakra.

Statistics: Water clones' have the following additions:

- Their maximum HP equals your character level.
- They have a swim speed equal to twice your base land speed
- They take a -4 penalty to attack rolls
- They take a -5 penalty to Defense
- They take a -4 penalty to saving throws
- They have water resistance 10
- They can stand on liquid as if it were solid

Water clones suffer a -1 penalty to attack rolls and skill checks when moved further than 100 feet from the source of water that created them.

Combat: Water clones cannot make more than two attacks per round. If a water clone takes electric damage from a technique and survives, for the next 1d4+1 rounds its melee attacks will deal an amount of additional electric damage equal to the rank of that technique.

Empower: Spend 3 Chakra per clone to create additional clones. You can control a maximum of 1 water clone, plus one per three character levels.

Mastery: The first step lets you create clones one size category smaller than you, applying appropriate size modifiers. Such clones have half the normal weight.

The fifth step lets you alter the appearance of the clones at will, including changing their equipment. You can only replicate simple equipment in this manner, (GM's discretion).

name: TAJUU KAGE BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (MULTIPLE SHADOW REPLICATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 6

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, E, H, Mas

This forbidden technique is a variant of Kage Bunshin, trading quality for quantity. Unless otherwise noted, the clones are identical to shadow clones created by Kage Bunshin.

You suffer 1d3 damage for each mass shadow clone when created, which cannot be mitigated in any way.

Control: Mass shadow clones disappear if they move more than half a mile from their creator.

Statistics: Mass shadow clones apply the following:

- Their maximum HP equals 1 /6 your character level.
- They take a -8 penalty to attack rolls
- They take a -10 penalty to Defense
- They take a -4 penalty to saving throws

Combat: Mass shadow clones cannot make more than one attack per round.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra per clone to create additional clones. Each clone created deals damage to you, as noted in the technique description. You cannot control more than 3 mass shadow clones per character level at the same time.

Mastery: The fifth step increases the maximum number of mass shadow clones you can control to 4 per character level.

name: YUKI BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (SNOW REPLICATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 5

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, E, F, H, Mas

This forbidden technique creates a clone made of snow and/or ice, appearing on or adjacent to the source it is created from.

Appearance: Snow clones look like vicious, clawed snowmen with only a very crude resemblance to their creator (or humans in general). To those sensing Chakra, the strength of a snow clone's Chakra Signature is calculated based on half your current Chakra Pool.

Statistics: Snow clones apply the following:

- Their maximum HP equals ½ your character level
- They take a -4 penalty to attack rolls
- They take a -5 penalty to Defense
- They take a -2 penalty to saving throws
- They have cold resistance 15
- They take +50% fire damage
- They have two natural claw attacks, dealing damage as humanoids of their size category (1d4 if Medium)

Snow clones suffer a -1 penalty to attack rolls and skill checks when moved further than 100 feet from the source of snow or ice that created them.

Combat: Snow clones cannot make more than two attacks per round.

Empower: Spend 3 Chakra per clone to create additional clones. You can control a maximum of one snow clone per three character levels.

Mastery: The fifth step improves the clones' claw attack damage, as if the clone were two size categories larger than it really is.

components.value: Concentration, Empower, Focus, Hand Seals, Mastery

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu (Advanced Seal)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, X

You send yout chakra to an advanced seal and throw it at the targeted area, where it explodes for 3d8 fire damage. You can also use this technique on an advanced seal within range to make it explode, though doing so require the use of hand seals.

name: ADVANCED SEAL: HYOUHOU (ADVANCED SEAL: ICE DAGGERS)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu (Advanced Seal)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, E, X

You throw an advanced seal at your target, which transforms into a shard of ice mid-throw. Make a ranged attack roll with a +1 bonus. The shard deals 1d4+2 cold damage on hit.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to throw an extra seal, up to 1 per level total. Each seal requires an attack roll.

name: ADVANCED SEAL: RYOKUIN (ADVANCED SEAL: ENERGY SEAL)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu (Advanced Seal)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: S, F

Spend an amount of Chakra to infuse the seal and throw it at the target. If you succeed at a ranged touch attack, the seal drains an amount of Chakra from the target equal to the Chakra you infused into it. For 1d4+2 rounds, either the victim can eat the seal to regain the Chakra drained from it or you can touch the seal to absorb any Chakra drained by it and gain as much temporary HP for 1 minute. A creature with the Chakra Vampire ability can drain the seal as though it were a creature that has amount of Chakra drained.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 5

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, H

You cause a seal to appear on the subject, which scrambles its Chakra pathways. The subject suffers a -6 penalty to meet the Perform Requirements of Chakra Control, Genjutsu and Ninjutsu techniques, and cannot benefit from any Medical ninjutsu of Rank 9 or lower.

This seal can be dispelled by using this technique on the target and succeeding at a level check (DC equal to the original seal's save DC).

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 4

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: C, H

You create a crimson, archaic symbol that leeches Chakra from nearby creatures. It cannot be placed on a moving object, and cannot be moved once placed, though it can be placed on a creature. You must have at least 20 Chakra when creating the seal, and once it is finished you are reduced to 1 Chakra.

Creatures with 2 or more Chakra coming within the seal's area must nake a Fortitude save (DC 15) each round or have 2 Chakra absorbed by the seal. The seal will not drain from creatures with the user's Chakra Signature. The seal can hold up to 100 Chakra, and can be detected by Sense Chakra, though its location cannot be discerned that way. A creature with the Chakra Vampire bloodline can absorb Chakra from the seal.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 2

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, Mas

You create a seal on the target's body, into which its bearer can pour up to 5 Chakra, reducing their maximum Chakra by the same amount while the seal is present. The Chakra inside the seal cannot be sensed, but creatures who can See (Through) Chakra gain a +4 bonus when trying to Spot the bearer.

As a free action, the bearer can release up to three seals created by this technique, removing the penalty to their maximum Chakra and regaining the Chakra poured into the seal when it was created. Releasing more than 3 seals at once is a move action. Each seal requires a Ninjutsu check (DC 15 + Chakra contained in the seal) to be released successfully. Attempting to release one or more seals provokes attacks of opportunity.

Mastery: The first, third and fifth step allow the seal to hold 1 additional Chakra each.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 3

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 24

Components: None

This technique is the same as Gesouin, except:

- The seal holds 20 lbs /level.
- The cost to add more objects increases to 2.
- The DC to undo the seal is 22.
- Each step of mastery increases the capacity by 10 lbs.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 28

Components: H

You touch a target and cause a seal to appear, causing the target to become paralyzed. The seal uses a seal slot, and can be dispelled by using this technique on the target and making a Fuinjutsu check (DC 10 + your HD when you performed the first seal).

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, H, XP

This seal is drawn from the target's cursed seal out onto a small circle on the floor, after which it contracts and forms a barrier around the cursed seal. The seal has one charge per level or HD of the target, and each time they make a Control Cursed Seal check to resist an involuntary transformation, one charge is consumed to grant a +8 bonus to the check. Once all charges are used, the seal disappears. If the target becomes a willing bearer of the cursed seal, the seal is destroyed.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H

This useful technique sheathes your hand in a faint purple glow that coalesces into a seal when the target is touched by it, sealing away their ability to make any sound with their voice (including grunts, moans, whispers, etc.). The seal disappears if the target dies.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, H

You scribe a description of the environment onto a blank page, after which you send your Chakra to the target area and seal any fire present into the scroll, where the 'Seal' kanji will appear. This technique puts out fires and can remove the caught on fire effect, but it cannot seal away lava or hot substances.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: H

You create seals to limit a target's strength, which is mainly used for training purposes. This technique has three different uses, and can be used on the target multiple times, as long as it has enough seal slots.

- Arms (Up to 2 seal slots): Each seal slot used incurs a -2 penalty to attack and weapon damage rolls, as well as Strength- and Dexterity-based skill checks requiring the use of your arms and/or hands.
- Chest (Up to 4 seal slots): Each seal slot used reduces the target's maximum Chakra Pool by 10 (minimum 1), and incurs a -2 penalty to Concentration checks.
- Legs (Up to 2 seal slots): Each seal slot used incurs a -2 penalty to unarmed attack and damage rolls, as well as to Strength- and Dexterity-based skill checks requiring specific use of your legs. In addition, each seal slot used incurs a -1 Speed Rank penalty.

The bearer can release one or more seals as a move action, which is generally accompanied by a burst of energy or a brief haze as their power is released.

Type: Fuinjutsu (Advanced Seal)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: F, H

You place the advanced seal within range, and cause it to radiate an illusory field. The illusion makes the seal look like a Medium-size or smaller creature or object. If the seal is moved or destroyed, the illusion immediately ends. While the illusion can be identified, analyzed and disbelieved as though it were a Genjutsu, it cannot be dispelled.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, H

You create a storage seal which can hold up to 10 lbs. of non-living matter in a pocket plane, and whose seal gives a rough indication of its content (a stored weapon might be marked 'weapon' or 'blade', for example). By performing this technique again, you can add objects to an existing Gesouin seal. In this case, the Cost of the technique is reduced to 1. A storage seal cannot hold objects that carry any type of storage seal. While sealed, objects have no weight and do not age, decay or be otherwise affected by the passage of time. If a liquid is sealed without a container, it will destroy the entire scroll upon being released.

A Gesouin can be released as a move action with a Ninjutsu check (DC 18) that requires half seals, and can be done by any creature who knows the technique. All items contained in the seal are released at once, and you can have one or more sealed weapons appear in hand, ready for use. If the seal is destroyed, there is an equal chance that all items are destroyed or that they are violently released, which deals 2d6 damage to every creature caught in the same square per full seal destroyed (Reflex DC 25 halves).

A single storage seal takes up one page, and a single scroll or book cannot hold more than 5 storage seals. Mastery - Each step adds 5 lbs. to the seal's capacity.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 5

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 31

Components: C, M

You transfer a seal onto the target, sealing its natural energies and making it unable to use any Supernatural or Spell-like abilities. The subject suffers a -5 penalty to Chakra Control checks, and if it wishes to perform a technique, it must succeed at a Chakra Control check (DC 15 + Technique Rank) first to do so.

Can be dispelled by using the same technique on the target again. Disappears upon the target's death.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, E

A potent seal makes the subject take a -1 penalty to Speed and Strength Ranks. The seal can be dispelled by its bearer as a move action requiring half seals, which provokes attacks of opportunity.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the penalty by 1, up to -5. Each point of penalty takes up an additional seal slot.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: H, E

A seal holds the closeable object shut (such as a book, a pouch, a door, etc.), preventing it from being opened by anyone.

Empower: Spend 3 Chakra to add a password or code to the seal. If the seal is broken without applying the code or password, the sealed object is destroyed.

name: JOU NO IN KAI (LOCKING SEAL RELEASE)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: C

You touch a seal created by Jou no In and dispel it, allowing the object to be opened once more. If the seal requires a code or password, you must focus on it in your mind and spend 1 additional Chakra to properly undo the seal.

target.value: One object sealed by Jou no In

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, F, H

You seal all traces of residual Chakra in the area onto the page of a scroll. All traces of Chakra usage going back 1 hour per level are removed and sealed. Another technique (like Youso Fuuin no Jutsu) can be used to read and identify such Chakra. If the seal or the scroll containing it is destroyed, the traces are completely destroyed.

name: KAIRAI ENGEKI: KENGAKURYOKOU (PUPPET THEATER: FIELD TRIP)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

You apply a seal to a puppet. Anyone with the same Chakra signature as you can spend 1 Chakra to animate the puppet with 1 HD, but it cannot attack or perform any combat actions. While animated by this seal, you can use the Puppetry ability to animate the puppet as a swift action.

This seal is created with any amount of Chakra (your choice, up to 1 per 2 levels), and extends the duration of the Puppetry ability by 30 minutes per point of Chakra spent, which can be spread among multiple uses of the Puppetry ability, but once this extra time is used up, the seal disappears. Only one such seal can be applied per puppet.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, Mas

You create a seal on the target that allows it to be summoned with the Kuchiyose: Shunkoku Kasei (p180) technique at a range of 3 miles. This technique costs 2 Chakra, plus half the target's level or HD (minimum 8 total Chakra).

Mastery: The second and fourth step increase the range by 1 mile and the duration by 1 day.

The fifth step requires ECL 18 to learn, and allows you to create a scroll when performing this technique.

The scroll costs 4 Chakra, requires a Fuinjutsu check (DC 23) and 30 minutes to make. The scroll lasts until used, or until this technique's duration expires. The scroll can be used to perform Shunkoku Kasei as an attack action, without paying Chakra or making a Perform check.

Type: Fuinjutsu (Advanced Seal)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: F, H

You create an invisible, indestructible barrier of force that hovers in the air as a horizontal or vertical barrier covering no more than 10 ft. by 10 ft. If its would-be surface is occupied by any creature or object, the barrier will avoid them. The barrier is solid, and blocks all material and ethereal objects, creatures and effects, though gaze attacks and teleportation techniques can easily pass though.

The barrier cannot be seen, but an advanced seal will seem to float at its center, on your side. If the seal is moved or destroyed, the barrier is dispelled.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H, M

You lay out a web of connected exploding tags, ready to trigger upon the first unfortunate soul to pass too close. The target area is now occupied by a CR 3 Exploding Tag Trap (p400), which is destroyed after triggering.

Type: Fuinjutsu (Advanced Seal)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, M, S

You speak a message of up to 20 words, which is recorded in an advanced seal and keyed to a specific Chakra Signature, chosen when you perform the technique. The first time a creature with the chosen Chakra Signature touches the advanced seal, it will recite the recorded message exactly as spoken. When the seal recites its message, you are immediately aware of it, and the seal will fade into nothingness once the message has been delivered.

Type: Fuinjutsu (Advanced Seal)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, M

You throw your advanced seal at the target, making a ranged touch attack. If hit, the seal attaches itself to the target, who must then make a save to resist a single suggestion made by you. If failed, it will follow the suggestion to the best of its ability while the technique lasts, though it automatically resists any suggestion that is directly harmful to it or strongly against its beliefs or ethics.

Once the technique ends, the advanced seal becomes a normal, blank piece of paper and falls off.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, H

You touch a creature and apply a seal that prevents it from using any technique that ends its own life, such as Jisatsu no Jutsu or Bakuretsu Junjiru no Jutsu, and grants the subject a +2 bonus to saves against poisons and diseases.

Type: Fuinjutsu (Advanced Seal)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, F, S

You touch the target with an advanced seal, which sticks to them until the duration expires or until they fall below 0 HP and are dying, at which point the seal immediately stabilizes the target. Once the seal triggers or its duration expires, it becomes a blank piece of paper and falls off.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, F

You place the advanced seal on a surface, after which it projects a sphere of energy that prevents any summoned creature or object from passing through. Attended summoned objects will use their wielder's Will save bonus, while unattended summoned object simply cannot pass. Banish resistance will apply to this effect.

If the seal is moved or destroyed, the seal disintegrates, ending the technique.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 20

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 4

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: C, M

You create a retrieval seal, which is bound to one or more objects that are present when creating it. As an attack action that provokes attacks of opportunity, any creature can touch the seal and summon each of its bound object(s) to an adjacent square. Soulbound objects (such as weapons with a Soulbound enhancement seal) cannot be summoned unless the one summoning it is bound to it, or if the creature it is bound to is either dead or hasn't touched it for at least one year. Sentient and held items can make a Will save to resist beind summoned.

The seal can be bound to one Huge, two Large, four Medium or eight Small or smaller sized objects.

Type: Fuinjutsu (Advanced Seal)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 5

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 27

Components: C, F, S

You send an advanced seal towards the target, which expands and wraps itself around them, paralyzing and blinding them, as well as causing them to suffer a -4 penalty to Listen checks. They can still speak. Removing the advanced seal is simple and can be done by anyone (the target, being paralyzed, cannot do so).

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, H

A lesser variant of Usagido, this seal is designed to conceal and contain part of a creature's strength. The target suffers a -1 penalty to Strength and Speed Ranks, Defense and weapon damage, and its maximum Chakra Pool is reduced by 5. The seal can be dispelled by its bearer by concentrating for a move action.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C, F, H

This relatively obscure technique allows you to feed Chakra into a seal to increase the weight of an object. When performing the technique, you may pour up to 5 Chakra into the seal. The seal radiates a Chakra Signature based on the amount of Chakra in it, and feels identical to your Signature. Each point of Chakra in the seal, increases the object's weight by 5 lbs. You may perform this technique again (without having to draw the seal) to add more Chakra to it, though it may not hold more than 5 Chakra.

As an instant action, you may make a Chakra Control check (DC 10 + 2 per point of Chakra removed) to reduce the Chakra contained within in the seal by up to 1 per 2 levels.

name: TOBIKIRI SAISEI NO JUTSU (GREATER REBIRTH TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 6

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, H

This extremely powerful sealing technique draws from medical knowledge to render you nearly immortal, for a time. Once performed, your Chakra Pool is reduced to 1 and the seal will begin to form. After being performed, you do not regain any Chakra. Instead, any Chakra you would recover will charge the seal, until the seal has absorbed 250 Chakra, at which point the seal completely covers your body and will activate the next time your HP reaches -10 or lower.

1d4+1 Rounds after the seal activates, you are brought back from the dead and your HP is set to 1. This will not regrow any lost limbs, though bleeding wounds will close.

Type: Fuinjutsu (Advanced Seal)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: F, H

You apply the seal to an object or surface, which grants the affected object 5 hardness, 1 HP per level and increases its break DC by 5. If used on a surface, the effect applies to a 10x10 ft. section. Up to two seals can be applied per object or surface, and their effects stack.

target.value: One object of Small or larger size

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, H

This seal is designed to conceal and contain a portion of a creature's strength. The target takes a -2 penalty to Strength and Speed Ranks, Fortitude and Reflex saves, Defense and attack and weapon damage rolls. Its maximum Chakra Pool is reduced by 10. The can be dispelled by its bearer by concentrating for a move action.

name: YOUSO FUUIN NO JUTSU (ELEMENTAL SEAL TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 2

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: C, F, H

This very basic sealing technique is often used for learning purposes, but also has practical uses in gathering information. You attempt to seal traces of the last technique used in the area (within the last 10 minutes per level). If successful, all traces of it are sealed (making the technique used before it the last technique used for this technique) into a scroll, which is inscribed with a seal clearly showing the technique's name and element. Creatures Sensing Chakra will be able to sense the Chakra Signature you had when you performed this technique if they focus on the scroll for one full round.

The Perform DC is 13, + 1 per Rank of the technique to be sealed. The Skill Threshold is 2, + 1 per 2 Ranks of the technique to be sealed. You can only seal the traces of elemental ninjutsu techniques this way (Doton, Fuuton, etc.). If no such technique can be sealed, the 'blank' kanji appears on the scroll.

Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: H

You send powerful and disturbing visions to disturb the target's rest. The subject suffers 1d10 damage and does not benefit from a night's rest as they normally would. The subject will become fatigued and be unable to naturally recover hit points or Chakra for one day.

The target may receive a bonus or penalty to their save based on how well you know them. If you know nothing about the target, they gain a +10 bonus. If you have some second-hand knowledge, they gain a +5 bonus. If you are intimately familiar with them, they suffer a -5 penalty.

This technique cannot be dispelled, and cannot be used on a creature more than once per week.

Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H

The next time the target sleeps for at least one hour, it will experience a dream communicating a message of your choice that it will remember perfectly upon wak ing. The message does not respond to any questions or actions, and if the subject does not speak your language it will not understand the message.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, H

You manipulate the target's brain, causing them to become violently ill and be nauseated. This effect can be dispelled.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: H

This potent technique encourages the feral instinct of man and beast alike, requiring them to succeed at a save or be overcome by bloodlust and attack their nearest enemy without regard for their own safety. If no enemies are nearby, they will attack the nearest creature instead. The subject(s) continue attacking until the object of their rage is dead or this technique's duration expires.

Subjects also receive a +2 enhancement bonus to Strength and Dexterity, a +2 morale bonus to Will saves, and become unable to use spells, powers, spelllike abilities or techniques, as well as any Charisma-, Dexterity- and Intelligence-based skills (except Balance, Escape Artist, Intimidate and Ride), as well as being unable to use the Chakra Control and Concentration skills, or actions requiring patience or concentrations. Creatures with an Intelligence of 3 or less do not get a save to resist the technique.

Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, H

The subject's sense of balance is completely disrupted, and they must make a Concentration check (DC 11) each round. If they fail, they suffer a -4 penalty to attack rolls, ability checks and skill checks while the technique lasts. This is a sound-based illusion.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, H

The subject slowly loses the ability to comprehend language in any way. They can attempt to speak, read or write languages they 'forgot', but the result is gibberish and cannot be understood. This technique progresses in stages based on the number of rounds since the subject was targeted.

- First Round: Subject loses the ability to read and write its non-native (not granted by race) language(s).
- Third Round: Subject loses the ability to speak and sign its non-native language(s).
- Fifth Round: Subject loses the ability to read and write its native language(s).
- Seventh Round: Subject loses the ability to speak and sign its native language(s).

name: DOUTA NO JUTSU (HAND MOTION CONFUSION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: C

You place a simple illusion over your hands, obfuscating your hand seals. Choose blur or confusion.

Blur: You seem to perform hand seals at such an incredible rate that the movements blur, preventing opponents from identifying the technique you perform.

Confusion: You seem to perform a different technique you are familiar with, as long as it has a perform time within one step of the technique you actually use. This effect only applies if you use hand seals or half seals to perform the technique.

This technique can be dispelled and does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C, S

You place an illusion on an object, either removing all text written on it, or forging text by using the Forgery skill (10 minutes for a simple forgery, 20 minutes for a moderate forgery). The illusion radiates a faint Chakra Signature. A creature can spend 1 Chakra and make a Chakra Control check (DC 15) to dispel the illusion.

target.value: One object weighing up to 5 lbs.

name: ESEFUKASHI NO WAZA (METHOD OF FALSE INVISIBILITY)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, H

An illusionary field surrounds you, making you seem unimportant and unworthy of attention. Creatures automatically avert their gaze from you and subconsciously avoid contact with you. Creatures who are specifically looking for someone with your general appearance or creatures looking for any creature around them (such as someone on guard, does not count if in a crowd) suffer a -4 penalty to Spot checks made to detect you.

Creatures with an Intelligence score of 3 or lower and Ordinaries of level 10 or lower do not get a save.

Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: H
