You confuse one of three senses of all creatures in the area. This technique can affect the same target multiple times, once for each sense, and must be disbelieved separately for each of them. This technique can be dispelled.

- Hearing: The creatures become deaf.
- Sight: The creatures suffer a -4 penalty to Spot checks and attack rolls. Blind creatures are unaffected.
- Smell: The creatures cannot use the Scent ability.

name: GENZOU JISHIN NO JUTSU (ILLUSIONARY EARTHQUAKE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 11

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 4

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: C, H

You create a powerful illusion that makes subjects believe an earthquake is happening, causing them to be knocked down and see the surrounding creatures, structures and ground shake, fall and tear apart, making them unable to move or attack. Further effects depend on the terrain:

Subterranean Area (cave, tunnel, etc.): Subjects see the roof collapse, causing 8d6 nonlethal damage (Reflex DC 15 halves) and pinning it beneath rubble (see below). Affects all creatures inside the subterranean area, and possibly some outside but very nearby (GMs discretion).

Vertical Earthen Surface (cliff, rock face, etc.): Subjects see the cliff break up into a landslide, travelling as far horizontally as the surface's height, along its entire width. Creatures caught take 8d6 nonlethal damage (Reflex DC 15 halves) and are pinned beneath rubble (see below).

Open Ground: Subjects see fissures open all over the ground, and have a 25% chance to be caught in one (Reflex DC 20 negates). When the technique ends, the fissures snap shut, causing subjects caught in them to be crushed and suffer 10d6 nonlethal damage.

Pinned Beneath Rubble: A creature that is pinned beneath rubble takes an extra 4d6 nonlethal damage. When used, the technique does not affect you.

Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, Mob

You create a short-lived shadow image of yourself, distracting the opponent. You make a melee attack with a +4 attack bonus, which benefits from Kawarimi Defense 1. This technique does not provoke attack of opportunity. The target must both identify and make a successful save to negate the technique's effects, in which case you still make the attack, but do not gain any bonuses.

target.value: One creature with Intelligence 3 or more

name: HICHISHI KYOUBU NO JUTSU (NONLETHAL BRUTALITY TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, H

A powerful illusion causes the creature to believe it has sustained serious damage. The subject takes 8d10 nonlethal damage (or 8d6 if using the cumulative nonlethal damage variant).

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 12 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 11

Components: C, S

You gain a +4 bonus to Intimidation checks, as you seem bigger and more threatening to other creatures.

Any creature seeing you or interacting with you can make a save to deny you the bonus against them.

name: ISHIKIKA KASSEIKA NO JUTSU (SUBCONSCIOUS TRIGGER TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H

You insert a trigger into the target's mind, causing it to perform a specific action when the trigger is met. The target is unaware of this trigger, and the condition must be a simple one (such as someone speaking a certain code word or phrase). When the subject's trigger is activated, it will perform a simple action that is not harmful to itself (such as speaking a short phrase), without being aware of it, unless someone later reminds them of it.

name: JISOKU NO JUTSU (PRETENSE OF SPEED TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, S

You cast an illusion of shifting light and Chakra upon yourself, making it seem as though you move at great speed. Cannot be used in darkness or at low levels of illumination. This technique affects any creature that can see you while this technique is in effect (naturally, excluding blind creatures or those who do not rely on sight), and makes them suffer a 30% miss chance on any attack directed against you.

Creatures who can See Through Chakra ignore this miss chance, and any other creature can make a save to disbelieve the illusion when it makes an attack against you, which does not remove the miss chance but does allow the effect to be dispelled from the creature. Once dispelled from a creature, that creature remains unaffected by this technique until it is used again.

Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: None

This technique is identical to Shougenzou no Jutsu (p141), except as above, and instead you get to make 1 minor change per level, or 1 advanced change per 3 levels. An advanced change is a significant detail, such as the color of a room or adding/removing a reasonably sized feature like a door or tree. It can also be used to make objects of Medium size or smaller appear or disappear. As with minor changes, such illusions cannot affect or harm creatures directly.

Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, H

This technique attempts to compel the target to go to sleep. On hit, the subject immediately becomes groggy and suffers a -2 penalty to attack and damage rolls, skill checks and saves. The next round, this penalty improves to -4. On the round after that, the target becomes unconscious for the duration of the technique.

If, at any time while affected, the subject takes damage equal to its Constitution score or greater in a single round, it receives an additional save to free itself of the effect.

This technique can be dispelled, and creatures with 8 or more HD gain a +2 bonus to saves made against it.

Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: C

Your Chakra signature is disguised, making it seem like an animal's signature to anyone Sensing Chakra. Creatures that detect your Signature can make a save to see through the illusion. Using any Chakra will cancel the technique's effects.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, S

You make the subject focus on a single target it would normally attack and is within sight range of the subject. The subject attacks the creature its focused on to the best of its ability until knocked out or killed (or until the duration expires), gaining a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls while doing so.

Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

You prepare a special pattern to your Chakra, allowing you to activate (and deactivate) a 'non-detection field' on your turn, as a free action. Each round this field is active costs 1 Chakra. While the field is active, any creature that would detect the user by scent, sound or sight must make a save to avoid dismissing you as an unimportant detail, allowing you to hide while being observed, even without any cover. If you remain stationary, you also gain a +2 bonus to your Hide checks against creatures who failed their save. Each time you are outside of a creature's line of sight for at least 5 rounds, it must make a new save to resist the technique (even if it had failed before).

Certain conditions may make the field ineffective, such as standing alone in a nearly featureless room, not having enough details to 'blend in' with.

This technique cannot be dispelled.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: H

You cause the target to relive bad memories from all those it has killed. If the target has never killed anyone, it is therefore immune to this technique. The subject must save each round to avoid suffering a cumulative -1 morale penalty to attack rolls, skill checks and saves, and a cumulative +1 rage bonus to weapon damage rolls against you.

The morale penalties persist for 1 minute after the technique ends, though the rage bonus ends when the technique does.

Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 9

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: None

This technique is identical to Jougenzou no Jutsu (p132), except as above, and instead you get to make 1 minor change per level, 1 advanced change per 3 levels, or 1 greater change per 5 levels. An greater change is a something of great importance, such as changing an entire room, concealing a trapdoor or pit, or making

objects of a Large size or smaller appear or disappear. As with minor changes, such illusions cannot affect or harm creatures directly.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, H

If the subject is free thinking or at peace with itself, it will fall prone and laugh continuously. It is not helpless, but cannot take any actions. A brooding or remorseful subject will instead be panicked.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C

You make a feint attempt against a creature with which you are engaged in melee. This technique does not provoke attacks of opportunity when performed in a threatened area.

Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, H

You hypnotize yourself, becoming convinced you are completely invincible and indestructible, standing up to any enemy, fearless and confident. You gain a +6 morale bonus to Will saves against feat effects, and a +2 morale bonus to attack and weapon damage rolls, De- fense and skill checks.

Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C

You gain a +4 bonus on your next Bluff or Diplomacy check against the subject. Using this technique in certain kinds of negotiations may be punished if detected.

Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: C, S

The touched subject begins to worry that something is wrong, though they cannot pinpoint what, and suffer a -1 penalty to attack rolls and skill checks due to this uncertainty. This technique can be dispelled.

name: KYOUHAKU WARAI NO JUTSU (COMPELLED LAUGHTER TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, S

You look the target in the eye and attempt to send it such horrifying visions that it suffers a short mental breakdown. The subject falls prone and starts laughing in a manic, humorlous manner for 1d4 rounds, unable to take any action or think about anything. A creature incapable of laughter will simply make random sounds or speak gibberish.

For 2 rounds after this behavior fades, the subject becomes shaken.

Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, H

The subject is shown an illusion catering to its greatest desire in this moment (reinforcements, death of an enemy, etc.), losing their Dexterity bonus to Defense or losing their next turn (your choice). You are not aware of what illusions they experience. Once the technique ends, the illusion falls away, and the subject takes 2d6 damage as its hopes are crushed. This damage cannot reduce their HP below 0.

Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, H

The subject is shown the illusion that it's body is slowly being covered in a layer of earth and rock, as though it is being petrified. The subject slowly suffers from progressive effects over time, which are cumulative:

- First round: Subject cannot run or charge.
- Second round: Subject moves at half its speed.
- Third round: Subject cannot move or perform actions requiring any sort of movement (even speech). They can still breathe. The subject re-

mains affected by this effect until the technique ends.

The illusion is broken if the target suffers a powerful emotion or instinctual need (such as fear or the need to flee or protect a loved one), and thus ends if the target is afflicted with panic or cowering effects. The technique also immediately ends if the target is attacked, though if they had been affected for three rounds or more, they will lose their Dexterity bonus to Defense against the first attack.

This technique can be dispelled. Creatures with 8 or more levels/HD gain a +4 bonus to saves to resist this technique.

name: MAGEN: GOUSENJIN (DEMONIC MIRAGE: TORTURE OF A THOUSAND SWORDS)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

The subject feels as if its body is being torn apart by and feels excruciating pain. The subject suffers a -4 penalty to attack rolls, weapon damage rolls, skill numerous sword slashes. It sees its skin being torn open checks and ability checks.

This technique can be dispelled, but there is a 50% chance that any dispel attempt will fail.

Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C

The subject is caught in a strange illusion, and is completely unaware of its surroundings (and, thus, is also entirely unresponsive). If the subject is hit by an offensive action, the illusion is immediately ended. This technique cannot be used on the same creature more than once every 24 hours, and can be dispelled.

name: MAGEN: JIBAKU SATSU (DEMONIC MIRAGE: TREE BINDING DEATH)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H

You create the illusion that the subject is bound by a tree that grows around it as you vanish from its senses. The subject becomes immobilized and cannot detect you through smell, sight, taste, hearing or touch. You
are considered as an invisible attacker if you choose to attack the subject. This technique ends if the subject is attacked or damaged, and blind creatures are not affected.

name: MAGEN: JIGOKU KOUKA NO JUTSU (DEMONIC MIRAGE: HELL'S DESCENT TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: F, H

Creatures within the area see a gigantic ball of fire descending from the sky, engulfing their surroundings in fire and brimstone. Creatures caught in the area who fail their save take 3d8 damage, and will take 1d6 damage each round they remain within the area as they see their surroundings set ablaze. This damage cannot reduce creatures below 0 HP, but those brought to 0 HP by the technique's damage will be unconscious for 1d4+2 hours or until healed.

Creatures immune to fire are unaffected, as are creatures that cannot use their sense sight, smell, touch and hearing. Creatures warned about the technique's effects will receive a +8 bonus on their save to resist it (identifying it does not grant this bonus).

This technique can be dispelled.

name: MAGEN: JIGOKU TENSHI NO JUTSU (DEMONIC MIRAGE: HELL'S ELEMENT TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: F, H

You create an illusion of yourself throwing a ball of elementally charged Chakra that explodes for 1d4 damage per two levels, up to 5d4, of an elemental type of your choice. This damage is not affected by energy resistances, but creatures immune to the element will be unaffected by the technique. The damage cannot bring creatures below 0 HP, but those reduced to 0 HP will remain unconscious for 1d4+2 minutes or until healed.

Creatures without use of their sense of sight, smell, touch and hearing are immune to this illusion as well, and creatures warned about its effects gain a +8 bonus on their save to resist it (identifying does not grant this bonus).

name: MAGEN: KARASUGAN NO KYOUEN (DEMONIC MIRAGE: FEAST FOR CROWS)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, S

The subjects see a murder of crows descend upon them and assault them. They suffer a -10 penalty to Spot and Listen checks, must make a Concentration check (DC 15) to use any action requiring concentration, and lose their Dexterity bonus to Defense against the first attack made against them. If attacked, the illusion immediately fades.

A creature cannot be affected by this technique more than once per hour.

target.value: Two creatures within 30 ft. of each other

name: MAGEN: KUCHIRAKU NO JUTSU (DEMONIC MIRAGE: MOUTH OF HELL TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, H

The subject sees the ground beneath their feet crumbling, and feels itself fall into the fiery pits of hell. The technique progresses in stages, one per round:

First round: The subject is unable to take action as they feel themselves begin to fall, suffering 3d6 nonlethal damage.

Second round: The subject also becomes unaware of its surroundings as it falls deeper into the pit, suffering 6d6 nonlethal damage.

Final round: The subject feels itself swallowed by dark, malevolent flames as deadly vines tear it apart. Suffering 12d6 nonlethal damage. It is still unable to act. If the subject is still conscious, it will be overcome by an irrational fear and will be cowering for 1d4 rounds (Will negates).

Note: If using optional rules for stacking nonlethal damage, the technique deals 2d6, 4d6 and 8d6 damage (in the first, second and third round, respectively) instead.

While under the illusion, the subject is likely to scream and thrash about. If it takes any damage from a source other than this technique, the illusion immediately breaks. Blind creatures are immune to this technique. This technique can be dispelled.

name: MAGEN: MUGEN DOUTEI (DEMONIC MIRAGE: ENDLESS JOURNEY)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, H

The subject(s) will slowly succumb to an illusion that causes them to lose any sense of direction, building up as the technique progresses.

First round: The subject is unable to make sense of which direction is north (or south, etc.) without using a compass or similar effect or device.

Second round: The subject wanders around, making little progress towards it destination, without realising.

Third round: The subject moves with numerous turns and twists and becomes unable to wander more than 200 ft from the location it started its turn in for the rest of this technique's duration.

This technique can be dispelled.

name: MAGEN: NARAKUMI NO JUTSU (DEMONIC MIRAGE: LIVING HELL TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, H

You describe an illusion to show to the subject, which has an effect based on how the subject would feel about the illusion (and thus how well you know them):

Indifference: The subject simply doesn't care and remains unaffected.

Repulsed: The subject despises or is slightly frightened, it is shaken for 1d3 rounds.

Fear (Weak): If the subject is even slightly afraid of the illusion, it is dazed for 1d4 rounds. This is often a minor phobia or a source of fear from its childhood.

Fear (Strong): If the subject is very afraid of the illusion, it is panicked for 1d3 rounds. This could be a tormentor or serial killer, for example.

Fear (Overwhelming): If the subject is completely terrified, it suffers a short but serious nervous overload and becomes unconscious for 1d3 rounds. The illusion would usually involve someone the subject holds dear.

If the target succeeds at their save, they are instead cowering for 1 round.

name: MAGEN: SHINKEI NIGAI (DEMONIC MIRAGE: NERVOUS CONVULSIONS)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, E, H

The subject's brain is overwhelmed by conflicting signals, turning it against itself and overloading their nervous system. For five rounds, at the start of each of their turns, the subject suffers a cumulative -1 penalty to Defense, saves, ability checks and attack rolls. At the end of their fifth turn, the subject falls into a coma, becoming unconscious for 1 hour per level, during which the technique can no longer be dispelled. A comatose subject can only be awoken by a character with at least 12 ranks of Treat Injury, using the Iryou Ninjutsu: Iji - Shiketsu technique.

For the turns while it is still conscious, each turn the subject chooses either let the technique do its work and take no actions, or it can resist the technique, taking actions as normal but taking 1d8 damage. This damage cannot reduce the target below -1 HP, and if it is reduced to -1 HP by this damage, the subject remains stable and will immediately fall into a coma, as above.

If dispelled, any penalties suffered by the subject will remain in effect for 1d4 rounds.

Empower: Spend 6 Chakra to bypass the first five rounds and immediately send the subject into the coma. Can be empowered only once per day.

name: MAGEN: SHIROMANE NO JUTSU (DEMONIC MIRAGE: CASTLE IMITATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

You create an illusory setting, changing the appearance of the environment completely, though you cannot hide creatures, structures and equipment. As usual, the illusion is merely aesthetic and provides no actual protection or cover. If you move more than 1,000 ft. from the illusion, it automatically fades.

name: MAGEN: SHITSUENJOU NO JUTSU (DEMONIC MIRAGE: REALITY REVISION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C, H

You create a lingering effect within the minds of all creatures in the area, which has no immediate effect. For one round per level after using the technique, you can concentrate for a move action to: change the color of items in a 1 ft. cube, create a small object, or change the temperature, flavor or texture of 1 lb. of non-living material (such as food). Such changes cannot be too radical (i.e. changing black to white, making water taste like a rich stew, etc.). These changes will remain in effect until the technique ends.

These effects are, in fact, illusory, and only change the perception of creatures affected by this technique. It cannot disrupt concentration or deal damage. Items created look crude and simple, and will immediately fade if touched or disturbed. Any creature sensing Chakra will sense chakra activity as if this technique was being used each time you make a change.

This technique can be dispelled.

Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, S

The subject suddenly experiences itself being high up in the air, and suffers a sensation as though it were falling, becoming unable to act for one round, and must make a second Will save next round to avoid falling prone and becoming nauseated for 1 round. This technique cannot be dispelled, and cannot be used on the same creature more than once per 24 hours.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, H, Mas

You create a zone that affects all ordinary characters, creatures without Chakra Reserves and creatures without any ranks in the Chakra Control skill. The zone does not move with you, and you can concentrate on it only while you remain within it. Subjects automatically ignore all sights and sounds from within the zone, as though they were completely unimportant and not worthy of attention. They will avoid entering the zone if possible, or will attempt to leave as soon as possible if they are forced inside. Each round they spend inside the zone, they can retry their save against the technique.

Dangerous effects (such as attacks) or extremely obvious events (like an explosion) coming from within the zone are not ignored, and allow subjects to make another Will save to disbelieve.

Cannot be dispelled.

Mastery: The first, third and fifth steps increase the radius of the zone by 10 ft.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 5

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 32

Components: C, H

You create an illusory barrier of trees and plant growth, which seems completely real in all ways, acting as a physical barrier that obscures vision. The wall cannot be destroyed, and prevents affected creatures from passing through or attacking a creature beyond the barrier intentionally (an area attack that aims to destroy the wall may 'accidentally' affect a creature beyond it) Creatures who make their Will save still cannot see through the barrier, but can move through without any issues. This technique can be dispelled.

name: MUON JUNAN NO JUTSU (SOUNDLESS AGONY TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, H

Subjects believe that they must remain completely silent, and will not speak, shout, scream or otherwise try to make no sound. They can still move their lips (to allow for lip reading). Can be dispelled.

name: NEHAN SHOUJA NO JUTSU (TEMPLE OF NIRVANA TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 9

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, H

bonus to their save for every 5 HD or levels they have over 5 (up to +3 at level 20). This technique can be dispelled.

name: NINPOU: KAGEMUKU GENJUTSU NO WAZA (NINJA ART: DOUBLE-LAYERED METHOD OF GENJUTSU)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, S

You place a genjutsu effect upon the subject, locking a single genjutsu effect it is already affected by with a kagemuku. When a creature or effect tries to dispel the original effect, it instead dispels a single kagemuku, if one is present and bound to it. A single effect can have up to five separate kagemuku affecting it, but each application beyond the first costs 2 additional Chakra, and decreases the dispel DC of all kagemuku tied to the same effect by 1.

Once per day, you can use this technique as an instant action immediately after performing a Genjutsu technique on a creature, targeting the same creature.

Mastery: The second and fourth step allow you to use this technique as an instant action one additional time per day.

Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, H

You create the illusion that you are exhausted, sick or suffer from some kind of debilitation or condition, or one that hides such effects. This illusion affects sight and hearing, cannot be dispelled, and it cannot be seen through. Anyone interacting with you can identify and disbelieve the illusion as normal.

name: NOUYA SHOURETSU NO JUTSU (MIND DISRUPTION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: H

This technique affects the subject's bond to any creatures it controls by will (such as various types of clones, but not puppets or summoned creatures) When the subject sends mental orders to such creatures, they have a 50% chance of being ignored, resulting in the clone either continuing its previous actions or simply taking no actions instead. This technique can be dispelled.

name: ONPA BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (SOUND WAVE CLONE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, E, H

You create two illusory clones, perceivable only by those within the area as you use the technique. As long as a subject remains within line of sight, the clones will persist within its mind, regardless of how far they've moved from the clones' original location. The clones are consistent between all subjects, being perceived as doing the exact same things by everyone who can perceive them. Although illusory, they can speak with your voice and create sound as you normally would (such as footsteps).

The clones seem real, creating illusions around them to make it seem like the environment is affected by their presence (such as leaving footprints and disturbing grass), though these manipulations are short-lived after the clone moves. The clones are destroyed on contact, and have a Defense equal to your touch Defense 5. Deaf creatures are immune to this effect.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to create an additional clone. You cannot control more than 1 clone per level.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C, F

You manipulate sound waves and send them into the target's ears, triggering a mechanism in the brain that leaves the target stunned for 1 round.

name: SAIMIN JUTSU: KAGE KIAI (HYPNOTISM TECHNIQUE: OTHERWORLDLY SCREAM)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

You make the subject hear an extremely loud, highpitched scream, which stuns them for 1d4 rounds. While stunned this way, the subject takes a -20 penalty to Listen checks.

name: SAIMIN JUTSU: MUSOU NO JUTSU (HYPNOTISM TECHNIQUE: MIND BLANK TECHNIQUE)

Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, H

You ensnare the target's senses, making them completely unable to detect you by sight, hearing or smell. You are treated as invisible to the target. This technique can be dispelled, and the Kaigan technique completely nullifies its effects. If you attack or otherwise harm the target, the technique ends.

name: SAIMIN JUTSU: YOKEN NO JUTSU (HYPNOTISM TECHNIQUE: FORESIGHT TECHNIQUE)

Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: S

The subject's mind is forced into a distinct thought pattern, allowing you to more easily anticipate its movements, granting you a +2 insight bonus to attack rolls, skill checks and Defense against the subject. This technique can only affect a single target at a time, and can be dispelled once it is detected (the subject may be able to realize it is subjected to a trick).

Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C

You instill an idea into the subject that you are not threatening to it. You make a Diplomacy check against the target to improve its attitude towards you, and gain a +15 bonus to Diplomacy checks against the subject to do so, and while its attitude is still improved. The improved attitude is shaky at best, and will be undone as soon as you take any action that will obviously affect the subject in a negative manner, provided it has an Intelligence of 3 or greater.

name: SAKURA NO YUME (DREAMS OF CHERRY BLOSSOMS)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: H

You trap the minds of subjects in the area within a dream-like illusion, causing them to become trapped in a dream-like scene, in the shape of a field of cherry blossoms. The creature is effectively unable to use sight or hearing (including blindsight or blindsense) to detect what is going on around them. You can speak to subjects freely. In addition, the subjects must succeed at a Will save each round to avoid being unable to take any action. Even if they can act, subjects cannot leave the area of effect.

This technique can be dispelled, and immediately ends for any creature that is moved outside of the area of effect.

name: SAKURAGENZOU NO JUTSU (MIRAGE OF CHERRY BLOSSOMS TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, H

The subject sees a swirl of cherry blossoms swarm around it, briefly obscuring sight before dissipating. When their vision clears, the appearance of all creatures it sees is changed into those of other creatures (as you direct), though a creature cannot change to something or someone of another size category.

You may decide to have the subject become unable to make sense of any speech in the area, having them hear it as gibberish. This technique can be dispelled, though counts as a Rank 9 technique for the purpose of being identified and/or dispelled.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 1

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 14

Components: C, H

You make the target feel a sudden drop in morale, making it suffer a penalty to its next attack roll, ability, skill or initiative check equal to half your level, rounded down.

Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, Mob

This technique allows you to erase your presence from the target's senses and create eight illusory replicas that attack the target from all sides. Make a melee attack against the target. If the subject failed its save, the attack gains a +10 bonus to the attack roll, Kawarimi Defense 3, and the subject loses its Dexterity bonus to Defense against the attack.

If you can use the Shiden technique (p226), you may increase the Chakra Cost by 6 and increase the Perform Requirements by 4 to allow this technique to be used from 30 ft. away, adding the same conditions and effects of Shiden to the attack.

This technique counts as a Rank 12 genjutsu technique for the purpose of identifying it.

Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: C, S

You attempt to shock the target's brain, dazing it for one round (Fortitude negates) and dealing 2d6 nonlethal damage to them (Will negates). A target cannot be dazed by this technique more than once per 24 hours.

Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, H

You implant a powerful aversion in the subject's brain, the effects of which depend on the aversion.

- Creature or Object: The subject prefers not to be within 30 ft of the creature or object, and will actively try to move away it it comes too close.
- Word or Phrase: The subject avoids speaking the word or phrase.
- Action: The subject will not perform the action.
- Event: The subject will not take part in or attend the event, if possible.

The subject tries its best to follow this behavior, but will not put itself in danger to do so. If forced to take an action involving the thing it is averse to, it takes a -2 penalty to attack rolls, ability checks and skill checks for that action. The aversion counts as a weak source of fear for the purpose of the Magen: Narakumi no Jutsu technique (p136). This technique can be dispelled.

target.value: One creature with Charisma 3 or higher

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: H

The subject believes it has been poisoned, and acts as though it has suffered 2d6 ability damage to an ability score of your choice. The subject gains a +2 bonus to its save if you choose Constitution. If the subject's HP are reduced to 0 or lower due to this effect, it acts accordingly. If the subject takes damage while unconscious because of this effect, it will remain awake for 1 round before falling unconscious again.

There is no secondary damage, and the penalties fade immediately when the technique ends. A creature cannot be affected by more than one instance of this technique at the same time.

name: SHINSHIN FUNKYUU NO JUTSU (MIND AND BODY DISORDER TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, H

You place some restraints in the subject's mind, making it difficult for them to move normally. The subject suffers a -4 penalty to attack and weapon damage, skill checks and Defense. This technique can be dispelled.

Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: C, H

The subject's mind drifts between thoughts, leaving the subject dazed.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 2

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 14

Components: C, H

The subject's thoughts loop around, forcing it to repeat the actions it took on its previous turn during its next turn. If the situation no longer allows the subject to do so (no room, its previous target is dead or gone, etc.), it will simply take no action instead. The subject can still defend itself normally.

Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: H

You can make minor, illusory modifications within the area to trick or deceive others. You may make up to one minor change per level. The technique can only affected unattended objects or create the illusion of such objects. A minor change is a small detail, such as the inscription on a door or plaque, making a Small sized object appear or disappear, etc. Such a change cannot directly cause harm.

A creature interacting with an object created by the technique will immediately notice that something is not quite right, and can only make a save to disbelief after it has identified or studied the illusion.

This technique can be dispelled, which renders the affected creature immune to that instance of the technique.

name: TAIBAKUDOU NO JUTSU (BODY BINDING STARE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, H

Any creature that is caught in your frightful gaze will cower for 1 round. You cannot use this technique if you are blinded.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 5

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 31

Components: C, H

The subject's mental state becomes highly unstable, causing it to act unpredictably. Each round, roll a d20 and consult the table below to determine its behavior that round. If the subject cannot perform the indicated action(s), it will stand still and babble incoherently.

| D20 | Behavior |
|-------|------------------------------------------------|
| 1-2 | Attacks you *, or moves closer if out of range |
| 3-4 | Acts normally |
| 5-10 | Stands still and babbles incoherently |
| 11-15 | Flees from you at its highest speed |
| 16-20 | Attacks the nearest creature * |

If the confused creature is prompted to attack a creature, it will do so unarmed or with any held or carried weapon, ranged or melee. It will only use attacks with which it is proficient and skilled, unless such attacks or weapons are unavailable. A confused character can still defend itself normally. If attacked, it will automatically attack its most recent attacker on its next turn (provided it is still affected by this technique at that time).

The subject will make attacks of opportunity as normal against any creature it has attacked in its previous turn or any creature it will attack next (due to the subject having been attacked by that creature), but will not make attacks of opportunity against any other creature.

This technique can be dispelled.

name: TSUTAKAZURA GENZOU NO JUTSU (ILLUSORY VINES TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: H

Up to one creature per level inside the area will see vines bursting forth from all around, causing them to act as though entangled. This effect lasts for as long as those creatures remain within the area. This technique can be dispelled.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, E, S

You create a sound-based illusion that allows you to charm a creature that can hear and understand you clearly, and whose HD does not exceed yours. If a target is being attacked by you or your allies, it receives a +5 bonus to its save. Charmed creatures perceive your words very favorably, and you can make an opposed Charisma check against them to attempt to give them orders, which they will follow unless they are suicidal or obviously harmful to the creature. If you fail an opposed check, you cannot retry it.

If you or your allies threatens or harms a charmed creature, the effect on them is immediately ended.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to charm an additional creature within range (up to 1 target per 2 levels total).

name: CHAKRA HANKAI NO JUTSU (CHAKRA DISRUPTION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 5

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, H

You attempt to disrupt an ongoing Chakra Control or Ninjutsu effect, a sealed item or a Spell-like ability by touching a creature and trying to destabilize the energy flow. When you hit with the touch attack, you must make a disruption check of 1d20 plus your ranks in the Fuinjutsu skill, up to your level or +5 (whichever is lower). The effect is based on the target:

Spell-like, Chakra Control or Ninjutsu effect: You must have witnessed the target creating the effect or becoming affected by it, or have identified the effect with a successful skill check. The DC of the disruption check is 11 + the level of the creature who created the effect. If successful, the effect ends immediately. Does not affect anything with a duration of 'Permanent'.

Sealed Item: The DC is 11 + the level of the item or enhancement seal. If successful, the touched item or seal will not function for 1d4 rounds. Such an item can only be successfully disrupted once per day.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the maximum bonus by +1, up to a total of your level or +20 (whichever is lower). Spend 5 Chakra to increase the duration of the disruption to an item or seal to 1d6+1 rounds.

Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 7

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C

Highly forbidden in most villages, this technique lets you scramble your own Chakra Signature to become unrecognizable, or change it into one of a creature you are familiar with, as long as you both are of the same type (and subtype). A creature that senses your Signature can make a Wisdom check (DC 18) to look past the deception.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 6

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 28

Components: C, H, X

You scribe a tattoo-like seal onto your body using your blood as ink. Once complete, the seal starts draining your Chakra until it has absorbed 100 Chakra. You control the rate of absorption, and the seal cannot reduce you below 0 Chakra. Once full, you can activate the seal as a swift action to gain a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls, Defense, saving throws and skill checks, as well as increasing your current and maximum Chakra by 5. The bonuses last for 10 minutes, after which the seal fades and you become fatigued.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H, Mas

Usually reserved for a village's top spies, this technique serves as a very convincing disguise. You change your physical appearance, voice and Chakra Signature into that of a persona you imagine or those of another creature you have interacted with, though those very familiar with that creature can still sense that your Chakra Signature is not quite right. When using this technique to disguise yourself as someone else, you make a Disguise check with a +5 bonus.

The creature whose persona you take on must be the same gender and size category as you, and the technique does not alter your clothing or equipment.

For the first half hour, you take 50% additional damage from all sources as the transformation leaves your body in a weakened, painful state.

Creatures that can See (Through) Chakra can make a spot check (DC 25) to notice a strange Chakra pattern around you, after which a Ninjutsu check (DC 21) can identify it as a transformation technique.

Mastery: The first step allows you to change your scent to one appropriate to your new appearance. The third step allows you to change your gender.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

You attempt to remove a single seal of Rank 5 or lower from the target, of which you must be aware. You make a Chakra Control check (DC 15), which is increased by the complexity rating of the technique that made the seal: E (+0), D (+1), C (+3), B (+5), A (+7), S (+10) or SS (+15).

Removing a seal requires one person using this technique simultaneously per seal slot it occupies on the target's body.

target.value: One willing or helpless living creature

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, H

You erect a layer of Chakra around you that blends into the environment, granting you a +8 bonus to Hide checks while you remain in the same type of environment, and allowing you to make a Hide check even while being observed if you stand still for at least one round. Creatures who can See (Through) Chakra gain a +8 bonus to Spot checks against you. If you take any hostile action, the technique ends.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 12 | Successes: 2

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 11

Components: E, H

You create a head-sized sphere of fiery Chakra in front of your hands, and then fire it towards the area to deal 1d4 fire damage. If you wish to target a very small object or send the sphere through a small passage, you must make a ranged touch attack in order to hit it (it has a Defense of 5 + size modifiers). In that case, the sphere has a range increment of 10 ft and cannot exceed the technique's range.

Empower: You can spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d4 (maximum 3d4).

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: HIKEN – TAISHA NO JUTSU (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: SECRET – REGENERATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 5

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 29

Components: C, H, M, XP

You can regenerate non-vital organs or appendages that the target lost no more than 1 day ago per point of Constitution modifier it has, as long as the target's Chakra Pool is full when you use this technique. The target regenerates two simple body parts (such as a toe or fin- ger) or one complex organ (such as an eye or tongue). If the target lost an organ that was implanted and accepted by its body, such an organ is regrown as the implanted one and not its original organ.

As a result, the target takes 3d6 Chakra coils damage, and its Chakra Pool is reduced to 0. In addition, both you and the target suffer 2 negative levels, which heal by themselves after 24 hours.

This technique can be used only once per year on the same creature. If it is used more often, it does not work, but the target's negative levels become permanent unless it succeeds at a Fortitude save (DC 27).

components.value: Concentration, Hand Seals, M, XP Cost

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 6

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, H

You ignore difficult terrain and can move through obstacles and other creatures. While moving, you do not trigger traps or provoke attacks of opportunity, as though you were incorporeal. Though you remain affected by gravity, you do not fall through surfaces unless you wish to. If your movement ends in an occupied square, you are shunted to an adjacent square, taking 1d6 damage. If all adjacent squares are occupied, you return to where you started the movement and take 5d8 damage instead.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 25

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 5

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 28

Components: C, H

You attempt to remove a seal of Rank 10 or lower from the target by making a Chakra Control check (DC 25 + complexity rating of the seal). You must be aware of the seal's presence before you can attempt to remove it. This technique must be performed simultaneously by as many people as the number of seal slots the seal takes up on the target's body (i.e. all performers must start and complete the technique on the same turn and initiative count).

target.value: One willing or helpless living creature

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H

You attempt to instantly heat the water inside a 5 ft cube or a target creature to a boiling point, having a Cost and effect based on the target. You can select 1 target per 5 levels, each of the same type, but you must pay the cost for each target you choose.

5 ft Cube (4 Chakra): You target a square to evaporate water from. If there is sufficient water (at least 3 inches), a burst of steam deals 6d6 fire damage in a 5ft wide, 10 ft high Cylinder (Reflex halves).

Creature (10 Chakra): You temporarily make the target's bodily fluids boil, dealing 6d6 fire damage to it and requiring it to make a Fortitude save to avoid 1d6 Constitution damage and becoming fatigued.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 20

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, H

You make a bite-like touch attack against the target (a nonproficiency penalty may apply), forcing a cursed seal onto its body and granting it the Cursed Seal template with you as its origin, and the Cursed Seal Level 1 ability (p342). Ths subject is initially unwilling, and will gain a level adjustment (see template). The subject must make one Fortitude save (DC 15) per day for ten days. If they fail two in a row, they die.

You suffer 2 negative levels and must make a Fortitude save (DC 23) after 24 hours. If it succeeds, the negative levels are cured. If not, they become permanent. Once per day per subject, you can use a gaze attack against subjects carrying 'your' cursed seal to have various effects (see Cursed Seal Template).

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 20

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 6

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, H, M

You bind a target to their blood pact, solidifying their connection to it permanently. The process is painful, and the target suffers 1d6 temporary Strength and Dexterity damage, as well as having to make a save (DC 20) to avoid falling unconscious for 1d6 hours. Once successfully completed, the target can summon creatures of their Blood Pact as though using a Greater Summoning Scroll (see p63). In addition, they can ignore the hand seals component when summoning a creature by increasing the Perform Requirements of the summoning technique by 5.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, F

You make a touch attack against a target bound by the Keiyaku Fuuin technique, a target who has bound a creature using said technique, or against a creature who has the Blood Pact feat. The subject's Keiyaku Fuuin is broken, and any creature bound by it is freed from its effects. If the target has the Blood Pact feat, it becomes unable to summon creatures from its blood pact(s) for 1d4 hours, and any creatures they have summoned from their blood pact(s) must make a Will save or be banished.

Alternatively, you can use this technique on an object with a seal made by the Fuinjutsu: Shuntori Fuin technique to break the seal. The object can make its save as though it was held by the creature that created said seal. This technique cannot be used on the same target more than once per day.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, E, H

A technique almost exclusively used by ANBU forces, you send your Chakra into the target, mixing it with their own, causing the target to become paralyzed, and allowing it a single save every round to break the effect.

Empower: Spend 4 Chakra to target an additional creature, up to 1 per 5 levels or 5 (whichever is lower).

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 30

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, F, H, M, XP

This truly fearsome technique must be used when the target is still conscious, with its Chakra Pool and HP at least 80% of their maximum. The subject's soul is drawn into an object that resembles it well, and is sealed there. The subject's body dies, and its soul is bound to the item, unable to be called upon by effects such as Edo Tensei. If the seal or object is destroyed, the soul is freed.

XP Cost: 10,000 XP.

components.value: Concentration, Focus, Hand Seals, M, XP Cost

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, E, M

You touch the target and attempt to create a summoning contract with it, forcing it to obey your orders as a summoned creature would. As an attack action costing 1 Chakra per HD or level of the target (minimum 15), you may summon the target to a square adjacent to you. The target is not subject to the normal rules for summoned creatures and cannot be banished. The target of this technique cannot be more than twice your HD or level, and the Cost is equal to the target's level or HD (minimum 15).

name: MAGEN: KYOUNOMEN (DEMONIC MIRAGE: VISAGE OF DEATH)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 8

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 33

Components: C, Mob, S

You pour a powerful surge of killing intent into a melee attack you make against the target. If the attack hits, the subject suffers such a powerful surge of fear that it is immediately reduced to -1 HP and starts dying. If the target succeeds at their save, they are instead cowering for 1 round.

name: MAGEN: KYUUTEN JIKAICHOU (DEMONIC MIRAGE: PALACE OF TRUE ENLIGHTENMENT)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 8

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 33

Components: C, F, H

The target must have an attitude towards you that is indifferent or better for this technique to affect it. The subject truly believes it is in no danger, and as such it will not take any actions. Each round, the subject will answer one question truthfully, though it can make a Will save each time to simply not answer. If the subject's attitude towards you changes to something worse than indifference, the technique ends. This technique can be dispelled.

name: MAGEN: SHINSENJOU NO JUTSU (DEMONIC MIRAGE:  METAPHYSICAL BATTLEGROUND TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 5

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

You trap the target's mind into an imaginary battlefield, where it must fight a foe that is its equal in strength (or weakness). You and the subject make opposed Will saves to determine the winner. If the subject wins, it suffers a -4 penalty to Spot and Listen checks for 1 round.

If you win, the subject is defeated and suffers 3d6 damage, +1 per level (up to 3d6+10), suffers a -4 penalty to Spot and Listen checks for two rounds, and cannot act on its next turn. This technique cannot be used more than once per minute on the same target, and can't be dispelled.

name: MAKAI KYUUDOU: HAKKYOU GYOUSHI (HELL'S ENLIGHTENMENT: INSANITY GLARE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 6

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, H

This dangerous technique was forbidden due to its ability to drive people insane by repeated use. It allows you to send terrifying images from 'hell' with little more than a look. Any creature that meets your gaze is panicked for 2d6+1 rounds and suffers 1d4 temporary Wisdom damage (a Will save negates both). If a creature succeeds at their save, they are shaken for 1d4 rounds instead.

name: NAN KAIZOU NO JUTSU (BODY ALTERATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 6

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, H

You temporarily change the flexibility of your bones and skin, gaining a +4 bonus to Escape Artist and opposed Grapple checks. You may also spend a full-round action to deliver a melee touch attack at a range of up to 30 ft, stretching your limb temporarily.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 5

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, H, M

The targets become bonded, and become instantly familiar with each other. They can detect each other as though using Sense Chakra and Detect Emotion without needing to make a check, and they gain a +4 bonus to all Charisma- and Wisdom-based checks made against each other. When flanking or making a skill check to aid another with their bonded partner, the bonus granted increases by +1.

The seal cannot be removed unless both seals are broken at the same time (such as by the Gekata no Fuukatsu technique). A creature cannot be bonded to more than two creatures at a time. If a creature's bonded partner dies, it is very likely to become depressed, and suicide is very common.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 6

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C

You attach Chakra strings to yourself, controlling your body by nothing but your will. This technique can be used while paralyzed, and allows you to make a Concentration check (DC 20) each round to act as normal while suffering from that condition. Once the technique ends, it cannot be used again for 1d4 minutes.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 30

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, F, H, XP

You create a body double of another creature, which will act as the original creature would, but will obey your orders without fail. The double has the same ability scores as its original, but its Intelligence, Wisdom and Charisma are reduced to 14 if they were higher than that. It has all of the original's feats, talents, templates, special abilities, class levels, etc.

The double has only half the original's HP and Chakra Pool, and suffers a -5 penalty to attack rolls, saves, Defense and skill checks. It counts as 5 levels lower as the original for any ability or technique whose effects (duration, range, damage, empowering, etc) depend on the user's level. All of these statistics are determined based on the original creature as it was at the time its blood sample was taken.

The double cannot gain experience.

components.value: Concentration, Focus, Hand Seals, XP Cost

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 5

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: H, Mas

The subject is overcome with uncontrollable, violent thoughts and attacks the nearest creature to the best of its ability. If the subject is damaged or attacked by a creature, that creature becomes the focus of its rage, and the subject attacks it to the best of its ability. The subject does not make attacks of opportunity against any creature it is not currently attacking.

Mastery: The first and third steps increase the duration by 1 round.

The fifth step allows you to select a secondary target within 15 ft of the first, which is also affected by this technique, though only for a single round.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 5

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: C, H, M

You seal the flow of the target's Chakra, making the target unable to use Chakra as though affected by a Chakra Sealing Tag, with one exception: as a move action that provokes attacks of opportunity and requires concentration, the target can make a Chakra Control check (DC 15) to dispel the seal. While in effect, the target's Chakra Signature appears to be two categories smaller than in reality (minimum faint).

name: SAIMIN JUTSU: SHINTEIRYUU NO JUTSU  (HYPNOTISM TECHNIQUE: MIND BLOCK TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, S

You create a mental block within the target, making it unable to use two of the following abilities (your choice): Scent, See Chakra, See Through Chakra, Sense Chakra, Detect Emotions. This technique can be dispelled.

Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 6

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

You disrupt the rhythm of the target's heartbeat. If the subject has fewer than 6 HD, it dies. Otherwise, the subject takes 4d6 damage, which cannot reduce them below 0 HP.

name: SHIN KASOKU NO JUTSU (MENTAL ACCELERATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 4

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, S

You manipulate your brain into working faster, gaining a +1 bonus to Defense and saves. If the technique remains in effect for more than (2 + Wis modifier) rounds, you suffer 1 temporary Wisdom damage.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 29 | Successes: 8

Perform: 17 | Perform DC: 37

Components: C, H, Mas

You speak in a clear voice, giving the target an order that it can understand (if no common language exists, you can only convey basic instructions such as 'go there' or 'fight that person'). The subject obeys the order, and prioritizes it above all other things, completing it to the best of its ability. Other creatures can determine that its actions are being influenced with a Sense Motive check (DC 15).

An obviously self-destructive order will not be carried out, and each time you target the same creature within a 24 hour period beyond the first time, it gains a +2 cumulative bonus to its Will save to resist it. The technique automatically ends if the instructions given have been completed.

name: SHINJI HENKOU NO JUTSU (MIND ALTERATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 18

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, H

This technique attempts to fundamentally alter the thought patterns of a target, and is generally only used when drastic measures are required. The technique cannot be used more than once per day on the same creature. The subject will suffer one of the following effects:

Instill Fear - The subject experiences uncontrollable fear similar to a strong phobia, for 1 week per level. Whenever it is within 50 ft of a creature of your choice (you may choose yourself) and is aware of them, the subject becomes shaken and suffers a -2 penalty to saves against fear effects coming from the chosen creature. A subject can only fear one creature at a Time: a second use of this technique will simply remove the existing fear and create a new one.

Modify Memory - You permanently alter the subject's memories by eliminating all memory of a single event, allowing it to recall an event from memory with perfect clarity, change he details of an event it remembers or implant a memory of an event it never experienced. You can modify up to 1 minute worth of memories per level, and can only change or remove memories which you know the subject has. Badly implanted or changed memories will be dismissed as a dream or similar.

Restore Memory - As Modify Memory, but you can restore any memories you know have been erased from the subject's mind. You are still restricted to 1 minute per level worth of memories. The perform DC changes to 25 + the level or HD of the source that caused the memory loss (minimum 39).

Modifying or Restoring Memory will require you to concentrate for the length of the memory in question.

You can dispel this technique as a full-round action as long as you are within 1 mile of the subject. If you dispel a modified memory, you dispel only a single instance of this technique of your choice.

target.value: One helpless or willing living creatures

name: SHINKAI SATSUJIN NO JUTSU (DEEP SEA MURDER TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 6

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, H

The target sees itself surrounded by clear water, and is able to hold its breath and act normally. If the target failed its save, the water turns dark, making the subject unaware of any creatures around it and causing it to start making Constitution checks to avoid drowning (D20 Modern, p213). If the subject falls unconscious, its HP drops by 1 each round until it dies. While drowning, the subject cannot speak.

If the technique ends or is dispelled before the subject dies, any HP lost because of this technique is instantly restored. This technique can be dispelled.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 30

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, F, H, XP

The target must be bearing a child (of any type) and be within a day from going into labor or otherwise birthing it. You take the soul stored with the Katou Shin Fuuin technique, and transfer it from the object into the unborn child. The unborn child gains a bonus to a score modifier, up to +4. (For example, if the subject's highest ability score was 20 Constitution, the infant would gain a +4 bonus to Constitution; in case of a tie, single ability score based on the subject's highest ability determine at random).

In addition, the child gains any template or bloodline the subject has (except Moujuu Aishou), and has a 75% chance to gain the subject's primary allegiance as one of its own allegiances. The GM may decide to award additional effects or special templates depending on the subject (such as granting the Ghastly Inheritance template when sealing the Kyuubi's spirit). Upon child- birth, the creature that bore the child will die (no save). If the target succeeded at their save, the soul escapes and vanishes, allowing it to later be resurrected once again.

components.value: Concentration, Focus, Hand Seals, XP Cost

name: SHUUGYOU: SAIKITSUI NO WAZA (TRAINING: ABILITY IMBUING ART)

description.value:
Type: Training (*)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

This training technique comes in six varieties, each with a different subtype, and each relating to one of your ability scores: Strength (Taijutsu), Dexterity (Taijutsu), Constitution (Chakra Control), Intelligence (Ninjutsu), Wisdom (Chakra Control) and Charisma (Genjutsu). This technique can be learned six times: Once for each ability score. You cannot learn it twice for the same ability score.

You must have previously ingested an abilityenhancing drug of the appropriate kind (such as a Strength-enhancing Shinobi drug for the Strength variation) in order to be able to complete this training, which will increase the inherent bonus granted by the drug by +1.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 13 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 6

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 30

Components: H

This very potent technique has been forbidden because it is a cruel weapon that can leave disturbing mental scars on its subject. Your hand flares up with blazing flames, which will deal 8d8 fire damage to the touched target. In addition, the target is marked with a blazing seal, which deals 2d6+1 fire damage each round and lasts 1d8+2 rounds. Only a successful use of the Fuuka Houin technique can remove the brand and its flames (other than its duration expiring).

Each round the brand deals damage, the target will cower for 1 round and suffer 1 temporary Wisdom damage (Will DC 16 negates both effects).

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 20

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, H, M, XP

This seal is unique in its effect, and allows you to temporarily absorb another creature into yourself, gaining some of their abilities and most of their knowledge. You have a willing participant (the subject) absorbed into your body through the fusion seal. You gain a bonus to your ability scores equal to the subject's relevant ability score modifiers, a +1 inherent bonus to attack rolls per 4 levels of the subject, a +1 inherent bonus to Defense per 5 levels of the subject, and a +1 bonus to Chakra and Chakra Reserves per 2 levels of the subject.

You gain the use of all the subject's techniques, skills, Speed Ranks, Strength Ranks, Power Units and Power Ranks, though such things do not stack with your own.

You also gain all extraordinary and supernatural abilities possessed by the subject, as well as any template and bloodline abilities it might possess, though you will use your own level to determine what abilities are available to you, and you cannot use the powers of more than one bloodline at a time.

If you fall unconscious or fail a massive damage save while fused, the fusion ends and both you and the subject are separated, the subject appearing in an adjacent square. If you die or suffer the following effects, they will also apply to the subject when the fusion ends: Chakra depletion, ability damage, ability drain, Chakra coil damage, tenketsu damage, and any spell or technique affecting you whose duration has not yet expired.

When the transformation ends, both you and the subject are exhausted until you have a good night's rest, and lose half of your respective maximum HP, Chakra and Reserves (you cannot be reduced below 1 HP by this effect). You cannot fuse with a creature that is already fused, nor can you fuse with a creature while you are already fused.

components.value: Concentration, Hand Seals, M, XP Cost

description.value:
Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 5

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C

This very rare and useful technique allows you to enhance the senses, granting you the Detect Emotions ability and giving you a +2 competence bonus to Sense Motive checks.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 50

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, H, P, X

This seal must be applied to a creature with a Chakra Signature identical to your own, and isn't affected by ability damage, fatigue, exhaustion or movement impairing effects. The creature ignores any aging penalties it is currently suffering from. When the seal ends, its bearer suffers 1d6 temporary Strength, Dexterity and Constitution damage and becomes nauseated for 2d6+2 hours.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: F, Mob

You make an unarmed attack that deals one additional die of damage, and ignores up to 15 points of DR and any hardness of 15 or lower. On hit, the target takes an additional 2d6 damage and is knocked back 1d6 x 5 ft (Fortitude negates both). If the target collides with an object, it suffers 1d4 damage for every 10 ft of knockback it suffered and falls prone.

If used more than once per minute, you must make a Fortitude save (DC 20) to avoid taking 1d6 temporary Strength damage. You suffer a -4 penalty to Learn checks when learning this technique unless you have the Gouken feat.

name: FUZEN SHINRUI FUUIN (MINOR BLOOD BOND SEAL)

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 6

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: H, M

This seal can only be applied to a clone or replica of yourself created by Ishi Bunshin, (Tajuu) Kage Bunshin, Kasumi Bunshin or Mizu Bunshin no Jutsu, and grants the target a +1 bonus to attack rolls and Defense and increases its maximum Chakra Pool by 5 (if it had none, it gains a Chakra Pool of 5). In addition, the clone can use techniques of Rank 2 or lower and becomes capable of performing actions that require concentration.

Only one clone can be affected by this technique, and creating such a seal automatically dispels and previous ones you have created.

Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 5

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 29

Components: C, H

An illusory copy of you appears within range. Starting the round after you use this technique, you must maintain concentration on the double to keep it from disappearing at the end of the following round. The double acts and moves as you direct it, but cannot interact with physical objects or make any sound. In addition, you turn invisible to all creatures that could see you perform the technique. If the illusory clone is made to appear in your square, onlookers will not notice that you turned invisible as the illusion covers you. The invisibility breaks when you take offensive action or are damaged in any way.

Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 5

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, H

You create an illusion that mimics the effects of a Ninjutsu of Rank 4 or lower that you know the effects of (though you needn't be able to perform it). The Cost is increased by the cost of the mimicked technique (An imitated technique cannot be empowered). If the mim- icked technique deals damage, targets receive a save according to that technique in addition to their Will save. If disbelieved, the technique deals only one-fifth damage. If recognized as an illusion, the technique deals only half damage, or no damage if the target succeeds at any of its saves. Such a technique cannot mimic any secondary effects, but the save DC for it is calculated as though it were a Rank 6 Genjutsu.

If the mimicked technique was not damaging, it has its normal effects against targets who did not disbelieve it. Objects remain unaffected by this technique.

name: HARADOU: AKU NO SOUSHIKI (WAY OF PURIFICATION:  FUNERAL FOR THE WICKED)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 7

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 29

Components: C, P

You make a touch attack that has the power to reject evil influence. If the attack hits, the target must make a save to avoid being disintegrated, leaving behind only the items it was holding and/or wearing.

target.value: One evil or non-human, nonanimal creature

name: HARADOU: BAKU NO MOUKIN (WAY OF PURIFICATION:  SHACKLES OF THE PREDATOR)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 6

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C

Used by demon hunters to mark their prey, this technique leaves a cross-shaped seal on the target's body, which takes up a seal slot. While it lasts, the seal can be instantly detected and pinpointed by anyone sensing Chakra, as long as it is within range of the senses. Evil outsiders are unable to see, sense or feel the mark.

name: HARADOU: HAKUTOU (WAY OF PURIFICATION: WHITE SWORD)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 4

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, E

You create one hakutou, a glowing white cross-shaped dagger that weighs nothing and deals 1d4 piercing damage, as well as 3d4 holy damage that is not multiplied on critical hits. The weapon is considered to be a dagger, and benefits from modifiers you may have to such a weapon.

If it hits an evil creature, a hakutou creates a brilliant glow for a moment. If it hits a non-evil creature, it deals no damage. In either case, once it hits, it disintegrates.

Empower: Spend 3 Chakra to create an additional hakutou (up to 1 per 3 levels or 5 total, whichever is lower).

name: HARADOU: SEIKOUJIN (WAY OF PURIFICATION: SACRED LIFE BARRIER)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, S

A barrier of translucent energy surrounds you and moves with you. To any evil creature, the barrier is like a solid wall of force, but to objects or other creatures, it does not interfere with their movement. If an evil outsider touches the barrier, it suffers 1d4 holy damage, plus 1d4 holy damage each round it continues to touch the barrier.

Once the technique ends, you become fatigued. If used while already fatigued or exhausted, you take 1d4 or 1d6 damage per round while concentrating on it, respectively.

Type: Taijutsu (Mobility)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 5

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: Mob, Mas

You move to a location within range instantly, and to not provoke attacks of opportunity for moving through or out of threatened areas.
