While moving, you move through obstacles up to 10 ft tall or wide, and you do not trigger traps that would normally be triggered by your movement. You do not leave physical tracks, but can still be tracked by scent. If you end your movement on a surface that you cannot stand on or which cannot support you, you begin to fall.

Instant Action: You can use Hirameku as an instant action when within 10 ft of a sturdy, vertical surface (such as a wall) to shorten the length of a fall by the techniques range (maximum 100 ft), reducing fall damage. You are limited to one use per day between this technique and Hiryuusen.

Mastery: The third step allows you to make a Hide check while being observed as you move.

The fifth step of mastery allows you to be treated as though invisible while moving, allowing you to catch a foe unaware with your first attack after moving (up to once per encounter). Speed Sight 4 or greater allows a creature to see through the invisibility.

Type: Taijutsu (Mobility)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 5

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 29

Components: None

This technique is identical to Hirameku except as above, and you count as invisible while moving (as the fifth step Mastery of Hirameku). High Speed Sight 7 or higher allows a creature to ignore the invisibility.

Mastery: The third step allows you to make the movement as though you had a flight speed with perfect maneuverability.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 3

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: E, F, Mob, S

You focus your Chakra into the tip of a held melee weapon, igniting a roaring flame to enhance your next strike. Your next attack with the weapon will deal 2d6 additional fire damage (not multiplied on critical hits). Should the attack score a critical hit, it deals another 1d6 bonus fire damage. If the attack is evaded but still strikes an object (e.g. if the attack would have hit, but the opponent used Kawarimi no Jutsu or something similar to evade it), the bonus damage is still dealt, ending the enhancement to the weapon.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6 (maximum 5d6 total).

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: HIKEN – KYOUI CHUUSHI (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: SECRETS – MIRACLE STASIS)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 6

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C

This technique can be performed even when it isn't your turn, though doing so will consume the swift action of your next turn, and must be used within 1

round of the target's death. You must maintain physical contact while maintaining this technique, and while doing so the target's body is held in perfect stasis, allowing it to remain useful for techniques or abilities that only work on (very) recently deceased bodies.

Each round you concentrate on this technique, you suffer 1 temporary Constitution damage, which can only be healed by resting. When the technique ends, you become exhausted until all the Constitution damage taken this way is healed.

name: KAGE ANSATSU NO JUTSU (SHADOW ASSASSINATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Shadow)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 7

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 29

Components: H

One of the third Hokage's original techniques, which attempts to deal a lethal blow by striking a creature's shadow. You must be able to see the shadow clearly, and its owner must be unaware of you. It has a Defense of 10, and if you hit, you deal normal damage to the shadow's owner, and it must save against being reduced to -1 HP and dying.

This attack automatically bypasses the creature's damage reductions. Creatures immune to sneak attacks or critical hits are immune to this technique.

name: KAGEBAKU SHURIKEN NO JUTSU (SHADOW BINDING SHURIKEN TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Shadow)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 7

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 24

Components: F, H

This technique's range is equal to that of the weapon(s) used. You can use a melee weapon as well, though it must be left in the shadow to keep affecting the target.

You throw a number of weapons (shuriken, kunai, etc), each at the shadow of a creature no larger than your size, and attempt to completely immobilize it. A shadow has a Defense of 10 if it's owner is unaware or flat-footed. Otherwise, use the target's touch defense.

You can make a single attack as an attack action, or a Full Attack as a full-round action. Each attack costs 3 Chakra and must target a different shadow.

If you hit, the target is completely immobilized, and cannot move or be moved as though held in place by a powerful force. Creatures caught can make a save each round in order to free themselves. Though immobile, the creature is able to move its eyes and can still speak.

If the weapon used to bind them is removed from their shadow (or their shadow is no longer where the weapon struck), the technique also ends.

name: KAIZAN SHINJUTSU: ENMA NO KESSHIN (WORLD ENDING SUPREME TECHNIQUE: AVATAR OF THE KING OF HELL)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 6

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 29

Components: C, H

You cast an illusion upon yourself, making yourself appear slightly taller, gain crimson eyes and making your flesh seem deathly pale. Your aura becomes a visible, fiery and chaotic red and the ground beneath you seems to shake with an unearthly power. Your voice becomes booming and deep. Enemies within 50 ft of you become shaken for 2d6 rounds, ordinaries become panicked instead. If a creature leaves and re-enters the aura, it must make a new save. Allies within 50 ft of you instead gain a +1 morale bonus to attack rolls and saves. Enemies that correctly identify the technique or were warned about its effects gain a +8 bonus to saves to resist it.

name: KENSOKU: OUGI - SHIN IAIKEN (SWIFT FISTS: SECRET SKILL TRUE UNDODGEABLE FIST)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: Mas, Mob

You make an unarmed attack that is truly difficult to see, and can hit a creature up to 10 ft further than your melee reach. You gain a +4 bonus to the attack roll, and the attack deals 1d6 bonus damage per 2 levels (up to 10d6), which is not multiplied on critical hits. If hit, the target is knocked back 1d6 x 5 ft and becomes dazed for 1 round. A successful save negates both these secondary effects.

This attack is difficult to see and is harder to perform without the appropriate clothing, as with Kensoku: Iaiken.

Mastery: The fifth step extends the range by another 10 ft.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 6

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 28

Components: C, H, M, P

One of the Hidden Steel's secret techniques, it exemplifies the spirit of a true warrior, the equivalent of signing a blood pact with your own weapon. The target has its currently held weapon sealed within its body. The target can apply some of its blood to the seal and mold Chakra to release the weapon, which can take up a free action or a full minute depending on how easy the seal is to reach. As a free action, they can dismiss the weapon back into the seal, and it disappears in a puff of smoke. If the weapon is destroyed or moved further than 1 mile from its host, it also disappears, but will be unavailable for summoning for 1 hour.

If the seal is broken or the target dies, the weapon reappears next to their body, broken into so many pieces it cannot be repaired.

The number of seal slots this technique requires, and the Fuinjutsu DC required to identify or break the seal, is based upon the size of the weapon that is sealed:

| Weapon Size | Slots | DC | Weapon Size | Slots | DC |
|------------------|---------|------|---------------|---------|------|
| Small or smaller | 1 | 12 | Huge | 4 | 24 |
| Medium | 2 | 16 | Gargantuan | 5 | 28 |
| Large | 3 | 20 | Colossal | 6 | 32 |

For each size category the target is larger than Medium, the technique requires 1 less seal slot (minimum 1 slot required). Once the weapon is sealed, the target takes 3 temporary Strength damage per seal slot it occupies.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 5

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, Mas, S

A lost technique from the Hidden Steel, you transform one of your arms into a blade, which counts as a onehanded Katana made for your size. While fighting defensively or using total defense, the weapon grants a +1 shield bonus to Defense, stacking with similar bonuses. You are automatically proficient with the weapon, which cannot be sundered or damaged due to a protective layer of Chakra.

Any objects held in the hand are dropped, and the transformed hand cannot be used to hold objects or make hand seals. Once the technique ends, you take 1 temporary Strength damage and become fatigued for the rest of the encounter (Fortitude DC 15 negates both).

Mastery: The first step allows you to make the blade one size smaller, reducing its damage and making it a light weapon.

name: KODACHI NITTOURYU: KAITEN KENBU ROKUREN (DUAL KODACHI STYLE: SIX SWIRLING SWORD DANCES)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: None

This technique is identical to Kenjutsu: Kodachi Ryu Kaiten Kenbu, except as above, and the target must either be flat-footed or be under the effect of your Ryuusui no Ugoki. You make a Full Attack with both your weapons, gaining a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls. The target loses its Dexterity bonus to Defense only against the first attack from each weapon.

name: KODACHI NITTOURYU: ONMYOU HASSHI (DUAL KODACHI STYLE: DUAL HAIR KILLER)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 4

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, F, Mob

You throw two held weapons at the target, one directly behind the other, at your highest attack bonus. If the first one hits, the target will be denied its Dexterity bonus to Defense against the second attack. If the first attack missed, the target may choose to make a Reflex save against your attack roll instead of using its Defense.

The weapons have a range increment of 10 ft, and deal normal damage when they hit. Each weapon that hit will fall to the ground in the target's square, while each weapon that missed falls to the ground 10 ft behind it.

Mastery: The third step allows you to retrieve the weapon(s) by moving to a square adjacent to the thrown weapon(s) and making an attack roll against a Defense of 15. This can only be done if you benefit from Speed Rank 1 or higher. This is a move action.

name: KODACHI NITTOURYU: ONMYOU KOUSA (DUAL KODACHI STYLE: DUAL CROSS)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: F, Mob

This technique can only be used if you wield two weapons and missed the target by 5 or less with a melee attack this round. You make an attack that deals normal damage, and may choose to make a sunder or disarm attempt instead. The attack is made with the weapon that didn't miss (i.e. if your main hand attack missed, this is an attack with your off-hand weapon).

name: KODACHI RYU: KAITEN KENBU (KODACHI STYLE: SWIRLING SWORD DANCE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, F, Mob

The target must be unable to pinpoint your location (such as while hidden, invisible of fully concealed). You make a Full Attack with your held weapon, gaining a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls. The target is denied its Dexterity bonus to Defense against the first attack, and the attacks deal damage as though the weapon was one size category larger.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, H, Mas

You send your Chakra into the area and manipulate the airflow within, changing the direction and strength of wind within the area. While concentrating, you can spend a move action to change the current direction and/or strength of the winds. You can choose to create a zone of calm winds at the center of the Cylinder, up to 80 ft in diameter, and can freely choose to affect an area smaller than this technique's normal potential.

Direction: You can choose to create a downdraft (blowing from the center outward), updraft (blowing from the perimeter towards the center), rotation (the winds circle around the center point, either clockwise or counter-clockwise) or a blast (the winds blow in one direction throughout the area).

Strength: You can increase or decrease the strength of the winds by one step per 10 levels (minimum 1) per round. These effects are cumulative, and creatures within the area can make a Fortitude save to negate any penalties.

Light winds (< 11 mph) are a gentle breeze.

Moderate winds (11-21 mph) have a 50% chance each round to extinguish small, unprotected flames (candles and the like).

Strong winds (21-31 mph) extinguish unprotected flames, makes sailing difficult and imposes a -2 penalty to ranged attack rolls and Listen checks.

Severe winds (31-51 mph) causes minor damage to ships and buildings, and has a 50% chance to extinguish protected flames (such as lanterns). The penalty increases to -4.

Windstorms (51-75 mph) drives flying creatures out of the area and knocks over small trees and light, wooden structures. It can tear off roofs and seriously endanger ships. It has a 75% chance to extinguish protected flames, ranged weapon attacks are impossible, and siege and ballistic weapons take a -4 penalty to attack rolls. The Listen check penalty is increased to -8.

Hurricane force winds (75-175mph) cannot be made or lessened unless you Master this technique. It destroys wooden buildings, sometimes uproots larger trees, and most ships will flounder. It extinguishes any flames and makes Listen checks impossible. Increases the penalty for ballistic and siege weapons to -8.

Tornado strength winds (175+ mph) cannot be made, but if you have Mastered this technique you can temporarily decrease their strength by paying 3 Chakra per round per category you wish to decrease it by. If the technique ends, the tornado will return if the effect that created it has not yet ended. These winds are so strong, they destroy all unfortified buildings and often uproot even large trees. See Tatsumaki no Jutsu (p321).

Mastery: The fifth step allows you to create or reduce Hurricane winds, as well as allowing you to reduce Tornado strength winds.

Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 7

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 29

Components: C, H

This technique was forbidden and sealed due to its utterly inhumane effects, which are meant to shut down all the target's senses over time. The subject is blinded and deafened. It loses all sense of taste and texture, cannot smell, and loses its sense of touch (including its sense of pain), so it can't tell if it's standing, sitting, falling, whether it has been damaged, etc. The subject is unable to sense Chakra, and must make a Will save each round to avoid becoming unable to act.

Even though the subject is blinded, it is still subject to gaze attacks (since the blindness is merely an illusion). The subject further suffers a -4 penalty to Massive Damage saves.

This technique can be dispelled, but counts as a Rank 12 technique for those attempting to do so.

name: MAGEN: GOUKYOU GENMU NO JUTSU (DEMONIC MIRAGE: PHANTASMAL TORTURE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 6

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, H

The subject writhes in pain as they experience their flesh being ripped from its body and their flesh being burned and torn from their bones. The subject suffers 1d4+1 damage each round, and a -1 penalty to skill checks, ability checks and attack rolls that stacks up to eight times. Once the technique expires, these penalties persist, but are reduced by one each round until they disappear entirely. If the subject is reduced to 0 HP, it stops taking damage and becomes unable to act while the technique lasts. This technique can be dispelled.

name: MAGEN: MUGEN ONSA (DEMONIC MIRAGE: THRALL OF INFINITE  MELODIES)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 20

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 7

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 31

Components: C, F

While concentrating on this technique, you must keep playing the musical instrument you've chosen to use for the technique. The subject will sit kneeling, subject to an illusion that it is bound by chains and subjected to terrible torture, though it remains completely aware of its surroundings. It will be unable to take any action, and takes 1d10 damage per round. Damage from an outside source immediately ends the technique.

The technique can be dispelled, and a creature that cannot hear the music (e.g. because it is deaf) becomes immediately immune to the technique's effects.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 20

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 6

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 32

Components: C, Mas, Mob

This ancient technique was one of the first forms of Chakra manipulation created by the first generation of shinobi. You weave nine intricate symbols in the air with the index and middle finger of one hand, imbuing them with Chakra and then attaching the completed array onto a target creature or unattended object. The subject will carry the symbols, which detonate after 6 rounds to deal 10d8 fire damage as a 30 ft Burst centered on it. A Reflex save will halve the damage, but the target takes a -4 penalty and cannot use (Improved) Evasion to take no damage.

The bomb can be defused by any creature who knows how, but requires them to touch the target and make a Chakra Control check (DC 30), spending 20 Chakra. If the target tries to defuse it, they do not need to touch themselves to do so. You can dismiss this technique by concentrating for a move action.

If you are unable to see, there is a 20% chance you fail to perform the technique, and you suffer a -4 penalty to Perform when your main hand is not free.

Mastery: When you perform this technique, you may choose to reduce the time it takes for the symbols to detonate by up to 1 round per step of mastery you have obtained.

Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 6

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, M

This ancient technique was one of the first forms of Chakra manipulation evercreated. You weave nine intricate symbols in the air with the index and middle finger of one hand, imbuing them with Chakra and then directing them towards your target(s). Subjects have an effective Strength and Dexterity score of 3 and suffer a -10 penalty to Perform techniques that require hand or half seals (unless they can perform them without those components). The subjects cannot run or charge, move at half speed, and cannot make more than one attack of opportunity per round.

This technique can only be dispelled by a character with 10 or more ranks in the Concentration skill.

If you are unable to see, there is a 20% chance you fail to perform the technique, and you suffer a -4 penalty to Perform when your main hand is not free.

name: NAIJIN OUKA NO JUTSU (INNER SELF ABSORPTION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 7

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, S

This extremely dangerous technique has been forbidden due to the high level of danger it poses to the user. You temporarily suppress your conscious mind, letting your unconsciousness take over. You remain fully conscious until you reach -10 HP, gain Strength Rank and Speed Rank 2, as well as gaining a +8 bonus to Will saves against Mind-Affecting and Fear effects. You cannot be reasoned or talked with.

You cannot use techniques, tactics or skills requiring concentration, and are completely oblivious to any creature that isn't your opponent, losing your Dexterity bonus to Defense against any creature you do not recognize as an enemy. You cannot make Listen or Spot checks to detect approaching enemies. While you are oblivious, you are not helpless.

You will fight your opponents to the best of your ability. If there are no enemies left, or you are unable to reach or damage them, you will stand in the same place.

Type: Fuinjutsu (Advanced Seal)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 6

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, H, M *

This ancient technique is used to infuse an advanced seal with a ninjutsu technique, setting it to unleash at a later time. You choose a technique of Rank 7 or lower as part of performing this technique, infusing it into an advanced seal. Such a technique must be able to target other creatures (i.e. not a target of 'You').

If the technique's perform time is longer than one minute, this technique's perform time becomes equal to the technique's. This technique's Cost is increased by the chosen technique's Cost, and any components the technique requires (other than Material Focus or Expendable Components) are also required for this technique.

After being infused, the seal is set as a trap that can be found with a Search DC of 10 + your Sleight of Hand modifier. The trap cannot be disarmed (other than by you dismissing it or its duration expiring), and will trigger when a creature first moves through the area.

When triggered, the technique contained in the seal is fired off at the target, as though performed by you, though its save DC is decreased by 2. If the technique has an area of effect, it must be determined when the trap is set. If the technique requires a Material Focus or Expendable Components, they must be nearby for the trap to go off.

Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 3

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, Mas

The subject gains 2 Chakra. If you have 5 or more levels of Elementalist with a Doton specialization, you can use this technique to reverse most kinds of petrification. This technique cannot be used more than once per day per target.

Mastery: The fifth step allows you to restore the target's Chakra Reserves by 2 instead, and if used on a target within 5 minutes of it having suffered Chakra depletion, it suffers none of the usual effects of that affliction.

Type: Taijutsu (Mobility)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, Mas, Mob

You must have Speed Rank 1 or higher active to use this technique, and must target a creature no larger than Medium size. You move at high speed around the target, but it seems as though you are slowly circling it. This technique lasts for up to 3 rounds, but you must spend at least a move action each round to move through 4 or more squares adjacent to the target, and it ends as soon as you take an action other than moving.

While active, you provoke no attacks of opportunity from the target for moving through a threatened area, and other creatures take a -4 penalty to attacks of opportunity made against you. You gain total concealment from your target, and if the target tries to move away from you in any way, you can make an attack of opportunity against it that, if it hits, also prevents the target from moving.

The first attack or technique you use against the target counts as though you were invisible to the target.

The target can make a Spot check (opposed by your Hide check, to which you gain a +10 bonus) to determine the square you are in, though it still suffers from the usual miss chance due to the concealment.

Mastery: The fifth step allows you to increase the Chakra cost by 3 to increase the maximum duration by 1 round.

name: SAIMIN JUTSU: KAGE GUGEN NO JUTSU (HYPNOTISM TECHNIQUE: SHADOW INCARNATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Doujutsu)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 6

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, H

You erase your own presence from the target's mind, granting you total concealment and making the subject unable to see or hear you (though it can still detect your scent if it isn't hidden). Instead, the subject constantly sees an image of the user to their side, no matter where they look, as if you were moving at impossible speeds.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 5

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: H

You combine three basic elements into a single attack, dealing 5d6 damage three times, each time from a different energy type from among the following: cold, earth, electric, fire, water and wind (Reflex halves, one save per element). Add the appropriate descriptors to the technique.

To deal damage of a certain type, you must have the appropriate elemental affinity (katon for fire, etc). An elementalist increases the damage dealt by their specialized element. Range is not affected.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 7

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 29

Components: C, E, H

You sheathe your hand in offensive Chakra, touching the target to drain it of its energies. If hit, the target is drained of 1d6 Chakra, and you gain temporary HP equal to the amount drained.

Empower: Spend 1 additional Chakra to increase the Chakra drain by 1 (maximum +1 per 3 levels, up to +5).

name: SEIGAE NO WAZA (METHOD OF LIFE EXCHANGE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 6

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, H, Mas

This technique allows for quick and effective healing of even deep wounds, but does so by channeling your life force, making it dangerous and ineffective for use on yourself. This technique cannot be used on a target below 0 HP. Each round you concentrate, you heal the target for 1d6 HP, but take 1d6 damage (not affected by damage reductions). If you heal the target for more than 3 rounds, the target suffers from Chakra Overload for 1 hour (as per Iryou Ninjutsu: Chiyu techniques).

Mastery: The first step decreases the damage you take to 1d4.

The third step increases the healing to 1d6+1. The fifth step increases the healing to 1d6+3.

Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 60

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, E, F, H, XP

This technique is used for two purposes: to create a soul receptacle that can be used for the Edo Tensei technique, called a seishinkugi, and to create a talisman that can enhance and/or control the summoned soul. The seishinkugi has one of two forms.

Faux Body: This receptacle is a generic body that is not attuned to a single creature, and a soul that inhabits it cannot use spells or techniques above Rank 4 or CClass complexity, has only 25% of its normal maximum HP and CP, and has no Chakra Reserve. (See the Sealed Items)

Prepared Receptacle: This receptacle requires a corpse of the same species as the intended soul, which had at least half as much HD as the soul intended to possess it. The receptacle takes 3 days to prepare, requiring 8 hours of effort per day. The receptacle is attuned for one specific creature, and while inhabited by the intended soul, it can fight to its full ability.

After the receptacle is created, it must be placed inside a coffin or other container, where it remains preserved for 1 month, ready to be summoned. After this month, the receptacle becomes unusable.

The talisman carries two components: a control component, which takes 3 days to craft, and an optional immortality component which takes 1 day to craft.

Partial Control: This talisman allows the soul to react normally to defend itself even when not commanded to, and allows it to retain its personality, but also allows it to make a Will save against Edo Tensei when given an order that goes strongly against its nature.

Total Control: This talisman elicits full control. The soul cannot act on its own in any way, unless commanded, and retains none of its original personality.

Immortality: This component extends the duration of Edo Tensei indefinitely and grants the summoned body and soul the Immortal subtype, with the condition that its immortality ends if the talisman is destroyed, or removed from its body. An immortal seishinkugi continually reconstructs itself, healing 10 HP per round and regrowing any lost limbs (including the head) at the beginning of each of its turns. When reduced to 0 HP, the immortal seishinkugi is incapacitated for 1 round, but recovers to full HP on its next turn. The immortality talisman can support this process only twice, and once it has done so it and the seishinkugi will be destroyed when reaching 0 HP.

Empower: Spend 10 Chakra to increase the number of times the immortality talisman can reconstruct its host by one (maximum 10 times total). Doing so increases the preparation time by 2 days and the XP cost by 25 per level of the intended summoned soul each time.

components.value: Concentration, Empower, Focus, Hand Seals, XP Cost

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, H

This ancient technique works on the idea that a small part of your spirit, soul (or Chakra) is left behind whenever you visit a location, and can be used as an anchor to return to. While concentrating, you manifest your spirit in any location which you've previously visited. Your real body is left behind, unable to take actions and you are unaware of its surroundings. If your real body is harmed, the technique ends.

While manifested, you can control your spirit to move as you normally would, though you are unaffected by gravity (this does not allow you to fly). Your spirit counts as though ethereal, and as such is unaffected by most attacks and effects. Effects that can damage your spirit simply cancel the technique (as above) without having their normal effects. Genjutsu techniques and effects that do not affect your physical body (like Kanashibari no Jutsu) can still. Your spirit can move through openings of any size, can see and hear normally even in low lighting, can Sense Chakra (if you can) and can speak, though its voice sounds hollow and distorted. The spirit has no physical substance, though techniques it uses may have it.

While the spirit can use techniques, the perform time of any technique is increased by 1 round per 500 ft between your real body and your spirit, as your Chakra needs time to travel from your body to your spirit. Techniques performed by the spirit have all their random variables reduced to their lowest possible value.

The spirit cannot move more than 1,000 ft away from the point where it initially manifested.

When the technique ends by any means, your spirit immediately travels back at a speed of 1,000 ft per round and is completely undetectable while doing so. Your body remains unresponsive until your spirit returns to it.

Type: Ninjutsu (Shadow)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 6

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, F, H, Mas

This secret technique is considered highly forbidden and immoral, and lets you control one or more dead bodies with your Chakra. A corpse so controlled cannot run, charge or make sounds, has the undead creature type (with its associated qualities and immunities), and has 1 HD per 3 levels (maximum 5), with average HP. It has the same Strength and Dexterity score it had before it died (up to 16 each), and can carry up to 40 lbs per HD it has. Its movement speed is 30 ft, which is unaffected by how much weight it may be carrying or whether it changes size category. It is a Chakra-created construct.

A corpse can be controlled as long as it remains within range of you and within line of sight. They follow your command, moving and attacking as you direct, though they cannot attack anyone or anything you cannot see. The corpses do not make attacks of opportunity and cannot take any action requiring sentience or independent thought.

You can control up to 1 corpse per 7 levels.

Mastery: The fifth step increases the maximum HD of the corpses by 1.

Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 6

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, H

This technique functions the same as Genryuudan (p266), but allows you to recreate techniques of Rank 8 or lower, increases its base cost to 12 plus the cost of the recreated technique, and the save DC is calculated as though it were a Rank 10 genjutsu.

name: SHINOBI HIKEN: IKUSA - DENRAISEI (SHINOBI SECRET: WAR ANCESTRAL SPIRIT)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 5

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, H, P

You accelerate the flow of Chakra in your body, enhancing your capabilities for a time. Your Base Attack Bonus increases to 3/4 th your level (as a Fast Hero), and your class bonus to Defense becomes equal to half your level (rounded down, minimum +1). These bonuses do not increase beyond 20 th level. In addition, you gain 1 temporary HP per level while the technique lasts.

The technique's cost is equal to: 5 + the Base Attack Bonus gained by this technique (i.e. if you go from +5 to +7, this technique costs 7 Chakra).

When the technique ends, you become fatigued. If you were already fatigued, you become exhausted instead.

name: SHINOBI HIKEN: SAKKI JUTSU (SHINOBI SECRET: KILLING INTENT)

description.value:
Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, Mas

You enhance yourself, emitting a murderous intent that makes you appear threatening to weaker-willed creatures. You gain the Frightful Presence creature ability (p362), with a save DC of (10 + ½ level + Cha modifier). Affected creatures become shaken for 2d6 rounds, or become frightened instead if they have at least 15 fewer HD than you or if they have a Wisdom score of 3 or less.

Once per encounter, you can use this technique to cancel the effects of an opponent's use of Sakki Jutsu. This technique cannot be used more than once per day.

Mastery: Unlike the usual case, mastery does not count toward your level to determine the save DC. The second and fourth steps increase the number of uses per day by one each.

name: SHUKUCHI HIGI: SHUNTENSATSU (WORLD BELITTLING SECRET TECHNIQUE: FATAL HEAVEN FLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 7

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 36

Components: F, Mas, Mob

You must be moving at Speed Rank 10 to use this technique, and the weapon used must be sheathed. You make a lightning-quick Iaijutsu-style attack, making a single attack roll against all creatures in the area, against which they must make a Spot check (DC 40) or lose their Dexterity bonus to Defense. The attack deals four times normal damage, and creatures hit must make a save or be pushed back a number of feet equal to the damage taken, rounded to the nearest 5 ft unit.

Once the attack finishes, the weapon used is unsheathed. If the weapon is not of mastercraft or higher quality, it shatters and cannot be repaired. This technique cannot be used more than once per encounter.

Mastery: The second and fourth steps each increase the uses per encounter by one.

Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 6

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, H

You designate a single creature other than the target, which will become the subject's 'nemesis'. In the subject's experience, nothing they do against their nemesis seems effective, crushing their morale. Each time the subject takes an offensive action against its nemesis, it suffers a cumulative -1 morale penalty to skill checks, ability checks and attack rolls made against the nemesis (up to -10 total). Even if the action was successful, the subject believes its nemesis was completely unaffected.

In addition, each time this happens the subject must make a Will save to avoid suffering non-lethal damage equal to the damage the offensive action dealt or would have dealt (halved if using cumulative non-lethal damage rules, minimum 1).

This technique can be dispelled. When the illusion ends, the penalty incurred as well as any nonlethal damage dealt disappear.

name: TENNOIZOU: HAKUSHOUKA (HEAVEN'S LEGACY: SEARING WHITE FLAME)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 30

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 7

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, H, P

Among the most powerful of fire techniques, this lost skill allows you to expel Chakra and superheat it, breathing it out as a short, white-hot stream of flames that deals 25d8 fire damage. Any creature damaged will also catch fire until it manages to put out the flames. Creatures immune to fire damage still take 5d8 damage, but will not catch fire.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 27

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 7

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 31

Components: H, P

This ancient technique originated in the Hidden Village of Steel, and allows you to use a large amount of Chakra to alter the composition of your skin and flesh, turning them into a metallic substance which, while granting various bonuses, also makes you count as a metal construct in addition to your normal type for the purpose of which kinds of techniques or effects can affect you.

You gain DR 15/Epic and become immune to critical hits, disease, electricity, poison, blindness, ability score damage, deafness, massive damage and nonlethal damage, as well as stun effects from a physical source. In addition, you take only half damage from earth, fire and wind effects or attacks.

You gain a +6 enhancement bonus to Strength, but take a -6 pealty to Dexterity (minimum 1 Dexterity). Your speed is reduced by half, you suffer a -2 Speed Rank penalty, a 50% arcane spell failure chance and a 8 armor check penalty. You suffer a -8 penalty to perform techniques requiring half or hand seals, and cannot drink or play wind instruments.

Your unarmed attacks become Slam attacks, dealing damage as that a Construct of your size would deal. This automatically makes these attacks count as armed.

Your weight increases tenfold, you automatically sink in fluids, and you suffer a -15 penalty to the Perform Requirements when performing techniques used to walk on or stick to surfaces (like Kinobori or Tadayou).

You suffer 3d6 damage and become fatigued for 1 hour after using this technique.

name: TETSUSHIN NO JUTSU (HEART OF STEEL TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, F, H

This technique was created in the Hidden Village of Steel, and is a particularly useful wartime skill that allows you to quickly create weaponry. You shape metal, allowing you to create simple, standard quality weapons. You make a Craft (Mechanical) check to craft the weapon(s), and halve the time required to do so. The weapons cannot be mastercrafted after being created.

name: TSUI NO HIKEN: KAGUZUCHI (SUCCESSION SECRET TECHNIQUE: GOD OF FIRE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 5

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: E, F, S

You infuse your weapon with blazing Chakra, sending forth a divine, burning wrath. You swing your weapon, creating a burst of flame that deals 5d8 fire damage to creatures in the area, which can deal damage to objects and set fire to combustibles.

You may opt to instead make a melee attack against a creature within melee reach. This determines the direction of the cone, and if the attack hits, the melee attack deals normal damage and has the creature hit suffer a -4 Reflex save penalty against this technique. A critical hit will not increase the damage of the cone.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d8, up to 5d8 plus 1d8 per 3 levels or 10d8 total, whichever is lower.

name: YOUTON: IBARA NO KANMURI (DEMONIC RELEASE: CROWN OF THORNS)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 7

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 28

Components: C, H

A spiked, crimson chain erupts from your outstretched hand and coils itself around the target's forehead, where it slowly damages and incapacitates them. Make a ranged touch attack. On hit, the chain fastens itself and deals 1d4 damage to the target each round. In addition, the target must make a Will save each round to avoid becoming dazed for that round.

You can remove the chain easily, but others must succeed at a Strength check (DC 25) in order to do so. When removed, the chain instantly disappears.

name: YOUTON: KUSA JUUJI (DEMONIC RELEASE: CHAIN CROSS)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 4

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, Mob

This technique was designed to severely wound an enemy, or even cut it in half, and must be performed while you have at least two hands free. Make a single melee attack against the target, which deals 3d8 slashing damage as two wicked, crimson spiked chains erupt from your palms. If the target is hit, it will bleed for 1d6+1 rounds, taking 1d4 damage each round (Fortitude negates all bleeding).

You suffer 2d6 damage when performing this technique. If you did not pay for this technique with demonic Chakra, you also suffer 1d4 temporary Strength damage.

name: YOUTON: OU NO ME (DEMONIC RELEASE: EYE OF THE EMPEROR)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 6

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, E, P

This technique was founded on using the pain of a serious injury (the loss of an eye, or something roughly comparable) to call forth inner demonic essence. If you have never suffered similar pain or injury, you cannot use this technique (GM's discretion). You use your Chakra to amplify the power of the demonic essence exponentially, causing severe, nerve wracking pain. The target takes 4d8 negative energy damage and must make a save to avoid becoming stunned for 1d4 rounds. If the damage kills a creature, their body will wither (as though mummified).

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d8, up to 1d8 per level or 12d8, whichever is lower. Each additional damage die will cause you to take 1d4 damage, and you must make a Fortitude save (DC 18) to avoid becoming fatigued. This DC increases by 2 each time you empower this technique, until you get an evening of rest (at least 8 hours).

name: BAKURETSU JUNJIRU NO JUTSU (EXPLOSIVE SACRIFICE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 19

Components: None

You use your Chakra and your body as fuel, causing an explosion dealing 6d8 fire damage, after which you die and leave nothing but a burned corpse.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 1

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 14

Components: H, E

You expel a sudden burst of air (approx 25 mph), clearing out dust, smoke, mist and fog as well as extinguishing small fires (such as candles). Diminutive or smaller creatures must make a save to avoid being knocked back 10 ft.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the radius by 5 ft. (up to 30 ft. total).

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 12 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 11

Components: C, H

You create a clone of yourself, which appears by your side and cannot move further than 100 ft. from you. The clone is a perfect copy, but cannot speak or physically interact with anything or anyone, though it does make noise when moving and carries your scent. Clones have a Defense of 10 + your size modifier + your Dex modifier + half your class bonus. If damaged, touched or violently shaken, they disappear in a puff of smoke. Clones cannot perform actions requiring concentration and cannot perform techniques. If an enemy cannot distinguish you from your clones and tries to attack you while you stand among your clones, randomly determine whether they hit you or a clone.

The Cost increases by 1 Chakra for each clone you create beyond the first (up to 2 + 2 per level total).

name: CHAKRA JIRAI NO JUTSU (CHAKRA LANDMINE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, H

You create a charge of Chakra in a specific square, which detonates when a creature with a Chakra Pool of 5 or more steps on it. The blast deals 3d6 fire damage and 1d6 force damage within a 15 ft radius of the mine, and will set fire to flammable materials caught in the blast.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, H, F, E

You charge an object with Chakra. If the object is touched by a Chakra Signature that is different from yours, it explodes, destroying and dealing 2d6 fire damage in a 10 ft. Burst around it (Reflex halves). When performing this technique, you may have the object ignore up to two other Chakra Signatures you are familiar with.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 5d6 total.

target.value: Object of Medium or smaller size

name: CHAKRA SHORI NO WAZA (METHOD OF CHAKRA READING)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 0

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 3

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, S

Each round, you are able to do two different things.

Chakra Reading: As a full-round action, you can make a Ninjutsu check (DC 15 + seal or item level) to gain information on enhancement bonuses, powers and/or properties of an enhancement seal or sealed item, including how to activate it (if possible) and how many charges it has left (if it uses charges).

Seal Reading (Requires Kaikken no In technique): You touch a Kaikken no In or similar seal, and are able to read the information stored in it.

You discover the types of technique used (genjutsu, ninjutsu, bloodline ability, speed ranks, etc.) in the order they were used, and can make a Wisdom check (DC 20) to identify the Chakra Signature of a user if you are familiar with it.

Each round you spend reading the seal, you gain information on one hour of recorded events, and any read information is removed from the seal.

target.value: One or more seals or sealed items

name: CHI HAKAIHA NO JUTSU (EARTH DESTRUCTION WAVE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, H, Mas

You part the earth and open up a pit that is 10 ft. wide, and has a depth of 5 ft. per level (up to 100 ft.). Crea- tures must save to avoid falling down the hole and suffering fall damage. Structures take 10d10 damage. After 30 minutes, the earth returns to its previous state, closing the pit and killing any creature inside (no save).

This technique can only be used on firm or soft earth.

Mastery: Each step allows you to extend the duration of the pit by 3 minutes if you wish, and increases the damage dealt to structures by 1d10.

name: CHI KATAME NO JUTSU (HARDEN EARTH TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, H

Your Chakra moves into the earth, hardening one cubic foot of earth or sand per level each round, turning it to stone. You direct precisely what area is affected. The technique has no effect on earth created by techniques, nor does it affect manufactured objects. You can only have one instance of this technique active at a time (including usage by clones).

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: C, H

You lay your bare hand on the ground and instantly know which way is north.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Components: H

You shrink a target one size category. Having it gain the appropriate bonuses and penalties (-2 Strength, +2 Dexterity, -2 Constitution, +1 size penalty to Defense and attack rolls, -4 to Grapple checks, +4 to Hide checks and unarmed damage decreases by one step). Any worn and equipped items shrink with the target.

This technique can be used to counter and dispel the effects of Baika no Jutsu and Chou Baika no Jutsu.

If used on an unwilling target, the duration is reduced to 1 round per level (D).

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 5

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: C, H, E *

See Godai Ransatsu: Sandan Jutsu (p159).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 24d6 (whichever is lower).

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H, F

You slowly encase a subject in earth, rock and/or mud. If the target fails its save, it will be subject to the first step as described below. Each round, you can concentrate on the subject as an attack action to advance the effect by one step. Doing so provokes attacks of opportunity. Once this technique is performed, the earthen prison will remain until it is destroyed or the technique ends.

First Step: The target's feet are trapped. They cannot move or turn and take a -2 penalty to Defense and Reflex saves. They can destroy the prison with a Strength check (DC 27) or by using weapon, unarmed or natural attacks. The prison has 20 hp.

Second Step: The target's legs and waist become encased. They lose their Dexterity bonus to Defense and suffers a -4 penalty to Defense and attack rolls. The prison's hp increases by 15.

Third Step: The target is completely encased. They become immobilized. After five rounds, the target starts suffocating. The Strength check DC increases to 30, and the prison's hp increases by 20.

target.value: One creature of Medium size or smaller

name: CHITENKYOU NO JUTSU (BRIDGE OF HEAVEN AND EARTH TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: H, Mas

You create a stairway or a bridge from rock and dirt, which begins in your square and covers 5 ft. per level. It can have a slope up to 45 degrees, either upward or downward. The construction is 15 ft. wide, an a single 5 ft. square can support a creature of up to 250 lbs.

Mastery: The second and fourth step increase the width of the construction by 10 ft each.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 5

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, H, E

You rain spear-shaped bolts of lightning down on the battlefield, targeting 2d6 creatures and/or structures within the area. Each target is hit by 1d4+1 spears, each dealing 1d8+1 electricity damage. The technique can affect each target only once, and structures take double damage. In a crowded area with many structures (like a town), targets are chosen at random.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the number of targets by 1d6, up to 5d6 total.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: S

You touch a surface directly connected to the target area and send a volatile wave of sound towards it, havarea.

Close; Area: 10 ft. Burst; Duration: Instant *; Save: Reing an effect based on the type of surface in the targeted

Hard Ground: The wave sends debris flying in all directions; dealing 2d6 bludgeoning and 2d6 slashing damage which can be halved with a Reflex save. A single square inside the area is treated as though it had caltrops spread over it until it is repaired (the surface takes triple damage from this technique).

Soft Ground: A wave of mud or a cloud of sand and/or dirt is sent flying up, blinding all creatures for 1d4 unless they succeed at a Fortitude save.

name: DAI KAMAITACHI NO JUTSU (GREAT SICKLING WIND BLAST TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: None

This technique is an improved version of Kamaitachi no Jutsu, and functions like it. The slashing winds deal 6d6 wind damage, and creatures caught must make a Fortitude save to avoid being pushed back 1d6x5 ft. The increase to Perform Requirements when using a fan or other suitable implement increases to 4.

Empower: Spend 1 Chaka to increase the damage by 1 die, up to 1 die per level or 12d6 (whichever is lower). Every 2 Chakra you spend this way increases the Perform Requirements by 1.

name: DAI TATSUMAKI NO JUTSU (GREAT TORNADO TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H

You create a powerful gust of wind resembling a tornado, dealing 3d6+3d4 wind damage. Small-size or smaller creatures caught are knocked upwards 1d6x5 ft (Fortitude negates), and will suffer falling damage as normal. Flying creatures take double damage, and Mediumsized flying creatures are must also save against the knock up. Despite having a flight speed, flying creatures knocked up by the technique will fall to the ground afterwards.

name: DAI TSUCHIRYUU NO JUTSU (GREAT EARTH DRAGON TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, H

You create an earthen dragon that dives towards a primary target within the area, then surges toward up to one secondary target per 2 levels within the area, maximum 10 secondary targets total, dealing half the primary damage to each of them. The damage and cost depend on the size of the dragon:

- Small (8 Chakra): 6d6 earth damage.
- Medium (12 Chakra): 9d6 earth damage.
- Large (17 Chakra): 12d6 earth damage.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 4

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: H, F

Your Chakra forms a swirling sphere of water that moves 75 ft. per round in a straight line until it reaches the technique's maximum range. Any Medium-size or smaller creature struck by the orb must succeed at a Reflex save or get dragged along, suffering 3d6 Water damage each round, though it is allowed a Reflex save or swim check every round to escape from the sphere of liquid. Large or larger creatures are merely pushed back 1d6x5 ft. on a failed Reflex save. Structures hit by the sphere take double damage.

An electric technique that hits the sphere charges it for d4+1 rounds, letting it deal 1d4 electric damage per 2 ranks of the technique to each creature or structure hit by the sphere.

If the sphere collides with the effects of another Daibakufu or a Suishouha, Deishouha or Bakusuishouha, the effects cancel each other out.

Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, H, F

You create a ferocious tiger of ice and snow that lunges towards a primary target within the area, dealing 8d6 damage (half cold, half slashing) to it. Afterward, it dives toward up to one secondary target per 2 levels within the area, maximum 12 secondary targets total, dealing half the primary damage to each of them. The damage can be halved with a Reflex save. Creatures taking damage must make a second Reflex save to avoid suffering a -1 penalty to attack rolls and skill checks for 1 minute due to the freezing cold, which is removed if a target is healed for at least one HP by a medical technique.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: (Spell Level 0)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: | Successes:

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

As Daikodan no Jutsu (p153), but you spit out a long, slithering dragon of flames. Instead of saving against the secondary penalties of Daikodan no Jutsu, creatures damaged must make a Reflex save to avoid catching fire.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, H

You gain Sneak Attack (+1d6), or increase your existing sneak attack value by 1d6 (See p14 for more information on sneak attacks).

name: DEISHOUHA NO JUTSU (CRUSHING MUD WAVE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 5

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 31

Components: None

As Suishouha no Jutsu, except as above and below. The wave consists of mud, earth and rock and deals earth damage. Rather than being empowered by an Electric technique, it is empowered if hit by a Fire technique, and the empowerment deals fire damage instead of electric damage. You must have your hands in direct contact with the ground while concentrating on this technique.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 5

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: C, H, E *

See Godai Ransatsu: Yondan Jutsu technique (p159).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 24d6 (whichever is lower).

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: H

You release a ray of shocking currents. If it hits, the ray deals 1d2 electric damage and forces the target to make a save against suffering 2d4 nonlethal damage. This counts as a stun effect.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: H, E *

See Godai Taigeki: Shodan Jutsu technique (p160).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or the maximum indicated per variant (whichever is lower).

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

You convert your Chakra into a consistent current, electrolysing up to 1 liter of water per level and turning it into a combustible gas (hydrogen) that ignites with the slightest spark or flame, and will continue to burn for up to an hour. This gas is not poisonous and lingers over the source of water used to create it. Cannot be used on creatures.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: H, E, Mas *

See Godai Taigeki: Nidan Jutsu technique (p160).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or the maximum indicated per variant (whichever is lower).

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: H, E *

See Godai Taigeki: Sandan Jutsu technique (p160).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or the maximum indicated per variant (whichever is lower).

name: DOCHUU ENGYOU NO JUTSU (UNDERGROUND DISPLACEMENT TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, H, Mas

You soften the earth around you and become able to move through it, gaining a burrow speed equal to your normal speed. If you are within 5 ft. of the surface, you automatically sense if there is a creature standing above you. You cannot run or move through hard ground or stone, but sand, dirt and firm earth are susceptible to this technique. You leave tunnels while moving underground.

Mastery: The third step allows you to leave no trace of your passing (including no tunnels) if you desire.

The fifth step allows you to burrow through hard ground (and rock) as well.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

You transform the air in your lungs, increasing its volume and turning it poisonous before breathing it out as a 15ft wide, 10 ft. high Spread of poison gas. The following round, the gas spreads to a 20 x 20 ft. Spread, and the third round it becomes a 30 x 30 ft. Spread. After 5 rounds, the gas disperses. A moderate wind (11+ mph) will disperse it in 3 rounds, and a strong wind (21+ mph) disperses it in a single round.

The cloud functions as an inhaled poison with 1d6 Constitution damage as both its primary and secondary damage, and a save DC equal to this technique's.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Each mud ball deals 1d6 earth damage, avoided with a Reflex save.

You summon a pack of hounds that bursts from the ground, ready to track down and immobilize your foe. The pack has 41 HP, a Defense of 13, a +7 Fortitude save bonus and a movement speed of 50 ft. It has the Scent ability, can track by scent at its full speed, and is immune to mind-affecting effects. Once the pack comes within range of the target, it can make 8 melee touch attacks (at a +11 bonus each). If at least three of these attacks his in a single round, the target becomes immobilized by the pack. It can break free by succeeding at four opposed Strength checks (the pack has a +4 Strength bonus), each taking a full-round action. If the pack is killed, the target is released. If the target tries to take an action requiring Concentration , it must make a Concentration check (DC 15) or fail to complete the technique.

To use this technique, you must be in direct contact with the ground and place the scroll upon it. If the scroll is destroyed or loses contact with the ground, the technique ends.

A Craft (Structural) (DC 20) or Spot (DC 25) check allows triple damage. This bonus can be shared with allies if it can be communicated to them. At the end of each round, the dome regenerates completely.

Chakra Resistance does not prevent a creature from being trapped in the dome, but can prevent the Chakra damage.

You agitate the waters around you, creating a whirlpool that has effects based on the state of the water when this technique was performed (See the Swim skill, D20 Modern p74, for information on water conditions):

Calm: The water worsens and becomes rough. If you spend a full-round action concentrating on the technique, the water becomes stormy instead that round.

Rough: The water becomes stormy.

If the water conditions are made stormy in the round this technique is performed, creatures walking on water within the area must make a Reflex save to avoid being pushed down 5 ft. into the water.

While on stormy water, you can spend a full-round action to concentrate instead of an attack action each round to push down all creatures currently in the water below the area by 1d6x5 ft. unless they succeed at a Swim check (DC 30). Creatures with a natural swim speed automatically succeed at this check. This technique cannot push creatures into solid surfaces.

You must be standing on or swimming in water when performing this technique, and must remain within the affected area to be able to concentrate on it. You are unaffected by the technique's effects.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the radius by 5 ft., up to 100 ft. total.

This technique is actually a collection of techniques, elemental variants on the same core idea, which vary only slightly. The six techniques covered by Godai Taigeki: Shodan Jutsu are listed below. Each is a separate technique using the statistics above, and has a subtype and descriptor as indicated. Each of these techniques deal their damage as the type listed as their descriptor (the Denha no Jutsu technique is a Ninjutsu (Raiton) [Electric] technique that deals electric damage, for example).

This technique cannot be learned or mastered, and feats or special abilities cannot be applied to it. Instead, such things apply only to the individual techniques presented below, meaning you must learn each of the six variants separately in order to use them all (if your elemental affinities allow for it). Below is given the general effect and the variants available. If you learn any of these techniques, list it on your character sheet as the name of the variant, not as a Godai Taigeki technique. Some variants may require a material focus. If they do, the material focus is listed with the variant.

You breathe out a cone of energy, dealing 2d6 damage. The cone's length cannot exceed 30 ft. This technique has the following variants:

- Denha no Jutsu (Raiton) [Electric]: Can be empowered up to 10d6.
- Doronami no Jutsu (Doton) [Earth]: Can be empowered up to 8d6. Material Focus - At least 25 lbs of earth, stone or mud nearby.
- Goukakyuu no Jutsu (Katon) [Fire]: Can be empowered up to 10d6.
- Gufuuran no Jutsu (Fuuton) [Wind]: Can be empowered up to 10d6.
- Hyoukaimen no Jutsu (Hyouton) [Cold]: Can be empowered up to 8d6. Material Focus - At least 5 cubic ft of snow or ice nearby.
- Mizurappa (Suiton) [Water]: Can be empowered up to 8d6. Material Focus - At least 25 liters of water nearby.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or the maximum indicated per variant (whichever is lower).

Each shark has a single bite attack with an attack modifier of +15, and deals 2d6+5 water damage on hit. Each shark that hits also drags the target down 5 ft. if it was already fully submerged.

The sharks cannot be harmed or destroyed, and disappear once they have made their attack.

Type: Ninjutsu

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 5

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, H

A more advanced form of Henge no Jutsu commonly used by beastmasters. You transform to take the shape of any Humanoid, Monstrous Humanoid, Magical Beast, Animal or Outsider that you have seen or studied, as long as it does not have more than 10 HD and is within one size category of your own. While transformed, you:

- Lose all Extraordinary, Supernatural and Spell-like abilities, as well as any Templates you have (except Moujuu Aishou).
- Assume the new form's shape, including all appendages, and gaining its natural weapons, though you still cannot use more than two limbs to attack.
- Gain the Strength, Dexterity and Constitution scores of the new form, but retain your Wisdom, Intelligence and Charisma scores.
- Gain the new form's Extraordinary abilities, as well as any special properties (such as resistance to cold weather), natural armor bonuses and species modifiers to skills.
- Gain any natural feats the new form would have.
- Gain the new form's mundane movement types and speeds (burrow, flight, swim speed etc. granted by natural appendages such as wings)
- Retain all other stats (levels, HP, saves, etc.), modified by your new ability scores and new size if necessary.

You can perform techniques if you have the required body parts, and are capable of speech if the new form is capable of it. Unlike with Henge no Jutsu, your new form cannot be distinguished from the real thing, and your Chakra Signature and scent change to imitate one appropriate for your new form.

Mastery: The first step allows you to retain your Extraordinary abilities while transforms. The second and third steps do the same for your Supernatural and Spelllike abilities, respectively.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: C

You infuse yourself with the essence of luck, or so it seems. You gain a +1 luck bonus to saves, Gamble checks and attack rolls. This technique can be used once per day.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: H

You inhale deeply before breathing out a cloud of thick ashes and embers which grants 20% concealment and spreads to 20 ft. width next round. Each round a creature is inside the cloud (standing in it, moving through it, etc.), it must save to avoid being blinded for 1d4 rounds and must make a Constitution check (DC 10, +1 per consecutive check) to avoid spending the round coughing uncontrollably, unable to take any actions. Each consecutive round spent coughing after the first inflicts 1d6 damage. A gas mask or similar device grants a +2 bonus to the check.

In addition, the cloud deals 2d6 fire damage to creatures inside it the first round it exists, reduced to 1d6 the second round and no damage the third round. After three rounds, the cloud disperses. A moderate wind (11+ mph) causes the smoke to disperse in 2 rounds, while a strong wind (21+ mph) causes it to disperse in 1 round.

name: HAKISUITOGE NO JUTSU (SPITTING WATER SPINES TECHNIQUE)

If you are (partially) submerged in water, you can increase the Perform Requirements by 5 to perform the technique without Half Seals.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to create an additional needle (up to 1 per level total), for which you may choose a new target. Creatures can be targeted by more than one needle.

Learn DC: 12 | Successes: 1

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 12 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 11

Components: E, Mas, S

This basic technique is taught at the academy to anyone capable of using Ninjutsu, and is one of the three most basic techniques. You assume the form of a Tiny or larger creature whose size category does not exceed yours, and can freely designate its specific appearance (hair, weight, skin tone, etc.). The form does not grant any benefits other than size modifiers (if any) and natural weapons, and you cannot use any actions or special abilities that rely on a body part that your new form does not possess. You retain the ability speak even if the new form does not have vocal chords, but cannot change your voice. You retain your own type and subtype(s).

You can include equipment as part of the transformation, which functions as it normally would, but the transformation on them is undone as soon as they leave your grasp, and you cannot create complex objects or Chakra-based items.

When using the form as a disguise, you gain a +1 bonus to Disguise checks per level (up to +15), but the disguise is easily distinguishable from those who know the creature you imitate well, and you cannot imitate their fingerprints, DNA, blood type and similar things well enough to fool a detector or scientific test.

The technique can also be used to transform into an object no smaller than Tiny size, in which case the Perform DC is 10 + its Purchase DC. This cannot be used to transform into complex weaponry, mastercraft quality items or Chakra-based items.

If a creature transformed via Henge no Jutsu takes damage, it must make a Concentration check (DC 10 + damage dealt) to avoid losing the transformation. If a creature carefully observes or interacts with a transformed creature, it can make a spot check (DC 25 or opposed by a Disguise check made when performing this technique) to recognize it as a fake appearance. Creatures that can See (Through) Chakra can make a Spot check (DC 10) to notice a Chakra pattern around the user, after which a Ninjutsu check (DC 16) can identify the effect as originating from this technique.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the duration by 10 minutes, up to 10m/level total. Spend 1 Chakra per clone within 20 ft you wish to transform along with you, which increases the Perform Requirements by 3.

Mastery: Each step grants a +1 bonus to Concentration checks made to avoid losing the transformation.

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6 fire or sonic damage, up to 12d6 fire and 7d6 sonic or 1d6 per level total.

name: HIJOU KAWARIMI NO JUTSU (HEARTLESS BODY SUBSTITUTION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: H, Mob

This technique is identical to Kawarimi no Jutsu, except as above, and instead of changing place with a lifeless object, you attempt to swap places with a creature.

To succeed, you must start a grapple as normal. If you succeed in both the touch attack and the grapple check, you move up to your movement speed or 30 feet (whichever is shorter, as per Kawarimi no Jutsu), and the target is now in your previous square. When used to avoid an attack, you must succeed at this substitution in addition to the normal Perform check to properly avoid the attack. If successful, the substituted creature is now targeted by the attack (the attack roll must still beat the creature's Defense in order to hit).

Mastery: Each step allows for an additional use per day (up to 5/day). Some steps allow you to increase the Cost when avoiding an attack to defend against a CR up to your level or a certain number (whichever is lower).

The first step: Cost 8, CR 10.

The third step: Cost 10, CR 15 The fifth step: Cost 12, CR 20.

At the start of your next turn, if you moved less than 30 ft. away from the location you used this technique from, the object safely returns to your hand.

Mastery: The third step allows you to ignore the size limit when throwing a Fullblade or oversized weapon.

Empower: Spend 7 Chakra to create an additional dragon (maximum 1 dragon per 6 levels total). Each dragon must target a different creature.

name: HISAJI NO MAI (DANCE OF THE FLYING SPOONS)

In order to use this technique, you must have Chakra threads active. You create up to one Chakra thread per two levels (up to 10), each of which can be used to move an inanimate object weighing up to 10 lbs. by up to 40 ft. per round. Doing so requires you have one hand free, or two if you created more than five Chakra threads.

Objects cannot be moved outside of the technique's range, but can otherwise be moved freely. You can move objects heavier than 10 lbs by attaching multiple threads, combining their weight capacity (i.e. an object weighing 25 lbs could be manipulated by attaching three or more threads).

You can attach and detach the threads to change which objects you are manipulating as a free action.

This technique cannot be used to manipulate held items unless their holder allows for it.

name: HITO NINGYOUGEKI NO JUTSU (LIVING HUMAN PUPPETRY TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 13 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 29 | Successes: 5

Perform: 17 | Perform DC: 33

Components: C, Mob

You use your Puppetry ability on the target, which must be willing or helpless and the same type as you. If the target is not willing, you must succeed at a ranged touch attack first. If the target has more HD than the Puppetry ability would allow you to control, the technique fails. The target cannot take any actions except speech, but you can make it act as though it were a puppet, using the target's own statistics, with two exceptions: It uses your base Reflex save instead of its own, and it uses your normal puppet Defense bonuses rather than it's own class bonuses to Defense. The target has the same number of attacks it would normally have, but cannot be made to use any techniques. It does not gain a new or different HP score. Creatures that can deal Chakra damage may choose to apply the damage to the Chakra threads in order to sever them, freeing the subject.

On the subject's turn, if it would normally be able to move, it can make an Escape Artist check (DC 15 + your puppeteer levels) as a full-round action to escape and end the technique.

This technique shares the cost, duration and restrictions of your Puppetry ability.

You focus Chakra into a Chakra Storing Gem to start an overload, then throw it like a grenade with a 10 ft range increment (D20 Modern, p148), dealing 3d6 force damage (Reflex halves), and has an additional effect based on your primary elemental affinity:

- Earth: 1d6 earth damage, targets make a Fortitude save against being stunned 1 round.
- Fire: 3d6 fire damage, damages unattended objects and sets fire to combustible materials.
- Ice: 1d6 cold damage, targets make a Fortitude save against being unable to run or charge for 2 rounds.
- Lightning: 1d6 electric damage, targets make a Fortitude save against being deafened 1d6 rounds.
- Water: 2d6 water damage, douses small fires, damages paper and fragile fabrics, creates 10 liters of water.
- Wind: 2d6 wind damage, snuffs out small fires.

This technique costs 1.5 Chakra if the target is of Tiny size, and 1.5 Chakra extra for each size category it is larger than Tiny (round down the final number). Furthermore, for the technique to work, a certain amount of the surface beneath the target must be com-posed of ice and/or snow, depending on the target's size category: Tiny (2 ft.), Small/Medium (5 ft.), Large (10 ft.), Huge (20 ft.), Gargantuan (30 ft.) or Colossal (50 ft.).

The ground beneath the target opens up and buries it up to its neck (Reflex negates), immobilizing it. It cannot take any actions other than free actions, and suffers 1 cold damage per round (Fortitude DC 12 negates), which counts as cold weather.

A buried creature can free itself by succeeding at three Escape Artist or Dexterity checks (DC 18) in a row, each of which takes one round.

A Small-size creature starts suffocating after 1d4+1 rounds, and although it counts as immobilized, it can still attack with unarmed attacks or held weapons to destroy the prison.

The prison has 35 HP and can be attacked from the outside, though a creature trapped inside takes half damage from any outside attack that destroys the pris- on. Trapped creatures can make a Strength check (DC 30) to break free of the prison.

In addition, unarmed attacks deal 1 additional cold damage, and your critical threat range for unarmed attacks increases by 1. You must have both hands free to perform this technique.
