name: ICHIJIN NO JUTSU (GUST OF WIND TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: H

You create a powerful gust of air (some 50 mph) that has an effect on creatures caught in it, based on their size:

- Tiny or smaller: Knocked prone and sent rolling back for 1d6 x 15 ft, taking 1d4 nonlethal damage per 10 ft.
- Small: Knocked prone and blown back 1d6 x 10 ft.
- Medium: Blown back 1d6 x 5 ft.
- Large or larger: No effect.

The technique cannot blow creatures back further than the edge of its area. Medium and smaller creatures are unable to move against the direction of the wind, and creatures inside the area take a -4 penalty to Listen checks and ranged attack rolls. The gust of wind does anything a powerful wind would be expected to do, such as blow out open fires (or fan larger ones), blowing away gases, etc. and has a 50% chance to blow out protected flames (such as those in lanterns).

name: IKAKU HAKUGEI NO JUTSU (ONE-HORNED SNOW WHALE TECHNIQUE)

A gigantic narwhal of ice and snow emerges from the ground, impaling creatures in the cylinder with its horn to deal 8d6 damage (half piercing, half cold, Relex halves). Any creature taking damage is thrown upwards 2d6 x 5 ft. Any creature this technique was not specifically aimed at has a 20% chance to avoid being hit by this first half of the technique.

Afterward, you direct the narwhal to fall in any direction as it dissolves, causing any creature caught in the Line area (starting from the cylinder's center point) to suffer 8d6 cold damage (Reflex halves).

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: CHIYU – NIDAN JUTSU (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: HEALING – SECOND RANK)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: None

As Iryou Ninjutsu: Chiyu - Shodan Jutsu. The healing is increased to 1d6+2 HP per minute. Discharging the technique can be done only by a character with Medical Specialist level 4 or higher, and heals 3d6 HP, +1 per level (maximum +10).

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: CHIYU – SANDAN JUTSU (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: HEALING – THIRD RANK)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: None

As Iryou Ninjutsu: Chiyu - Shodan Jutsu. The healing is increased to 1d8+3 HP per minute. Discharging the technique can be done only by a character with Medical Specialist level 4 or higher, and heals 4d8 HP, +1 per level (maximum +15).

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: CHIYU – SHODAN JUTSU (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: HEALING – FIRST RANK)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, H, Mas

This basic healing technique slowly heals yourself or the target as long as you remain concentrated and in contact with them, but cannot be used on a target below 0 HP. If you concentrate on using this technique on a target other than yourself in a given round, you cannot move that round.

The target is healed for 1d4+1 HP per minute. If the target is healed more than three times per use of this technique, it suffers from Chakra Overload for 20 minutes, causing the next Iryou Ninjutsu: Chiyu technique used on them to cause the same amount of negative energy damage instead of healing their HP.

A Medical Specialist of level 2 or higher can discharge the technique as a free action on their turn, healing the target for 2d4 HP, +1 per level (maximum +5) but ending the technique. If a target receives healing from a discharged Chiyu technique three times per encounter, it suffers from Chakra Overload, as above.

You can sense if a target suffers from Chakra Overload when you touch them, before you start healing.

Mastery: The fifth step allows you to use this technique at a distance of 5 ft from the target, and turning it into a 'ranged touch' technique. Doing so increases the Perform Requirements by 10.

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: CHIYU – YONDAN JUTSU (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: HEALING – FOURTH RANK)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 5

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 32

Components: None

As Iryou Ninjutsu: Chiyu - Shodan Jutsu. The healing is increased to 1d10+4 HP per minute. Discharging the technique can be done only by a character with Medical Specialist level 8 or higher, and heals 5d10 HP, +1 per level (maximum +20).

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: HIKEN – FUJIMI (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: SECRETS – PAIN NUMBING)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C

You numb the target's sensations of pain, allowing it to make one move or attack action per round when reduced below 0 HP and dying. In addition, the target becomes incapable of judging how much damage it has taken, and suffers a -2 penalty to its Dexterity scores and to initiative checks.

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: HIKEN – IDENSHI TAISHA NO JUTSU (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: SECRET – GENETIC RECONSTRUCTION)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 13 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 18

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 6

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 38

Components: C, M

This advanced healing technique regenerates cells at an incredible rate. The technique removes one negative level from the target per 5 minutes. You must keep physical contact with the target while you concentrate on maintaining the technique.

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: HIKEN – KATAWA JUUSHOU (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: SECRETS – CRIPPLING INJURY)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, E, Mob

You imbue your Chakra Scalpel with a charge which enhances its next successful hit. The technique ends when all charges are used. Chakra Scalpel attacks deal 1d6 additional damage, and when you hit you can ex- pend a charge to try and damage a specific limb, which can be saved against. The following effects last 8 hours and can be applied twice (except head/neck):

- Arm: Target suffers a -1 penalty to attack and damage rolls.
- Leg: Target suffers a -1 penalty to Defense and Reflex saves, and its land movement speed is reduced by 5 ft.
- Torso: Target suffers a -2 penalty to Constitution checks and a -1 penalty to Fortitude saves.
- Head/Neck: Target is blinded for 1d3 hours.

The arm and leg debuffs can be healed as though they were 1 point of ability damage per debuff 'charge' (they count as the same type of ability damage). The torso damage counts as an exhaustion effect, which can only be removed by any ability that completely removes exhaustion (and not by any which merely turn it into fatigue).

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: HIKEN – KATOU SAISEI (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: SECRETS – MINOR REBIRTH)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 28

Components: C, H

This technique functions as Iryou Ninjutsu: Chiyu Shodan Jutsu, and can be used on targets below 0 HP, as long as they are stable. The target is healed for 2 HP when this technique is performed, and another 2 HP per minute. This technique cannot be discharged.

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: HIKEN – KYOUI SAISEI (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: SECRETS – MIRACLE REBIRTH)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 200

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 6

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, H, M, XP

This technique is nearly impossible to perform alone: You may have up to four characters of level 10 or higher with at least 1 level of Medical Specialist aid you, each granting you a +2 bonus to the Perform check. The aides do not need to know the technique and must concentrate on the technique just as you do. The Cost is shared equally between you and all assistants. If anyone is unable to pay that Cost, the technique fails.

This technique can be used on a living creature, or a creature that has died no more than 1 round ago (or has been preserved in stasis since then). While the technique is being performed, the target is held in stasis, causing it to be unaffected by the passage of time (and thus, negating periodic effects such as poison, fast healing or having to make saves while dying). When completed, the target is healed of all negative levels, poisons, diseases, ability damage, ability drain, paralysis, nausea, insanity effects, blindness, deafness, fatigue, exhaustion, tenketsu damage and Chakra coils damage. If the target was dying, it immediately stabilized. If it was dead, it is restored to -9 HP and becomes stable. Any limb that was severed from the target less than 5 days ago can be physically reattached without penalty, though this does not affect a severed head, and the limb is unusable for a week as the nerves reconnect. The target's natural HP recovery rate during bed rest is doubled for the next 1d4 days.

components.value: Concentration, Hand Seals, M, XP Cost

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: HIKEN – NIKUTEKI TAISHA (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: SECRETS – PHYSICAL RECONSTRUCTION)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 5

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 32

Components: C, F, H

You hold a severed limb where it should be, reattaching it to its original owner as long as it was severed no more than a day ago. For 30 days, -1 per level of the target and -1 per level of Medical Specialist and Exarch you have (minimum 1 day), the limb will not function correctly as it heals, causing the target to suffer a -4 penalty to attack and damage rolls, as well as to skill and ability checks.

In addition, they suffer a -4 penalty to their skill threshold and perform checks for any technique requiring hand seals or half seals. Furthermore, the target cannot run or charge if the reattached limb was a leg, and any encumbrance penalties it may suffer from are doubled if the reattached limb was an arm.

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: IJI – MASHUJUTSU (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: PRACTICE – MYSTICAL SURGERY)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: H

If you start surgery on a creature within the next 3 rounds, you may do so as though you had a surgery kit.

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: IJI – SHIKETSU (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: PRACTICE – HEMOSTASIS)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H

The target immediately stabilizes.

name: RYOU NINJUTSU: IJI – SHINRYOU JUTSU (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: PRACTICE – DIAGNOSIS TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: C, S

You analyze the touched creature, and will immediately know if it is suffering from blindness, dazed, deafness, exhaustion, fatigue, nausea, paralysis and/or stun. In addition, you know if the target is suffering from Chakra Overload (due to Iryou Ninjutsu: Chiyu techniques), poisons or diseases and whether any of the conditions detected are temporary or permanent.

You also detect the target's current HP and Chakra compared to its maximum, rounded to quarter units (for example, it may have ½ HP left).

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: IJI – SHOUSEN JUTSU (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: PRACTICE – MYSTICAL PALM TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C, S

A commonly used technique in shinobi hospitals, this minor but practical skill boosts a patient's narutal recovery. If the target starts complete bed rest within 1 hour of this technique's use, their HP recovery doubles during the rest period, and it is healed of 1 temporary Chakra coils damage. If it does not start resting, it recovers twice the amount of nonlethal damage in the hour after use of this technique. If it tries to rest but cannot sleep restfully (for example, because it has consumed a soldier pill recently), it can still recover half its level worth of HP if it performs no strenuous activities for six to eight hours.

Alternatively, this technique can be used as a Treat Injury check to restore HP or revive a dazed, stunned or unconscious character without the need for a first aid kit. This technique cannot be used more than once per 24 hours on the same target.

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: RYOJI – DOKUKESHI (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: TREATMENT – POISON PURGE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, H

You concentrate Chakra into your hand and touch a creature, forcing the Chakra into its body, curing one poison effect. It will not suffer any secondary damage from the poison, if it hasn't already. If you have 9 or more ranks in Craft (Pharmaceutical) and Knowledge (Earth and Life Sciences), you can extract a dose of the poison.

The dose must be used within 1 hour, or it becomes unusable, and can only be used to create an antidote.

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: RYOJI – DOKUYOKE (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: TREATMENT – POISON WARD)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 28

Components: C, E, H

The target becomes immune to the next disease or poison that tries to affect it.

Empower: Spend 3 Chakra to make the target immune to another disease or poison, up to 1 every 5 levels or 5 total (whichever is lower).

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: RYOJI – JUUKI (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: TREATMENT – PARALYSIS)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: H, Mas

If the subject is affected by a paralysis effect that did not stem from a mind-affecting ability or technique, it can save to end it, gaining a +4 bonus to the check. The DC is the same as the one from the original effect that caused the paralysis.

Mastery: The first, third and fifth step increase the bonus granted by +1 each. The fifth step allows you to use this technique on yourself once per day, even while paralyzed.

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: RYOJI – KEKKI (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: TREATMENT – VIGOR)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 2

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 14

Components: C, S

The target becomes unaffected by any fatigue it is suffering from. This does not heal the fatigue, but merely suppresses its effects.

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: RYOJI – KENTAI (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: TREATMENT – FATIGUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, H

The target is healed of fatigue, and if it is suffering from exhaustion, it becomes fatigued instead. In addition, the target is healed of 1d4 temporary ability damage to a single ability score. Using this technique on the same target more than once per day increases the Cost by 2 each time.

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: RYOJI – MANNOUYAKU (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: TREATMENT – PANACEA)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 5

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, H

You touch the target, curing it of all blindness, daze, deafness, disease, exhaustion, fatigue, nausea, paralysis, poison and stun effects. In addition, they are cured of all ability damage to a single ability score, as well as 1d4 temporary ability damage or ability drain to the same ability score. Furthermore, the target is healed for 2d4+1 temporary HP.

If you are under any of the conditions listed above, you suffer a -10 penalty to your skill threshold and perform checks to perform this technique.

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: RYOJI – NANROUME (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: TREATMENT – EYE AND EAR DISORDER)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, H

You cure the target of temporary blindness or deafness (choose one). Once per day, you can use this technique to reduce a target's penalties to attack rolls, saves and skill checks suffered by mangekyou blindness by 2.

name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: RYOJI – RYOUKUDOU (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: TREATMENT – CHAKRA PATHWAYS)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, H

You heal the target of 2d6 tenketsu damage, 1d2 points of temporary Chakra coils damage or 1 point of Chakra coils damage. This technique cannot be used more than once per day on the same creature.

name: ISHI NANKA NO JUTSU (SOFTEN STONE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, H

This technique is the opposite of Chi Katame no Jutsu, and will turn 1 cubic ft of stone to sand each round. You choose precisely what area is softened. If the target area contains rock belonging to a manufactured object or structure, it can make a Fortitude save at a +4 bonus to resist the transformation. Structures so transformed take 1d10 damage per round this technique remains active on its area. You can only have one instance of this technique active at a time (including usage by clones).

name: ISHI SHURIKEN NO JUTSU (STONE SHURIKEN TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: C, E, F, H

You hurl a small stone object (a stone or a tile), making a ranged attack against the target at your highest attack bonus, which deals 1d6 earth damage and cannot score a critical hit.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to fire an additional shuriken (maximum 1 per 2 levels), which can target the same or a different target. You make an attack roll at your highest attack bonus for each shuriken.

name: ISSUI SUBERI NO JUTSU (CURRENTS SLIDING TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 1

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 14

Components: Mob

This technique can only be used while under the effects of Tadayou. You can skate and slide over the water, allowing you to move twice your normal speed over water. You can still stop and turn as you wish, and are still capable of performing any normal movement actions (running, charging, tumbling, etc).

name: IWA BAKUHA NO JUTSU (ROCK EXPLOSION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: H

You send your Chakra through the ground to cause up to one rock per 3 levels within range to explode. The Cost and effects of this technique depend on the size of the rocks targeted. You must may the Cost for each rock or boulder you target.

- Small (2 Chakra): 5 ft Burst, 1d6 earth damage.
- Medium (4 Chakra): 10 ft Burst, 2d8 earth damage.
- Large (6 Chakra): 20 ft Burst, 3d10 earth damage.
- Huge (8 Chakra): 30 ft Burst, 4d12 earth damage.

The area is centered on the targeted rock(s), and creatures within the area(s) can make a Reflex save to halve the damage. You can target a stone object you created with Shouchite or Kaigeki Chite no Jutsu. Such objects count as Large boulders, and are destroyed after exploding.

name: IWA NI FUBATSU (STEADY AS A ROCK)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: H

You firmly plant your feet into the ground, gaining a +12 bonus to checks made to resist bull rush, grapple, overrun and trip checks. If your feet leave the ground (you move or are bull rushed, tripped, etc), the technique immediately ends.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: H

This technique can only be used if the target area contains a hard or rocky surface and is not underwater.

You touch the ground or a surface directly connected to it and send a shock wave through the ground, causing the target area to erupt in a spray of earth and rock, dealing 5d6 earth damage.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, H

You camouflage yourself near an amount of dirt, rock or stone that can cover your size, gaining a +10 bonus to Hide checks and becoming able to Hide while being observed for as long as you remain immobile. Creatures who can See (Through) Chakra gain a +5 bonus to Spot checks against you while you hide like this.

You can partially merge with any rock or stone formation that can physically contain your body to gain DR 5/-. You must maintain direct contact to the surface you use to hide in and/or merge with. If you lose direct contact, the technique ends.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, H

You must be in contact with the surface you wish to affect, or one directly connected to it. You send your Chakra into the roof of a cave or tunnel or the side of a cliff and cause it to collapse. Creatures caught by the collapsing earth take 5d8 earth damage and must make a Reflex save to avoid becoming pinned beneath the rubble.

A creature that is pinned beneath rubble takes 1d6 nonlethal damage every minute, increasing by 1d6 every time (2d6 the second minute, etc). If they fall unconscious, they must make a Constitution check (DC 15) each round to avoid taking 1d4 damage.

If the area does not have a cliff face or roof, the technique only produces a brief earthquake, causing crea- tures to fall prone unless they succeed at a Reflex save (DC 15).

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: H

You create a minor electric current in your Chakra pathways which can be focused, adding 1d4 electric damage to unarmed attacks or attacks with melee weapons, as long as there is a direct path of metal from where you touch the weapon to its striking surface (a sword, for example, would generally not be affected since you only hold it by its wood or leather grip).

You can also make unarmed touch attacks that deal 1d4 electric damage (not modified by Strength), but cannot score a critical hit. The technique remains active until you've made one attack per 2 levels (maximum 8 attacks). While active, you also receive a +1 bonus to Fortitude and Reflex saves against electric effects and techniques.

name: JIGEN UGOKU NO JUTSU (DIMENSIONAL SHIFT TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H, Mob

You teleport to a location you can see or have been to previously, bringing up to a single creature carrying up to their maximum load. You can teleport through up to 3 ft of concrete (or similar materials) per level. If you reach that limit before reaching the location, you appear outside the obstacle preventing you from moving further. You must grasp or hold the creature you bring along firmly: merely touching it is insufficient.

If the location is already occupied (by a creature, object or structure), you appear adjacent to it and suffer 1d6 damage. If all adjacent spaces are also occupied, you are moved 2d6 x 10 ft in a random direction and suffer 6d8 damage. Any creature you carry also suffers any damage taken this way.

Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, H, Mob

The target is teleported anywhere within Medium range, following the same limitations as Jigen Ugoku no Jutsu regarding moving through obstacles and potentially taking damage (above). The subject cannot be teleported underground if there is no space for it to appear.

Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, Mas

You detect the use of any Spacetime Ninjutsu with the Teleportation descriptor within range, even if you do not have direct line of sight or line of effect. You also detect any creatures teleporting into the area. You can detect an effect's direction, but not the exact distance, nor what technique was used.

Mastery: The second and fourth steps increase the radius of the Spread by 10 ft each.

The third step allows you to detect the use of techniques with the Summoning descriptor as well.

Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, H

You touch an object and cause space to warp around it. If the object provided any cover except total cover, it will provide no cover while the technique lasts.

Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

You can see around or through any object in the area, unless that object provides total cover.

Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 20

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 6

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, E, H, Mob

You form an invisible tear in spacetime within 10 ft of you, which links to a location within range. The first creature of Medium size or smaller that passes through is teleported immediately to the linked location (following the same rules as Mugen Ugoku no Jutsu).

Once the technique ends, you become fatigued and must make a Fortitude save (DC 25) to avoid becoming exhausted instead.

Empower: Spend 6 Chakra to increase the number of creatures that can pass through the gate by 1 (maximum 1, +1 per 10 levels total)

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 1

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 15

Components: C, H

6 You focus Chakra into your hands, generating one charge per 10 levels (minimum 1).

As an attack action that does not provoke attacks of opportunity, you can release a charge by clapping your hands together, creating a loud shockwave that deafens all creatures in a 30 ft Cone-shaped Spread for 1d4+1 minutes (Fortitude negates, CR applies).

If you wear a sound amplifier, the range of the Cone increases to 40 ft, and the duration of the deafening effect increases by 1 minute.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 0 | Perform DC: 0

Components: H

Used as a last resort to avoid the risk of leaking information once captured by your enemies, this technique reduces your HP to -10, killing you instantly.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 13 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 4

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, H

You must be in contact with the surface you wish to affect, or one directly connected to it. You send your Chakra into the area, causing violent tremors. The effects are identical to those of Genzou Jishin, except subjects cannot make a Will save to disbelieve, and the damage is earth damage rather than nonlethal.

Creatures in the area cannot concentrate (as the Concentration skill, extraordinarily violent motion). The technique's other effects depend on the surface each creature is standing on, near or under, as Genzou Jishin no Jutsu (p131), with the following exceptions:

Open Ground: When the fissures grind shut, instead of dealing nonlethal damage, any creature caught inside of them dies.

Structure: Any structure caught within the area takes 100 damage. (Generally enough to collapse a wooden or masonry building, but not a stone or reinforced masonry building)

River, Lake or Marsh: Fissures open underneath the water, draining the water away. Marshlands become quicksand, sucking down creatures and structures. Creatures receive a Reflex save (DC 15) to avoid being sucked down. When the technique ends, the waters rush back in, potentially drowning those caught.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C

You refine your hearing, gaining a +10 bonus to Listen checks and gaining the Blindsight ability with a range of 10 ft, but suffering a -4 penalty to saves against Sonic effects. If a complicated pattern of movement is performed within the range of the Blindsight (such as writing or someone making hand signs or hand seals), you can make a Listen check (DC 25) to identify exactly what is being done (the text being written, hand sign performed, etc).

name: JOU RAKUMUGAI NO JUTSU (GREATER HARMLESS FALL TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: None

This technique is identical to Shou Rakumugai no Jutsu, except as above, and the fall height is reduced by 30 ft instead.

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: E, H

You send your Chakra through the ground, forcing ground water upward and freezing it, making a large spike of ice erupt from the ground to deal 2d8 damage (half cold, half piercing) to creatures in the area.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to target another square, causing an ice spike to erupt there as well (maximum 1 target square per 2 levels).

name: JOUSHOU OOTORI NO JUTSU (RISING PHOENIX BLAST TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, E, H

You place your hand on the ground and send your Chakra forth, causing a devastating column of fire to explode upward, dealing 8d6 fire damage to creatures caught inside the blast.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 15d6.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, H

Protective winds swirl around you, granting a +2 deflection bonus to Defense, wind resistance 5, and a +4 bonus to saves against Wind effects or attacks. If such an effect or attack allows for a Reflex save for half damage, you take no damage on a successful save instead. A creature making an attack against you with an unarmed strike or natural weapon suffers 1d4 wind damage, regardless of whether it hits (CR applies).

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: H

You greatly increase the effects of gravity upon the subject, making it count as though it were carrying an extra 15 lbs per level of extra gear. If the subject's heavy load is exceeded by this effect, it is staggered while the technique lasts, and suffers 1d6 damage for every 20 lbs its heavy load is exceeded each round (up to 10d6 per round). A creature that cannot lift its new weight is immobilized.

If the ground beneath the subject cannot support its new weight, it may collapse and have it fall through. It cannot use the tumble skill to lessen the fall damage in this case.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H

You inhibit the movement of creatures within the area, causing them to be unable to run or charge and suffer a

-2 penalty to attack and weapon damage rolls, as the weight of all affected creatures and any items they carry increases by 50%. Subjects also take a -2 penalty to Speed Ranks, which is reduced by 1 for each Strength Rank they have active.

The area moves with you, and any creature who saves against it becomes immune to its effects even if it exits and re-enters the area of effect.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: H, Mob

You lessen the effects of gravity on you, improving your speed. You gain the Speed Rank 1 extraordinary ability.

This technique only functions while you maintain contact with solid, rocky ground. If you are knocked off your feet, become prone or leave the ground, the technique immediately ends.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 5

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 32

Components: H

This powerful gravity manipulation throws subjects straight up into the air 10 ft per level, then slams them back into the ground, suffering fall damage at an increased die size (in d8 rather than d6). A Reflex save can (DC 15 + 1 per 10 ft of the fall) halve the damage.

name: KAEN HOUDAN NO JUTSU (BLAZING CANNONBALL TECHNIQUE)

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 3

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 25

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: E, F, S

You focus flames into a single shuriken and send it flying at the target, dealing 1d6 fire damage.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1 (maximum +5).

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, Mas, Mob

You fire a ray of flames at your target, dealing 1d6 fire damage. If you hold a weapon with a Homura Dama effect active on it, you can instead discharge the effect to deal damage equal to the Homura Dama's. The effect is discharged even if the attack misses.

Mastery: The third step increases the range to Long.

name: KAGE BUNSHIN NO TATE (SHADOW REPLICATION SHIELD)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: H

You quickly call on one of your (Tajuu) Kage Bunshin to step in and block an attack. Can only be used if such a clone is within 10 ft of you (for a melee attack) or within 10 ft of the path of a ranged attack.

Mastery: Each step allows this technique to be used an additional time per day. The fifth step allows you to create a (Tajuu) Kage Bunshin as part of using this technique, negating the need for a nearby clone. Doing so will cause you to take 1d4 damage.

name: KAIGEKI CHITE NO JUTSU (LARGE CRUSHING EARTH HAND TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 13 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 4

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 30

Components: F, H

As Shouchite no Jutsu, but the hand is Large, has a Strength score of 35 and a base attack bonus equal to half your level, and can reach out to grapple an adjacent enemy once per round. While successfully grappling, a successful grapple check deals 2d6+12 damage to the grappled creature as the hand crushes it. The hand has a Defense of 20 (10, -1 size, +11 natural) and has 2 HP per level.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 3

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 18

Components: E, H

You gather Chakra in your mouth and spit out a jet of water at great force dealing 2d6 water damage and having the target make a save to avoid being knocked back 1d3 x 5 ft and falling prone.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6 and the knockback distance by 1 die size (up to 5d6 water damage and 1d8 x 5 ft knockback).

name: KAIRAI ENGEKI: KAMIDETERU (PUPPET THEATER: EXIT STAGE LEFT)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: E, H

This technique's effect is identical to Kaihoudan, except it originates from a puppet controlled by you, using it's attack bonus modified by your Intelligence modifier.

The puppet in question must be animated with 4 HD or more, and be equipped with an Elemental Cannon loaded with a Water Scroll. The attack consumes 2 charges from the scroll. The technique consumes 2 of the puppet's Chakra, and you can have the puppet pay up to 3 of the technique's cost.

name: KAIRAI ENGEKI: SENKEN NO MAI (PUPPET THEATER: DANCE OF A THOUSAND BLADES)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: E, H

You must control 2 puppets with the Wire components, and all squares adjacent to the target must be unoccupied in order for you to use this technique. Each puppet will draw the other's Wire, running it between them and move around the target in a flurry of razor-sharp attacks. Both puppets will make an attack using the Wire as a weapon, including a bonus for flanking. Each attack deals 3d6 slashing damage and has a critical of 20, x2. The target must save or be dazed for 1 round, even if both attacks miss.

The puppets will end up in two squares adjacent to the target, so that they are flanking them.

name: KAIRAI ENGEKI: SHICHIHENGE (PUPPET THEATER: COSTUME CHANGE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, Mas, S

You change the appearance of the puppet into that of a humanoid or animal of the same size category. The transformation cannot add or remove limbs, equipment or clothing, but can change their appearance to something with the same rough shape. This technique functions like Henge no Jutsu in the sense that it is purely cosmetic, must be maintained and can be seen through.

Mastery: Each step grants a +1 bonus to the Concentration check made to prevent the transformation ending when the puppet takes damage.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: H

You suffer no penalty to Balance checks for moving at your normal speed on a difficult or narrow surface (D20 Modern Rulebook, p49).

name: KAKUREIMINO NO JUTSU (MYTHICAL INVISIBILITY CLOAKING TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 12 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 11

Components: F

You use a camouflage to conceal yourself. As long as you are not observed and have at least one-quarter cover, you make a Hide check and gain a +4 bonus to the check. You will remain hidden until you take an action requiring exaggerated or vigorous movement.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, E, H

You release a blast of cutting wind, causing 4d6 wind damage (Reflex halves), and any creature caught in the area is pushed back 1d4 x 5 ft (Fortitude negates). You can ignore the Hand Seals component by swinging with tessen, war fan or a Huge or larger weapon. Doing so increases the Perform Requirements by 3.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 12d6.

name: KAN RAKUMUGAI NO JUTSU (PERFECT HARMLESS FALL TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

This technique is identical to Shou Rakumugai no Jutsu, except as above, and the fall height is reduced by 50 ft instead.

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: E, H

You breathe a cone of deadly flame, which deals 5d6 fire damage.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 14d6.

Mastery: The third step allows you to add the Shapeable (S) effect to the technique's area.

name: KARYUU ENTOU NO JUTSU (BLAZING VENGEANCE TECHNIQUE)

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 5

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: C, H, E *

See Godai Ransatsu: Yondan Jutsu (p159).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 24d6 (whichever is lower).

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

You shoot a stream of searing flames from your mouth, taking shape as a nimble, fiery dragon that deals 4d10 fire damage. The range cannot exceed 60 ft.

name: KARYUUGA NO JUTSU (FIRE DRAGON FANG TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 11

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 4

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 29

Components: H, E, Mas *

See Godai Ransatsu: Nidan Jutsu (p158).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 20d6 (whichever is lower).

Mastery: Each step increases the number of possible targets by 1. The first, third and fifth step increase the radius by 5 ft each.

name: KASUMI ENBU NO JUTSU (BLAZING MIST TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: H

You expel a wave of Chakra that causes flames within the area to flare up. The technique has each source of fire within the area emit a Burst, its damage and radius based on the size of the flame. Any creature caught in such an area can make a Reflex save (DC 15) for half damage.

- Small (candle, torch): 5 ft radius, 2d6 fire damage.
- Medium (campfire, grill): 10 ft radius, 3d6 fire damage.
- Large (burning tree): 15 ft radius, 5d6 fire damage.
- Huge (burning house): 20 ft radius, 8d6 fire damage.

area.value: 30 ft wide, 10 ft high Burst, centered on you *

name: KATAWA HAIJIN NO JUTSU (CRIPPLING FROSTBITE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: H

The temperature around the target must be below freezing point (0° C/32° F), the coldness of which you then concentrate around one of the target's limbs, causing instant frostbite. Choose arm or leg.

Arm: A frostbitten arm incurs a -2 penalty to Strength and Dexterity as the limb becomes unable to wield weapons and objects. In addition, the subject suffers a -2 penalty to skill checks and grapple checks, as well as becoming incapable of using techniques that require hand seals (unless they can perform them without). If both arms are affected (through multiple uses of this technique), these penalties stack, and the subject becomes incapable of using techniques requiring hand or half seals (unless they can perform them without both).

Legs: The subject's movement speed is halved. If both legs are affected (through mutliple uses of the technique), its speed is reduced to 25% and it will fall prone, and remain so while thusly afflicted. If a creature has more than 2 legs, any legs in excess of 2 must be removed, disabled or targeted by this technique before the technique can have it's normal effects.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: S

You coat your body with a thin layer of bodily fluids, making you slippery to the touch and gaining a +4 bonus to Escape Artist and Dexterity checks to escape bindings, as well as a +4 bonus to grapple checks to resist or break free of being grappled.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: H, Mob, Mas

This quintessential technique is taught to academy students and widely used by ninja of all skill levels, since it allows you to quickly replace yourself with a simple Chakra construct while you dash away, evading attacks or creating a diversion.

Diversion: You move up to 30 ft or your base land speed (whichever is lower), leaving behind a simple Chakra construct that looks like you. When you do, you may make a Hide check if you move out of line of sight, unless you are being closely observed. The construct can follow a single command from among the following, which it will follow for 3 rounds: Stay still, run, walk, eat, sleep, swim or jump.

The construct can be identified as a fake with a Spot check (DC 10), will dissappear when it comes into contact with a physical object, and will not trigger traps unless the object used to create it could do so. A creature that can See (Through) Chakra can make a Spot check (DC 10) followed by a Ninjutsu (DC 16) check while doing so to identify it as a replacement construct.

The construct is completely non-responsive, and will not take any action other than its given command, including not dodging, evading or blocking incoming attacks. Anyone interacting with it will almost immediately notice that it is not a real person.

Avoiding an Attack (1/day): Minimum DC 15. If you succeed, you may move as per the Diversion part of the technique, and replace yourself with a construct that is immediately destroyed.

When performed as an instant action, you can take a -5 penalty to the Perform check to replace the Hand Seals component with the Half Seals component, or take a -15 penalty to the Perform check to ignore the Hand Seals component. You can use this technique to avoid an attack against a source with a CR of up to 1.

Mastery: Each step allows you to use the technique to avoid an attack an additional time per day. Each step also increases the CR which you can avoid, up to your level or a specific CR (whichever is lower), at an increased Chakra cost.

The first step: CR 5. The second step: Cost 2, CR 10. The third step: Cost 3, CR 15. The fourth step Cost 4, CR 20. The fifth step: Cost 5, CR 25.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

Used mainly by scouts and messengers, this technique allows you to send a spoken message of no more than twenty five words or sounds, spoken by anyone within 15 ft as it is performed, or the wind can simply send a faint sensation of stirring air. The message is carried upon the winds, traveling anywhere between 20 ft per round to 1 ft per minute, and the spoken message or sensation is delivered if it reaches its destination before the duration ends. If you lose consciousness, have your Chakra Pool reduced to 0 or die before the wind reaches its destination, the message is lost.

name: KAZE NO YAIBA (BLADE OF THE WIND)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 5

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 29

Components: C, H

You solidify air, forming a sword of air in your hand. The blade cannot be sundered or disarmed, and creatures lose their Dexterity bonus to Defense against it unless they can See (Through) Chakra. The blade is wielded as a chisa-gatana and deals 1d6 wind damage, +1 per 4 levels (up to 1d6+5), with a critical of (18-20, x2). You do not apply your Strength modifier to damage with the air blade.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: H

You release an ear-splitting blast of wind that deals 2d6 damage (half wind, half sonic; Fortitude halves). On a failed save, creatures are also deafened for 1d4+1 rounds. Exposed brittle or crystalline objects take 1d6 damage per level. Creatures holding them can make a Reflex save to negate the damage to the objects.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: E, H

You fire a curved blade of wind, dealing 1d8 wind damage. The line cannot reach beyond 30 ft range.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1 (maximum 1d8+5 damage total).

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 1

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 14

Components: S

The subject is knocked prone, becomes staggered and cannot run or charge, all for 1 round. You can delay the effects for up to 3 rounds, chosen when you perform the technique. The effects will take place during your turn in the chosen round.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 1

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, H

You attempt to repair a simple Large or smaller object, which is simple or moderate in complexity and primarily made of metal or rock. Make a Craft (Mechanical) check equal to the craft DC of the item. If you succeed, the item recovers 1 HP each minute. If you do not have the Mastercraft feat, there is a 10% chance any mastercraft quality is lost.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, E, H, M

You fill the area around you with a thick mist, reaching up to 30 ft high, which disperses in 5 rounds by a moderate wind (11+ mph) or 1 round in a strong wind (21+ mph). The fog completely obscures all vision beyond 5 feet, and creatures within 5 ft of each other gain concealment (20%).

Empower: As an attack action while standing inside the fog, you can spend up to 5 Chakra to expand its radius by 20 ft and have it reach 10 ft higher (up to 1 Chakra per level's worth of total empowerment).

name: KIRIGAKURE SHURIKEN NO JUTSU (SHURIKEN HIDDEN IN THE MIST TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: F, S

You create a projectile out of mist. The projectile cannot leave the area of the mist, and you must know the square the target is in. The projectile always hits, deals damage as a kunai, and sneak attack (and other damage bonuses) applies.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 4

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: C, H

Your body turns to mist, allowing you to fly with perfect maneuverability, but you cannot go further than 5 ft from the ground. This gaseous form suffers double damage from Fuuton techniques, and you take 4d6 damage from Ichijin no Jutsu, as well as being pushed back three times as far by it. While gaseous, strong winds may affect your movement (GM's discretion).

This technique puts a lot of strain on your body, and you suffer 1d4 temporary Constitution damage when the technique ends (Fortitude DC 20 halves).

name: KOORI TANJOU NO JUTSU (ICE FORMATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: H

You freeze water, covering its surface with a thick sheet of ice. Each 5 ft square of ice has 15 HP and can support up to 500 lbs. Creatures on the ice must make a Balance check (DC 12) at the start of each of their turns to avoid falling prone.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 5

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: C, H, E *

See Godai Ransatsu: Sandan Jutsu (p159).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 24d6 (whichever is lower).

name: KOUDENISHOKU NO JUTSU (HIGH VOLTAGE TOUCH TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

You focus a large amount of Chakra in your hand, charging it with a high voltage. When the charge hits, the target must make a save vs massive damage. Holding the charge will not impede your normal functions.

name: KOUSEN JIZAN RENDAN (IRON WIRE KILLER MAGNET COMBO)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 3

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, S

You focus your Chakra into the wires coiled around a creature trapped by Kousen Shibari no Jutsu, creating a powerful magnet that attracts all unattended metal objects of a Small or smaller size within 30 ft. Attracted objects deal damage as though the target was struck by falling objects.

name: KOUSEN SHIBARI NO JUTSU (IRON WIRE BIND TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: F, H

You make a ranged touch attack, which binds the target to a nearby object or suface, immobilizing it as iron wires wrap tightly around them. Though flying targets relying on wings will fall, they will be held at maximum range unless you decide to let them go. A bound creature also suffers a -4 penalty to Defense while it is bound.

The target remains that way as long as you keep the wire used in your hand and concentrate, though they can make an Escape Artist check (DC 30) or a Strength check (DC 25) to break free. As an attack action while holding a creature in Kousen Shibari no Jutsu, you can pull on the wires to deal 1d4+1 slashing damage to the target as the wires cut into their flesh (an opposed Strength check can negate this damage).

Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: H, M *

This unique summoning technique calls forth a white weasel, carrying a Gargantuan-size kama, with which it will rush forward and spin viciously. You may swing a tessen or war fan to ignore the hand seal component. The weasel makes a single attack against each creature in the area, at a +16 attack bonus. These attacks deal 2d8+10 slashing damage, and have a critical of (20, x2).

Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: E, H, M

This technique is a sister to Fuinjutsu: Keiyaku Houjin, and allows you to summon a creature marked by it if it is within range (determined by the Fuinjutsu: Keiyaku Houjin seal when it was made), which appears in a square adjacent to you. The technique costs 2 Chakra, plus half the level or HD of the summoned creature (minimum 6 Chakra).

A creature cannot be summoned by this technique more than once per week.

Empower: You can summon up to one additional creature per 6 levels by spending the appropriate cost.

Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H, M

This technique summons a single creature, which appears at a location within range and will start acting on your next turn. If the summoned creature has an Intelligence score of 4 or lower, it cannot follow any complicated orders, though it can always be ordered to attack a specific enemy, to not attack at all, or to perform some basic action. If the summoned creature cannot speak, a Sense Motive check (DC 20) can decipher the creature's body language if it is trying to communicate something. This check can only be made by you.

If the creature you intend to summon refuses to be summoned, nothing happens, and no Chakra is paid.

This technique's duration and Chakra cost, as well as the statistics of the summoned creature, are covered in Chapter 12.

name: KUGUTSU TEISHI NO JUTSU (PUPPET DEANIMATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C

You attach Chakra threads to a puppet in an attempt to hinder its movement. If you currently control no puppets, the duration is Concentration (up to 1 round/level). If you are currently controlling a puppet you animated, you can forego the concentration and instead spend a move action each round to maintain this technique.

The target suffers either a -4 penalty to attack rolls, skill checks and Defense, or a -6 penalty to attack rolls and a -2 penalty to skill checks and Defense, chosen as you perform this technique. If you control a puppet, you suffer a -4 penalty to attack rolls, Defense and skill checks (also affects your puppets). Multiple characters can apply this technique to the same puppet, up to a maximum number based on the puppet's size: Small (2), Medium (4) or Large (8).

You may choose to make this technique dormant when you perform it. If you do, the technique has no immediate effect and you need not concentrate or spend actions to maintain it until you choose to activate it as a swift action. However, each round of this dormant state does count against the technique's maximum duration.

Mastery: The second and fourth step reduce the penalties you suffer while controlling a puppet by -2. The fifth step increases the penalties suffered by the target by 1 (to -5, or -7 and -3).

name: KUUDEN MYAKU NO JUTSU (STATIC PULSE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: H *

This highly versatile technique creates a short but powerful magnetic field, which can have various effects.

Immobilize (7 Chakra): Target a single creature to magnetically hold all metal-based equipment it has. It cannot wield any metal-based weapons, and cannot move if its armor is mostly metal. Lasts 1 round, Fortitude negates, CR applies.

Defensive Pulse (12 Chakra): You create an aura around yourself, making you immune to any metallic weapon of up to Large size, which are held in place before reaching you.

This pulse lasts 1 round, and during that time any metal-based weapons you try to use are also stopped by the aura.

Instant Defensive Pulse (3 Chakra): This is a defensive maneuver, which can be activated as an instant action no more than once per round against an attack made with a (mostly) metallic weapon. If successful, you suffer no damage from the attack. Using the technique this way requires Half Seals rather than Hand Seals.

name: KUUHA BUKIGAKURE NO JUTSU (AIR CURRENT WEAPON CONCEALMENT TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: F, S

You distort the air around a held melee weapon, making it difficult to detect. This concealment lasts for one attack per 4 levels (maximum 5), regardless of the result of the attack. When you attack a target, you may choose to discharge this technique, or not. If you choose to discharge, the attack is made as normal, but deals 1d6 bonus wind damage on hit per attack left on the concealment effect (not multiplied on critical hits).

If you do not discharge the technique, the target of the attack must make a Spot check (DC 20 or attack roll, whichever is lower) to avoid losing its Dexterity bonus to defense.

name: KUUHA TOURAN NO JUTSU (AIR WAVE BLADE STORM TECHNIQUE)

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 4

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 4 (up to 7d8+20 damage total).

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

You focus Chakra onto the edge of your weapon and swing, releasing a slashing wind. Make a single attack roll against all creatures in the area, which deals normal damage and ignores concealment.

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, H

You create a curtain of powerfully gusting winds, which reaches up to 1 ft per level high and is 2 ft thick. The roaring gale tears paper and similar light materials out of people's hands (Reflex negates). Any Small or smaller creatures cannot pass through the barrier. Loose items may be sent flying upward when caught in the wall, and arrows and bolts passing through are deflected upwards, missing entirely. Other ranged weapons passing through the wall have a 30% miss chance, though exceptionally large or heavy weapons (such as siege weapons) are immune, as are ballistic weapons. Gases and gas-based attacks cannot pass through the wall, nor can any creature in a gas-like form.

The wall is vertical, but can be shaped in any continuous path along the ground. It cannot be made to completely enclose a location on its own.

name: KUURYUUKEN NO JUTSU (AIR CURRENT DETECTION TECHNIQUE)

As long as there is at least a breeze (3+ mph wind) in the area around you, you can determine which direction is North with perfect accuracy, though techniques that create an artificial airflow may disrupt that ability. This technique may aid you in detecting an environment-changing illusory effect (GM's discretion).

name: KUUSETSUME NO JUTSU (REAPING AIR TALONS TECHNIQUE)

The lizard is slower, but can more easily conceal itself and can carry a Small or smaller item of up to 3 lbs to its destination. The bird can carry a Small or smaller item of up to 15 lbs and travels up to 9 miles an hour, but can only be sent to a location you have visited before. It has a Defense of 13, and has 8 HP. See p369 for the statistics of these summons.

The blade has the same statistics as a katana, deals 1d4 bonus electric damage and counts as Chakra-enhanced for the purpose of bypassing damage reductions. If you score a critical hit with the blade, the target is paralyzed for 1 round (Fortitude negates).

When the blade is destroyed or leaves your grasp, it disappears immediately.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 4

The barrier blocks all creatures and animated objects from passing through, as though an indestructible, invisible wall (CR does not apply).

Creatures that can See (Through) Chakra can make a Spot check (DC 20) to detect the barrier.

Type: Ninjutsu

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

You camouflage yourself expertly, gaining a bonus to Hide checks equal to your ranks in either the Disguise or Hide skill, up to +15, and can hide while being observed no matter the situation. You suffer no penalty to Hide while moving at your normal speed, and the penalty to Hide while running or charging is reduced to 10. If you remain still for at least 1 minute, you gain an additional +1 bonus to Hide checks every round (up to +10 extra), and your current Hide result (if you are currently hiding) improves by the same amount.

If you perform an offensive action of any kind, the technique is dispelled. If you move from your current environment, the benefits of the camouflage are lost. If you are damaged, you must make a Concentration check (DC 15 + damage taken) to maintain the technique.

A creature that can See Chakra gains a +4 bonus to Spot checks against you, and creatures that can See Through Chakra gain a +8 bonus to do the same.

name: MIKAN SEIHA NO JUTSU (LESSER DOMINATION TECHNIQUE)

You take control of the creature's mind, and can make one very simple mental command each round, which the subject follows to its best ability. Suicidal or selfdestructive commands are not followed.

Mastery: The first and fifth step increase the number of HD the animal may have by 1 each.

If you use Raite no Jutsu while holding a water whip, you can make its attack with the whip, adding the whip's damage and treating the attack as though the target were wearing metal armor (see Raite no Jutsu).

The whip immediately loses its form if it leaves your grasp.

Mastery: The third step allows you to increase the Cost to 6 and increase the area to a 15 ft square.

The fifth step allows you to increase the Cost to 8 and increase the area to a 20 ft square.

You focus Chakra into your salivary glands, producing a large amount of saliva and hardening it to a mud-like consistency which you spit at the target, making a ranged attack roll which deals 1d4 water damage on hit. Alternatively, you can target small fires such as torches or candles, and extinguish them if you hit.

If you know the Toushou technique, you may perform both Toushou and this technique in quick succession as a Full-round action. Doing so has the standard effects of Toushou, and changes the damage of this technique to 1d4+2 (half cold, half water), cannot put out small fires, but may break fragile objects.

This technique gains a descriptor based on the damage type gained.

You shape your Chakra, sending it to a creature you have been bonded to by the Fuinjutsu: Ninjou Kan technique in order to strengthen it. The bonded creature gains a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls or a +1 dodge bonus to Defense and Reflex saves,. You can double the bonus by increasing the technique's cost to 4.

A creature cannot be affected by this technique more than once at the same time.

name: NINJUTSU HIKEN: JIKUUKAN INGOKU (NINJUTSU SECRET: SPACETIME SECLUSION)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, E, H

The touched creature becomes trapped in a separate dimension shaped like a 15 ft cube. While trapped, it is as though it were completely removed from the world, becoming entirely unaware of anything happening around it, and completely unable to affect or be affected by any object, creature or effect in 'the real world'.

When the effect ends, the subject reappears in the square it was when it became affected, in the exact same condition as it was previously. If there is no space for it, it will reappear in the nearest unoccupied square (determined at random). While trapped, the subject can attempt to end the technique by attempting to perform a Spacetime technique with the Teleportation descriptor, but such an attempt fails unless it succeeds at a Will save.

You may use this technique on yourself, but doing so increases the Cost to 25 Chakra.

Empower: Spend 5 Chakra to allow the subject to be able to see everything it would normally see from its original posision, though it still cannot detect anything with its other senses or affect/be affected by anything.

name: NINPOU: CHAKRA NAGASHI (NINJA ART: CHAKRA FLOW)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 1

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 14

Components: C, F, S

You imbue a single held melee weapon or five thrown or projectile ammunitions with Chakra, having them count as Chakra enhanced for the purpose of bypassing damage reductions and having them deal 1d6 additional force damage to any creature or object made entirely of Chakra. The effect ends one round after such an imbued weapon is no longer held by you.

Mastery: The first step allows weapons to remain imbued as long as they are within 5 ft of you.

The third step allows you to replace the Material Focus with any object or weapon.

The fifth step requires ECL 12 to learn, but allows you to imbue the weapon with an effect based on your primary elemental affinity (see below). Doing so increases the Chakra cost of the technique to 6 and adds the appropriate descriptor to the technique:

Earth (Crushing) - The weapon has hardness 20, bypasses dark iron damage reduction and ignores any hardness of 8 or lower, and gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls made against targets affected by the Suibouheki no Jutsu technique, or those vulnerable to earth damage. Imbued objects do not gain the increased hardness.

Fire (Searing) - Creatures or objects struck by the weapon have their hardness and damage reductions reduced by 2 for 3 rounds, stacking up to 10 times. Lasts for 5 attacks. Any creature suffering more than 25% of its HP in damage from a searing weapon takes a 50% penalty to any healing received by Medical techniques, healing spells or Treat Injury skill use for 24 hours. Lastly, the weapon gains a +2 bonus to attack against a creature vulnerable to fire, or one affected by the Junkaze no Jutsu technique.

Ice (Freezing) - Creatures or objects struck by the weapon have their hardness and damage reductions reduced by 1 for 5 rounds, stacking up to 10 times. The weapon gains a +2 bonus to attack against a creature vulnerable to cold, or one affected by the Soukou no Jutsu technique.

Lightning (Vibrating) - The weapon ignores all hardness and 5 points of damage reductions. The weapon gains a +2 bonus to attack against a creature vulnerable to lightning, or a +4 bonus against a creature affected by the Tsuchi no Yoroi technique (choose one).

Water (Slowing) - Creatures hit by the weapon take a -1 penalty to Defense for 2 rounds, stacking up to 5 times. Lasts for 5 attacks. The weapon gains a +2 bonus to attack against a creature vulnerable to water, or one affected by the Enkoudate no Jutsu technique.

Wind (Slicing) - The weapon ignores 15 points of hardness and/or damage reductions, and automatically confirms critical hits. Lasts for 4 hits. The weapon gains a +2 bonus to attack against a creature vulnerable to wind, or one affected by the Raidate no Jutsu technique.

name: NINPOU: CHAKRA NO ITO (NINJA ART: CHAKRA THREADS)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C

You create invisible Chakra threads which can be used to manipulate objects with varying degrees of control. Creatures that can See (Through) Chakra can make a Spot check (DC 10) to see the threads. Using such threads requires you have both hands free. To attach your threads to an object, you must hit it with a ranged touch attack. For each range increment beyond the first a controlled object is distanced from you, you take a -2 penalty to all checks and rolls made through or with it.

Each time a controlled object is used to deliver damage, you must make an Intelligence check (DC 20) to avoid losing your grip on the object until your next turn. Chakra threads come in various classes, each with its own Chakra cost and statistics:

| Class | Range Increment | HP | Trip | Spot DC | Objects | Cost |
|---------|-------------------|------|--------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| D | 10 ft | 7 | 10 ft | 10 | 2 | 1 |
| C | 20 ft | 11 | 15 ft | 15 | 3 | 2 |
| B | 30 ft | 15 | 20 ft | 20 | 4 | 3 |
| A | 50 ft | 20 | 30 ft | 25 | 5 | 4 |

A chakra thread can reach up to five range increments and can be used to deliver a Trip or Disarm at- tempt at range (as indicated). You do not risk getting tripped or disarmed if you fail such an attempt.

More powerful threads become increasingly difficult to spot (as shown) and can be used control multiple objects, though each object is controlled individually and a puppeteer is still limited by its (Advanced) Puppetry ability in how many puppets it can control.

Chakra threads have a Defense of 10 plus your Dexterity modifier, and can only be damaged by slashing attacks that can bypass Chakra-based damage reduction. A thread that is destroyed will disconnect you from whatever object that thread controlled. Severed threads can be reformed as a swift action while this technique is still active, but you will have to pay the cost again.

Although they can manipulate objects at range, you still use your Strength score to determine the total weight of items you can carry, lift or move.

The basic use of this technique creates D-class threads. Mastery allows you to create higher class threads.

- D-Class: These threads manipulate object as though they were a rope. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Trip or Disarm attempts made with them, and you suffer a -4 penalty to attacks rolls and skill checks requiring precision made with or through the objects.
- C-Class: These threads manipulate object as though using a weak telekinetic force, allowing you to nudge it in any direction, and you suffer a -2 penalty to attacks rolls and skill checks requiring precision made with or through the objects.
- B-Class: These threads manipulate objects as though they were a telekinetic force, and increase your effective Strength score by 2 when lifting or moving objects.
- A-Class: These threads can manipulate objects as though using your own hands and increase your effective Strength score by 5 when lifting or moving objects.

Mastery: Each step grants a +1 bonus to the touch attack made to attach threads to an inanimate object.

The first step requires five times as long to learn, and allows you to create C-Class threads.

The second step allows you to perform this technique as a move action up to three times per encounter.

The third step requires ten times as long to learn, and allows you to create B-class threads.

The fourth step allows you to perform this technique as a swift action up to three times per encounter.

The fifth step takes twenty times as long to learn, and allows you to create A-Class threads.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 2

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H, Mas

You gain the Tremorsense ability (p365), with a 30 ft range.

Mastery: The first, third and fifth steps increase the range of the Tremorsense by 10 ft each.

name: NINPOU: KIBAKU FUUDA NO WANA (NINJA ART: PAPER BOMB TRAP)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, E, M, Mas

To properly trigger the trap, you must have an attack action ready when a creature moves to or over the trap's area, after which the paper bombs attempt to crawl up the target's legs. The target may make a Reflex save, but takes a -4 penalty if it was not aware of the trap. If the creature fails, it is unable to make a save against the primary damage.

The trap, once sprung, must be set off as a free action, which can be done even if it is not your turn, and the resulting explosion deals 10d6 fire damage to the target and all adjacent creatures (primary), and a half as much damage as a 30 ft Burst centered on the creature that triggered the trap (secondary). A successful Reflex save will halve the damage.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the primary damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 16d6.

Mastery: Each step increases the duration by 1 minute and reduces the perform time by 1 round (minimum 1 round).

The third step allows you to activate the trap as an instant action, rather than an attack action.

The fifth step allows you to perform this technique as an attack action, gaining a range of Close.
