name: NINPOU: MAKIBISHI NO JUTSU (NINJA ART: EARTH CALTROPS TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: H

The target square(s) must be composed of rock or dirt, which immediately shapes into small but sharp spikes and counts as though it had caltrops scattered over it (see p64). A square of makibishi has Defense 11, 3 HP and 8 hardness. When you dismiss this technique, you may choose to either dismiss all makibishi, or only a select number, leaving the rest (which could be dismissed at a later time).

name: NINPOU: NOUSEI KOUYOU (NINJA ART: MEMORY ENHANCER)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, S

You increase your brain activity, stimulating your memory and allowing you to explore your memory thoroughly. You gain a +4 insight bonus to all saves and checks that relate to events you have experienced in the past (for example, to help gather clues or form a conclusion based on reviewing memories of the investigation) (GM's discretion).

This technique can only be used once per day, and once it ends you become fatigued. You also take 1d6 temporary Intelligence damage (Fortitude DC 18 negates).

name: NINSHOUKAN NO JUTSU (EMPATHY BOND SUMMON TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 18

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 5

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, H, M

This technique summons the target, which must be bonded to you by the Fuinjutsu: Ninjou Kan technique. If the target is grappled, pinned or otherwise physically restrained in a way that makes them unable to move normally (thus, being paralyzed does not prevent them from being summoned, as it is not physically restraining them).

The target appears in a square adjacent to you, and must then make a Fortitude save (DC 13) to avoid becoming dazed for 1 round.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, F

You form opposite elemental energies in both your hands and fire them in a ray, dealing 2d6 cold and 2d6 fire damage, and having a random additional effect (roll a d6):

- 1 (Electric Release): The target is paralyzed for 1 round (Fortitude negates)
- 2 (Violent Explosion): The effect becomes a 5 ft Burst (it is no longer a ray), and allows a Reflex save for half damage.
- 3 (Cold Snap): Frost creeps up the target's legs, entangling it for 1d4 rounds.
- 4 (Wind Shock): The target falls prone (Reflex negates).
- 5 (Bright Flash): The target becomes blinded for 1d3 rounds (Fortitude negates).
- 6 (Dark Matter): The ray deals 1d6 bonus force damage.

Mastery: The fifth step allows you to reroll the random effect once per use of the technique.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, H

You sheathe yourself with thunder and lightning, letting it form a protective shield over your body. You gain a +2 deflection bonus to Defense, and electricity resistance 5. If a creature hits you with an unarmed or melee attack, it takes 1d4 electric damage (CR applies). In addition, you gain a +4 bonus to saves against Electric effects, and if such an effect allows a Reflex save for half damage, you take no damage on a successful save instead.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: S

You disappear in a flash of lightning, and reappear at any location in range, as though you moved there with a flight speed with perfect maneuverability. Creatures adjacent to the square you arrive in take 4d6 electric damage.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, H

You send forth a glimmering yellow tiger to leap at the target, dealing 4d8 electric damage (Fortitude halves). After one to five rounds (your choice), the target suffers another 3d8 electric damage and must make a Fortitude save or take 1d4 Chakra Coils damage.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: S

You mold Chakra in your hand, turning it into a blade of electricity that is wielded like a ninja-to. Attacks with the blade are touch attacks, dealing 1d6 electric damage, +1 per three levels (up to +5). Since the blade is made of energy and not physical matter, you do not apply your Strength modifier to damage.

If a creature that carries a large amount of metal or one that is soaking wet is hit by the blade, it is stunned for 1 round (Fortitude DC 13 negates).

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, H

You create a small orb of lightning. By increasing the Chakra cost by 2, you can create additional orbs (up to 1 orb per 2 levels total). When performed, you can immediately fire any number of orbs you've created. The orbs have a Close range, and each orb can attack the same or a different creature, as you direct. An orb is a ranged attack that deals 1d6 electric damage.

If any orbs remain, they will circle you. As an attack action, you can fire any number of remaining orbs (as above). Alternatively, whenever you are hit by a natural weapon, unarmed attack or metal melee weapon, you can choose to have an orb meet the attack, shocking the attacker for 1d6 electric damage (this damage does not stack with that of Raidate no Jutsu).

Once used to attack or respond to an attack, an orb dissipates.

name: RAIKOUSEN NO JUTSU (RAY OF LIGHTNING TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: S

You fire a ray of lightning that deals 2d6 electric damage. If hit, the target is stunned for 1 round (Fortitude negates).

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, M

You call forth lightning, shaping it into a large axe that you smash into the target, dealing 6d8 electric damage (Reflex halves). A target taking any amount of damage from this technique is paralyzed for 2 rounds (Fortitude negates). This technique does not provoke attacks of opportunity when performed in another creature's threatened area.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: H

You use your Chakra to form a powerful electric aura around you, which crackles with energy. Each round, other creatures caught within the area during your turn suffers 8d4 electric damage. While active, you gain a +2 bonus to Reflex saves against electric effects, but suffer a -8 penalty to Hide and Move Silently checks, as well as taking a -4 penalty to saves against any Water effects.

name: RAIRYUUDAN NO JUTSU (LIGHTNING DRAGON BLAST TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H

You launch a dragon of yellow lightning, which charges to the area to deal 7d6+5 electric damage.

name: RAIRYUURETSU NO JUTSU (VIOLENT LIGHTNING DRAGON TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, H, F

This technique functions as Daikodan no Jutsu (p153). The projectile is the shape of a yellow dragon of lightning, dealing 8d6 electric damage to primary targets, and half that to secondary targets.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 3

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 25

Components: H, E *

See the Godai Ransatsu: Shodan Jutsu technique (p159).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 16d6 (whichever is lower).

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: E, S

You throw a shuriken of lightning at the target, dealing 1d6 electric damage.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1, up to a total of 1d6+5.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, Mas

You charge your body with lightning, and instantly move to any location within range, as long as it is not behind a barrier through which you could not ordinarily move (i.e. you could not move through a wall that only has a small drain, but you could move to the top of the wall if it is within range). The movement makes no sound or visual effect. This movement is instantaneous, and counts as though it were a teleportation effect, though any effect that interacts with teleportation effects will not interact with Raisoku.

You can use this technique up to once per encounter (uses to avoid an attack, as below, do not count toward this limit).

Avoiding an Attack (1/day): Minimum DC 21. If you succeed, you use the technique as normal, (though in this case the range is limited to 50 ft) and you can make a Hide check to hide. You can use this technique to avoid an attack against a source with a CR of up to 10.

Mastery: Each step allows you to use the technique to avoid an attack an additional time per day.

The first, third and fifth steps each increase the maximum CR you can avoid attacks from by 5.

The third step also allows you to use this technique when not avoiding an attack up to three times per encounter.

The fifth step allows you to use this technique when not avoiding an attack as many times per encounter as you wish, though no more than once per round.

name: RAITE NO JUTSU (HANDS OF THUNDER TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: S

You charge your hands with crackling electricity, dealing 2d6 electric damage, +1 per level (up to 2d6+5 total) against the target on hit. If the target wears a lot of metal (such as metal armor), you gain a +2 bonus to the attack roll (GM's discretion).

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 11

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 4

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 29

Components: H, E, Mas *

See the Godai Ransatsu: Nidan Jutsu technique (p158).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 20d6 (whichever is lower).

Mastery: Each step increases the number of possible targets by 1. The first, third and fifth step increase the radius by 5 ft each.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 28

Components: C, S, F

You touch a swamp you've created with the Yomi Numa technique, reducing its duration to 1r/level and having it deal 1d6 acid damage each round to creatures trapped in it. Creatures walking on the swamp without protective footwear take only 1 acid damage per round. The swamp does not affect any creature with your Chakra signature.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: E, H, Mas

You fire a bolt of lightning from your hand, dealing 3d6 electric damage. You can reduce the length of the Line as you see fit.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 12d6 total.

Mastery: The third step reduces the base cost to 3.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: E, H

You gather and multiply air inside your lungs, expelling it as a nearly solid sphere that deals 7d8 wind damage.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d8, up to 1d8 per character level or 14d8 total. Each die also increases the burst radius by 5 ft (up to 50 ft).

name: REPPUUTSUKI NO JUTSU (VIOLENT WIND THRUST TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: E, H

You concentrate Chakra in the air, creating a potent gust of wind that can do one of two things:

Disarm - Make a ranged touch attack against a target weapon. If it hits, you may make a disarm attempt, gaining a +4 circumstance bonus to the check, without risking being disarmed yourself. The gust of wind counts as though you wield a Medium-sized weapon.

Violent Thrust - Make a ranged touch attack against a Medium-sized or smaller target, throwing it 1d6 x 5 ft in a direction of your choice (halved upwards, doubled downwards). If the subject collides with an object of its own size or larger, it suffers 3d6 fall damage. A Large creature can be affected as well, though it is only thrown 1d4 x 5 ft. A successful save halves the distance the subject is thrown, and halves the collision damage (if any). The collision can be made to do nonlethal damage, though you incur a -4 penalty to the touch attack and save DC if you choose to do so.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to gain a +2 bonus to either the disarm check (Disarm) or to the roll to determine the distance the target is thrown (Violent Thrust), up to +10 total. Each such bonus also increases the collision damage by 1d6 (maximum 1d6 per level).

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: E, H

You create a small but powerful sphere of spinning wind, ready to target either a creature or a thrown weapon. Either way, you must succeed at a ranged touch attack against the target.

If directed against a creature, the attack deals 2d6 wind damage, knocks the target back 5 ft and has it fall prone.

If directed against a thrown weapon, the technique must be made as a readied action to respond to the weapon being thrown. You can either hinder the weapon, throwing it 2d6x5 ft in a random direction from its intended target (thus making it miss), or aid the attack, having it gain a +4 bonus to the attack roll and having it deal 2d6 additional damage on hit (not multiplied on critical hits). If the touch attack misses the weapon, nothing happens.

You gain a +8 bonus to the touch attack if you are adjacent to the creature or throwing the weapon, or a +4 bonus if you are within 10 ft of them.

Empower: Spend 3 Chakra to either increase the knockback by 5 ft or to target two thrown weapons fired by the same creature, at the same target.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, H

You must be in contact with the surface you wish to affect, or a surface directly connected to it. You can only affect open ground and structures within the area.

The ground in the area trembles and cracks. Each creature within has a 25% chance to fall into a fissure (Reflex negates). Creatures traveling underground have only a 20% chance to be caught in a fissure. When the technique ends, the fissures close, killing any creatures inside.

Structures standing on open ground in the target area suffer 100 damage (enough to collapse a typical wooden or non-reinforced masonry building), which ignores hardness. Creatures within a collapsing structure take 8d6 earth damage (Reflex halves) and are pinned beneath the rubble, suffering 1d6 nonlethal damage each minute, increasing by 1d6 each minute. If it falls unconscious, it must make a Constitution check (DC 15) each round or take 1d4 points of damage.

name: ROUGA NADARE NO JUTSU (WOLF FANG AVALANCHE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 4

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: H, M

You send a pack of snow wolves tearing through the area, dealing 6d8 cold damage (Reflex halves), as well as 4d8 slashing damage. Creatures of Large or smaller size are pushed back 1d6 x 5 ft (Fortitude negates). The technique's range only limits the point where you can have the line start. The line can go in any direction you choose.

name: ROUSURO ONPA NO JUTSU (DEAFENING SOUND WAVE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, H

You manipulate sound waves in the area, creating a blast of sound that deals 2d6 sonic damage. Any creature in the area is also deafened for 1d6+1 rounds (Fortitude negates).

name: RYOUTOU SUIRYUUDAN NO JUTSU (TWO-HEADED WATER DRAGON BLAST TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 13 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 17

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 4

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 30

Components: F, H

This advanced technique creates two large dragon heads, each dealing 7d6+3 water damage to creatures within their respective areas. Both dragon heads can target the same square, though a creature must save against each of them seperately.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: S

The target creature must be caught by the Kousen Shibari no Jutsu technique, or bound in a similar way with you holding the bindings that lead directly to the target. You release a powerful stream of fire that flows along the bindings holding the target, engulfing it and dealing 6d6 fire damage. The target must make a Fortitude save to avoid catching fire for 2d6+1 rounds.

The bindings holding the target are disintegrated, freeing the them.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H

This technique must be used on soft ground, and creates an area of quicksand.

A character approaching the patch of quicksand at a walking pace can make a Survival check (DC 18) to detect it before it steps in.

A running or charging character does not receive such a check, and if it passes through, it will be carried 1d2 x 5 ft into the quicksand before coming to a stop.

A character caught in quicksand must make a Swim check (DC 10) every round to prevent itself from sinking, or it can attempt a DC 15 Swim check to move 5 ft in any non-vertical direction of their choice. Characters who fail a Swim check sink below the surface, and will have to hold their breath and/or start drowning. A successful Swim check (DC 15, +1 per round spent sunk below the surface) allows you to resurface.

A character outside the quicksand may use a pole of some sort (a spear shaft, a sturdy branch) or a length of rope to pull a creature out, as long as that item can reach the target. The rescuer makes a Strength check (DC 15) as a full-round action. The trapped creature must make a Strength check (DC 10) to hold on to the pole or rope. If they fail, they must make a Swim check (DC 15) to avoid sinking (as above). If both Strength checks succeeded, the trapped creature is pulled 5 ft towards the rescuer.

name: SAN IBUKI NO JUTSU (ACIDIC BREATH TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

You expel a cloud of acid from your lungs, filling and adjacent 10 ft square. The cloud grows to a 15 ft square the second round, and a 20 ft square the third, and will disperse four rounds after that. A moderate wind (11+ mph) disperses it in three rounds, and a strong wind (21+ mph) disperses it in a single round. Creatures within the cloud take 3d8 acid damage each round they remain within.

name: SARUBOU NO MAI (DANCE OF THE WILD MONKEY)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, H, Mas

You imbue yourself with five air charges, which may be used to perform the following tricks. Each trick requires you to spend an air charge:

Air Dance (Free Action) - You stand up from prone as a free action without provoking attacks of opportunity.

Freestyle (Instant Action) - You slow your falling speed to 10 ft for a single round.

Monkey Charge (Swift Action) - Increase your base land speed by 10 ft for 3 rounds.

Uplift (Free Action) - Only usable while jumping. Make an immediate second jump, gaining a +10 circumstance bonus to the check and ignoring height restrictions for that jump.

Mastery: The third step allows you to spend 1 additional Chakra to gain 2 additional air charges, up to a maximum of 11 air charges. Each step also allows you to expend additional air charges when using Uplift, increasing the bonus to the check by +10 per additional air charge spent.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: C, H

You create a sudden updraft to guide you into the air. Make a Jump check, gaining a +10 competence bonus to the roll and ignoring the need for a 10 ft move before jumping. This technique can be used a second time while mid-air from jumping, jumping even further, but you cannot use this technique while falling.

name: SEIDENKI REIKI NO JUTSU (STATIC ELECTRICITY AURA TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: S

This basic technique forms an aura of static electricity around you, delivering static discharges that deal 1d3 damage each round to creatures caught inside it.

name: SEIHYOUROU NO JUTSU (ETERNAL ICE PRISON TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 13 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 18

Learn DC: 29 | Successes: 5

Perform: 17 | Perform DC: 33

Components: H, M

This technique is identical to Hyourou no Jutsu (p166). The Strength check DC to break the prison is 35, and instead of suffocating the target will fall unconscious after being trapped for 1d4+1 rounds, remaining so until freed.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: H

You send forth a surge of bright white electrical energy, dealing 6d6 electric damage (Reflex halves), and stunning any creature damaged for 1d3 rounds (Fortitude negates).

area.value: 20 ft semicircular Spread, centered on your hands

name: SEKIJUN HAYASHI NO JUTSU (STALAGMITE FOREST TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 5

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: C, H

This difficult and powerful technique has you focus a large amount of Chakra into your hands and touch the ground, sending forth a seemingly subtle shockwave. Immediately after, 15 ft tall stalagmites erupt throughout the area, dealing 8d12 earth damage and leaving a forest of stony trees that resemble a thick forest, not providing enough space for Small-sized or larger creatures to fight in. The stalagmites remain for one day, or until dismissed.

This technique cannot be performed on water.

name: SENSATSU SUISHOU NO JUTSU (FLYING WATER NEEDLES TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: E, F, H

You create needles of ice that surround the target square and fly towards it, dealing 2d4 damage to creatures within the area (half cold, half piercing). Alternatively, you may target a 10 ft square, but the damage will be halved.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d4, up to 1d4 per level of 10d4.

name: SHIGARASUGAN (DEATH IN THE EYE OF A CROW)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 4

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: E, H, M

You summon a murder of crows to swarm the area, without any regard for the allegiance of creatures within. The crows deal 5d4+5 slashing damage with their talons (Fortitude halves). A creature taking damage is nauseated for 1 round (Fortitude DC 20 negates).

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d4+1, up to 1d4+1 per level or 15d4+15 total.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: S

You press your hand into the ground and cause tremors to shake the area, making creatures within fall prone.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 5

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: C, H, E *

See the Godai Ransatsu: Yondan Jutsu technique (p159)

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 24d6 (whichever is lower).

name: SHINHYOUKODAN NO JUTSU (ULTIMATE ICE TIGER BLAST TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 11

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 4

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 29

Components: H, E, Mas *

See the Godai Ransatsu: Nidan Jutsu technique (p158)

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 20d6 (whichever is lower).

Mastery: Each step increases the number of possible targets by 1. The first, third and fifth step increase the radius by 5 ft each.

name: SHINJUU ZANSHU NO JUTSU (INNER DECAPITATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: C, H

You must be moving underground with a burrow speed in order to use this technique. You grab the subject and pull it down into the earth, burying it up to its neck. The subject is immobilized until it can succeed three Escape Artist checks (DC 15) in a row, each requiring a move action.

As a result of this technique, you will be halfway out of the ground.

name: SHINKUUDAN NO JUTSU (AIR VOID BURST TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 3

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 25

Components: H, E *

See the Godai Ransatsu: Shodan Jutsu technique (p159)

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 16d6 (whichever is lower).

name: SHINOBI HIKEN: KAMIKAKUSHI (SHINOBI SECRET: SPIRITED AWAY)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: S

You set up a process that converts your body's energy into Chakra upon death. If you die within the duration, your body vanishes over the course of 5 rounds, turning into Chakra and dispersing. This process cannot be reversed in any way once it begins, and does not affect your equipment.

If performing defensively, you gain a +8 bonus to the Concentration check to do so.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: H, Mas

You gain a +1 competence bonus to Hide and Move Silently checks.

Mastery: The third step requires ECL 8 and increases the bonus to +2. The fifth step requires ECL 12 and increases the bonus to +3.

name: SHINRYUUDAN NO JUTSU (ULTIMATE DRAGON BLAST TECHNIQUE)

See the Godai Ransatsu: Sandan Jutsu technique (p159)

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 24d6 (whichever is lower).

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 3

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 24

Components: E, H

You release a blast of sound, dealing 1d6 sonic damage per 2 levels (maximum 6d6, Fortitude halves). Creatures in the area are also thrown back 1d8 x 5 ft (Fortitude negates). If you wear a sound amplifier or a similar device that can amplify your voice, you can increase the Chakra cost to 12 to improve the damage dice to d8.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 14d6.

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 5

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

See the Godai Ransatsu: Yondan Jutsu technique (p159)

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 24d6 (whichever is lower).

name: SHIROIYARI NO JUTSU (WHITE ICE SPEAR TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 5

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: C, H, E *

See the Godai Ransatsu: Yondan Jutsu technique (p159)

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 24d6 (whichever is lower).

name: SHOU RAKUMUGAI NO JUTSU (MINOR HARMLESS FALL TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 12 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 11

Components: Mob

This technique allows for a clever use of Chakra and positioning to absorb the energy of a fall. You reduce your effective falling height (for the purpose of calculating how much fall damage you take, if any) by 10 ft. This stacks with the effects of the Tumble and Jump skills, does not apply to any fall caused by a technique (such as being knocked up by one), and the technique cannot be used if you are denied your Dexterity bonus to Defense.

name: SHOUCHIHOU NO JUTSU (FLYING EARTH SPIKES TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: E, H

You must be touching the ground with your hands, and the target area must be an earthen surface (earth, dirt, rock or sand). A sharp spike of earth rises up, skewering creatures in the area for 2d8 damage (half earth, half piercing).

Empower: Spend one Chakra to create an additional spike, up to one per level. Each spike must target a different 5 ft square.

name: SHOUCHITE NO JUTSU (RISING EARTH HAND TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: F, H, Mas

You must be in direct contact with the ground to use this technique, which makes a large, earthen hand rise from the ground. The hand is 10 ft tall and 5 ft wide and cannot move. It has a Defense of 0, has 2 HP per level and is immune to earth damage. A creature weighing at least 2,000 lbs can destroy the hand simply by moving through it.

A creature moving towards the hand at high speed may make a Reflex save to avoid it, or suffer impact damage as though struck by a falling object of one size category larger than the impacting creature or object, with no save to avoid the damage. In this case, the hand suffers double the impact damage itself.

Mastery: You can spend 5 Chakra and double the material focus to create a second hand.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C, E, H

You spit out a ball of flame, dealing 2d4 fire damage. The range cannot exceed 20 ft.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d4, up to 1d4 per level or 5d4.

Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 4

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 29

Components: F, H

You unleash an avalanche that pushes back creatures by 1d4 x 5 ft and knocks them prone. The wave leaves a thick layer of snow, effectively burying any creature still within the area under a 1d6 x 5 ft layer of snow. Structures caught in the area take 2d4 x 10 damage. Any creature buried in the snow will start suffocating, and will suffer 3d6 cold damage per minute while buried. A successful Strength check (DC 20) allows a buried creature to move 5 ft in any direction.

The layer of snow makes it impossible for creatures to move through or fight within the area, unless they can walk on snow. The snow will melt and fade after 10 minutes.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, H

The target must have suffered damage from a piercing or slashing weapon before it can be affected by this technique, which makes the wound bleed, causing the subject to suffer 1 damage every round, which ignores all damage reductions. A creature can only be affected by a single use of this technique at a time.

Each time the subject receives healing from a spell, item, technique or the like, there is a cumulative 5% chance that the technique ends.

Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 5

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 27

Components: Mob, S

You can make a melee or thrown weapon attack against the target without having to move. The target must make a Spot check (DC equal to the attack roll) or be denied its Dexterity bonus to Defense. A thrown weapon attack ignores all range penalties, and bypasses any obstacles (including cover) between you and the target, as long as you know the exact square the target is occupying.

name: SHUNKOKU MEIHOUJIN: BUSHI (MOMENTANEOUS ALLY FORMATION: SOLDIER)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 0

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: H, M, Mas

You summon a creature of Soldier rank, which appears in a square adjacent to you and can act immediately, though it disappears on your next turn. The summoned creature cannot be a special summon (paragon, elite or unique), and you are still limited by the normal restrictions of summoning. The technique's cost is increased by 1 per Level of the summon.

Mastery: Each step increases the range at which you can make the summoned creature appear (up to 30 ft at the fifth step).

name: SHUNKOKU MEIHOUJIN: HOGOSHA (MOMENTANEOUS ALLY FORMATION: PROTECTOR)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: None

This technique functions as Shunkoku Meihoujin: Bushi, but instead summons a Protector rank summon.

name: SHUNKOKU MEIHOUJIN: SEIHEI (MOMENTANEOUS ALLY FORMATION: NOBLE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: None

This technique functions as Shunkoku Meihoujin: Bushi, but instead summons a Noble rank summon.

name: SHUNKOKU MEIHOUJIN: SHINGEN (MOMENTANEOUS ALLY FORMATION: CHAMPION)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 5

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: None

This technique functions as Shunkoku Meihoujin: Bushi, but instead summons a Champion rank summon, and the cost increases by 2 per Level of the summon. A Champion summoned in this manner will not require or demand payment or compensation.

name: SHUNKOKU MEIHOUJIN: SHUGOREI (MOMENTANEOUS ALLY FORMATION: GUARDIAN)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: None

This technique functions as Shunkoku Meihoujin: Bushi, but instead summons a Guardian rank summon.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 1

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 14

Components: Mas, Mob, S

This basic teleportation-like technique allows you to move to a location within range, as though moving with a flight speed with perfect maneuverability. The technique comes with audiovisual cues, like a pop and a puff of smoke, which does not allow you to hide while moving, and you cannot use it while heavily encumbered.

Mastery: The fifth step requires ECL 9 or higher, and allows you to perform this technique without the halfseal component by increasing the Perform Requirements by 5.

Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, F, S

You can unseal objects from a storage scroll, which you may have appear in hand, ready to use.

Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C

You flicker in and out of existence, allowing you to make an Escape Artist attempt to free yourself from bonds or confinements, to which you gain a +20 bonus.

Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 5

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, Mob, S

You instantly relocate to a location within range, using the same rules as Mugen Ugoku no Jutsu (p184). You may, at your choice, leave an afterimage that remains completely still, which disappears on your next turn. If you arrive at a square adjacent to another creature, but outside of its line of sight, you can make a Hide check even without cover, which will not hide you from creatures that have an unobscured line of sight to you.

Avoiding an Attack (1/day): Minimum DC 31. This technique may also be used to avoid a technique that allows a Reflex save for half or no damage. Using the technique this way increases the Cost to 9. If you succeed, you may use the technique as normal, though its range is halved.

The effective Kawarimi Defense of an attack is lowered by 1 when determining if you can use Shunzeki to avoid an attack. There is no maximum CR.

Mastery: Each step allows you to use the technique to avoid an attack an additional time per day.

name: SHURIKENJUTSU: REPPURENSHOU (SHURIKEN SKILL: FIERCE GALE CRUSHER)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 1

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: F, Mob

You throw a weapon at the target, immediately followed by a Reppushou to enhance its effectiveness, granting the attack 2d6 bonus damage (not multiplied on critical hits), as well as a +1 damage bonus, and its range increment increases by 50% (stacks with the Far Shot feat).

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: None

This technique functions as Shurikenjutsu: Reppurenshou, except as above, and you make a second thrown weapon attack at a -5 penalty, which benefits from the same bonuses.

name: SHUSEN: CHIBOUNUSHI (DEFENSIVE TECHNIQUE: RISING MUD GUARDIAN)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, H, Mas

You must be standing directly on rocky ground, earth or asphalt to use this technique, which creates a thin wall of mud or earth in a square in range. Any creature directly behind it can use it to be granted one-half cover (if the creature is Medium sized) or three-fourths cover (if the creature is Small or smaller).

Once a single attack or area of effect has been made against a target that is granted cover against it by the wall, the wall crumbles, even if it did not negate any damage.

Mastery: Each step increases the number of times per day you can use this technique as a defensive maneuver by 1.

The first step allows you to defend against sources of a CR up to 5. Each additional step increases the CR by 5.

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: H

This technique cannot be used underwater.

Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: H, M

You cover yourself with an armor of ice, which is a medium armor granting a +5 armor bonus to Defense (+2 non-proficient), has a maximum Dexterity bonus of +2, an armor penalty of -3, does not affect your speed, and weighs 20 lbs. While worn, the armor grants you cold and water resistance 5, and any attacker striking you with an unarmed or natural melee weapon takes 1d4 cold damage for each attack.

If you take more than 20 fire damage while the armor is active, it melts and the technique ends.

name: SOUREI SAIJI NO JUTSU (RITE OF TWIN SOULS TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 4

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 28

Components: E, H

You summon two creatures of the same blood pact, neither of which can be of a higher rank than Protector. There is no chance to summon Elite or Paragon creatures when using this technique, though you can call on such creatures if you already know how to summon them. The Cost is equal to 5, plus the normal cost of both summoned creatures.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: E, F, Mas, S

You can lift and throw a barrage of Tiny or smaller throwing weapons towards your enemies. Make a ranged attack roll at your maximum attack bonus. On hit, the weapon deals damage as though thrown by you.

You cannot apply any special feats or abilities to the attack other than weapon focus and weapon specialization.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to throw an additional weapon, up to one per 2 levels or 5 total, whichever is lower. Each weapon may target a different creature.

Mastery: The third step increases the maximum number of thrown weapons to 6. The fifth step increases it to 7.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: H

Creatures caught in the area take 3d6 bludgeoning damage, increased to 5d6 if the creature occupies more than one square within the area. Objects and structures take twice as much damage. If an affected creature is of Medium size or smaller, it is knocked up 1d6 x 5 ft and will be prone when they land. A Large or larger creature will simply fall prone. A second Reflex save will negate this effect.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, H

In addition, you receive a +4 bonus to saves against water-based attacks. If such an attack allows a save for half damage, you take no damage on a successful save instead.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 5

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: C, H, E *

See Godai Ransatsu: Yondan Jutsu technique (p159).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 24d6 (whichever is lower).

name: SUIGADAN NO JUTSU (WATER FANG BLAST TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: F, H

You send your Chakra into the water and have it surge into the area from all sides, dealing 5d8 water damage to any creature within the area. Creatures surrounded on all sides by a physical barrier are unaffected.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: F, H

A creature attempting to move through the wall must make a Strength check (DC 25) to do so, which breaches the wall just long enough for the creature to pass through. If a Raiton technique is used targeting the wall or whose area also hits the wall, it is electrified for 1d4+1 rounds, dealing 1d4 electric damage per rank of the Raiton technique used to any creatures making direct contact with it.

area.value: 10 ft high and up to 5 ft/level long wall (S)

name: SUIKOUDAN NO JUTSU (SHARK WATER BLAST TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: F, H

You create a large shark of water that speed towards the target and explodes, dealing 7d8 water damage.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: F, H

This technique creates a sphere of water 1 ft in diameter per level, centered on the target. If the sphere is not big enough to completely engulf the target, it automati- cally fails. In addition, the target must be at least halfway submerged in water. If hit, the target is engulfed, becomes unable to take any action and will start drowning. The target can see outside the sphere, but it takes a -4 penalty to Spot and Listen checks. When freed, it will be flat-footed until the start of its next turn.

If you lose contact with the sphere, the technique ends. The sphere is immune to damage, and objects cannot pass into, out of or through it. Any hand used to maintain the prison cannot be used for anything else.

name: SUIRYUUDAN NO JUTSU (WATER DRAGON BLAST TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: F, H

You create a small, watery dragon that crashes down, dealing 7d6+5 water damage to creatures caught in the area.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 11

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 4

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 29

Components: H, E, Mas *

See the Godai Ransatsu: Nidan Jutsu technique (p158).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 20d6 (whichever is lower).

Mastery: Each step increases the number of possible targets by 1. The first, third and fifth step increase the radius by 5 ft each.

name: SUIRYUURETSU NO JUTSU (VIOLENT WATER DRAGON TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, H, F

This technique functions as Daikodan no Jutsu (p153), except as above, and the projectile is a watery dragon, dealing 8d6 water damage to primary targets, and half that to secondary targets.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 3

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 25

Components: H, E *

See the Godai Ransatsu: Shodan Jutsu technique (p159).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 16d6 (whichever is lower).

name: SUISENDAN NO JUTSU (DRILLING WATER BULLET TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: F, H

You create a ball of water that bursts outward in a spiraling wave, dealing 2d6 water damage to creatures caught in the area. Creatures damaged are knocked back 5 ft (Fortitude negates). If a creature is knocked back into another creature, both creatures fall prone (Balance or Dexterity check DC 10 negates). The range of this technique cannot exceed 30 ft.

name: SUISHOUHA NO JUTSU (GREAT WATER WAVE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 4

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 28

Components: F, H

You create a massive wave of water, ready to destroy anything in it's path. The wave travels outward from your location at a speed of 60 ft per round until it reaches its maximum range. The waters in the wave continually rush out in force, causing any Large or smaller sized creature in its area to be pushed back 2d6 x 5 ft and suffer 2d6 water damage. Huge or larger creatures are unaffected. Structures are always affected, and take triple damage, though they are not pushed back.

If a Raiton technique is used targeting the wave or including the wave inside it's area of effect, the wall is electrified for 1d4+1 rounds, causing it to deal 1d4 electric damage per rank of the Raiton technique used to any creature or structure caught inside the wave.

If this wave collides with another Suishouha, a Deishouha or a Daibakufu wave, they will cancel each other out.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: H

The subject takes a -1 penalty to its Strength Ranks.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 1

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 14

Components: C, H, Mas

You spit out 10 Litres of water per level. The water is pure and drinkable, and can be used as any normal water could, but it lasts for only 3 rounds (As such, drinking it will not quench your thirst). If used as a swift action, increase the Perform Requirements by 8 and the Cost by 2.

Using this technique in a hot and dry environment (like a desert) causes you to take 2d6 damage.

This technique can be used once per day.

Mastery: The second and fourth step each allow you to use this technique an additional time per day.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: H

You become invisible, along with any objects you are holding or carrying. Light emitted by objects made invisible will not become invisible, and any part of an object that sticks out more than 10 ft from you will also become visible. If an object leaves your grasp or is no longer carried by you, it instantly becomes visible. You gain a +30 bonus to Hide checks, and cannot be seen by any creature that cannot See (Through) Chakra. This does not conceal your Chakra Signature, smell or sounds you make. A creature that can See (Through) Chakra can Spot you, and the DC for doing so is 30 if you are not attempting to Hide. A creature that can See Through Chakra gains a +15 bonus on its Spot checks to see you.

Each time you attack, perform a technique or directly cause harm to a creature or object, you must make a Concentration check (DC 30, +5 per check made) to avoid having the technique end immediately. If you make a second directly offensive action against any creature or object, the technique ends regardless of the result of the check. If you take damage while affected, the technique ends.

This technique only functions while you remain in the same environment the technique was used in. If you move to a different environment, the technique will not provide any benefit until you return to the correct kind of environment.

Mastery: The first, third and fifth increase the amount of offensive actions that can be made before the technique ends by one each (provided you succeed at the Concentration checks).

Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 30

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 5

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: C, H

Using a large amount of Chakra, you can intensify the power of an existing storm for a short time. Creatures in the area suffer 6d10 slashing damage from violent winds, 3d8 bludgeoning damage from flying debris, and 4d8 electric damage from flashes of lightning. Structures take double damage. Three Fortitude saves can be made to halve the damage, one save for each damage type.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 12 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 11

Components: H

This is among the most basic of Katon techniques, often used to light fires when circumstances would otherwise make that difficult. The target takes 1 fire damage, and will catch fire for 1d4 rounds. A successful Reflex save negates both. Objects do not get a save, and will burn until they are completely consumed or until the fire is extinguished.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

You establish a lingering field of Chakra shaped like a sphere, which is designed to pick up the passage of creatures with Chakra. When a creature with a Chakra Pool of at least 10 enters the area, the field is dispelled and you are automatically aware of that fact (and, if you have multiple fields, you know exactly which one was dispelled). The field detects other creatures even if they are hiding, invisible or underground, though if they can shield their Chakra Signature completely, it is unable to detect them.

Creatures that can See (Through) Chakra can make a Spot check (DC 20) to see the field and be able to determine its exact area.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: H

You focus and inhibit the target's speed, causing the subject to suffer a -1 penalty to its Speed Ranks.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 1

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 14

Components: H

You create a sudden but potent updraft, dealing 1d6 wind damage to creatures in the area. In addition, creatures in the area are blown upward 1d4 x 5 ft (Fortitude negated), and may take falling damage on landing if they were blown upward enough.

name: TENKOU BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (CLONE SHIFT TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: H

You must have at least one clone of any kind active to use this technique. Choose a clone within range and immediately trade places with it. Onlookers must succeed at a Spot check (DC 20) to notice the exchange.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, H

A specialized version of Mizudama no Jutsu, this technique has you produce large amounts of saliva, which is spit out and hardened. Make a ranged attack roll, which deals damage on hit based on your size category: Large (2d4 water damage), Huge (2d8 water damage), Gargantuan (4d6 water damage) or Colossal (4d8 water damage).

You may fire additional bullets (up to 1 bullet per 4 levels total). Each bullet requires an attack roll, can target any creature within range (even creatures already targeted by other teppoudama), and increases the Cost by 2 Chakra.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 12

Components: F, H

The next attack you make with a thrown weapon of Small or smaller size has its range increment (and, as a result, its maximum range) doubled.

Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, H

You are able to fly through the air, as though you have a flight speed with clumsy maneuverability. The distance you can fly is equal to either your base land speed (if performed as a move action) or your run speed (if performed over one round). You can only fly in a straight line, and cannot travel upwards at an angle greater than 45 degrees. When traveling downward at an angle greater than 45 degrees, your speed is doubled.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, Mas, S

You take control of an inanimate, unattended object of Tiny or smaller size to use as a weapon. The weapon can be directed to attack any target within range, and allows you to make ranged attack rolls against your target (maximum attack bonus +10). For each 20 feet between you and the target, you take a -1 penalty to the attack roll. On hit, the weapon deals normal damage for an object its size (or for the appropriate weapon of that size), but you cannot apply your Strength modifier to damage.

If the object leaves your line of sight, the technique ends and you immediately lose control of it.

Mastery: The first step increases the maximum attack bonus to +11, and you can now control a Small object.

The third step increases the maximum attack bonus to +13, and you can now control a Medium object.

The fifth step increases the maximum attack bonus to +16, and you can now control a Large object.

name: TOBIKIRI KAWARIMI NO JUTSU (GREATER BODY REPLACEMENT TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: H, Mas

This technique functions as Kawarimi no Jutsu. When avoiding an attack, the minimum DC increases to 24 and the technique can be used to defend against techniques allowing a Reflex save for half or no damage. If used to avoid a technique, the Perform DC further in- creases by 2 per Rank of the incoming technique (maximum 10). The CR limit increases to 10.

Mastery: Each step allows you to use this technique an additional time per day.

The first step increases the maximum CR to 13. The second step allows you to increase the Cost to 7 to increase the maximum CR to 16.

The third step allows you to increase the Cost to 9 to increase the maximum CR to 19.

The fourth step allows you to increase the Cost to 11 to increase the maximum CR to 22.

The fifth step allows you to increase the Cost to 13 to increase the maximum CR to 25.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, S

Your Swim speed increases by 10 ft, and you gain a +3 bonus to Swim checks.

Mastery: Each step increases your swim speed by an additional 5 ft, and improves the bonus to Swim checks by +1.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, H

Your skin assumes reptilian qualities, becoming scaled and sickly green. This new skin grants a +2 natural armor bonus to Defense, but you suffer a -2 penalty to Fortitude saves against cold weather and cold attacks or techniques.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C, Mas, S

You create a globe of rapidly spinning winds around you, limiting your fall speed to 10 ft per round, and you will not suffer damage when landing. This technique can be used once per day, even while in mid-air, to slow your descent and land safely.

Mastery: The third and fifth steps each allow you to use this technique an additional time per day.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: C, F, S

You cover yourself with a thin layer of earth, which provides you with a +1 natural armor bonus to Defense and a +1 deflection bonus to Defense against the next melee or ranged attack aimed at you. The shield weighs 1 lb per size category for creatures of Medium size or smaller (5 lbs for Medium creatures). For Large creatures, the shield weighs 10 lbs, and larger creatures increase that weight by 10 lbs per additional size category.

Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C, H

You temporarily freeze the surface of the target square, causing all creatures to lose their Dexterity bonus to Defense. If an affected creature leaves the area, it immediately recovers from this penalty. Creatures not standing on the surface are unaffected.

name: TOUKETSU KOUSHOU NO JUTSU (FROZEN ARSENAL TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: H, M

You freeze a small amount of water, shaping it into any weapon of Large or smaller size, as long as you are proficient with it. The icy weapon carries all characteristics of the original, but deals 1 bonus cold damage on hit and has no hardness.

Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, H

You breathe out a gust of freezing air that deals 3d6 cold damage. Each creature in the area also suffers 1d4 temporary Strength damage (Fortitude negates). If used in very cold environments, the damage is reduced to

2d6 cold. A strong wind may, at your GM's discretion, nullify this technique. Creatures immune to cold are also immune to the Strength damage.

Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, H, M

You create a swarm of small birds from ice and snow, which will occupy a 5 ft wide, 10 ft long area, and appears within 10 ft of you. Each round, you can have the swarm move as you choose. It has a flight speed of 50 ft, with Perfect maneuverability, and it provokes no attacks of opportunity for moving into, out of, or through threatened areas. If the swarm flies through an area occupied by one or more creatures, those creatures take 2d6 cold and 2d6 slashing damage (Reflex halves).

The swarm can be attacked, but is immune to attacks that target only a single creature. It has 10 HP and a Defense score of 18. It shares your Reflex save bonus, and if you have evasion (or a variation thereof), the swarm also benefits from it. The swarm cannot be flatfooted, is immune to being entangled, stunned, diseased or poisoned, cannot suffer ability damage or ability drain, and is unaffected by any effect requiring a Will or Fortitude save.

If the swarm moves out of the technique's range or is destroyed, the technique ends.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C, F, S

You cover your hand with earthen materials, creating a large sledgehammer. For your next 1 unarmed attack per 2 levels, the attacks count as armed, deal lethal damage, and gain 1d4 bonus earth damage. While in effect, the hand used cannot hold objects.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: H, M, Mas

You cover yourself with a heavy, earthen layer of armor, which counts as heavy armor granting a +8 armor bonus to Defense (+3 nonproficient), has a maximum Dexterity bonus of +1, an armor penalty of -6 and a speed of 20 ft. It grants you DR 2/- and weighs 80 lbs. The DR stacks with the one granted by the Fortify bloodline.

The armor crumbles into nothing when the technique ends.

Mastery: The fifth step allows you to not count the armor's weight against your carrying capacity.

name: TSUCHI YADORI NO JUTSU (EARTH HAVEN TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 3

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, E, H, Mas

You must be in direct contact with the earth of rock you intend to use, which will rise up into a sturdy and simple hut that is 20 ft long, 20 ft wide, and 10 ft high. It has no windows and a single entrance, sized to fit a Medium-sized creature easily. The opening in will appear in whatever wall of the structure you desire.

The shelter looks like an ordinary stone building of its size (not counting the obvious lack of windows), and counts as though it were made of stone regardless of the material actually used. As such, it resists fire and is immune to normal projectiles (except siege weaponry), and will retain heat well enough to provide a comfortable shelter even in colder environments if a simple fire is lit within.

The shelter contains no furniture or other features, and lasts until dispelled or its duration expires, after which it will crumble to nothingness.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the duration by 1 day (up to 10 extra days).

Mastery: The first step allows you to increases the shelter size to 30ft by 30 ft.

The third step adds basic furniture to the shelter, such as tables, chairs and a fireplace you can cook in.

The fifth step allows you to increases the shelter size to 40ft by 40 ft.

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 3

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 25

Components: H, E *

See Godai Ransatsu: Shodan Jutsu technique (p159).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 16d6 (whichever is lower).

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: F, H

You create an earthen dragon of a certain size, whose Perform Requirements, Range, Area, Cost and damage change based on the dragon's size. In all cases, the damage is dealt to all creatures in the area, and a Reflex save can be made to halve the damage.

A Small dragon has the listed Perform Requirements, Close Range, its Area is a 5 ft square, its Cost is 6 and it deals 3d6+1 earth damage.

A Medium dragon increases the Perform Requirements by 1, has Medium Range, its Area is a 10 ft square, its Cost is 10 and it deals 6d6+3 earth damage.

A Large dragon increases the Perform Requirements by 3, has Long range, its Area is a 15 ft square, its Cost is 13 and it deals 9d6+5 earth damage.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 5

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 27

Components: H

This technique is an effective way of countering opponents who use summoning techniques. If hit, the target must make a save or be immediately banished as though its duration had ended. Objects are not allowed a save. If a banished creature is Unique, Elite or Paragon, it cannot be summoned again for 1 day.

name: TSUIRAIMOU NO JUTSU (TRACKING THUNDER WEB TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Raiton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, H

While concentrating on this technique, you must either keep your hand in direct contact with the ground, or you may touch the ground with a Small or smaller sized metal object. You spread your Chakra throughout the area as a low voltage pulse, which will alert you to the presence, size and exact position of all creatures of at least Tiny size that are within the area and in direct contact with the ground. As such, the web does not extend up surfaces such as walls or trees.

name: TSUKIGAKURE TOUKAI NO JUTSU (HIDDEN MOON CONCEALMENT TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, H

This technique originated in the Hidden Village of Steel, which was destroyed long ago. You cover yourself and your equipment in a cold, steel-like substance that provides protection and camouflage, without hindering your movement. You gain a +20 bonus to Hide checks while in complete darkness and a +4 bonus to Move Silently checks. The DC to track you increases by 5, and the 'mantle' removes your scent, making it impossible for creatures to detect or track you by scent.

When exposed to sunlight (or light of similar strength), every creature within 30 ft of you (including yourself) with a direct line of sight to you is blinded for 1d6 rounds (Fortitude DC 15 negates). In addition, you suffer a 25% miss chance, and creatures within 30 ft suffer a 25% miss chance when attacking you. Blind creatures are not blinded and do not suffer a miss chance.

Original author's note: This technique was directly taken from the fanfiction Foxhound, which I find extremely entertaining. Its name was changed from Kage Jutsu: Yabun no Fukemen, which I found inappropriate.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C, Mas, S

You force yourself to vomit, regurgitating whatever you've recently eaten or drunk. You become nauseated for 1d4 rounds, and gain a +4 bonus to secondary saves against ingested poisons for 1 minute.

Mastery: The fifth step reduces the duration of the nausea by 2 rounds (minimum 1 round).

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 5

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: C, H, E *

See Godai Ransatsu: Sandan Jutsu technique (p159).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 24d6 (whichever is lower).

name: TSUUFUUKA NO JUTSU (GOUT OF FIRE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: C, Mas, S

You focus Chakra in your mouth, breathing out a very short stream of fire against a creature within the same square of you, or an object within 1 ft of you. A creature takes 1 fire damage per round (Reflex negates, one save per round), while objects are affected differently and receive no save:

- First Round - Combustible and easily flammable materials catch fire. Meat can be cooked 'very rare'.
- Second Round - Metal becomes warm and uncomfortable to touch. Meat can be cooked 'medium'.
- Third Round - Metal becomes hot, dealing 1 fire damage when touched. Meat can be cooked 'well done'.
- Fourth Round - Metal becomes searing, dealing 1d4 fire damage when touched. Meat is severely overcooked and is barely edible.
- Fifth Round and up - Metal can be used for crafting purposes such as smithing. Meat is carbonized and entirely inedible.

Heated metal will cool within one round. Especially well-crafted or reinforced metallic items may be able to resist being melted down (GM's discretion).

Mastery: Each step increases the maximum duration by 1 round.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, H

You scribe your thoughts onto one or more scrolls at a distance by sending delicate manipulations of Chakra towards them. You may decide to target any number of blank scrolls (up to 1 per level) by spending an additional 2 Chakra per scroll beyond the first. You must know the exact location of each scroll, and must have made physical contact with it within the last 8 hours. For a scroll to receive information, it must be laid open, and there must be an open path for the Chakra to reach it (a very small hole would suffice).

Each round you concentrate, you can burn up to one page's worth of information into the scrolls (one page is the equivalent of 250 words). You may only transmit writing or very basic visual patterns (such as a simple floorplan). A faint orange glow accompanies the writing, as your words are burned into the page. The information is permanent and cannot be erased (save by destroying the entire scroll).

Concentrating on this technique provokes attacks of opportunity.

Creatures that can See (Through) Chakra will see tendrils of Chakra emanating from you towards the scrolls, allowing them to get a general sense of which direction the scrolls are.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: H, Mob

This oddly named technique does not actually have anything to do with eels or talons, and was often used by shinobi of the Hidden Mist when traveling or fighting over water. You gain the effects of the Tadayou and Issui Suberi no Jutsu techniques, without needing to make any checks. You also benefit from Speed Rank 1 while you are on water. The technique ends when you step on land. On the round the technique would end, you can spend 1 Chakra to extend its duration by 1 round.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 1

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 14

Components: S

You project your voice to a location within range, making it seem as though you were speaking from that location.

Type: Ninjutsu (Spacetime)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, F, M

This very basic summoning technique conjures a bladed weapon, which rises from the ground at a location within range. The weapon functions like normal, but disappears when the duration runs out or when the duration runs out. The weapon you choose to summon determines the Cost (see table top right). You may double the cost to increase the weapon's size by one size category.

You may increase the Perform Requirements by 10 to omit the expendable components.

| Weapon | Cost | Weapon | Cost |
|---------------|--------|------------------|--------|
| Battle Wire | 2 | Kunai | 1 |
| Battleaxe | 2 | Kunai, curved | 1 |
| Chisa-gatana | 1 | Kusari-gama | 3 |
| Daigama | 2 | Naginata | 2 |
| Daikunai | 2 | Longsword | 2 |
| Dagger | 1 | Ninja-to | 2 |
| Double Katana | 3 | Nunchaku | 1 |
| Fullblade | 4 | Quarterstaff | 3 |
| Greatsword | 3 | Scythe | 4 |
| Hansori | 2 | Shortsword | 1 |
| Kama | 1 | Spear | 3 |
| Katana | 2 | Sabre | 2 |
| Katana, Large | 3 | Spiked Greatmace | 3 |
| Knuckle Blade | 1 | Tessen | 1 |
| Kodachi | 1 | Wakizashi | 1 |

Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: H

You turn all natural, unworked earth and stone in the area into a thick mud, to a depth of 1 ft per level (which may be reduced based on the ground's toughness or resilience, GM's discretion). Creatures caught in the mud must save each round to avoid sinking in and becoming immobilized for 1d6 rounds. If a creature is small enough, it may start drowning as well.

You have full control over the shape, size and depth of each patch of mud (within the technique's limits).

Creatures can use Tadayou or similar effects to walk on the mud without a chance of any ill effects.

Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 13 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 6

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 38

Components: C, H

This technique can only be used in areas covered in ice and snow, and causes a sea of snowy/icy trees to rise up around you. The trees are Medium to Huge size, resembling a forest of a few decades old. The trees do not have foliage, but otherwise act like trees, and will impose movement penalties like a normal forest would. The trees, while made of snow or ice, are not especially slippery.

You can dismiss the forest partly or entirely, as precise as a single tree (or any number of specific trees) at a time.

Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: H

You gather Chakra in your mouth, generating a huge amount of saliva that you spit out as an oily substance. The subject will be covered by the oily saliva. If they come into contact with fire, they will catch fire for

1d6+1 rounds.

Alternatively, you can spit onto a 10 ft square, creating a slippery surface. Any creature that is in the area or steps on it must make a Reflex save to avoid becoming prone and suffering 1d4 nonlethal damage.

The saliva will dry after 1 hour, losing any of its special effects.

Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, S

You fire a drilling blade of air that deals 4d6+4 wind damage to the target, and continues onward to affect all other creatures in the target's square and the square behind it (relative to you), dealing half damage to all other creatures hit.

Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, H

You cover yourself with a protective cocoon of energy, granting 5 energy resistance to either cold, earth, electric, fire, water or wind. No more than one instance of this technique can be active at a time.

Type: Hachimon Tonkou

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: C, Mas

You open the Initial Gate, gaining a +2 enhancement bonus to Strength and Dexterity scores and a 10 ft increase to your land speed. You are unable to suppress your Chakra Signature while gaining these bonuses. At the start of each of your turns while the technique lasts, you take 2 damage (which bypasses DR). If the damage would reduce your HP below 1, the technique will end instead.

When the technique ends, you are fatigued for the rest of the encounter, and for 1 minute afterward (Fortitude DC 15 negates). The technique automatically ends when the encounter ends, unless you specify otherwise.

Mastery: The third step allows you to activate this technique as part of opening a greater Gate. Doing so will not grant you its benefits, nor will it have you suffer from any of its penalties.

Type: Hachimon Tonkou

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

As Kai-mon Kai, except as above, and you open the Heal Gate, gaining Fast Healing 2 in addition to the bonuses of Kai-mon Kai. You also ignore any fatigue or exhaustion you may suffer from while the Heal Gate is open, and any Strength or Dexterity damage is temporarily ineffective (it will return when this technique ends). You take 3 Chakra damage (but no normal damage) per round while this gate is opened.

Mastery: The first, third and fifth steps increase the Fast Healing value by 1 (each). The fifth step also reduces the Chakra damage taken to 2 per round.

The second step allows you to activate this technique as part of opening a greater Gate. Doing so will not grant you its benefits, nor will it have you suffer from any of its penalties.

Type: Hachimon Tonkou

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: C, P, Mas

As Kai-mon Kai, except as above, and you open the Life Gate, improving the bonuses to +4 Strength and Dexterity, and +15 ft land speed. Your Chakra Signa-ture increases by one step, and you gain 8 temporary Chakra. Each use halves the Chakra gained from opening any further Gates within the next 24 hours. The damage you take increases to 4 damage per round, and the fatigue lasts for 5 minutes after the encounter ends, with the save DC to negate it increasing to 20.

Mastery: The second step allows you to activate this technique as part of opening a greater Gate. Doing so will not grant you its benefits, nor will it have you suffer from any of its penalties.

The fifth step reduces damage taken to 3 per round.

Type: Hachimon Tonkou

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

As Sei-mon Kai, except as above, and you open the Harm Gate, improving the bonuses to +6 Strength and Dexterity, and +20 ft land speed. Your Chakra Signature increases by two steps, and the temporary Chakra gained increases to 12. In addition, you gain a +4 bonus to Initiative, as well as Balance, Climb, Jump, Swim and Tumble checks.

The damage you take increases to 5 damage per round, and the fatigue lasts for 10 minutes after the encounter ends. The save DC is unchanged (20), but even on a successful save you will be fatigued until the end of the encounter. If the Gate was open for more than 1 round, you take a cumulative -2 penalty to all ability scores for 24 hours after the Gate closes.

Mastery: The second step allows you to activate this technique as part of opening a greater Gate. Doing so will not grant you its benefits, nor will it have you suffer from any of its penalties.

The fifth step reduces damage taken to 4 per round, limits the penalty to ability scores to -4, and you recover from the penalty to ability scores after 8 hours of rest.

Type: Hachimon Tonkou

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 4
