Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

As Shou-Mon Kai, except as above, and you open the Limit Gate, improving the bonuses to +8 Strength and Dexterity, and +30 ft land speed. Your Chakra Signature increases by two steps and can no longer be suppressed. The temporary Chakra gained increases to 16.

The damage you take increases to 6 damage per round. The save DC increases to 25, and you become exhausted until 30 minutes after the encounter ends on a failed save instead. The penalty to ability scores increases to -4.

Mastery: The second step allows you to activate this technique as part of opening a greater Gate. Doing so will not grant you its benefits, nor will it have you suffer from any of its penalties.

The fifth step reduces damage taken to 5 per round, and reduced the penalty to ability scores after use to -2.

Type: Hachimon Tonkou

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 5

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

As To-mon Kai, except as above, and you open the View Gate, improving the bonuses to +8 Strength and Dexterity, +30 ft land speed, and the temporary Chakra gained increases to 20. You also gain 3 temporary Chakra each round, but the bonuses to Initiative or skill checks from To-Mon Kai are not applied. The damage you take increases to 7 damage per round. When the View Gate closes, make a Fortitude save (DC 28). If you succeed, you are exhausted until the end of the encounter. Otherwise, your HP is reduced to 0 and you are exhausted until you rest for 8 hours.

If the Gate was open for more than 1 round, you take a cumulative -6 penalty to all ability scores for 24 hours after the Gate closes, and you take 50% increased damage from all sources for 1 minute after it closes.

Mastery: The second step allows you to activate this technique as part of opening a greater Gate. Doing so will not grant you its benefits, nor will it have you suffer from any of its penalties.

The fifth step reduces damage taken to 6 per round, reduces the penalty to ability scores to -2 (still cumulative), and you will not suffer extra damage once the Gate closes.

Type: Hachimon Tonkou

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 5

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

As Kei-mon Kai, except as above, and you open the Wonder Gate, improving the bonuses to +10 Strength and Dexterity, +30 ft land speed, and the temporary Chakra gained increases to 24. You do not gain temporary Chakra per round, but do gain a +8 bonus to Initiative, as well as to Balance, Climb, Jump, Swim and Tumble checks, and are covered in a cloak of blazing Chakra, causing you to fail all Hide checks. When opening the Wonder Gate, adjacent creatures take 1d10 force damage, and are knocked back based on their size: Medium-size or smaller (30 ft), Large (20 ft), Huge (10 ft), Gargantuan or larger (no knockback).

The damage you take increases to 8 damage per round. When the Wonder Gate closes, you are exhausted until the end of the encounter, plus 1 hour afterward (Fortitude DC 30 negates).

If the Gate was open for more than 1 round, you take a cumulative -8 penalty to all ability scores for 24 hours after the Gate closes, and you take 50% increased damage from all sources for 1 minute after it closes.

Mastery: The fifth step reduces damage taken to 7 per round, reduces the penalty to ability scores to -4 (still cumu-lative), and you will not suffer extra damage once the Gate closes.

name: SHUUGYOU: RENGE HENSHOU (TRAINING: THE LOTUS BLOOMS TWICE)

description.value:
Type: Training (Taijutsu)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: Mas

Whenever you would suffer an ability score penalty when closing a Gate, you can spend 3 Chakra to reduce the penalty by 1. You may do this up to two times each time such a penalty is gained.

Mastery: The first, third and fifth steps allow you to repeat this process two additional times each (up to 8 times total).

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 1

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 14

Components: F, Mas, Mob

You must be standing on a firm or hard earthen surface to use this technique (such as rock or stone). You slam your weapon into the ground, sending out a burst of debris that deals 1d4 earth damage per 2 levels (maximum 4d4) to the creature in the area that is closest to you.

Mastery: The first step increases the range to 40 ft. The fifth step allows you to increase the Perform Requirements by 5 to make the technique 'safe': It will not reduce a creature below 0 HP. However, doing so also incurs a -1 penalty to damage per damage die.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 1

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 15

Components: F, Mas, Mob

This technique requires that the weapon used be sheathed inside a hard sheath (such as wood or metal). With your hand on the sheath, you flick your thumb and send the weapon flying. Make a ranged attack against the target, which deals 1 die of damage per 2

levels (up to 4 dice). The damage die is either d3 is the weapon is Small or smaller, or d4 otherwise. In addition, the target is stunned for 1 round on hit (Fortitude negates).

On a hit, the weapon used will fall to the ground in the target's square: If you move to an adjacent square in the same round and are moving at Speed Rank 1 or higher, you may catch the weapon by making a melee touch attack against a touch Defense of 15, which will not provoke attacks of opportunity. If the attack missed, the weapon falls in a square 10 ft directly behind the target (relative to you).

Mastery: The second step allows you to increase the Perform Requirements by 4 to make the technique deal non-lethal damage.

name: HITEN MITSURUGI RYU: HIKEN - KUZU RYU SEN (HITEN MITSURUGI STYLE: SECRET TECHNIQUE - NINE-HEADED DRAGON FLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 5

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 29

Components: F, Mas, Mob, P

You make nine attacks against the target, at your highest attack bonus. Only the first attack benefits from any charge bonuses, and every other attack suffers a cumulative -1 penalty to attack (-1 for the second attack, -2 for the third, etc). The attacks gain Kawarimi Defense 2, which increases by 1 each time an attack hits (up to Kawarimi Defense 9).

Each hit deals 1d8 damage of a type appropriate to the weapon used (doubled on critical hits). The ninth attack's critical threat range increases by 4, and it deals triple damage on a confirmed critical hit.

You may continue to move past your opponent once the attacks are made (if you have any movement left), without provoking any attacks of opportunity from it.

Mastery: The fourth step increases the base damage per hit to 1d10.

name: HITEN MITSURUGI RYU NO HIKEN: AMA KAKERU RYU NO HIRAMEKI (HITEN MITSURUGI STYLE SUCCESSION TECHNIQUE: HEAVEN'S SOARING DRAGON FLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 18

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 6

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 34

Components: C, F, Mas, Mob

This ultimate technique of the Hiten Mitsurugi style is the reason why there is only one master and one student at any time, as the technique is passed on only in a fight to the death between master and student. Should the student live, they are the new master. Should the student fail, they die, and the master will find a new student to teach.

You muse be moving at Speed Rank 4 or higher, and your weapon must be sheathed in a solid sheath. Make an attack against the target, which must make a Fortitude save. If the target fails, it is slain immediately. If the target succeeds, it suffers 8d6 damage of a type appropriate for your weapon, and an additional 5d6 damage of the same type on its next turn (Fortitude halves the additional damage). If the attack misses, the target loses its Dexterity bonus to Defense (Reflex negates), and you make a second attack at a -5 penalty, whose effects are as the first attack, but the save DC is decreased by 5, and the damage suffered on a successful save is reduced to 6d6, plus 4d6 additional damage the next turn.

You become fatigued once this technique has finished, and your katana will be unsheathed and held in hand. If used while fatigued, you take a -4 penalty to meet the Perform Requirements. If used while exhausted, you take a -8 penalty to meet the Perform Requirements, fall unconscious for 1d4 hours after using the technique, and will be exhausted once you wake.

If you fail to meet the Perform Requirements when attempting to perform this technique, you provoke attacks of opportunity, fall prone, and lose your Dexterity bonus to Defense until your next turn.

This technique's Rank counts as 12 for the purpose of its Learn DC and identifying it.

Mastery: Each step reduces the attack penalty to the second attack by -1, and increases the save DC of the second attack by 1 (thus improving it to be identical to the first attack at the fifth step).

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: F, Mas, Mob

You make a melee attack against the target with your held weapon, suffering a -4 penalty to attack and damage rolls. You may take a 5 ft step before or after the attack. This can be done even if you've already moved this turn, and will not prevent you from moving normally this turn.

Once per round, if an opponent misses you with a melee attack, this technique can be used as an instant action to counter-attack. Doing so works as above, but the penalties are halves. This attack counts as an attack of opportunity (and so cannot be used if you have none remaining this round).

You cannot use both this technique and an avoid an attack or defensive maneuver technique in response to the same attack.

Mastery: The fifth step reduces the normal penalties to -2 (and thus, the instant action penalties to -1).

name: RYU KAN SEN KOGARASHI (WITHERING COILING DRAGON FLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: F, Mob

This technique functions as Ryu Kan Sen, except as above. The penalty is reduced to -2 when used as an attack action. If used as an instant action, you suffer no penalties. The attack will deal an additional d6 damage on hit (of a type appropriate for the weapon used).

name: RYU KAN SEN TSUMUJI (COILING DRAGON SPINNING FLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: F, Mas, Mob

While based on Ryu Kan Sen, this technique is not a counter-attack, but simply a powerful offensive attack. If you are moving at a Speed Rank lower than 2, you take a -5 penalty to meet the Perform Requirements per Speed Rank you are below 2. You initiate a basic charge attack, but when you reach the target you spin rapidly and make a Kenjutsu: Iaido attack (with any charge bonuses), which deals 1d6 additional damage per 3 levels (maximum 4d6). In addition, if the target is hit it will be thrown upward 1d4 x 5 ft.

You cannot deal non-lethal damage with this technique.

Mastery: The second, fourth and fifth steps grant a +1, +2 and +3 bonus (respectively) to the attack roll made for this technique.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, F, Mob

This technique is the style's only noutoujutsu (swordsheathing technique), which allows you to sheathe your weapon at incredible speed, creating a shockwave that is amplified by your Chakra. As such, the weapon used must be unsheathed when using this technique, and will be sheathed once the technique has been performed.

The shockwave deals 1d6 sonic damage per 2 levels (maximum 5d6; Fortitude halves). Creatures damaged are stunned for 1 round (Fortitude negates).

Creatures within 50 ft suffer a -2 penalty to Listen checks for one round (Fortitude DC 15 negates).

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: F, Mob

To use this technique, the target must be of the same size category as you, and you must wield the weapon used with two hands. The technique cannot be used on a moving (or falling) target. Make a melee attack against the target, which will deal 1d4 additional slashing damage per 2 levels (up to 5d4) on hit. In addition, the target is thrown upwards 1d3 x 5 ft, losing its Dexterity bonus to Defense and becoming unable to act until it starts falling on its next turn.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: F, Mob

You must be proficient in the weapon used in order to use this technique. You make a Full Attack against the target, gaining an additional attack at your highest attack bonus. All attacks made this round suffer a -2 penalty to the attack roll. Additional attacks do not stack with other non-permanent additional attacks (such as from other techniques).

name: RYU SOU SEN GARAMI (DEADLY DOUBLE DRAGON FLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 212

Components: None

This technique functions as Ryu Sou Sen, except as above. You must be moving at Speed Rank 1 or higher to use this technique. You attack the target (as per Ryu Sou Sen). Your critical threat range increases by 1 for these attacks, and the damage die of your weapon increases by one size (d6 becomes d8, 2d6 becomes 2d8, etc).

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: F, Mas, Mob

You perform a powerful leaping strike, harnessing your momentum for increasing damage. You must wield your weapon with two hands in order to use this technique properly. Make a charge attack against the target, and make a Jump check while doing so. The attack gains a bonus to the attack rolls and bonus damage based on the result, as shown on the left.

| Jump | Damage | Attack |
|--------|----------|----------|
| ≤ 14 | 1d6 | +1 |
| 15-24 | 2d6 | +2 |
| 25-34 | 3d6 | +2 |
| 35-39 | 4d6 | +3 |
| ≥ 40 | 5d6 | +4 |

The additional damage cannot exceed 1d6 per 3 levels, and is of a type appropriate to the weapon used. On hit, the target will fall prone (Fortitude negates). You cannot make this attack if there is not enough room to Jump, based on the Jump result (D20 Modern, p65, high jump; p36 ND20).

Mastery: The third step allows you to use this technique (and make the jump) without a charge. Doing so increases the Perform Requirements by 8.

name: RYU TSUI SEN ZAN (SLAYING DRAGON HAMMER FLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: None

This technique functions as Ryu Tsui Sen, but is much more powerful, increasing its results (as below) and increasing the limit of the bonus damage to 1d6 per 2 levels.

| Jump | Damage | Attack | Jump | Damage | Attack |
|--------|----------|----------|--------|----------|----------|
| ≤ 14 | 2d6 | +1 | 30-34 | 6d6 | +4 |
| 15-19 | 3d6 | +2 | 35-39 | 7d6 | +4 |
| 20-24 | 4d6 | +2 | 40-44 | 8d6 | +5 |
| 25-29 | 5d6 | +3 | ≥ 45 | 9d6 | +6 |

name: RYU TSUI SHOU SEN (RISING DRAGON HAMMER FLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 2

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: F, Mob

This simple yet powerful combination attack starts with you executing an attack as though performing Ryu Tsui Sen. On hit, the target is not knocked prone, however, but loses its Dexterity bonus to Defense against the second hit of this combo (no save). Immediately after the first attack, you follow up with a second one (even if the first attack missed), this time making an attack as though performing Ryu Shou Sen, though you suffer a 5 penalty to the attack roll. The distance the target is thrown increases to 1d4 x 5 ft, and it will end up prone once it lands.

Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 1

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 14

Components: C, Mob

As long as you are moving at Speed Rank 1 or higher, you gain the benefits of the Cleave feat (D20 Modern, p. 81). This stance does not end if you move at a lower Speed Rank, though it offers no benefit until you start moving at Speed Rank 1 or higher again.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: F, Mob

To use this technique, your katana must be sheathed in a solid sheath (such as wood or metal). You make an attack against the target, as though performing Kenjutsu: Iaido. Regardless of the result, you make a second attack with the sword's sheath at a -4 penalty, which is treated as a katana of one (metal) or two (wooden) sizes smaller than the katana it is paired with.

Unlike Iaido, this technique cannot be used as part of a charge. When this technique has been performed, your katana will be unsheathed, and you will hold the sheath in your off-hand.

name: SOU RYU SEN IKAZUCHI (TWIN DRAGON THUNDER FLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: F, Mas, Mob

This technique functions as Sou Ryu Sen, except as above, and you swap the attacks, making the sheath attack first. If the sheath attack hits, the target is denied its Dexterity bonus to Defense against the Iaido attack.

Mastery: The third step allows you to increase the Perform Requirements by 8 and the Cost by 5 to have the Iaido attack also target any creatures adjacent to the target, though doing so will cause you to suffer a -4 penalty to hit with that attack. If you fail to meet the higher Perform Requirements but do meet the normal ones, you perform this technique as normal, without its enhanced effects (at the normal Cost).

Type: Ninjutsu (Shadow)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: H

You make your own shadow wrap around your body and make erratic movements, confusing your foes and granting you 15% concealment against melee attacks unless the attacker makes a save to keep focused enough to ignore the shadow. A successful save makes the attacker immune for a single round, after which it must save again when it attacks.

Blind creatures are immune to this technique.

name: NINPOU: KAGE NUI (NINJA ART: SHADOW NEEDLES)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Shadow)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: H, Mas

You manipulate a shadow within range, forming shadowy needles that can attack once, with a range of 10 ft. A shadow needle has a +10 attack bonus, and deals 1d6+1 damage (half slashing, half piercing). If a creature affected by Kage Mane no Jutsu is damaged by a shadow needle, this damage is not shared or transferred to any other creature caught in the technique, nor to the technique's user.

A single shadow can be used to create 1 shadow needle, plus 1 per size category it is larger than Fine. Each needle costs 2 Chakra. You cannot create more than 1 needle per level.

Mastery: The fifth step increases the needles' attack bonus to +15.

Type: Ninjutsu (Shadow)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, H

You animate your shadow, which grasps the object and will attack with it, using your attack bonus(es), though the shadow does not add any damage bonuses (except those that belong to the weapon itself). The shadow will not stray further than 5 ft from you, but will deanimate if you die or become unconscious. While the shadow is animated, you can grab the weapon it holds as a free action, though doing so will immediately deanimate the shadow. You cannot control more than one shadow created by this technique at the same time.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: F, Mob

You throw three projectiles of Small or smaller size. The attacks are made at your highest attack bonus, though the second and third attacks suffer a -5 and -10 penalty to hit, respectively. The range depends on the weapon(s) used. Each attack may target a different creature, if you wish.

You may throw objects or non-throwing weapons as improvised weapons, which will have a range increment of 5 ft, suffer a -4 penalty to hit, and will deal damage based on their size category (thrown weapons that aren't throwing weapons do not deal their normal damage).

Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, Mob

You hold potent Chakra in your extremities. Your unarmed attacks count as armed and deal lethal damage, plus an additional 1 bonus force damage on hit.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: F, Mas, Mob

You must be outside to use this technique, and most (or all) of the sky must be covered in clouds for this technique to work. You call forth lightning to surge into your weapon, which allows you to deal 3d6 bonus electric damage the next time you hit with it. If you hit a creature that is soaking wet or wearing a lot of metal, it is also stunned for 1d3 rounds (Fortitude negates). CR applies to the entire effect.

Mastery: The third step allows you to ignore the required weather conditions. The fifth step also allows you to use this technique indoors.

The mastery for Raimeiken also affects Raimeiken Ni no Tachi, and vice versa.

name: KEN: RAIMEIKEN NI NO TACHI (SWORD: LIGHTNING CUTTER SECOND STRIKE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, E, F, Mas, Mob

This technique is an advanced version of Raimeiken, and carries the same limitations as it does. However, instead of enhancing your next attack, you fire a ray of lightning at the target, which deals 4d6 electric damage on hit. If the target is soaking wet or wearing a lot of metal, it is stunned for 1d3 rounds (Fortitude negates).

If the target is possessed by a spell, technique or ability, you may choose to damage the creature pos-sessing it instead. If you do, the target is automatically stunned (as above), without gaining a chance to save against it.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 10d6 total.

Mastery: This technique's mastery is identical to Raimeiken's. The mastery of this technique also affects Raimeiken, and vice versa.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: F, Mob

Make an attack against the target. If the attack hits, it will ignore 5 hardness or DR, and its base damage die increases by one size (d6 becomes d8, etc). If used against an object, it must be inanimate and unattended. The object must make a Fortitude save to avoid suffering 1d6 damage per level (maximum 10d6) which ignores all hardness.

name: KEN: ZANGANKEN NI NO TACHI (SWORD: STONE CUTTER SECOND STRIKE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: F, Mob

This technique functions as Zanganken, but you can make a second Zanganken attack against any inanimate object(s) in the square directly behind the target. You may choose to leave the target completely unharmed, only attacking the object(s) behind them.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, E, F, Mob

You gather Chakra into your weapon, refining it into a spiritual edge that you swing down, creating a shimmering, golden ray. If it hits an animal, elemental, humanoid, magical beast, monstrous humanoid or outsider, it deals 2d6 force damage. You may use this technique as a full-round action instead. If you do, instead of firing a ray, you swing your sword and make a melee attack that will deal 2d6 additional force damage if it hits a creature of the appropriate creature type.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 10d6 damage total.

name: KEN: ZANMAKEN NI NO TACHI (SWORD: DEMON SLAYING SWORD SECOND STRIKE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, E, F, Mob

This technique functions as Zanmaken, except if a ray is fired, it may pass through any organic matter (including creatures) to reach its intended target, though you suffer a -1 penalty to hit for each creature it passes through. The damage (or bonus damage if used as a melee attack) increases to 4d6 force damage. Using this technique as a melee attack will not increase its perform time.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 15d6 damage total, whichever is lower.

name: NAGEWAZA: UKIGUMO TSUMUJIISEN (GRAPPLE: FLOATING CLOUD TWISTING FLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: Mob

In order to use this technique, you must be grappling with the target, the target must be within 1 size category of you, and neither of you can be prone or pinned. Both you and the target twist several times in midair, both falling prone. As a result, the target will be pinned by you, and suffers 1d4 bludgeoning damage per 5 levels (Reflex halves the damage).

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, F, Mob

You swing your Chakra-infused blade in a downward motion, creating a blast of wind carrying your Chakra, which takes the shape of numerous cherry blossom petals. Once it arrives at its destination, it turns into a whirlwind that slashes everything within.

Make a melee attack against each creature in the area, which deals 3d6+3 slashing damage on hit. Any creature in the area (even if missed) is also blown upward 5 ft per two levels (Fortitude negates), and will begin to fall until their initiative count (even if they do not get a turn).

name: SEN: JAKUZANKUUSEN (FLASH: WEAK SEVERING AIR FLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, Mob

You make a (ranged) touch attack against the target. If it hits, the target is thrown back 1d6 x 5 ft if you used a melee touch attack or 1d4 x 5 ft if you made a ray attack. If the target collides with an object larger than it, it suffers 1d4 bludgeoning damage per 10 ft travelled, and falls prone in front of the object, not travelling further.

target.value: One M-sized or smaller, non-living creature or object

name: SEN: KAKUSAN ZANKOUSEN (FLASH: SCATTERED SEVERING LIGHT FLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, Mob

You make a Full Attack, converting any number of attacks into Zankousen attacks at the cost of 3 Chakra per attack. This technique cannot benefit from additional attacks by the use of techniques like Renzuki or Tsubaki no Mai.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, Mob

You focus Chakra into your weapon, allowing you to make a melee attack at a target at range. If the attack hits, it deals 1d4 force damage, and the target must make a save to avoid their held weapon(s) take 1 damage per level (maximum 10), which bypasses all hardness. Weapons with mastercraft qualities or weapon seals are unaffected.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 1

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 14

Components: C, Mob

You focus Chakra through your body or through a held weapon, firing off swirling rays of condensed air. Each 'flash' is a ray attack that will deal 1d4 force da-mage on hit. In addition, each hit will throw the target back 5 ft (Fortitude negates). In addition, targets hit must make a Fortitude save for each ray to avoid being stunned for 1 round by the pain (non-cumulative). You can make up to 1 ray attack per 2 levels.

name: SEN: ZANKUUSEN KAI (FLASH: REVISED SEVERING AIR FLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, Mob

This technique functions as Zankuusen, except as above. The maximum number of rays is 1 per 3 levels, and each ray deals 1d6+1 force damage. The knockback increases to 10 ft, and the DC to avoid being stunned increases to 12.

name: SEN: ZANKUUSEN NI NO TACHI (FLASH: SEVERING AIR FLASH SECOND STRIKE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 3

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 24

Components: C, Mob

This technique functions like Zankuusen. The maximum number of rays is 1 per 4 levels, and each ray deals 1d6+2 force damage. The knockback increases to 15 ft and the DC to avoid being stunned increases to 14. You may have the rays pass through any organic matter (including creatures) on their way to their intended target(s), though each creature they pass through will apply a cumulative -1 penalty to the attack roll for that ray attack.

name: SEN: ZANMAKEN NI NO TACHI ISSEN (FLASH: THOUSAND DEMON SLAYING SWORD SECOND STRIKE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 5

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 29

Components: C, E, F, Mob

This technique functions as Zanmaken Ni no Tachi, except that when the ray hits, it bounces to the nearest creature that meets its criteria, and will continue to bounce until there are no more available targets, until it has hit 1 target per 4 levels, or until it would deal no damage. The damage is rolled once. Each bounce, the damage is halved (rounded down). You must still make an attack roll for each bounce.

If a bounce misses, it will still bounce to another target. The ray will not bounce to creatures it has already (tried to) hit. The penalty to hit for passing through other creatures still applies.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 18d6 damage total, whichever is lower.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 4

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, Mob

Make a melee attack against all creatures in the area, which will deal half damage and knock back targets hit for 1d3 x 5 ft. Targets hit are also knocked prone (Fortitude negates). You may use this technique against inanimate, unattended objects of Medium-size or smaller.

name: SHINMEI RYU KESSEN OUGI: SHIN RAIKOUKEN (VOICE OF HEAVEN STYLE ABSOLUTE FIGHTING SKILL: TRUE LIGHTNING SLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 4

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 29

Components: F, Mob

One of the most destructive techniques of the Shinmei Ryu style, it combines various techniques with advanced Chakra Control to imbue your weapon with excessive amounts of energy. The next attack you make with the weapon is greatly enhanced, striking with extreme velocity and unleashing a burst of power. The attack will gain Kawarimi Defense 3. Whether the attack hits or misses, a burst of energy is unleashed, dealing 4d8 electric and 4d8 force damage to all creatures and unattended objects in a 40 ft radius sphere around you, which does not affect you.

A Reflex save can be made to halve each type of damage. If the target was hit by the first melee strike, it receives a -4 penalty to those saves.

name: SHINMEI RYU OUGI: SEN - MESSETSU ZANKUU ZANMASEN (VOICE OF HEAVEN STYLE SECRET SKILL: FLASH - DEMON CRUSHING AIR VOID FLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, E, F, Mob

This technique combines various skills of the Shinmei Ryu styles and has you fire a condensed blast of Chakra.

If you are not wielding the weapon used in two hands, the Perform Requirements increase by 4.

You wave your weapon, sending forth a wave of energy that explodes, dealing 3d6 slashing, 3d6 bludgeoning and 3d6 force damage to creatures within the area.

The blast damages unattended objects and completely ignores cover.

Alternatively, you can make a melee attack against the target, dealing normal damage. The area of the blast will center around the target, but you will be unaffected. If the target was hit, it suffers a -4 penalty to its Reflex save. If the attack missed, the save DC is decreased by 2, and you suffer a -2 penalty to Defense until your next turn.

Empower: Spend 4 Chakra to increase the damage of each type by 1d6, up to a maximum of 5d6 damage per damage type.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, E, Mob

You fire a small bullet of shimmering, white Chakra from your palm. Make a ray attack against the target, suffering a -2 penalty to hit if you do not have at least two hands free. The bullet deals 2d6 force damage, though you may choose to have it deal non-lethal damage without the usual penalties.

Alternatively, you may use this technique to enhance an unarmed melee attack, causing it to deal an additional 1d6 force damage and push the target back 10 ft. If performed this way, you suffer a -4 penalty to meet the Perform Requirements, and the technique cannot be empowered.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 5d6 damage total.

name: SHOU: ZANKUUSHOU SAN (PALM: SCATTERED CRUSHING AIR PALM)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, E, Mob

You make a Full Attack, either all with Chakra Bullets or all with enhancedunarmed strikes, each attack working like with Zankuushou, except as follows:

The bulllets deal 1d4 force damage, or melee attacks are enhanced with 1d4 additional force damage. The knockback the target suffers takes effect after all attacks are finished.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage of a single bullet or attack by 1d4, up to 3d4 total per bullet or attack.

name: SHOU: ZANMASHOU NI NO TACHI (PALM: DEMON CRUSHING PALM SECOND STRIKE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 5

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, Mob

Despite its fearsome name, this technique is reasonably harmless. You gather Chakra in your palm and push it forward with force, shredding the target's clothing. Any piece of equipment that can be considered clothing, which includes fabric and plastic armor, is completely destroyed.

Leather equipment and mastercraft equipment is unaffected, as is more resilient gear.

name: ZAN: HIENBATTOU KASUMIKIRI (SLASH: FLYING SPARROW MIST CUT)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: F, Mas, Mob

You must be wielding two weapons to use this technique. Make a normal attack with each weapon (incurring normal penalties for doing so), which will target all creatures in the target square.

Mastery: The second step grants the attacks Kawarimi Defense 1, and allows you to use the technique if both weapons are sheathed, though the Perform Requirements increase by 4 when doing so.

name: ZAN: HYAKURETSU OUKAZAN (SLASH: HUNDRED RAGING CHERRY BLOSSOMS STRIKE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: F, Mob

You focus your Chakra around you, into razor-sharp cherry blossom petals that create a swirling, destructive storm that can shred your enemies to bits. Make a melee attack against all creatures inside the area, which deals 2d6 x 1d4 damage, increasing to 2d6 x 1d4+1 on a critical hit. The attack benefits from Kawarimi Defense 2.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: F, Mob

Make a melee attack against the target, which deals normal damage. If the creature is draconic or reptilian in nature, the attack deals additional damage based on the creature's size (as shown below), and provokes a save against Massive Damage.

The bonus damage is as follows: 4d4 (Small or smaller), 4d6 (Medium), Large (4d8), Huge (4d10), Gargantuan or larger (4d12).

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 3

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 19

Components: F, Mob

Make a single attack that deals 1d6 damage per 3 levels if it hits (maximum 5d6).

Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, H, Mas

Choose an element: cold, earth, electricity, fire, water or wind. Your body glows with a faint hue with a color according to your element, and your hands are covered by elemental energy, allowing you to make touch attacks that deal 2d6 damage of the chosen energy type, which benefits from damage bonuses to unarmed attacks or elemental damage you may have (though attack bonuses to unarmed attacks do not apply). While in this stance, you apply your Dexterity bonus to attack rolls instead of your Strength modifier.

Entering this stance in melee provokes attacks of opportunity, and you suffer 1d4 damage each round while the stance is active.

Mastery: The second step allows you to ignore taking damage from this stance each round.

The fifth step allows you to deal 1d6 of two chosen elements instead of 2d6 of a single element.

Type: Taijutsu (Mobility)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: Mob

You must be in the Shunpo stance to use this technique. You take a number of Shunpo leaps equal to a move action in a straight line, and each creature standing adjacent to a square you pass through suffers 3d6 damage and is pushed back 5 feet. Unlike normal Shunpo movement, you can be easily spotted while moving.

You can make fewer leaps if you wish, though you must make at least 2 leaps.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: Mob

Make a melee attack that deals normal damage and cannot score a critical hit. If the target is hit, it will lose any benefit from having used the Total Defense action (if it was benefiting from it), and must make a Fortitude save or be unable to use the action until your next turn.

name: BUNKAI SABAKI NO JUTSU (MOVEMENT ANALYSIS TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C

You study the target, which must be using a Stance technique. As long as the opponent remains in the same stance, you gain a +2 insight bonus to attack and damage rolls against them.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: Mob

This technique must be used within 1 round of the target having missed a charge attack against you. Make a melee attack against the target that deals normal damage, and allows you to make a free trip attempt against the target without provoking an attack of opportunity.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: F, Mob, Mas

You make a charge attack with your weapon. If it hits, the attack deals double damage, and all damage becomes piercing damage. Any damage that would not be multiplied on critical hits is not doubled. This technique can be used once per encounter.

Mastery: The first, third and fifth step increase the number of uses per encounter by one each.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: None

This technique functions the same as Gatotsu: Isshiki except as above, and if the attack hits, the target must make a save to avoid falling prone and taking 1d6 additional damage. This technique can be used once per encounter, and cannot be used on creatures that are not flying, swimming or moving underground.

Mastery: The first, third and fifth step increase the number of uses per encounter by one each.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: F, Mob

If the target was falling (uncontrollably), it takes additional d6 damage.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: F, Mob

Only usable after you miss with a charge attack made for Gatotsu: Isshiki or Gatotsu: Nishiki, you salvage the situation and make a normal melee attack with your weapon at your highest attack bonus -5. This technique can be used once per encounter.

Mastery: The second and fourth step increase the number of uses per encounter by one each.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: Mob

The most basic of iron fist strikes, this technique allows you to make a single unarmed attack, gaining a +1 bonus to the damage roll on hit.

name: GOUKEN: KONOHA DAISENPUU (IRON FIST: LEAF'S GREAT SPINNING WIND)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: Mob

Make a Full Attack against the target. Each attack deals normal damage (unless otherwise specified) and gains the following benefits:

- 1 st Attack gains a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.
- 2 nd Attack knocks back the target 5 ft once all attacks have been made.
- 3 rd Attack deals damage as though you were one size category larger.
- 4 th Attack knocks the target prone (Reflex negates). The target may choose to make a Tumble check opposed by your attack roll instead of making a save.
- 5 th Attack and higher will stun the target for 1 round (Fortitude negates), the duration is cumulative.

This technique does not grant you more attacks than normal, but you may use this technique as a free action if you also use the Renzuki technique, using the Full Attack for this technique.

You suffer a -4 penalty to Learn checks when learning this technique if you do not have the Gouken feat.

name: GOUKEN: KONOHA GOURIKI SENPUU (IRON FIST: LEAF'S HERCULEAN SPINNING WIND)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: None

This technique functions as Gouken: Konoha Senpuu, except as above. Your reach increases by 5 ft for these attacks, you count as one size category larger when determining your damage die, and creatures hit are knocked back 5 ft. You suffer a -4 penalty to Learn checks when learning this technique if you do not have the Gouken feat.

name: GOUKEN: KONOHA KAIGANSHOU (IRON FIST: LEAF'S BOULDER BUSTER)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 3

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 24

Components: Mob

You plant your elbow into the target, delivering a powerful blow. The attack cannot target held objects, but ignores any hardness of 8 or lower when striking other objects. Make an unarmed attack that deals 4d6 bonus damage, plus 1d6 per 4 levels (up to 9d6 total bonus damage). If you use the Power Attack feat, you gain a +2 damage bonus per point of attack penalty taken instead of the normal bonuses from that feat. This attack can be made as part of a charge.

If hit, the target is knocked back a number of feet equal to the damage done (rounded down to the nearest 5 ft increment) (Fortitude negates). If the target hits a solid object of its size or larger, it suffers 2d6 fall damage, as though it had fallen 20 ft. You suffer a -4 penalty to Learn checks when learning this technique if you do not have the Gouken feat.

name: GOUKEN: KONOHA REPPUU (IRON FIST: LEAF'S VIOLENT WIND)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: Mob

Make a trip attempt against the target that does not provoke an attack of opportunity. If successful, you receive an attack of opportunity against the target. You suffer a -4 penalty to Learn checks when learning this technique if you do not have the Gouken feat.

name: GOUKEN: KONOHA SENPUU (IRON FIST: LEAF'S SPINNING WIND)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: Mob

Make an unarmed attack against all adjacent creatures, which deals normal damage. Feats like Cleave or Great Cleave will not activate if you kill an enemy this way. You suffer a -4 penalty to Learn checks when learning this technique if you do not have the Gouken feat.

name: GOUKEN: KONOHA SHOUFUU (IRON FIST: LEAF'S RISING GUST)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: Mob

Make an unarmed attack that, if it hits, deals normal damage and grants you a free disarm attempt against the target,without provoking an attack of opportunity. You suffer a -4 penalty to Learn checks when learning this technique if you do not have the Gouken feat.

name: GOUKEN: SHIN TAIHOUKEN (IRON FIST: TRUE FIST ROCKET)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: None

This technique functions as Gouken: Taihouken, except as above, and the bonus damage becomes 3d6, plus 1d6 per 4 levels (up to 8d6 total bonus damage). On a failed save, the target is knocked back 20 ft and falls prone. You suffer a -4 penalty to Learn checks when learning this technique if you do not have the Gouken feat.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: Mob

Make a single unarmed attack against the target, which deals 1d6 bonus damage per 3 levels (maximum 3d6). If the attack hits, the target is knocked back 10 ft (Fortitude negates). You suffer a -4 penalty to Learn checks when learning this technique if you do not have the Gouken feat.

name: HIKEN DACHI: BANKYOU HEBI (SECRET STANCE: COILED SERPENT)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: C, Mob

This stance has you hunch up, bringing your limbs close and then lashing out like a snake. Unarmed attacks and attacks with Tiny or smaller melee weapons have their attack rolls modified by Dexterity instead of Strength. In addition, you gain a +1 bonus to Defense against attacks of opportunity when you make grapple or disarm attempts.

name: HIKEN DACHI: HACHIDORI NO YARI (SECRET STANCE: LANCE OF THE HUMMINGBIRD)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, Mob

This stance requires you wield a single melee weapon of a size category smaller than you and have at least one hand free. It is designed to help fight wielders of large weapons, keeping them in close quarters. This stance only provides a benefit against your Dodge target, provided they wield a reach weapon. When in a square adjacent to them, if they move away from you to attack you (even a 5 ft step), you may make an attack of opportunity of attack against them before they make the attack. The exception is if they take a withdrawal action.

Movement through instant transportation (such as the Shunshin no Jutsu or Hiyruusen no Jutsu techniques) will not provoke an attack of opportunity.

name: HIKEN DACHI: SHOUJA (SECRET STANCE: SMALL SERPENT)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 12 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 11

Components: Mob

You crouch low, lashing out and retreating as you attack like a cobra. Unarmed attacks have their attack rolls modified by Dexterity instead of Strength, and you gain a +1 bonus to Defense against trip attempts.

name: HIKEN DACHI: TORAGEKI (SECRET STANCE: STRIKING TIGER)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, Mob

You do not suffer the usual penalties for fighting while prone, and may have your melee attack rolls be modified by Dexterity instead of Strength.

name: HIKEN DACHI: YASEI KUMA (SECRET STANCE: WILD BEAR)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 12 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 11

Components: Mob

You move slow but steady, emulating the thrashing attacks of a wild bear. You take a -2 penalty to Defense, but gain a +2 bonus to grapple checks and a +1 bonus to unarmed attack damage. All melee attack rolls are modified by Strength (if they weren't already).

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: F, Mob

You make an exceptionally powerful strike with your held weapon, which deals an additional 1d6 damage per 3 levels (maximum 3d6) and knocks the target prone if it fails its save.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: F, Mob

You make a melee attack with a held weapon, which deals an additional 1d6 damage per 5 levels (maximum 4d6, not multiplied on critical hits). On hit, the target is dealt 1 Strength damage per 2 levels (maximum 8) if it fails its save. This damage lasts 5 minutes. Each time a creature makes a successful save against this technique, it gains a +2 bonus to further saves against it for 24 hours.

name: HOKOJUTSU: KABUTO-KAKUSHI DACHI (ARMED TECHNIQUE: HELM SPLITTER STANCE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: Mob

While in this stance, any weapon attack made against a single creature (including Armed techniques) deals damage as though the weapon was one size larger. Applies only to attacks made with a melee weapon appropriately sized for you.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: F, Mob

You make a focused strike, dealing only half damage. If it hits and the target fails its save, it suffers a -1 penalty to Speed or Strength ranks (your choice) for 5 minutes, stacking up to two times. Each time a creature makes a successful save against this technique, it gains a +2 bonus to further saves against it for 24 hours.

name: HOKOJUTSU: SHIN DAIBUTSU (ARMED TECHNIQUE: AWESOME BLOW)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: None

This technique is identical to Hokojutsu: Daibutsu, but the bonus damage increases to 3d6, plus 1d6 per 4 levels (maximum 8d6 total).

name: HOKOJUTSU: SHINSATSU OUGI - OWARI BUTSU (ARMED TECHNIQUE: GODSLAYER SECRET SKILL - ULTIMATE STRIKE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 5

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: E, F, Mob

You strike a fearful blow, which deals 10d6 additional damage (not multiplied on critical hits).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 20d6 total (whichever is lower).

name: HOKOJUTSU HIKEN: YABUKI DACHI (ARMED SECRET TECHNIQUE: SPIRITUAL DESTROYER STANCE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 4

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 27

Components: Mob

While in this stance, any weapon attack made against a single creature (including Armed techniques) deals 1d6 additional damage (not multiplied on critical hits). If you score a critical hit with such an attack, it deals an additional 1d10 bonus damage per multiplier (so 1d10 on x2, 2d10 on x3, etc). This technique applies only to attacks made with a melee weapon appropriately sized for you.

name: IAIJUTSU: TSUKIZUKI (QUICK DRAW TECHNIQUE: MOON CLEAVER)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: E, F, Mob

This technique is identical to Kenjutsu: Iaido (p219). The attack and damage bonus increases by +1 per 6 levels, and the attack deals an additional 1d6 damage.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per 3 levels or 6d6 (whichever is lower).

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 5

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 31

Components: Mob

To use this technique, you must have a Speed Rank of 4 or higher active. You move forward up to 30 ft, making a series of extremely fast and subtle attacks. You can make a single melee attack against up to one creature per level inside the area (maximum 15).

These attacks cannot score a critical hit, and apply a number of sneak attack dice up to your Intelligence modifier (maximum 3d6). You do not provoke attacks of opportunity while moving this way.

area.value: 15 ft wide, up to 30 ft long Line *

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: C, Mob

You focus your energy into a limb and strike the ground, sending a shockwave through it. Creatures above ground fall prone and take 1d6 nonlethal damage (Reflex negates). Creatures underground suffer 3d6 nonlethal damage and are stunned for 1 round (Fortitude negates the stun). Creatures with the Tremorsense ability gain a +2 bonus to saves against this technique.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: Mob

This technique may be used only when making an attack of opportunity, and grants you a +2 bonus to the attack and damage roll for that attack.

name: JUURYU: RAIRI NETTOU (TEN-TON STYLE: LIGHTNING PLOW CLEAVER)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 15

Learn DC: 27 | Successes: 4

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 29

Components: E, H

This advanced form of Risai Butsu exerts such power that the target's chest cavity looks like it might cave in. This technique functions as Juuryu: Risai Butsu, except as noted above, and the attack instead deals unarmed damage as though you were two size categories larger, plus 2 per Strength Rank you currently benefit from. If hit, the target also suffers 1d6 damage per two levels (10d6 maximum; Fortitude halves).

Mastery: The third step has the target fall prone if they fail their Fortitude save.

The fifth step increases the bonus damage by 2d6, and increases the maximum bonus damage to 12d6.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: Mas, Mob

You strike a creature up to one size category larger than yourself with a simple lariat, making an unarmed attack that deals damage as though you were one size category larger, and deals 2 additional damage per Strength Rank you are currently benefiting from (maximum +6 damage).

This technique may be used as part of a charge.

Mastery: The third step allows you to make a trip attempt as a free action after the attack, without provoking an attack of opportunity.

name: JUURYU NAGE: GANSO BAKUDAN (TEN-TON STYLE THROW: POWERBOMB)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: E, Mob

This technique can only be used on a target that is a size category no larger than yours, which you must currently be in a grapple with. Make an opposed grapple check against the target. If it hits, you slam the opponent into the ground, dealing your unarmed attack damage, plus 1 per Strength and Speed Rank you are currently benefiting from (maximum +5). In addition, the target is staggered for two rounds (Fortitude negates).

The target is left prone after this technique hits, but both you and the target will no longer be grappled.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 4d6 bonus damage.

name: JUURYU NAGE: GOKUSHOU TSURIOTOSHI (TEN-TON STYLE THROW: SUPREME BODY SLAM)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 4

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 28

Components: None

As Juuryu Nage: Tsuriotoshi, except as above, and the target can also be one size category larger than you. The bonus damage improves to 6d6, and if you throw the target, the distance and additional damage are doubled (to 20 ft and 2d6). You may choose to perform this technique if you are not currently grappling the target. If you do, replace the opposed grapple check with initi- ating a grapple attempt which will not provoke attacks of opportunity.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the bonus damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 12d6 total bonus damage, whichever is lower.

name: JUURYU NAGE: KUBIWARI OTOSHI (TEN-TON STYLE THROW: SUPER CHOKE SLAM)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 11 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 4

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 28

Components: E, Mob

This technique can only be performed if the target is your size category or smaller. You must initiate a grapple attempt as normal against the target that, if successful, deals your unarmed attack damage, as though you were one size category larger, and deals 6d6 bonus damage. You do not provoke an attack of opportunity for trying to start a grapple this way. If hit, the target is knocked unconscious for 2 rounds, though a successful Fortitude save reduces this to being staggered and losing their Dexterity bonus to Defense for 1 round instead.

If you were already grappling the target, you only need to make a successful grapple check to perform the technique successfully.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the bonus damage by 1d6, up to 10d6 total bonus damage.

name: JUURYU NAGE: NODOWA OTOSHI (TEN-TON STYLE THROW: CHOKE SLAM)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: E, Mob

This technique can only be performed if the target creature is your size category or smaller, and you are in a grapple with them. Make a grapple check. If successful, you deal your normal unarmed attack damage plus 3d6, and the target is left prone and no longer grappled by you. In addition, the target loses their Dexterity bonus to Defense until its next turn (Fortitude negates).

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the bonus damage by 1d6, up to 5d6 total bonus damage.

name: JUURYU NAGE: RAIGA BAKUDAN (TEN-TON STYLE THROW: LIGHTNING CRASH SUPER BOMB)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 14

Learn DC: 29 | Successes: 4

Perform: 17 | Perform DC: 31

Components: E, Mob

This technique can only be performed if the target is your size category or smaller. If you are grappling the target, make an opposed grapple check. Otherwise, you must initiate a grapple after a 10 ft drop or while benefiting from Strength Rank 5 or greater. This does not provoke an attack of opportunity. If you succeed, you deal your unarmed attack damage as though you were one size category larger, and deal 1d6 bonus damage for each Strength and Speed Rank you currently benefit from (up to 20d6).

On hit, the target is left prone and stunned for 2 rounds. A successful Fortitude save leaves it prone and staggered for 2 rounds instead. Either way, the target is also left prone.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the bonus damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 20d6 total bonus damage.

name: JUURYUGYAKU: RAIGA HANGEKI (TEN-TON STYLE COUNTER: THUNDER PLOW COUNTER)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 18

Learn DC: 35 | Successes: 3

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: None

This technique functions as Shundou, except it can only be used to avoid an attack once per day. Mastery does not increase the number of uses per day, and the CR against which you can avoid attacks is determined by your mastery in Shundou. You suffer a -4 penalty to the perform check to avoid attacks with this technique.

If you succeed at avoiding an attack, you can instantly perform Juuryu: Rairi Nettou against the origin of the attack, without having to pay its Cost or meet its Perform Requirements, and you will move to the square behind the attack's source (as per Shundou).

name: JUURYU NAGE: TSURIOTOSHI (TEN-TON STYLE THROW: BODY SLAM)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: E, Mob

This technique can only be performed if the target is your size category or smaller and you are in a grapple with them. Make an opposed grapple check. If you succeed, you deal your unarmed attack damage to the target, plus 3d6 bonus damage. In addition, you can either knock the target prone and initiate a pin OR throw the target up to 10 ft away and leave it prone, dealing 1d6 additional damage.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the bonus damage by 1d6, up to 6d6 total bonus damage.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, M

This technique can be used as part of a charge, and allows you to make an unarmed attack that deals normal damage, sending the target upward a number of feet equal to three times the damage dealt if it fails its save. Once airborne, you may spend a move action to jump, arriving directly behind the target.

While airborne, the target can take no actions involving any movement (even hand seals), and is denied its Dexterity bonus to Defense. If you take no action other than jumping to the target before your next turn, the target will remain airborne until then. Otherwise, it will fall as normal.

Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: None

You gain a +2 bonus to Grapple checks, and a +1 attack bonus to touch attacks while initiating a grapple.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: Mob

You make an efficient, graceful strike against the target, gaining a +1 bonus to the attack roll. You may use your Dexterity bonus to the attack roll instead of your Strength modifier.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: F, Mob

You perform a basic slashing strike, from the groin upwards, gaining a +1 bonus to your damage roll.

name: KENJUTSU: DACHI - BATTOUJUTSU (SWORD ART: STANCE ART OF QUICKDRAW)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 3

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 24

Components: F, Mob

This stance is the culmination of quickdrawing technique, designed to allow you to to perform a series of quick and powerful strikes that break through an opponent's guard.

While in this stance, if your weapon is sheathed before you make a Full Attack, you draw it on the first attack, dealing an additional die of weapon damage with that attack and gaining Kawarimi Defense 1 to all attacks made. You can return the weapon to its sheath as a free action when you finish the Full Attack.

To benefit from this stance, you must wield a single weapon with both hands.

name: KENJUTSU: DACHI - JIGEN RYU (SWORD ART: STANCE - JIGEN RYU)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, Mob

Named after the famed Jigen Ryu school of martial arts, this stance trades speed for power. Before each turn, you must choose whether to attack normally or attack by using this stance.

If you attack using this stance, you can only make a single attack per round, gaining a +2 bonus to damage rolls with it. You can instead choose to attack using a full-round action, increasing the benefit to a +2 bonus to attack and damage for every 5 points of BaB you have (up to +8 at a BaB of +20).

Such an attack can be made as part of a charge.

If the attack misses, the creature you attacked may make an attack of opportunity against you.

Mastery: Step one: Any attack made using this stance gains Kawarimi Defense 1.

Step two (Requires BaB +10): Kawarimi Defense 2. Step three (Requires BaB +20): Kawarimi Defense 3. Material Focus - A held, bladed weapon.

name: KENJUTSU: DACHI - TENKEN (SWORD ART: STANCE - HEAVENLY BLADE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, Mob

You close your eyes and embrace the flow of combat, letting your other senses guide your movements. You gain blindsense that extends 1 ft per level (rounded to the nearest 5 ft unit), and gain a +3 insight bonus to Defense against all creatures within that range.

You become immune to any effect a blind creature would be immune to, but any opponent beyond your blindsense has total concealment against you, and you lose your Dexterity modifier to Defense against their attacks.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: E, F, Mob

Make a single attack with your held weapon. If the attack hits, you deal normal damage and the target is pushed back 5 ft. If the target is pushed back, you may take a 5 ft step towards them for free as part of this technique. A Samurai with at least 2 class levels may substitute this technique for a normal attack when they make a Full Attack (using the same attack bonus as the substituted attack), but only if they chose the Kenjutsu path. If you substitute the technique this way, it cannot be empowered and the Perform Requirements are automatically met.

Empower: Spend 3 Chakra to have the attack deal 1d6 bonus damage, plus 1d6 per 4 levels (up to 5d6).

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: E, F, Mas Mob

Make a single attack with your held weapon. If the attack hits, it deals 1d6 bonus damage. A Samurai with at least 6 class levels may substitute this technique for a normal attack when they make a Full Attack (using the same attack bonus as the substituted attack), but only if they chose the Kenjutsu path. If you substitute the technique this way, it cannot be empowered and the Perform Requirements are automatically met.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the bonus damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per 2 levels or 6d6 total.

Mastery: On hit, you may choose to deal no immediate damage. Instead, the damage is dealt up to a number of rounds later (based on mastery level). If the damage would reduce the target to -1 hp when you hit and choose to delay, the target is paralyzed until it takes damage from any source. Step 1: One round, Step 3: Two rounds, Step 5: Three rounds.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 14 | Successes: 1

Perform: 2 | Perform DC: 13

Components: F, Mob

The basic technique of the iaijutsu style, this technique can only be used if your weapon is sheathed. You make a single attack with the weapon against all creatures in the target square, gaining a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls and dealing damage as though wielding the weapon with two hands. You suffer a -2 penalty to Defense until your next turn.

Can be used as part of a charge, but cannot be used while prone. If you have the Quick Draw feat, this technique can be performed as an attack action.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 2 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 15 | Successes: 2

Perform: 3 | Perform DC: 15

Components: None

This technique is identical to Kenjutsu: Iaido, except it can be used while prone, cannot be used as part of a charge attack, and you do not suffer a Defense penalty after making the attack.

name: KENJUTSU: KESSEN OUGI - HIRYUUSAI (SWORD ART: ABSOLUTE FIGHTING SKILL - FLYING DRAGON SLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: F, Mas Mob

Make one attack per 5 levels (maximum 4), each at your highest attack bonus. Each attack deals half your normal weapon damage on hit, as well as 2 temporary Strength damage, but they cannot score critical hits, nor can you apply sneak attack damage to them. The Strength damage is cumulative from multiple hits, but not from multiple uses of this technique against the same target.

A Samurai with at least 10 class levels may substitute this technique for a normal attack when they make a Full Attack (using the same attack bonus as the substituted attack), but only if they chose the Kenjutsu path, and only once per round. If you substitute the technique this way, the Perform Requirements are automatically met.

This technique can be used once per day.

Mastery: On hit, you may choose to deal no immediate damage. Instead, the damage is dealt up to a number of rounds later (based on mastery level). If the damage would reduce the target to -1 hp when you hit and choose to delay, the target is paralyzed until it takes damage from any source. Step 1: One round, Step 3: Two rounds, Step 5: Three rounds. The second and fourth steps allow you to use this technique an additional time per day.

name: KENJUTSU: KESSEN OUGI - SENMEIKEN (SWORD ART: ABSOLUTE FIGHTING SKILL - BLURRED SWORD)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: F, Mob

You must be under the effects of Speed Rank 2 or greater, and your weapon must be sheathed. Make a single melee attack against all creatures in the area, which deals an additional 2d4 damage, +1d4 per 4 levels (up to 6d4 total). This additional damage is not multiplied on critical hits, and you cannot apply sneak attack damage with these attacks.

After using this technique, the used weapon can be sheathed or left unsheathed (your choice).

area.value: Up to one adjacent square per 3 levels

name: KENJUTSU: KIRITSUKI (SWORD ART: CUT AND THRUST)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: F, Mob

If the charge attack hits, you gain a free Bull Rush attempt against the target, without provoking an attack of opportunity.

name: KENJUTSU: KODACHI NITTOURYU - GOUKU JUUJI (SWORD ART: DUAL KODACHI STYLE - BLAZING CROSS)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: F, Mas, Mob

You must be wielding a light slashing weapon in both hands to use this technique. You make a melee attack with your main hand at a -4 penalty, which deals damage as though you hit with both weapons. On a critical hit, only the main hand's damage it multiplied.

Mastery: The third step grants Kawarimi Defense 1 to the attack.

The fifth step reduces the attack penalty to -2. Material Focus - Two light slashing weapons.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: F, Mob

You perform a basic slashing strike, from the head downward, gaining a +1 bonus to your attack roll.

name: KENJUTSU: NAGETSUKI (SWORD ART: THRUST AND THROW)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: F, Mob

The charge attack deals 1d4 additional piercing damage per 2 levels (up to 5d4), and knocks the target back 1d4 x 5 ft. If the target is of a larger size category than you, it is not knocked back. This technique can be used once per encounter.

name: KENJUTSU: OUGI - MAKEN (SWORD ART: SECRET SKILL - DEMONIC SWORD)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: F, Mob

You pour evil intent into a skilful slash, which ignores all damage reductions and any hardness the target may have. If the target fails its save, it starts bleeding for 1d4+2 rounds, taking 1d6 damage each round until a Treat Injury check (DC 25) is performed, or until it is healed for at least 1 HP by a medical technique. If the used weapon was not of mastercraft quality, it is destroyed beyond repair.

name: KENJUTSU: OUGI - SHINKEN (SWORD ART: SECRET SKILL DIVINE SWORD)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 5

Perform: 16 | Perform DC: 32

Components: F, Mob

You make a graceful yet powerful strike, against which the target loses its Dexterity bonus to Defense. On hit, the target seems completely unaffected, but it numb to any physical pain for 1 round. On your next turn, a cut suddenly appears on the subject, dealing 3d6 slashing damage, +1 per level (up to 3d6+15) that bypasses all damage reductions. In addition, the target must make a massive damage save. This attack has a critical of (20, x2).

The target does not suffer any pain from the damage, even if it dies. If your weapon was not at least of mastercraft +2 quality, it is destroyed beyond repair.

name: KENJUTSU: OUGI - SHIRYUUGA (SWORD ART: SECRET SKILL PIERCING DRAGON FANG)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 3

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, Mob

You make an attack using deceptive movements. Make an unarmed attack or melee weapon attack, gaining a +2 bonus to attack and damage. The attack gains Kawarimi Defense 1 per 6 levels (up to 3).

name: KENJUTSU: OUGI - ZANKENTEKI (SWORD ART: SECRET SKILL HAND CUTTER)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: F, Mob

You perform an Iaido-like attack, which deals damage as though holding the weapon with both hands, and deals an additional 1d6 bonus damage per 2 levels (up to 4d6). If hit, the target suffers 1d4 temporary Dexterity damage for 5 minutes (Fortitude negates). Each time the target is attacked with this technique again within a 24 hour period grants it a cumulative +2 bonus to the save.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 12 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 11

Components: F, Mob

You perform a basic cut from the shoulder to the hip, gaining a +1 bonus to your attack roll, but suffering a -1 penalty to your damage roll.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: F, Mob

You attack with your held weapon, gaining an attack of opportunity against the same target at a -5 penalty if the first attack hits, provided you are still able to make an attack of opportunity this round.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: F, Mob

You make a simple thrusting attack, gaining a +1 bonus to your critical threat range for the attack, which does not stack with other non-permanent increases to critical threat range.

name: KENJUTSU: URASHAMEN-UCHI (SWORD ART: REVERSED DIAGONAL CUT)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 1

Learn DC: 12 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 11

Components: F, Mob

You perform a basic cut from the hip to the shoulder, taking a -1 penalty to attack, but gaining a +1 bonus to damage.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: Mas, Mob

This technique is learned for a specific stance, and can only be used while in the stance it was learned for. It can be learned multiple times, choosing a different stance to apply it to each time. You gain a +2 competence bonus to the Learn check if you learn this technique while you already know it. Mastery applies only to a single instance of the technique: it must be learned separately for each stance.

You make a convincing feint, provoking an attack of opportunity from the target against which you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Defense. If the target misses, you may make an attack of opportunity against them.

Mastery: Each step lowers the armor check penalty of your worn armor by 1 when determining the chance to fail to perform this technique.

The first, third and fifth steps each increase the circumstance bonus to Defense by +1.

Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: Mas, Mob

You make an unarmed attack, gaining a +2 bonus to the attack roll, and dealing 1d4 bonus damage per 3 levels (maximum 4d4), which is not multiplied on critical hits. If the attack scored a critical hit, or if the attack roll exceeded the target's massive damage threshold, it is dazed for 1 round, which can be saved against.
